papers.title: Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization for Effective and Efficient Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) poses a significant challenge in action recognition, requiring the adaptation of a model from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Despite recent advances, existing VUDA methods often fall short of fully supervised performance, a key reason being the prevalence of static and uninformative backgrounds that exacerbate domain shifts. Additionally, prior approaches largely overlook computational efficiency, limiting real-world adoption. To address these issues, we propose Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization (LMFT) for VUDA. LMFT tokenizes video frames into patch tokens and learns to discard low-motion, redundant tokens, primarily corresponding to background regions, while retaining motion-rich, action-relevant tokens for adaptation. Extensive experiments on three standard VUDA benchmarks across 21 domain adaptation settings show that our VUDA framework with LMFT achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing computational overhead. LMFT thus enables VUDA that is both effective and computationally efficient.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习的运动聚焦分词方法，通过丢弃低运动冗余令牌提升视频无监督域适应的效果与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频无监督域适应（VUDA）在动作识别中面临静态背景加剧域偏移的问题，且现有方法忽视计算效率，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何同时提升VUDA的适应性能和计算效率，减少背景干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态和无信息背景是域偏移的主要来源，且现有方法计算开销大。
analysis.method: 提出可学习运动聚焦分词（LMFT），将视频帧分词为补丁令牌，学习丢弃低运动、冗余的令牌（主要对应背景区域），保留运动丰富、与动作相关的令牌用于域适应。
contributions: 提出LMFT方法，通过丢弃背景令牌提升VUDA性能并降低计算开销。
在三个标准VUDA基准的21个域适应设置上取得最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个标准VUDA基准的21个域适应设置上进行实验，达到最先进性能并显著降低计算开销。
limitations: 可能对运动模糊或快速运动的场景敏感。
未讨论对长视频或复杂动作的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习的运动聚焦分词方法，通过丢弃低运动冗余令牌提升视频无监督域适应的效果与效率。

papers.title: Unmixing-Guided Spatial-Spectral Mamba with Clustering Tokens for Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Although hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is critical for supporting various environmental applications, it is a challenging task due to the spectral-mixture effect, the spatial-spectral heterogeneity and the difficulty to preserve class boundaries and details. This letter presents a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba with clustering tokens for improved HSI classification, with the following contributions. First, to disentangle the spectral mixture effect in HSI for improved pattern discovery, we design a novel spectral unmixing network that not only automatically learns endmembers and abundance maps from HSI but also accounts for endmember variabilities. Second, to generate Mamba token sequences, based on the clusters defined by abundance maps, we design an efficient Top-\textit{K} token selection strategy to adaptively sequence the tokens for improved representational capability. Third, to improve spatial-spectral feature learning and detail preservation, based on the Top-\textit{K} token sequences, we design a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba module that greatly improves traditional Mamba models in terms of token learning and sequencing. Fourth, to learn simultaneously the endmember-abundance patterns and classification labels, a multi-task scheme is designed for model supervision, leading to a new unmixing-classification framework that outputs not only accurate classification maps but also a comprehensive spectral-library and abundance maps. Comparative experiments on four HSI datasets demonstrate that our model can greatly outperform the other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/GSIL-UCalgary/Unmixing_guided_Mamba.git

analysis.tldr: 提出一种解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba模型，通过聚类令牌和端元变异性处理提升高光谱图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱混合效应、空间-光谱异质性以及类别边界和细节难以保持的挑战，现有方法在这些方面表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解耦光谱混合效应、处理空间-光谱异质性并保持分类边界和细节，以提升高光谱图像分类精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计光谱解混网络自动学习端元和丰度图并考虑端元变异性；基于丰度图聚类提出Top-K令牌选择策略生成Mamba令牌序列；设计解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba模块改进令牌学习与排序；采用多任务学习同时优化解混和分类。
contributions: 提出解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba框架，结合光谱解混与Mamba模型进行HSI分类。
设计考虑端元变异性的光谱解混网络和基于丰度图聚类的Top-K令牌选择策略。
提出多任务学习框架同时输出分类图、光谱库和丰度图。
analysis.experiments: 在四个HSI数据集上对比实验，模型显著优于其他最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量丰度图聚类结果。
多任务学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba模型，通过聚类令牌和端元变异性处理提升高光谱图像分类性能。

papers.title: Cross-Cultural Value Awareness in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in recent years has been accompanied by growing fairness concerns due to their propensity to reinforce harmful societal stereotypes. While significant attention has been paid to such fairness concerns in the context of social biases, relatively little prior work has examined the presence of stereotypes in LVLMs related to cultural contexts such as religion, nationality, and socioeconomic status. In this work, we aim to narrow this gap by investigating how cultural contexts depicted in images influence the judgments LVLMs make about a person's moral, ethical, and political values. We conduct a multi-dimensional analysis of such value judgments in five popular LVLMs using counterfactual image sets, which depict the same person across different cultural contexts. Our evaluation framework diagnoses LVLM awareness of cultural value differences through the use of Moral Foundations Theory, lexical analyses, and the sensitivity of generated values to depicted cultural contexts.

analysis.tldr: 探究大型视觉语言模型在图像文化语境下对人物价值观判断中的刻板印象与公平性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在快速部署中暴露出强化有害社会刻板印象的公平性问题，但现有研究主要关注社会偏见，对宗教、国籍、社会经济地位等文化语境中的刻板印象关注不足。
analysis.problem: LVLMs在图像中不同文化语境下对人物道德、伦理和政治价值观的判断是否存在文化刻板印象，以及模型对文化价值差异的感知程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用反事实图像集（同一人物在不同文化语境下），结合道德基础理论、词汇分析和生成值对文化语境的敏感性，对五个流行LVLMs进行多维分析。
contributions: 首次系统研究LVLMs在文化语境（宗教、国籍、社会经济地位）下的价值观刻板印象。
提出基于反事实图像集和道德基础理论的评估框架，用于诊断LVLMs的文化价值感知能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估五个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
反事实图像集可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的文化多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探究大型视觉语言模型在图像文化语境下对人物价值观判断中的刻板印象与公平性问题。

papers.title: Sequential KV Cache Compression via Probabilistic Language Tries: Beyond the Per-Vector Shannon Limit
papers.abstract: Recent work on KV cache quantization, culminating in TurboQuant, has approached the Shannon entropy limit for per-vector compression of transformer key-value caches. We observe that this limit applies to a strictly weaker problem than the one that actually matters: compressing the KV cache as a sequence. The tokens stored in a KV cache are not arbitrary floating-point data -- they are samples from the exact formal language the model was trained on, and the model is by construction a near-optimal predictor of that language. We introduce sequential KV compression, a two-layer architecture that exploits this structure. The first layer, probabilistic prefix deduplication, identifies semantically equivalent shared prefixes across sessions using the trie metric d_T(s, s') = -log_2 P_M(s ^ s') from Probabilistic Language Tries (PLTs). The second layer, predictive delta coding, stores only the residual of each new KV vector from the model's own prediction of it, achieving a per-token entropy bound of H(KV_{i+1} | KV_{<=i}) <= H(token_{i+1} | token_{<=i}). We prove that at typical language model perplexity -- approximately 10-20 for fluent English text -- this bound is 3.3-4.3 bits on average per token position, compared to TurboQuant's 3 bits per vector component (with typical attention heads having 64-128 components). The theoretical compression ratio over TurboQuant is approximately 914,000x at the Shannon limit. Even at 1000x above the entropy floor -- a deliberately pessimistic worst-case overhead, two orders of magnitude above the 2-5x typical of practical source coders -- the ratio remains approximately 914x over TurboQuant, with compression improving rather than degrading as context length grows. The two layers are orthogonal and compose with existing per-vector quantization methods including TurboQuant.

analysis.tldr: 提出顺序KV缓存压缩方法，利用语言模型预测性实现远超逐向量Shannon极限的压缩比。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KV缓存量化方法（如TurboQuant）仅达到逐向量压缩的Shannon极限，但忽略了KV缓存作为序列的结构特性——它们来自模型训练的形式语言，且模型本身是近最优预测器。
analysis.problem: 如何利用KV缓存的序列结构和语言模型的预测能力，实现比逐向量量化更高效的压缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: KV缓存中的token并非任意浮点数据，而是来自模型训练的形式语言样本，模型本身是近最优预测器。
analysis.method: 两层架构：第一层概率前缀去重，利用概率语言trie度量识别跨会话的语义等价共享前缀；第二层预测差分编码，仅存储每个新KV向量与模型预测的残差。
contributions: 提出顺序KV压缩概念，利用语言模型预测性突破逐向量Shannon极限。
设计两层压缩架构（概率前缀去重+预测差分编码），理论压缩比可达TurboQuant的914,000倍。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于语言模型困惑度10-20的假设，实际效果可能因模型和任务而异。
两层架构与现有量化方法的正交性需进一步实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出顺序KV缓存压缩方法，利用语言模型预测性实现远超逐向量Shannon极限的压缩比。

papers.title: I Walk the Line: Examining the Role of Gestalt Continuity in Object Binding for Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Object binding is a foundational process in visual cognition, during which low-level perceptual features are joined into object representations. Binding has been considered a fundamental challenge for neural networks, and a major milestone on the way to artificial models with flexible visual intelligence. Recently, several investigations have demonstrated evidence that binding mechanisms emerge in pretrained vision models, enabling them to associate portions of an image that contain an object. The question remains: how are these models binding objects together? In this work, we investigate whether vision models rely on the principle of Gestalt continuity to perform object binding, over and above other principles like similarity and proximity. Using synthetic datasets, we demonstrate that binding probes are sensitive to continuity across a wide range of pretrained vision transformers. Next, we uncover particular attention heads that track continuity, and show that these heads generalize across datasets. Finally, we ablate these attention heads, and show that they often contribute to producing representations that encode object binding.

analysis.tldr: 研究视觉Transformer中格式塔连续性原则对物体绑定的作用，发现特定注意力头追踪连续性并影响物体表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 物体绑定是视觉认知的基础，但神经网络如何实现绑定机制尚不明确，理解其原理有助于构建更灵活的视觉智能模型。
analysis.problem: 探究预训练视觉Transformer是否依赖格式塔连续性原则进行物体绑定，并识别相关注意力头。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用合成数据集测试绑定探针对连续性的敏感性，通过注意力头分析识别追踪连续性的头部，并进行消融实验验证其贡献。
contributions: 证明预训练视觉Transformer的绑定探针对格式塔连续性敏感。
识别出追踪连续性的特定注意力头，并展示其跨数据集泛化能力。
通过消融实验表明这些注意力头对物体绑定表征有贡献。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用合成数据集，可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
未探讨其他格式塔原则（如相似性、邻近性）与连续性的交互作用。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究视觉Transformer中格式塔连续性原则对物体绑定的作用，发现特定注意力头追踪连续性并影响物体表征。

papers.title: Can Coding Agents Be General Agents?
papers.abstract: As coding agents have seen rapid capability and adoption gains, users are applying them to general tasks beyond software engineering. In this post, we investigate whether coding agents can successfully generalize to end-to-end business process automation. We identify gaps in current evaluations, and conduct a case study to evaluate a coding agent on practical business tasks in an open-core Enterprise Resource Planning system. We find that the agent reliably completes simple tasks but exhibits characteristic failures on complex tasks, suggesting that bridging domain logic and code execution is a key bottleneck to generalizability.

analysis.tldr: 编码代理在简单业务任务上表现可靠，但在复杂任务中因领域逻辑与代码执行之间的鸿沟而失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 编码代理在软件工程领域快速进步，用户开始将其应用于更广泛的通用任务，但现有评估缺乏对端到端业务流程自动化的关注。
analysis.problem: 编码代理能否成功泛化到端到端业务流程自动化，以及其泛化能力的瓶颈是什么。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编码代理在简单任务上可靠完成，但在复杂任务上表现出特征性失败，表明领域逻辑与代码执行之间的桥接是泛化能力的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 通过案例研究，在开源企业资源计划（ERP）系统中评估编码代理在实际业务任务上的表现。
contributions: 识别了当前编码代理评估在业务流程自动化方面的空白
通过案例研究揭示了编码代理在复杂业务任务中的失败模式，指出领域逻辑与代码执行的鸿沟是泛化瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

未提供定量实验结果，仅定性分析失败模式

papers.title: New Hybrid Fine-Tuning Paradigm for LLMs: Algorithm Design and Convergence Analysis Framework
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) typically involves either full fine-tuning, which updates all model parameters, or Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), which adjusts a small subset of parameters. However, both approaches have inherent limitations: full fine-tuning is computationally expensive, while PEFT often struggles to learn new knowledge and exhibits suboptimal performance. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel hybrid fine-tuning approach that jointly updates both LLMs and PEFT modules using a combination of zeroth-order and first-order optimization methods. To analyze our new algorithm, we develop a theoretical framework centered on the concept of hybrid smoothness condition, which accounts for the heterogeneous nature of the optimization landscape in joint LLM and PEFT training. We derive a rigorous convergence analysis for the convergence of reshuffling-type SGD algorithm under multiple learning rates and demonstrate its effectiveness through extensive empirical studies across various downstream tasks and model architectures. On the practical side, our results demonstrate consistent performance improvement, making the approach a viable solution for large-scale language model fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合零阶和一阶优化的混合微调范式，并建立基于混合平滑条件的收敛分析框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 全量微调计算成本高，参数高效微调（PEFT）学习新知识能力有限且性能次优，亟需一种兼顾效率与效果的混合微调方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种混合微调算法，同时更新LLM和PEFT模块，并为其提供严格的收敛性理论保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合微调方法，联合更新LLM和PEFT模块，采用零阶和一阶优化组合；基于混合平滑条件建立理论框架，推导重排型SGD在多重学习率下的收敛性。
contributions: 提出一种新的混合微调范式，结合零阶和一阶优化，同时更新LLM和PEFT模块。
建立基于混合平滑条件的理论框架，并推导重排型SGD在多重学习率下的收敛分析。
analysis.experiments: 在多种下游任务和模型架构上进行实证研究，结果显示一致的性能提升。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖于特定的平滑假设，实际场景中可能不完全满足。
混合优化策略的超参数调优可能增加实践复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: HealthAdminBench: Evaluating Computer-Use Agents on Healthcare Administration Tasks
papers.abstract: Healthcare administration accounts for over $1 trillion in annual spending, making it a promising target for LLM-based computer-use agents (CUAs). While clinical applications of LLMs have received significant attention, no benchmark exists for evaluating CUAs on end-to-end administrative workflows. To address this gap, we introduce HealthAdminBench, a benchmark comprising four realistic GUI environments: an EHR, two payer portals, and a fax system, and 135 expert-defined tasks spanning three administrative task types: Prior Authorization, Appeals and Denials Management, and Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Order Processing. Each task is decomposed into fine-grained, verifiable subtasks, yielding 1,698 evaluation points. We evaluate seven agent configurations under multiple prompting and observation settings and find that, despite strong subtask performance, end-to-end reliability remains low: the best-performing agent (Claude Opus 4.6 CUA) achieves only 36.3 percent task success, while GPT-5.4 CUA attains the highest subtask success rate (82.8 percent). These results reveal a substantial gap between current agent capabilities and the demands of real-world administrative workflows. HealthAdminBench provides a rigorous foundation for evaluating progress toward safe and reliable automation of healthcare administrative workflows.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向医疗管理任务的计算机使用智能体基准，揭示当前智能体端到端可靠性不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗管理年支出超1万亿美元，是LLM计算机使用智能体的重要应用场景，但缺乏端到端工作流的评测基准。
analysis.problem: 现有基准未覆盖医疗管理领域的完整行政工作流，无法评估智能体在真实GUI环境中的端到端任务完成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳智能体（Claude Opus 4.6 CUA）任务成功率仅36.3%，而子任务成功率最高达82.8%，表明子任务能力与端到端可靠性之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含4个真实GUI环境（EHR、两个支付门户、传真系统）和135个专家定义任务的基准，任务分解为细粒度可验证子任务，共1698个评估点。
contributions: 首个针对医疗管理行政工作流的计算机使用智能体基准HealthAdminBench
系统评估7种智能体配置，揭示当前智能体端到端可靠性不足
analysis.experiments: 在HealthAdminBench上评估7种智能体配置，最佳智能体任务成功率36.3%，最高子任务成功率82.8%。
limitations: 基准环境可能无法完全模拟真实医疗系统的复杂性和变异性
仅评估了有限数量的智能体配置，未涵盖所有可能方法
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向医疗管理任务的计算机使用智能体基准，揭示当前智能体端到端可靠性不足。

papers.title: A Hybrid Intelligent Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Condition Monitoring of Industrial Systems
papers.abstract: Hybrid approaches that combine data-driven learning with physics-based insight have shown promise for improving the reliability of industrial condition monitoring. This work develops a hybrid condition monitoring framework that integrates primary sensor measurements, lagged temporal features, and physics-informed residuals derived from nominal surrogate models. Two hybrid integration strategies are examined. The first is a feature-level fusion approach that augments the input space with residual and temporal information. The second is a model-level ensemble approach in which machine learning classifiers trained on different feature types are combined at the decision level. Both hybrid approaches of the condition monitoring framework are evaluated on a continuous stirred-tank reactor (CSTR) benchmark using several machine learning models and ensemble configurations. Both feature-level and model-level hybridization improve diagnostic accuracy relative to single-source baselines, with the best model-level ensemble achieving a 2.9\% improvement over the best baseline ensemble. To assess predictive reliability, conformal prediction is applied to quantify coverage, prediction-set size, and abstention behavior. The results show that hybrid integration enhances uncertainty management, producing smaller and well-calibrated prediction sets at matched coverage levels. These findings demonstrate that lightweight physics-informed residuals, temporal augmentation, and ensemble learning can be combined effectively to improve both accuracy and decision reliability in nonlinear industrial systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合智能框架，融合物理残差与时间特征，提升工业系统状态监测的准确性与不确定性管理。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业状态监测中，纯数据驱动方法缺乏物理可解释性，而纯物理模型难以适应复杂非线性系统，混合方法有望结合两者优势提升可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合物理信息与数据驱动模型，在提高诊断精度的同时量化预测不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征级与模型级混合策略均优于单源基线；模型级集成最佳组合比最佳基线集成提升2.9%准确率；共形预测显示混合集成产生更小且校准良好的预测集。
analysis.method: 提出混合框架，集成主传感器测量、滞后时间特征和基于名义代理模型的物理残差；探索特征级融合（输入空间增强）和模型级集成（决策层组合）两种策略。
contributions: 提出结合物理残差、时间特征与机器学习的混合状态监测框架
在CSTR基准上验证特征级与模型级混合策略均提升诊断准确率
应用共形预测评估不确定性，证明混合集成改善预测集校准性与大小
analysis.experiments: 在连续搅拌釜反应器（CSTR）基准上评估，使用多种机器学习模型和集成配置，比较混合方法与单源基线。
limitations: 仅在一个CSTR基准上验证，泛化性需更多工业场景测试
物理残差依赖名义代理模型，模型误差可能影响性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合智能框架，融合物理残差与时间特征，提升工业系统状态监测的准确性与不确定性管理。

papers.title: Neuro-Oracle: A Trajectory-Aware Agentic RAG Framework for Interpretable Epilepsy Surgical Prognosis
papers.abstract: Predicting post-surgical seizure outcomes in pharmacoresistant epilepsy is a clinical challenge. Conventional deep-learning approaches operate on static, single-timepoint pre-operative scans, omitting longitudinal morphological changes. We propose \emph{Neuro-Oracle}, a three-stage framework that: (i) distils pre-to-post-operative MRI changes into a compact 512-dimensional trajectory vector using a 3D Siamese contrastive encoder; (ii) retrieves historically similar surgical trajectories from a population archive via nearest-neighbour search; and (iii) synthesises a natural-language prognosis grounded in the retrieved evidence using a quantized Llama-3-8B reasoning agent. Evaluations are conducted on the public EPISURG dataset ($N{=}268$ longitudinally paired cases) using five-fold stratified cross-validation. Since ground-truth seizure-freedom scores are unavailable, we utilize a clinical proxy label based on the resection type. We acknowledge that the network representations may potentially learn the anatomical features of the resection cavities (i.e., temporal versus non-temporal locations) rather than true prognostic morphometry. Our current evaluation thus serves mainly as a proof-of-concept for the trajectory-aware retrieval architecture. Trajectory-based classifiers achieve AUC values between 0.834 and 0.905, compared with 0.793 for a single-timepoint ResNet-50 baseline. The Neuro-Oracle agent (M5) matches the AUC of purely discriminative trajectory classifiers (0.867) while producing structured justifications with zero observed hallucinations under our audit protocol. A Siamese Diversity Ensemble (M6) of trajectory-space classifiers attains an AUC of 0.905 without language-model overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出Neuro-Oracle框架，利用术前-术后MRI轨迹向量和检索增强生成实现可解释的癫痫手术预后。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统深度学习方法仅使用静态单时间点术前扫描，忽略了纵向形态变化，难以准确预测药物难治性癫痫术后结果。
analysis.problem: 如何利用术前-术后MRI的纵向变化信息，实现可解释且准确的癫痫手术预后预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出网络表示可能学习切除腔的解剖特征（如颞叶与非颞叶位置）而非真正的预后形态学，当前评估主要作为轨迹感知检索架构的概念验证。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 3D孪生对比编码器将术前-术后MRI变化蒸馏为512维轨迹向量；2) 通过最近邻搜索从群体档案中检索历史相似手术轨迹；3) 使用量化Llama-3-8B推理代理基于检索证据合成自然语言预后。
contributions: 提出轨迹感知的检索增强生成框架，结合对比学习和语言模型实现可解释预后。
在EPISURG数据集上验证了轨迹分类器优于单时间点基线，且语言代理在零幻觉审计下达到相当性能。
analysis.experiments: 在EPISURG数据集（N=268纵向配对病例）上使用五折分层交叉验证，轨迹分类器AUC 0.834-0.905，单时间点ResNet-50基线AUC 0.793，Neuro-Oracle代理AUC 0.867，集成模型AUC 0.905。
limitations: 缺乏真实癫痫自由评分，使用基于切除类型的临床代理标签。
网络可能学习切除腔解剖特征而非真正预后形态学，当前仅为概念验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Neuro-Oracle框架，利用术前-术后MRI轨迹向量和检索增强生成实现可解释的癫痫手术预后。

papers.title: BLPR: Robust License Plate Recognition under Viewpoint and Illumination Variations via Confidence-Driven VLM Fallback
papers.abstract: Robust license plate recognition in unconstrained environments remains a significant challenge, particularly in underrepresented regions with limited data availability and unique visual characteristics, such as Bolivia. Recognition accuracy in real-world conditions is often degraded by factors such as illumination changes and viewpoint distortion. To address these challenges, we introduce BLPR, a novel deep learning-based License Plate Detection and Recognition (LPDR) framework specifically designed for Bolivian license plates. The proposed system follows a two-stage pipeline where a YOLO-based detector is pretrained on synthetic data generated in Blender to simulate extreme perspectives and lighting conditions, and subsequently fine-tuned on street-level data collected in La Paz, Bolivia. Detected plates are geometrically rectified and passed to a character recognition model. To improve robustness under ambiguous scenarios, a lightweight vision-language model (Gemma3 4B) is selectively triggered as a confidence-based fallback mechanism. The proposed framework further leverages synthetic-to-real domain adaptation to improve robustness under diverse real-world conditions. We also introduce the first publicly available Bolivian LPDR dataset, enabling evaluation under diverse viewpoint and illumination conditions. The system achieves a character-level recognition accuracy of 89.6% on real-world data, demonstrating its effectiveness for deployment in challenging urban environments. Our project is publicly available at https://github.com/EdwinTSalcedo/BLPR.

analysis.tldr: 提出BLPR框架，通过YOLO检测器、几何校正和置信度驱动的VLM回退机制，实现玻利维亚车牌在视角和光照变化下的鲁棒识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 在非约束环境下，车牌识别受光照变化和视角畸变影响严重，尤其对于数据稀缺且视觉特征独特的地区（如玻利维亚），现有方法鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决玻利维亚车牌在视角和光照变化下的鲁棒检测与识别问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：YOLO检测器在Blender合成数据上预训练并微调于真实街景数据；检测到的车牌经几何校正后输入字符识别模型；在低置信度场景下，轻量级视觉语言模型（Gemma3 4B）作为回退机制被选择性触发。
contributions: 提出BLPR框架，结合合成数据预训练、几何校正和置信度驱动的VLM回退机制，提升车牌识别鲁棒性。
发布首个公开的玻利维亚车牌数据集，支持视角和光照变化下的评估。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据上达到89.6%的字符级识别准确率。
limitations: 仅针对玻利维亚车牌，泛化性未验证。
VLM回退机制可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BLPR框架，通过YOLO检测器、几何校正和置信度驱动的VLM回退机制，实现玻利维亚车牌在视角和光照变化下的鲁棒识别。

papers.title: GLEaN: A Text-to-image Bias Detection Approach for Public Comprehension
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) models, and their encoded biases, increasingly shape the visual media the public encounters. While researchers have produced a rich body of work on bias measurement, auditing, and mitigation in T2I systems, those methods largely target technical stakeholders, leaving a gap in public legibility. We introduce GLEaN (Generative Likeness Evaluation at N-Scale), a portrait-based explainability pipeline designed to make T2I model biases visually understandable to a broad audience. GLEaN comprises three stages: automated large-scale image generation from identity prompts, facial landmark-based filtering and spatial alignment, and median-pixel composition that distills a model's central tendency into a single representative portrait. The resulting composites require no statistical background to interpret; a viewer can see, at a glance, who a model 'imagines' when prompted with 'a doctor' versus a 'felon.' We demonstrate GLEaN on Stable Diffusion XL across 40 social and occupational identity prompts, producing composites that reproduce documented biases and surface new associations between skin tone and predicted emotion. We find in a between-subjects user study (N = 291) that GLEaN portraits communicate biases as effectively as conventional data tables, but require significantly less viewing time. Because the method relies solely on generated outputs, it can also be replicated on any black-box and closed-weight systems without access to model internals. GLEaN offers a scalable, model-agnostic approach to bias explainability, purpose-built for public comprehension, and is publicly available at https://github.com/cultureiolab/GLEaN.

analysis.tldr: GLEaN 通过生成代表性肖像，让公众直观理解文本到图像模型中的偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 T2I 模型偏见检测方法主要面向技术用户，缺乏面向公众的可解释性工具。
analysis.problem: 如何让没有统计背景的公众直观理解 T2I 模型中的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GLEaN 管道：自动生成身份提示的大规模图像，基于面部标志过滤和对齐，通过中值像素合成生成代表性肖像。
contributions: 提出面向公众的 T2I 模型偏见可视化方法 GLEaN
用户研究表明 GLEaN 肖像与传统数据表效果相当但耗时更少
analysis.experiments: 在 Stable Diffusion XL 上对 40 个身份提示进行演示，并通过 291 人的用户研究验证有效性。
limitations: 仅针对肖像类偏见，可能不适用于其他类型偏见
依赖面部检测和对齐，可能对非正面或遮挡图像效果不佳
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GLEaN 通过生成代表性肖像，让公众直观理解文本到图像模型中的偏见。

papers.title: K-STEMIT: Knowledge-Informed Spatio-Temporal Efficient Multi-Branch Graph Neural Network for Subsurface Stratigraphy Thickness Estimation from Radar Data
papers.abstract: Subsurface stratigraphy contains important spatio-temporal information about accumulation, deformation, and layer formation in polar ice sheets. In particular, variations in internal ice layer thickness provide valuable constraints for snow mass balance estimation and projections of ice sheet change. Although radar sensors can capture these layered structures as depth-resolved radargrams, convolutional neural networks applied directly to radar images are often sensitive to speckle noise and acquisition artifacts. In addition, purely data-driven methods may underuse physical knowledge, leading to unrealistic thickness estimates under spatial or temporal extrapolation. To address these challenges, we develop K-STEMIT, a novel knowledge-informed, efficient, multi-branch spatio-temporal graph neural network that combines a geometric framework for spatial learning with temporal convolution to capture temporal dynamics, and incorporates physical data synchronized from the Model Atmospheric Regional physical weather model. An adaptive feature fusion strategy is employed to dynamically combine features learned from different branches. Extensive experiments have been conducted to compare K-STEMIT against current state-of-the-art methods in both knowledge-informed and non-knowledge-informed settings, as well as other existing methods. Results show that K-STEMIT consistently achieves the highest accuracy while maintaining near-optimal efficiency. Most notably, incorporating adaptive feature fusion and physical priors reduces the root mean-squared error by 21.01% with negligible additional cost compared to its conventional multi-branch variants. Additionally, our proposed K-STEMIT achieves consistently lower per-year relative MAE, enabling reliable, continuous spatiotemporal assessment of snow accumulation variability across large spatial regions.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识引导的时空高效多分支图神经网络K-STEMIT，用于从雷达数据估计地下地层厚度，融合物理先验与自适应特征融合，显著提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 地下地层包含极地冰盖积累、变形和层形成的时空信息，冰层厚度变化对雪质量平衡估计和冰盖变化预测至关重要。现有雷达图像CNN方法易受散斑噪声和采集伪影影响，纯数据驱动方法在时空外推时可能产生不切实际的厚度估计。
analysis.problem: 如何从雷达数据中准确估计地下地层厚度，同时利用物理知识提高时空外推的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: K-STEMIT：结合几何框架进行空间学习与时间卷积捕捉时间动态的多分支时空图神经网络，并融入从物理天气模型同步的物理数据，采用自适应特征融合策略动态组合不同分支特征。
contributions: 提出知识引导的时空高效多分支图神经网络K-STEMIT，融合物理先验与自适应特征融合。
在知识引导和非知识引导设置下，K-STEMIT均达到最高精度且保持近最优效率，自适应融合与物理先验使RMSE降低21.01%。
analysis.experiments: 与当前最先进方法在知识引导和非知识引导设置下进行对比实验，K-STEMIT持续达到最高精度，且每年相对MAE更低，支持大空间区域的可靠连续时空评估。
limitations: 可能依赖特定物理模型（如MAR天气模型），泛化到其他区域需重新校准。
多分支结构可能增加模型复杂度，尽管效率近最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识引导的时空高效多分支图神经网络K-STEMIT，用于从雷达数据估计地下地层厚度，融合物理先验与自适应特征融合，显著提升精度。

papers.title: Does Your VFM Speak Plant? The Botanical Grammar of Vision Foundation Models for Object Detection
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models (VFMs) offer the promise of zero-shot object detection without task-specific training data, yet their performance in complex agricultural scenes remains highly sensitive to text prompt construction. We present a systematic prompt optimization framework evaluating four open-vocabulary detectors -- YOLO World, SAM3, Grounding DINO, and OWLv2 -- for cowpea flower and pod detection across synthetic and real field imagery. We decompose prompts into eight axes and conduct one-factor-at-a-time analysis followed by combinatorial optimization, revealing that models respond divergently to prompt structure: conditions that optimize one architecture can collapse another. Applying model-specific combinatorial prompts yields substantial gains over a naive species-name baseline, including +0.357 mAP@0.5 for YOLO World and +0.362 mAP@0.5 for OWLv2 on synthetic cowpea flower data. To evaluate cross-task generalization, we use an LLM to translate the discovered axis structure to a morphologically distinct target -- cowpea pods -- and compare against prompting using the discovered optimal structures from synthetic flower data. Crucially, prompt structures optimized exclusively on synthetic data transfer effectively to real-world fields: synthetic-pipeline prompts match or exceed those discovered on labeled real data for the majority of model-object combinations (flower: 0.374 vs. 0.353 for YOLO World; pod: 0.429 vs. 0.371 for SAM3). Our findings demonstrate that prompt engineering can substantially close the gap between zero-shot VFMs and supervised detectors without requiring manual annotation, and that optimal prompts are model-specific, non-obvious, and transferable across domains.

analysis.tldr: 视觉基础模型在农业目标检测中性能高度依赖文本提示结构，本文提出系统化提示优化框架，发现最优提示是模型特异、非直观且可跨域迁移的。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉基础模型在复杂农业场景中的零样本目标检测性能对文本提示构建高度敏感，但缺乏系统化的提示优化方法，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化地优化文本提示结构，以提升视觉基础模型在农业目标检测中的零样本性能，并验证提示的可迁移性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同模型对提示结构响应存在分歧：优化一个架构的提示条件可能导致另一个架构性能崩溃；提示结构可从合成数据迁移到真实场景。
analysis.method: 将提示分解为八个轴，进行单因素分析和组合优化，并使用LLM将发现的轴结构迁移到形态不同的目标。
contributions: 提出了一个系统化的提示优化框架，分解提示为八个轴并进行组合优化。
揭示了最优提示是模型特异、非直观且可跨域迁移的，并验证了从合成数据到真实场景的迁移有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实田间图像上评估了四个开放词汇检测器（YOLO World、SAM3、Grounding DINO、OWLv2）对豇豆花和豆荚的检测，使用mAP@0.5指标。
limitations: 仅针对农业场景中的两种目标（花和豆荚），泛化性需进一步验证。
提示优化依赖合成数据，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景的变异性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉基础模型在农业目标检测中性能高度依赖文本提示结构，本文提出系统化提示优化框架，发现最优提示是模型特异、非直观且可跨域迁移的。

papers.title: Improving Medical VQA through Trajectory-Aware Process Supervision
papers.abstract: Reasoning capabilities are crucial for reliable medical visual question answering (VQA); however, existing datasets rarely include reasoning explanations. We address this by generating reasoning trajectories for six medical VQA benchmarks using the COMCTS algorithm with open-source vision-language models, with an LLM serving as the verification judge. Building on these generated datasets, we propose a two-stage training framework: supervised fine-tuning followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a novel process-based reward. While standard approaches rely solely on exact-match rewards for final answers, we introduce a trajectory-aware reward that measures the similarity between generated and ground-truth reasoning processes. Specifically, we embed reasoning steps using sentence transformers and compute the Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) distance between the resulting vector sequences. Experiments across six benchmarks demonstrate that combining the DTW-based process reward with exact-match reward consistently outperforms SFT-only training, raising mean accuracy from 0.598 to 0.689, mean BERTScore from 0.845 to 0.881, and mean ROUGE-L from 0.665 to 0.748. Our results highlight the importance of process supervision in training reasoning-capable medical VLMs. We make our code and generated reasoning datasets publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MICCAI-R1-MED-VQA-code-B14B/

analysis.tldr: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与GRPO训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉问答需要可靠的推理能力，但现有数据集缺乏推理解释，导致模型难以学习正确的推理过程。
analysis.problem: 如何生成医学VQA的推理轨迹并利用过程监督训练模型，以提升推理能力和回答准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅使用最终答案的精确匹配奖励不足以引导模型学习正确的推理过程，需要过程监督。
analysis.method: 使用COMCTS算法和开源VLM生成推理轨迹，LLM作为验证裁判；提出两阶段训练框架：SFT后接GRPO，其中奖励函数结合精确匹配奖励和基于DTW距离的轨迹感知过程奖励。
contributions: 为六个医学VQA基准生成了推理轨迹数据集，并公开代码和数据。
提出轨迹感知过程奖励（DTW距离）结合GRPO的训练方法，显著提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个医学VQA基准上，结合DTW过程奖励与精确匹配奖励的方法相比仅SFT训练，平均准确率从0.598提升至0.689，平均BERTScore从0.845提升至0.881，平均ROUGE-L从0.665提升至0.748。
limitations: 依赖开源VLM和LLM作为裁判，可能引入噪声。
DTW距离计算可能对长轨迹效率较低。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轨迹感知过程监督提升医学VQA的推理能力，结合DTW奖励与GRPO训练。

papers.title: The Rise and Fall of $G$ in AGI
papers.abstract: In the psychological literature the term `general intelligence' describes correlations between abilities and not simply the number of abilities. This paper connects Spearman's $g$-factor from psychometrics, measuring a positive manifold, to the implicit ``$G$-factor'' in claims about artificial general intelligence (AGI) performance on temporally structured benchmarks. By treating LLM benchmark batteries as cognitive test batteries and model releases as subjects, principal component analysis is applied to a models $\times$ benchmarks $\times$ time matrix spanning 39 models (2019--2025) and 14 benchmarks. Preliminary results confirm a strong positive manifold in which all 28 pairwise correlations positive across 8 benchmarks. By analyzing the spectrum of the benchmark correlation through time, PC1 explains 90\% of variance on a 5-benchmark core battery ($n=19$)) reducing to 77\% by 2024. On a four benchmark battery, PC1 is found to peak at 92\% of the variance between 2023--2024 and reduce to 64\% with the arrival of reasoning-specialized models in 2024. This is coincident with a rotation in the G-factor as models outsource `reasoning' to tools. The analysis of partial correlation matrices through time provides evidence for the evolution of specialization beneath the positive manifold of general intelligence (AI-hedgehog) encompassing diverse high dimensional problem solving systems (AI-foxes). In strictly psychometric terms, AI models exhibit general intelligence suppressing specialized intelligences. LLMs invert the ideal of substituting complicated models with parsimonious mechanisms, a `Ptolemaic Succession' of theories, with architectures of increasing hierarchical complication and capability.

analysis.tldr: 将心理测量学中的g因子概念引入AI基准测试，发现LLM表现出类似人类的一般智能因子，且随推理专业化模型出现而分化。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理测量学中g因子描述了能力间的正相关，而AGI领域常隐含类似G因子假设，但缺乏严格量化分析。
analysis.problem: 如何用心理测量学方法量化分析AI模型在时序基准上的能力结构，验证是否存在类似人类一般智能的G因子。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出PC1解释方差随时间变化，推理模型出现后G因子旋转，表明专业化趋势。
analysis.method: 将LLM基准测试视为认知测试，模型版本视为被试，对模型×基准×时间矩阵进行主成分分析，计算偏相关矩阵。
contributions: 提出将心理测量学g因子框架应用于AI基准测试分析
发现AI模型存在正流形和一般智能因子，且随推理专业化出现分化
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 基准选择有限，可能不全面
分析仅基于公开模型和基准，未考虑训练数据泄露等
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将心理测量学中的g因子概念引入AI基准测试，发现LLM表现出类似人类的一般智能因子，且随推理专业化模型出现而分化。

papers.title: From UAV Imagery to Agronomic Reasoning: A Multimodal LLM Benchmark for Plant Phenotyping
papers.abstract: To improve crop genetics, high-throughput, effective and comprehensive phenotyping is a critical prerequisite. While such tasks were traditionally performed manually, recent advances in multimodal foundation models, especially in vision-language models (VLMs), have enabled more automated and robust phenotypic analysis. However, plant science remains a particularly challenging domain for foundation models because it requires domain-specific knowledge, fine-grained visual interpretation, and complex biological and agronomic reasoning. To address this gap, we develop PlantXpert, an evidence-grounded multimodal reasoning benchmark for soybean and cotton phenotyping. Our benchmark provides a structured and reproducible framework for agronomic adaptation of VLMs, and enables controlled comparison between base models and their domain-adapted counterparts. We constructed a dataset comprising 385 digital images and more than 3,000 benchmark samples spanning key plant science domains including disease, pest control, weed management, and yield. The benchmark can assess diverse capabilities including visual expertise, quantitative reasoning, and multi-step agronomic reasoning. A total of 11 state-of-the-art VLMs were evaluated. The results indicate that task-specific fine-tuning leads to substantial improvement in accuracy, with models such as Qwen3-VL-4B and Qwen3-VL-30B achieving up to 78%. At the same time, gains from model scaling diminish beyond a certain capacity, generalization across soybean and cotton remains uneven, and quantitative as well as biologically grounded reasoning continue to pose substantial challenges. These findings suggest that PlantXpert can serve as a foundation for assessing evidence-grounded agronomic reasoning and for advancing multimodal model development in plant science.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PlantXpert 基准，用于评估 VLM 在植物表型分析中的细粒度视觉与农学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 植物科学需要领域特定知识、细粒度视觉解释和复杂生物农学推理，现有 VLM 在此领域表现不足，缺乏系统评估基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个结构化的、可复现的、覆盖多领域（病害、虫害、杂草、产量）的农学推理基准，以评估和推动 VLM 在植物表型分析中的适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务特定微调可显著提升准确率（如 Qwen3-VL-4B 和 Qwen3-VL-30B 达 78%），但模型规模增大带来的收益递减，跨作物泛化不均，定量和生物推理仍是挑战。
analysis.method: 构建包含 385 张图像和 3000+ 样本的基准 PlantXpert，覆盖病害、虫害、杂草管理和产量等关键领域，评估视觉专长、定量推理和多步农学推理能力。
contributions: 提出 PlantXpert，首个面向大豆和棉花表型分析的多模态推理基准。
系统评估 11 个 SOTA VLM，揭示微调收益、规模效应和推理瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在 11 个 SOTA VLM 上评估，任务特定微调后 Qwen3-VL-4B 和 Qwen3-VL-30B 准确率达 78%。
limitations: 仅覆盖大豆和棉花两种作物，泛化性待验证。
定量和生物推理仍存在显著挑战，基准可能未覆盖所有复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 PlantXpert 基准，用于评估 VLM 在植物表型分析中的细粒度视觉与农学推理能力。

papers.title: Diffusion Denoiser Achievable Analysis for Finite Blocklength Unsourced Random Access
papers.abstract: Polyanskiy proposed a framework for the unsourced multiple access channel (MAC) problem where users employ a common codebook in the finite blocklength regime. However, existing approaches handle channel noise before the joint decoder. In this work, we introduce a decoder compatible diffusion denoiser as a lightweight analysis within joint decoding. The score network is trained on samples drawn from the channel output distribution, making the method easy to integrate with existing code designs. In our theoretical analysis, we derive a diffusion-denoiser random-coding achievable bound that is strictly tighter. Simulations on existing decoders, including FASURA, MSUG-MRA and pilot-based method, show consistent performance gains with at least a $0.5$ $\mathrm{dB}$ improvement in required $\mathrm{E_b/N_0}$ at a fixed error target.

analysis.tldr: 将扩散去噪器作为轻量级分析模块集成到联合解码中，理论推导出更紧的随机编码可达界，并在多个解码器上实现至少0.5 dB的增益。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无源多址接入（MAC）方案在有限块长下处理信道噪声时，联合解码前噪声处理不够高效，需要一种轻量级且易于集成的方法来提升解码性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限块长无源随机接入中，通过扩散去噪器实现更紧的可达界并提升解码性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种与解码器兼容的扩散去噪器，作为联合解码中的轻量级分析模块；分数网络在信道输出分布样本上训练，易于集成；理论推导了扩散去噪器随机编码可达界。
contributions: 提出一种解码器兼容的扩散去噪器，可轻量集成到联合解码中。
理论推导出扩散去噪器随机编码可达界，比现有界更紧。
在多个现有解码器上验证了至少0.5 dB的Eb/N0性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在FASURA、MSUG-MRA和基于导频的方法等解码器上进行仿真，固定错误目标下所需Eb/N0至少降低0.5 dB。
limitations: 仅针对有限块长无源随机接入场景，泛化性未知。
扩散去噪器的额外计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将扩散去噪器作为轻量级分析模块集成到联合解码中，理论推导出更紧的随机编码可达界，并在多个解码器上实现至少0.5 dB的增益。

papers.title: PointSplat: Efficient Geometry-Driven Pruning and Transformer Refinement for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently unlocked real-time, high-fidelity novel view synthesis by representing scenes using explicit 3D primitives. However, traditional methods often require millions of Gaussians to capture complex scenes, leading to significant memory and storage demands. Recent approaches have addressed this issue through pruning and per-scene fine-tuning of Gaussian parameters, thereby reducing the model size while maintaining visual quality. These strategies typically rely on 2D images to compute important scores followed by scene-specific optimization. In this work, we introduce PointSplat, 3D geometry-driven prune-and-refine framework that bridges previously disjoint directions of gaussian pruning and transformer refinement. Our method includes two key components: (1) an efficient geometry-driven strategy that ranks Gaussians based solely on their 3D attributes, removing reliance on 2D images during pruning stage, and (2) a dual-branch encoder that separates, re-weights geometric and appearance to avoid feature imbalance. Extensive experiments on ScanNet++ and Replica across varying sparsity levels demonstrate that PointSplat consistently achieves competitive rendering quality and superior efficiency without additional per-scene optimization.

analysis.tldr: PointSplat 提出一种基于3D几何驱动的剪枝与Transformer精炼框架，在不依赖2D图像的情况下高效压缩3D高斯场景表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）虽能实现实时高质量新视角合成，但传统方法需数百万高斯基元，导致高内存和存储开销。现有剪枝方法依赖2D图像计算重要性分数并进行逐场景优化，效率低且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖2D图像和逐场景优化的前提下，高效剪枝3D高斯基元并保持渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PointSplat框架，包含两个关键组件：(1) 基于3D几何驱动的剪枝策略，仅利用高斯基元的3D属性进行排序，无需2D图像；(2) 双分支编码器，分离并重新加权几何与外观特征以避免不平衡。
contributions: 提出首个结合3D几何驱动剪枝与Transformer精炼的统一框架，无需2D图像参与剪枝阶段。
设计双分支编码器有效处理几何与外观特征的不平衡问题。
在ScanNet++和Replica数据集上验证了方法在不同稀疏度下均能保持竞争性渲染质量并提升效率，且无需额外逐场景优化。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet++和Replica数据集上进行了不同稀疏度水平的实验，结果表明PointSplat在渲染质量和效率上均具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于静态场景，未提及动态场景或大规模场景的泛化能力。
双分支编码器的设计可能增加模型复杂度，需进一步分析计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PointSplat 提出一种基于3D几何驱动的剪枝与Transformer精炼框架，在不依赖2D图像的情况下高效压缩3D高斯场景表示。

papers.title: Should We be Pedantic About Reasoning Errors in Machine Translation?
papers.abstract: Across multiple language pairings (English $\to$ \{Spanish, French, German, Mandarin, Japanese, Urdu, Cantonese\}), we find reasoning errors in translation. To quantify how often these reasoning errors occur, we leverage an automated annotation protocol for reasoning evaluation wherein the goal is to detect if a reasoning step is any of three error categories: (1) source sentence-misaligned, (2) model hypothesis-misaligned, or (3) reasoning trace-misaligned. We probe the reasoning model with perturbed traces correcting for these identified reasoning errors using an array of weak-to-strong interventions: hedging, removal, re-reasoning after removal, hindsight, and oracle interventions. Experimenting with interventions on the reasoning traces suggests that small corrections to the reasoning have little impact on translation quality, but stronger interventions yield the highest resolution rates, despite translation quality gains being mixed. We find ultimately that reasoning errors in MT can be identified with high precision in Urdu but lower precision in Spanish, but that removing these reasoning errors does not resolve the initial errors significantly, suggesting limited reasoning faithfulness for machine translation.

analysis.tldr: 机器翻译中的推理错误虽然可被高精度识别，但修正这些错误对翻译质量提升有限，表明推理忠实度不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在机器翻译中常产生推理错误，但这类错误对翻译质量的实际影响尚不明确，需要系统量化与干预分析。
analysis.problem: 机器翻译中推理错误的类型、频率及其对翻译质量的影响程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理错误可被高精度识别（如乌尔都语），但修正后翻译质量提升不显著，说明推理过程对最终输出的贡献有限。
analysis.method: 提出自动化标注协议，将推理错误分为三类（源句错位、假设错位、推理轨迹错位），并采用从弱到强的干预策略（对冲、移除、重推理、事后修正、理想干预）进行修正实验。
contributions: 首次系统量化机器翻译中推理错误的类型与频率
揭示推理错误修正对翻译质量提升有限，质疑推理忠实度
analysis.experiments: 在英语到7种目标语言的翻译上，使用自动化标注和多种干预策略进行实验，报告了错误识别精度和翻译质量变化。
limitations: 仅覆盖7种语言对，泛化性待验证
干预策略可能未完全消除错误影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 机器翻译中的推理错误虽然可被高精度识别，但修正这些错误对翻译质量提升有限，表明推理忠实度不足。

papers.title: In-situ process monitoring for defect detection in wire-arc additive manufacturing: an agentic AI approach
papers.abstract: AI agents are being increasingly deployed across a wide range of real-world applications. In this paper, we propose an agentic AI framework for in-situ process monitoring for defect detection in wire-arc additive manufacturing (WAAM). The autonomous agent leverages a WAAM process monitoring dataset and a trained classification tool to build AI agents and uses a large language model (LLM) for in-situ process monitoring decision-making for defect detection. A processing agent is developed based on welder process signals, such as current and voltage, and a monitoring agent is developed based on acoustic data collected during the process. Both agents are tasked with identifying porosity defects from processing and monitoring signals, respectively. Ground truth X-ray computed tomography (XCT) data are used to develop classification tools for both the processing and monitoring agents. Furthermore, a multi-agent framework is demonstrated in which the processing and monitoring agents are orchestrated together for parallel decision-making on the given task of defect classification. Evaluation metrics are proposed to determine the efficacy of both individual agents, the combined single-agent, and the coordinated multi-agent system. The multi-agent configuration outperforms all individual-agent counterparts, achieving a decision accuracy of 91.6% and an F1 score of 0.821 on decided runs, across 15 independent runs, and a reasoning quality score of 3.74 out of 5. These in-situ process monitoring agents hold significant potential for autonomous real-time process monitoring and control toward building qualified parts for WAAM and other additive manufacturing processes.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的多智能体AI框架，用于线弧增材制造缺陷检测，多智能体配置在决策准确率和F1分数上优于单智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: 线弧增材制造（WAAM）中缺陷检测依赖离线检测，缺乏实时自主监控能力，现有方法难以有效融合多模态过程信号进行在线决策。
analysis.problem: 如何利用AI智能体结合焊接过程信号（电流、电压）和声学数据，实现WAAM中孔隙缺陷的实时原位检测与分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多智能体协同决策比单个智能体（处理或监控）表现更好，表明融合多模态信息可提升缺陷检测性能。
analysis.method: 提出智能体AI框架，包含处理智能体（基于电流、电压信号）和监控智能体（基于声学数据），利用XCT数据训练分类工具，并通过LLM进行原位决策；多智能体框架协调两者并行决策。
contributions: 首次将智能体AI框架应用于WAAM原位缺陷检测，融合多模态过程信号。
提出多智能体协同决策机制，在15次独立运行中达到91.6%准确率和0.821 F1分数。
analysis.experiments: 使用WAAM过程监控数据集和XCT地面真值数据，评估单个智能体、组合单智能体及多智能体系统，多智能体配置在决策准确率（91.6%）、F1分数（0.821）和推理质量（3.74/5）上最优。
limitations: 仅针对孔隙缺陷，未覆盖其他缺陷类型。
依赖XCT数据训练分类工具，可能限制实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于LLM的多智能体AI框架，用于线弧增材制造缺陷检测，多智能体配置在决策准确率和F1分数上优于单智能体。

papers.title: Not Your Stereo-Typical Estimator: Combining Vision and Language for Volume Perception
papers.abstract: Accurate volume estimation of objects from visual data is a long-standing challenge in computer vision with significant applications in robotics, logistics, and smart health. Existing methods often rely on complex 3D reconstruction pipelines or struggle with the ambiguity inherent in single-view images. To address these limitations, we introduce a new method that fuses implicit 3D cues from stereo vision with explicit prior knowledge from natural language text. Our approach extracts deep features from a stereo image pair and a descriptive text prompt that contains the object's class and an approximate volume, then integrates them using a simple yet effective projection layer into a unified, multi-modal representation for regression. We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrating that our text-guided approach significantly outperforms vision-only baselines. Our findings show that leveraging even simple textual priors can effectively guide the volume estimation task, paving the way for more context-aware visual measurement systems. Code: https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/stereo-typical-estimator.

analysis.tldr: 融合立体视觉与自然语言先验知识进行物体体积估计，显著优于纯视觉方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 单视图体积估计存在歧义性，现有方法依赖复杂3D重建或难以处理单视图模糊性，需要更鲁棒的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语言先验知识提升立体视觉中物体体积估计的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从立体图像对和包含物体类别及近似体积的描述文本中提取深度特征，通过投影层融合为统一多模态表示进行回归。
contributions: 提出一种融合立体视觉与自然语言先验的体积估计方法。
在公开数据集上验证了文本引导方法显著优于纯视觉基线。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上进行实验，文本引导方法优于纯视觉基线。
limitations: 依赖文本提示的准确性，可能受噪声描述影响。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
