papers.title: What do your logits know? (The answer may surprise you!)
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that probing model internals can reveal a wealth of information not apparent from the model generations. This poses the risk of unintentional or malicious information leakage, where model users are able to learn information that the model owner assumed was inaccessible. Using vision-language models as a testbed, we present the first systematic comparison of information retained at different "representational levels'' as it is compressed from the rich information encoded in the residual stream through two natural bottlenecks: low-dimensional projections of the residual stream obtained using tuned lens, and the final top-k logits most likely to impact model's answer. We show that even easily accessible bottlenecks defined by the model's top logit values can leak task-irrelevant information present in an image-based query, in some cases revealing as much information as direct projections of the full residual stream.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，VLM的logits会泄露图像中与任务无关的敏感信息，其信息量接近残差流投影。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型内部状态可能泄露用户无法直接获取的信息，带来隐私和安全风险，但此前缺乏对不同表征层级信息泄露程度的系统比较。
analysis.problem: 量化并比较视觉语言模型中不同表征瓶颈（残差流投影 vs. top-k logits）泄露任务无关信息的程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使是通过模型自然瓶颈（如top-k logits）也能泄露图像查询中的任务无关信息，且在某些情况下信息量接近残差流投影。
analysis.method: 以视觉语言模型为测试平台，通过tuned lens获取残差流低维投影，并与最终top-k logits进行信息泄露程度的系统比较。
contributions: 首次系统比较了VLM中不同表征层级（残差流投影与top-k logits）的信息泄露情况。
揭示了易获取的logits瓶颈可泄露与任务无关的图像信息，带来隐私风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以视觉语言模型为测试床，结论可能不适用于其他模态或纯语言模型。
未讨论缓解信息泄露的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现，VLM的logits会泄露图像中与任务无关的敏感信息，其信息量接近残差流投影。

papers.title: Topo-ADV: Generating Topology-Driven Imperceptible Adversarial Point Clouds
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks for 3D point cloud understanding have achieved remarkable success in object classification and recognition, yet recent work shows that these models remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Existing 3D attacks predominantly manipulate geometric properties such as point locations, curvature, or surface structure, implicitly assuming that preserving global shape fidelity preserves semantic content. In this work, we challenge this assumption and introduce the first topology-driven adversarial attack for point cloud deep learning. Our key insight is that the homological structure of a 3D object constitutes a previously unexplored vulnerability surface. We propose Topo-ADV, an end-to-end differentiable framework that incorporates persistent homology as an explicit optimization objective, enabling gradient-based manipulation of topological features during adversarial example generation. By embedding persistence diagrams through differentiable topological representations, our method jointly optimizes (i) a topology divergence loss that alters persistence, (ii) a misclassification objective, and (iii) geometric imperceptibility constraints that preserve visual plausibility. Experiments demonstrate that subtle topology-driven perturbations consistently achieve up to 100% attack success rates on benchmark datasets such as ModelNet40, ShapeNet Part, and ScanObjectNN using PointNet and DGCNN classifiers, while remaining geometrically indistinguishable from the original point clouds, beating state-of-the-art methods on various perceptibility metrics.

analysis.tldr: 首个利用拓扑结构（持续同调）生成不可察觉对抗点云的攻击方法，在多个数据集和模型上达到100%攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D对抗攻击主要操纵几何属性（如点位置、曲率），假设保持全局形状即可保留语义，但忽略了拓扑结构这一新的脆弱面。
analysis.problem: 如何生成在几何上不可察觉但能有效欺骗3D点云分类器的对抗样本，并利用拓扑结构作为攻击表面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出拓扑结构是之前未探索的脆弱面。
analysis.method: 提出Topo-ADV，一个端到端可微框架，将持续同调作为显式优化目标，通过可微拓扑表示嵌入持久性图，联合优化拓扑发散损失、误分类目标和几何不可察觉约束。
contributions: 首次提出拓扑驱动的对抗攻击方法，利用持续同调生成对抗点云。
设计端到端可微框架，联合优化拓扑、分类和几何约束。
在多个基准数据集和模型上实现100%攻击成功率，且几何不可察觉性优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ModelNet40、ShapeNet Part和ScanObjectNN数据集上使用PointNet和DGCNN分类器，攻击成功率高达100%，并在多种可察觉性指标上超越现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有显著拓扑结构的物体。
计算复杂度可能较高，因为涉及持续同调计算。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个利用拓扑结构（持续同调）生成不可察觉对抗点云的攻击方法，在多个数据集和模型上达到100%攻击成功率。

papers.title: DINO_4D: Semantic-Aware 4D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: In the intersection of computer vision and robotic perception, 4D reconstruction of dynamic scenes serve as the critical bridge connecting low-level geometric sensing with high-level semantic understanding. We present DINO\_4D, introducing frozen DINOv3 features as structural priors, injecting semantic awareness into the reconstruction process to effectively suppress semantic drift during dynamic tracking. Experiments on the Point Odyssey and TUM-Dynamics benchmarks demonstrate that our method maintains the linear time complexity $O(T)$ of its predecessors while significantly improving Tracking Accuracy (APD) and Reconstruction Completeness. DINO\_4D establishes a new paradigm for constructing 4D World Models that possess both geometric precision and semantic understanding.

analysis.tldr: DINO_4D 利用冻结的 DINOv3 特征作为结构先验，在动态场景 4D 重建中抑制语义漂移，实现线性时间复杂度的语义感知重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景的 4D 重建是连接低层几何感知与高层语义理解的关键桥梁，但现有方法在动态跟踪中容易出现语义漂移，影响重建精度和完整性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持线性时间复杂度的前提下，提升动态场景 4D 重建的跟踪精度和重建完整性，并注入语义感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入冻结的 DINOv3 特征作为结构先验，将其注入重建过程以抑制动态跟踪中的语义漂移。
contributions: 提出 DINO_4D，利用冻结的 DINOv3 特征实现语义感知的 4D 重建。
在保持线性时间复杂度 O(T) 的同时，显著提升跟踪精度和重建完整性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Point Odyssey 和 TUM-Dynamics 基准上评估，跟踪精度 (APD) 和重建完整性均有显著提升。
limitations: 依赖 DINOv3 特征的质量和泛化能力。
可能对极端动态场景或遮挡敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DINO_4D 利用冻结的 DINOv3 特征作为结构先验，在动态场景 4D 重建中抑制语义漂移，实现线性时间复杂度的语义感知重建。

papers.title: Efficient Personalization of Generative User Interfaces
papers.abstract: Generative user interfaces (UIs) create new opportunities to adapt interfaces to individual users on demand, but personalization remains difficult because desirable UI properties are subjective, hard to articulate, and costly to infer from sparse feedback. We study this problem through a new dataset in which 20 trained designers each provide pairwise judgments over the same 600 generated UIs, enabling direct analysis of preference divergence. We find substantial disagreement across designers (average kappa = 0.25), and written rationales reveal that even when designers appeal to similar concepts such as hierarchy or cleanliness, designers differ in how they define, prioritize, and apply those concepts. Motivated by these findings, we develop a sample-efficient personalization method that represents a new user in terms of prior designers rather than a fixed rubric of design concepts. In a technical evaluation, our preference model outperforms both a pretrained UI evaluator and a larger multimodal model, and scales better with additional feedback. When used to personalize generation, it also produces interfaces preferred by 12 new designers over baseline approaches, including direct user prompting. Our findings suggest that lightweight preference elicitation can serve as a practical foundation for personalized generative UI systems.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量级偏好学习实现生成式用户界面的高效个性化，利用设计师先验知识替代固定设计规则。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式UI虽能按需生成界面，但个性化困难，因为UI属性主观、难以表达且从稀疏反馈中推断成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量用户反馈中高效学习个性化UI偏好，避免依赖固定设计规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 20位设计师对同一600个生成UI的偏好存在显著分歧（平均kappa=0.25），且即使使用相同概念（如层次、整洁），定义和优先级也不同。
analysis.method: 将新用户表示为先前设计师的加权组合，而非固定设计规则，从而利用先验知识进行样本高效的偏好学习。
contributions: 构建了包含20位设计师对600个生成UI的成对偏好数据集，揭示了偏好分歧的普遍性。
提出一种基于先验设计师表示的个性化方法，在偏好预测和UI生成中优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 技术评估中，偏好模型优于预训练UI评估器和更大多模态模型，且随反馈增加扩展性更好；12位新设计师偏好该方法生成的界面。
limitations: 数据集仅包含设计师，可能不反映普通用户偏好。
方法依赖先验设计师集合，覆盖不足时可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量级偏好学习实现生成式用户界面的高效个性化，利用设计师先验知识替代固定设计规则。

papers.title: Relational Preference Encoding in Looped Transformer Internal States
papers.abstract: We investigate how looped transformers encode human preference in their internal iteration states. Using Ouro-2.6B-Thinking, a 2.6B-parameter looped transformer with iterative refinement, we extract hidden states from each loop iteration and train lightweight evaluator heads (~5M parameters) to predict human preference on the Anthropic HH-RLHF dataset. Our pairwise evaluator achieves 95.2% test accuracy on 8,552 unseen examples, surpassing a full-batch L-BFGS probe (84.5%) while the base model remains completely frozen. Our central finding is that loop states encode preference predominantly relationally: a linear probe on pairwise differences achieves 84.5%, the best nonlinear independent evaluator reaches only 65% test accuracy, and linear independent classification scores 21.75%, below chance and with inverted polarity. Interpreted precisely, the evaluator functions as a model-internal consistency probe, measuring how stably Ouro's own learned value system organizes its representations rather than how well it predicts noisy human annotations. We also document a systematic architecture search that established a genuine 70% ceiling for independent scoring, and show how the 50% argument-swap protocol required to prevent degenerate pairwise solutions deflated pairwise training metrics by about 31 points at peak, creating the false appearance that pairwise and pointwise evaluators shared the same ceiling. Finally, we show that a cosine learning-rate dead zone at epoch 2 accidentally acted as early stopping, preserving the generalization peak before overfitting degraded test accuracy from 95.2% to 62.4% by epoch 5. Cross-epoch flip-test analysis shows that antisymmetry correlation remains stable while strict sign-flip rate mainly tracks scorer bias. We propose the flip test as a mandatory diagnostic for pairwise preference evaluators.

analysis.tldr: 循环Transformer的内部状态以关系方式编码人类偏好，线性成对探针准确率达84.5%，而独立分类器仅21.75%。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大型语言模型内部如何编码人类偏好对于对齐和可解释性至关重要，但现有方法多依赖外部探针或微调，缺乏对模型内部迭代状态中偏好表征方式的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 探究循环Transformer在内部迭代状态中编码人类偏好的方式，特别是偏好是独立编码还是关系编码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏好编码主要是关系性的：线性成对探针准确率84.5%，非线性独立探针仅65%，线性独立分类器21.75%（低于随机且极性反转）。
analysis.method: 使用Ouro-2.6B-Thinking循环Transformer，从每次迭代提取隐藏状态，训练轻量级评估器（~5M参数）预测人类偏好，并设计参数交换协议和翻转测试。
contributions: 发现循环Transformer内部状态以关系方式编码偏好，成对探针显著优于独立探针。
提出翻转测试作为成对偏好评估器的必要诊断工具。
analysis.experiments: 在Anthropic HH-RLHF数据集上，成对评估器测试准确率95.2%，超过L-BFGS探针（84.5%）；独立分类器仅21.75%。
limitations: 仅使用单一模型（Ouro-2.6B-Thinking），泛化性未知。
偏好预测基于人类标注，噪声可能影响结论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 循环Transformer的内部状态以关系方式编码人类偏好，线性成对探针准确率达84.5%，而独立分类器仅21.75%。

papers.title: Automating Structural Analysis Across Multiple Software Platforms Using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown the promise to significantly accelerate the workflow by automating structural modeling and analysis. However, existing studies primarily focus on enabling LLMs to operate a single structural analysis software platform. In practice, structural engineers often rely on multiple finite element analysis (FEA) tools, such as ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees, depending on project needs, user preferences, and company constraints. This limitation restricts the practical deployment of LLM-assisted engineering workflows. To address this gap, this study develops LLMs capable of automating frame structural analysis across multiple software platforms. The LLMs adopt a two-stage multi-agent architecture. In Stage 1, a cohort of agents collaboratively interpret user input and perform structured reasoning to infer geometric, material, boundary, and load information required for finite element modeling. The outputs of these agents are compiled into a unified JSON representation. In Stage 2, code translation agents operate in parallel to convert the JSON file into executable scripts across multiple structural analysis platforms. Each agent is prompted with the syntax rules and modeling workflows of its target software. The LLMs are evaluated using 20 representative frame problems across three widely used platforms: ETABS, SAP2000, and OpenSees. Results from ten repeated trials demonstrate consistently reliable performance, achieving accuracy exceeding 90% across all cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段多智能体架构，让LLM自动完成多平台结构分析脚本生成，准确率超90%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM辅助结构分析仅针对单一软件平台，而工程师实际需使用多种FEA工具，限制了LLM的实用部署。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM自动完成跨多个结构分析软件平台（如ETABS、SAP2000、OpenSees）的框架结构建模与分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段多智能体架构：阶段1中多个智能体协作解析用户输入并推理出几何、材料、边界和荷载信息，输出统一JSON表示；阶段2中代码翻译智能体并行将JSON转换为各平台的可执行脚本。
contributions: 提出跨多平台的结构分析自动化方法，突破单一软件限制。
设计两阶段多智能体架构，实现从自然语言到多平台脚本的端到端生成。
在20个代表性框架问题、三个平台上验证，准确率超过90%。
analysis.experiments: 使用20个代表性框架问题，在ETABS、SAP2000和OpenSees三个平台上进行十次重复试验，准确率均超过90%。
limitations: 仅针对框架结构，未涉及更复杂的结构类型。
依赖预定义的JSON schema，可能无法覆盖所有建模细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段多智能体架构，让LLM自动完成多平台结构分析脚本生成，准确率超90%。

papers.title: PAS: Estimating the target accuracy before domain adaptation
papers.abstract: The goal of domain adaptation is to make predictions for unlabeled samples from a target domain with the help of labeled samples from a different but related source domain. The performance of domain adaptation methods is highly influenced by the choice of source domain and pre-trained feature extractor. However, the selection of source data and pre-trained model is not trivial due to the absence of a labeled validation set for the target domain and the large number of available pre-trained models. In this work, we propose PAS, a novel score designed to estimate the transferability of a source domain set and a pre-trained feature extractor to a target classification task before actually performing domain adaptation. PAS leverages the generalization power of pre-trained models and assesses source-target compatibility based on the pre-trained feature embeddings. We integrate PAS into a framework that indicates the most relevant pre-trained model and source domain among multiple candidates, thus improving target accuracy while reducing the computational overhead. Extensive experiments on image classification benchmarks demonstrate that PAS correlates strongly with actual target accuracy and consistently guides the selection of the best-performing pre-trained model and source domain for adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出PAS分数，在领域适应前估计源域和预训练模型对目标任务的迁移性，指导最优选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 领域适应方法性能高度依赖源域和预训练模型的选择，但目标域无标签验证集，且预训练模型众多，选择困难且计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有目标域标签的情况下，预先估计源域和预训练特征提取器对目标分类任务的迁移性，以指导最优选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PAS分数，利用预训练模型的泛化能力，基于预训练特征嵌入评估源域与目标域的兼容性，并集成到框架中自动选择最相关的预训练模型和源域。
contributions: 提出PAS分数，用于在领域适应前估计源域和预训练模型的迁移性。
构建选择框架，通过PAS指导选择最优预训练模型和源域，提升目标精度并降低计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类基准上，PAS与实际目标精度强相关，并能一致地指导选择最佳预训练模型和源域。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图像分类任务，未验证其他领域。
依赖预训练特征嵌入，对特征质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PAS分数，在领域适应前估计源域和预训练模型对目标任务的迁移性，指导最优选择。

papers.title: FF3R: Feedforward Feature 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained views
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision foundation models have revolutionized geometry reconstruction and semantic understanding. Yet, most of the existing approaches treat these capabilities in isolation, leading to redundant pipelines and compounded errors. This paper introduces FF3R, a fully annotation-free feed-forward framework that unifies geometric and semantic reasoning from unconstrained multi-view image sequences. Unlike previous methods, FF3R does not require camera poses, depth maps, or semantic labels, relying solely on rendering supervision for RGB and feature maps, establishing a scalable paradigm for unified 3D reasoning. In addition, we address two critical challenges in feedforward feature reconstruction pipelines, namely global semantic inconsistency and local structural inconsistency, through two key innovations: (i) a Token-wise Fusion Module that enriches geometry tokens with semantic context via cross-attention, and (ii) a Semantic-Geometry Mutual Boosting mechanism combining geometry-guided feature warping for global consistency with semantic-aware voxelization for local coherence. Extensive experiments on ScanNet and DL3DV-10K demonstrate FF3R's superior performance in novel-view synthesis, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, with strong generalization to in-the-wild scenarios, paving the way for embodied intelligence systems that demand both spatial and semantic understanding.

analysis.tldr: FF3R 提出无需标注的前馈框架，统一几何与语义推理，实现从无约束多视图进行3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将几何重建与语义理解分离，导致流程冗余且误差累积，缺乏统一且可扩展的3D推理范式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖相机位姿、深度图或语义标签的情况下，从无约束多视图图像序列中联合进行几何与语义重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前馈特征重建管道中存在全局语义不一致和局部结构不一致两大挑战。
analysis.method: 提出FF3R框架，包含Token-wise Fusion Module（通过交叉注意力丰富几何token的语义上下文）和Semantic-Geometry Mutual Boosting机制（结合几何引导的特征扭曲实现全局一致性，语义感知体素化实现局部一致性）。
contributions: 首个无需标注的前馈框架，统一几何与语义推理，仅依赖RGB和特征图的渲染监督。
提出Token-wise Fusion Module和Semantic-Geometry Mutual Boosting机制，解决全局语义和局部结构不一致问题。
在ScanNet和DL3DV-10K上实现新视图合成、开放词汇语义分割和深度估计的优越性能，并泛化到野外场景。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet和DL3DV-10K数据集上进行新视图合成、开放词汇语义分割和深度估计实验，展示了优越性能和强泛化能力。
limitations: 可能对极端无约束视图（如大视角变化或严重遮挡）鲁棒性有限。
依赖渲染监督，可能对复杂场景的语义细节捕捉不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FF3R 提出无需标注的前馈框架，统一几何与语义推理，实现从无约束多视图进行3D重建。

papers.title: Evolutionary Token-Level Prompt Optimization for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models exhibit strong generative performance but remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation, often requiring extensive manual trial and error to obtain satisfactory results. This motivates the development of automated, model-agnostic prompt optimization methods that can systematically explore the conditioning space beyond conventional text rewriting. This work investigates the use of a Genetic Algorithm (GA) for prompt optimization by directly evolving the token vectors employed by CLIP-based diffusion models. The GA optimizes a fitness function that combines aesthetic quality, measured by the LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2, with prompt-image alignment, assessed via CLIPScore. Experiments on 36 prompts from the Parti Prompts (P2) dataset show that the proposed approach outperforms the baseline methods, including Promptist and random search, achieving up to a 23.93% improvement in fitness. Overall, the method is adaptable to image generation models with tokenized text encoders and provides a modular framework for future extensions, the limitations and prospects of which are discussed.

analysis.tldr: 用遗传算法在token级别优化扩散模型提示词，无需人工调参。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型对提示词高度敏感，手动调参耗时且难以获得满意结果，需要自动化的提示优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动优化扩散模型的提示词，以提升生成图像的美学质量和文本-图像对齐度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用遗传算法（GA）直接进化CLIP-based扩散模型的token向量，优化结合美学质量（LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2）和提示-图像对齐（CLIPScore）的适应度函数。
contributions: 提出一种基于遗传算法的token级提示优化方法，无需模型微调或文本改写。
在Parti Prompts数据集上验证了方法有效性，相比Promptist和随机搜索提升高达23.93%的适应度。
analysis.experiments: 在Parti Prompts (P2)数据集的36个提示上进行实验，与Promptist和随机搜索对比，适应度提升最高23.93%。
limitations: 仅测试了36个提示，规模较小。
依赖CLIPScore和美学预测器，可能无法覆盖所有用户偏好。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用遗传算法在token级别优化扩散模型提示词，无需人工调参。

papers.title: RoboLab: A High-Fidelity Simulation Benchmark for Analysis of Task Generalist Policies
papers.abstract: The pursuit of general-purpose robotics has yielded impressive foundation models, yet simulation-based benchmarking remains a bottleneck due to rapid performance saturation and a lack of true generalization testing. Existing benchmarks often exhibit significant domain overlap between training and evaluation, trivializing success rates and obscuring insights into robustness. We introduce RoboLab, a simulation benchmarking framework designed to address these challenges. Concretely, our framework is designed to answer two questions: (1) to what extent can we understand the performance of a real-world policy by analyzing its behavior in simulation, and (2) which external factors most strongly affect that behavior under controlled perturbations. First, RoboLab enables human-authored and LLM-enabled generation of scenes and tasks in a robot- and policy-agnostic manner within a physically realistic and photorealistic simulation. With this, we propose the RoboLab-120 benchmark, consisting of 120 tasks categorized into three competency axes: visual, procedural, relational competency, across three difficulty levels. Second, we introduce a systematic analysis of real-world policies that quantify both their performance and the sensitivity of their behavior to controlled perturbations, indicating that high-fidelity simulation can serve as a proxy for analyzing performance and its dependence on external factors. Evaluation with RoboLab exposes significant performance gap in current state-of-the-art models. By providing granular metrics and a scalable toolset, RoboLab offers a scalable framework for evaluating the true generalization capabilities of task-generalist robotic policies.

analysis.tldr: RoboLab是一个高保真仿真基准，用于系统分析任务通用机器人策略的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人仿真基准存在性能饱和快、训练与评估域重叠严重的问题，导致成功率虚高且无法真正测试泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够系统评估机器人通用策略在受控扰动下行为敏感性和真实泛化能力的仿真基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前基准因域重叠导致性能饱和，无法揭示策略的鲁棒性缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出RoboLab框架，支持人类和LLM生成场景与任务，包含120个任务（RoboLab-120），按视觉、程序、关系三个能力轴和三个难度级别分类，并引入系统分析量化策略性能及对受控扰动的敏感性。
contributions: 提出RoboLab高保真仿真基准框架，支持策略无关的场景与任务生成。
构建RoboLab-120基准，包含120个任务，覆盖三个能力轴和三个难度级别。
引入系统分析方法，量化真实策略的性能及其对受控扰动的敏感性，证明高保真仿真可作为分析代理。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到评估显示当前最先进模型存在显著性能差距。
limitations: 可能仅关注仿真环境，未涉及真实机器人部署验证。
任务数量有限（120个），可能无法覆盖所有泛化场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RoboLab是一个高保真仿真基准，用于系统分析任务通用机器人策略的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Instructing LLMs to Negotiate using Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
papers.abstract: The recent advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established their potential as autonomous interactive agents. However, they often struggle in strategic games of incomplete information, such as bilateral price negotiation. In this paper, we investigate if Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) can effectively teach LLMs to negotiate. Specifically, we explore the strategic behaviors that emerge during the learning process. We introduce a framework that trains a mid-sized buyer agent against a regulated LLM seller across a wide distribution of real-world products. By grounding reward signals directly in the maximization of economic surplus and strict adherence to private budget constraints, we reveal a novel four-phase strategic evolution. The agent progresses from naive bargaining to using aggressive starting prices, moves through a phase of deadlock, and ultimately develops sophisticated persuasive skills. Our results demonstrate that this verifiable training allows a 30B agent to significantly outperform frontier models over ten times its size in extracting surplus. Furthermore, the trained agent generalizes robustly to stronger counterparties unseen during training and remains effective even when facing hostile, adversarial seller personas.

analysis.tldr: 使用可验证奖励的强化学习训练LLM进行价格谈判，发现四阶段策略演化，小模型超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在非完全信息博弈（如双边价格谈判）中表现不佳，缺乏有效的训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM学会在价格谈判中最大化经济剩余并遵守预算约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练过程中出现四阶段策略演化：从幼稚讨价还价到激进定价、僵局，最终发展出说服技巧。
analysis.method: 提出RLVR框架，训练中型买家智能体与受控LLM卖家交互，以经济剩余最大化和预算约束为可验证奖励信号。
contributions: 首次将RLVR应用于LLM谈判任务，并揭示四阶段策略演化。
30B模型在提取剩余方面显著优于十倍规模的未训练前沿模型。
训练智能体对未见过的更强对手和敌对卖家具有鲁棒泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及30B模型优于前沿模型。
limitations: 仅针对价格谈判场景，可能不适用于其他博弈类型。
未讨论训练计算成本或数据需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用可验证奖励的强化学习训练LLM进行价格谈判，发现四阶段策略演化，小模型超越大模型。

papers.title: Do vision models perceive illusory motion in static images like humans?
papers.abstract: Understanding human motion processing is essential for building reliable, human-centered computer vision systems. Although deep neural networks (DNNs) achieve strong performance in optical flow estimation, they remain less robust than humans and rely on fundamentally different computational strategies. Visual motion illusions provide a powerful probe into these mechanisms, revealing how human and machine vision align or diverge. While recent DNN-based motion models can reproduce dynamic illusions such as reverse-phi, it remains unclear whether they can perceive illusory motion in static images, exemplified by the Rotating Snakes illusion. We evaluate several representative optical flow models on Rotating Snakes and show that most fail to generate flow fields consistent with human perception. Under simulated conditions mimicking saccadic eye movements, only the human-inspired Dual-Channel model exhibits the expected rotational motion, with the closest correspondence emerging during the saccade simulation. Ablation analyses further reveal that both luminance-based and higher-order color--feature--based motion signals contribute to this behavior and that a recurrent attention mechanism is critical for integrating local cues. Our results highlight a substantial gap between current optical-flow models and human visual motion processing, and offer insights for developing future motion-estimation systems with improved correspondence to human perception and human-centric AI.

analysis.tldr: 当前光流模型在静态图像运动错觉（如旋转蛇）上远不如人类，仅人类启发模型在模拟扫视时表现出类似感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建可靠、以人为中心的计算机视觉系统需要理解人类运动处理机制，但当前DNN光流模型虽性能强，却与人类策略差异大，且对静态图像运动错觉的感知能力未知。
analysis.problem: 评估现有光流模型能否像人类一样感知静态图像中的运动错觉（旋转蛇错觉），并分析其失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大多数光流模型无法生成与人类感知一致的流场；仅人类启发的Dual-Channel模型在模拟扫视眼动时表现出旋转运动，且消融表明亮度、高阶颜色特征及循环注意力机制均起作用。
analysis.method: 在旋转蛇错觉图像上测试多个光流模型，并模拟扫视眼动条件，通过流场一致性、消融分析等评估模型表现。
contributions: 首次系统评估光流模型在静态图像运动错觉上的表现，揭示与人类的显著差距。
发现人类启发模型在模拟扫视时能部分复现错觉，并识别关键组件（循环注意力、多模态运动信号）。
analysis.experiments: 在旋转蛇错觉图像上评估多个光流模型（包括传统方法和DNN），模拟扫视眼动，进行消融分析。摘要未提供定量结果。
limitations: 仅测试了旋转蛇一种错觉，泛化性未知。
模拟扫视条件可能不完全符合真实眼动，结论需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 当前光流模型在静态图像运动错觉（如旋转蛇）上远不如人类，仅人类启发模型在模拟扫视时表现出类似感知。

papers.title: MEMENTO: Teaching LLMs to Manage Their Own Context
papers.abstract: Reasoning models think in long, unstructured streams with no mechanism for compressing or organizing their own intermediate state. We introduce MEMENTO: a method that teaches models to segment reasoning into blocks, compress each block into a memento, i.e., a dense state summary, and reason forward by attending only to mementos, reducing context, KV cache, and compute. To train MEMENTO models, we release OpenMementos, a public dataset of 228K reasoning traces derived from OpenThoughts-v3, segmented and annotated with intermediate summaries. We show that a two-stage SFT recipe on OpenMementos is effective across different model families (Qwen3, Phi-4, Olmo 3) and scales (8B--32B parameters). Trained models maintain strong accuracy on math, science, and coding benchmarks while achieving ${\sim}2.5\times$ peak KV cache reduction. We extend vLLM to support our inference method, achieving ${\sim}1.75\times$ throughput improvement while also enabling us to perform RL and further improve accuracy. Finally, we identify a dual information stream: information from each reasoning block is carried both by the memento text and by the corresponding KV states, which retain implicit information from the original block. Removing this channel drops accuracy by 15\,pp on AIME24.

analysis.tldr: 提出MEMENTO方法，让LLM将推理过程分段压缩为记忆摘要，减少KV缓存并提升吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理模型产生长而无结构的中间状态，缺乏压缩和组织机制，导致上下文和计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM自主管理推理过程中的上下文，通过分段压缩减少KV缓存和计算量而不损失准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现双重信息流：推理块的信息既由记忆文本携带，也由对应的KV状态隐式保留；移除KV状态通道会导致准确率显著下降。
analysis.method: 两阶段SFT训练：先对推理轨迹分段并标注中间摘要（OpenMementos数据集），再训练模型生成记忆并仅基于记忆进行后续推理；扩展vLLM支持推理时方法。
contributions: 提出MEMENTO方法，使LLM能自主分段压缩推理状态为记忆摘要，减少KV缓存约2.5倍。
发布OpenMementos数据集（228K推理轨迹），支持两阶段SFT训练。
扩展vLLM实现推理加速，吞吐量提升约1.75倍，并支持RL进一步改进准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3、Phi-4、Olmo 3等模型（8B-32B）上验证，在数学、科学和编程基准上保持强准确率，同时实现约2.5倍峰值KV缓存减少和约1.75倍吞吐量提升。
limitations: 仅针对推理任务，可能不适用于其他类型的长上下文场景。
记忆摘要的生成质量依赖训练数据，可能引入信息损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MEMENTO方法，让LLM将推理过程分段压缩为记忆摘要，减少KV缓存并提升吞吐量。

papers.title: QMC-Net: Data-Aware Quantum Representations for Remote Sensing Image Classification
papers.abstract: Hybrid quantum-classical models offer a promising route for learning from complex data; however, their application to multi-band remote sensing imagery often relies on generic, data-agnostic quantum circuits that fail to account for channel-specific statistical variability. In this work, we propose a data-driven framework that maps band-level statistics such as Shannon Entropy, Variance, Spectral Flatness, and Edge Density to the hyperparameters of customized quantum circuits. Building on this framework, we introduce QMC-Net, a hybrid architecture that processes six data channels using band-specific quantum circuits, enabling adaptive quantum feature encoding and transformation across channels. Experiments on the EuroSAT and SAT-6 datasets demonstrate that QMC-Net achieves accuracies of 93.80 % and 99.34 %, respectively, while a residual-enhanced variant further improves performance to 94.69 % and 99.39 %. These results consistently outperform strong classical baselines and monolithic hybrid quantum models, highlighting the effectiveness of data-aware quantum circuit design under NISQ constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据感知的量子电路设计QMC-Net，利用波段统计量定制量子超参数，在遥感图像分类中超越经典和混合量子基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合量子-经典模型在多波段遥感图像中常使用通用量子电路，忽略通道间统计差异，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计数据感知的量子电路以自适应编码多波段遥感图像的特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QMC-Net，利用波段级统计量（香农熵、方差、谱平坦度、边缘密度）映射到定制量子电路的超参数，每个波段使用独立量子电路进行特征编码和变换。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的量子电路设计框架，利用波段统计量定制超参数。
引入QMC-Net混合架构，在EuroSAT和SAT-6上分别达到93.80%和99.34%准确率，残差增强变体进一步提升。
analysis.experiments: 在EuroSAT和SAT-6数据集上评估，QMC-Net准确率分别为93.80%和99.34%，残差增强变体达94.69%和99.39%，优于经典基线和混合量子模型。
limitations: 仅针对遥感图像，泛化性未验证。
NISQ设备噪声影响未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据感知的量子电路设计QMC-Net，利用波段统计量定制量子超参数，在遥感图像分类中超越经典和混合量子基线。

papers.title: Training-Free Object-Background Compositional T2I via Dynamic Spatial Guidance and Multi-Path Pruning
papers.abstract: Existing text-to-image diffusion models, while excelling at subject synthesis, exhibit a persistent foreground bias that treats the background as a passive and under-optimized byproduct. This imbalance compromises global scene coherence and constrains compositional control. To address the limitation, we propose a training-free framework that restructures diffusion sampling to explicitly account for foreground-background interactions. Our approach consists of two key components. First, Dynamic Spatial Guidance introduces a soft, time step dependent gating mechanism that modulates foreground and background attention during the diffusion process, enabling spatially balanced generation. Second, Multi-Path Pruning performs multi-path latent exploration and dynamically filters candidate trajectories using both internal attention statistics and external semantic alignment signals, retaining trajectories that better satisfy object-background constraints. We further develop a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate object-background compositionality. Extensive evaluations across multiple diffusion backbones demonstrate consistent improvements in background coherence and object-background compositional alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的动态空间引导与多路径剪枝框架，改善文本到图像扩散模型中的前景-背景组合生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型存在前景偏见，将背景视为被动副产品，导致场景连贯性差且组合控制受限。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散模型生成中前景-背景不平衡导致的场景不连贯和组合控制不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出扩散模型存在前景偏见，背景生成被动且未充分优化，影响全局场景连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的框架，包含动态空间引导（基于时间步的软门控机制调节前景/背景注意力）和多路径剪枝（多路径潜在探索并利用内部注意力统计与外部语义对齐信号动态筛选轨迹）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的扩散采样重构框架，显式建模前景-背景交互。
设计动态空间引导和多路径剪枝两个关键组件。
构建专门评估对象-背景组合性的基准。
analysis.experiments: 在多个扩散骨干网络上进行广泛评估，显示在背景连贯性和对象-背景组合对齐上的一致改进。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练扩散模型，可能受限于其固有偏差。
多路径剪枝可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的动态空间引导与多路径剪枝框架，改善文本到图像扩散模型中的前景-背景组合生成。

papers.title: Is There Knowledge Left to Extract? Evidence of Fragility in Medically Fine-Tuned Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly adapted through domain-specific fine-tuning, yet it remains unclear whether this improves reasoning beyond superficial visual cues, particularly in high-stakes domains like medicine. We evaluate four paired open-source VLMs (LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med; Gemma vs. MedGemma) across four medical imaging tasks of increasing difficulty: brain tumor, pneumonia, skin cancer, and histopathology classification. We find that performance degrades toward near-random levels as task difficulty increases, indicating limited clinical reasoning. Medical fine-tuning provides no consistent advantage, and models are highly sensitive to prompt formulation, with minor changes causing large swings in accuracy and refusal rates. To test whether closed-form VQA suppresses latent knowledge, we introduce a description-based pipeline where models generate image descriptions that a text-only model (GPT-5.1) uses for diagnosis. This recovers a limited additional signal but remains bounded by task difficulty. Analysis of vision encoder embeddings further shows that failures stem from both weak visual representations and downstream reasoning. Overall, medical VLM performance is fragile, prompt-dependent, and not reliably improved by domain-specific fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 医学微调VLM在困难任务上表现脆弱，性能接近随机，且对提示高度敏感。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在医学等高风险领域被广泛微调，但其是否真正提升了临床推理能力尚不明确，现有方法可能仅依赖表面视觉线索。
analysis.problem: 评估医学微调VLM在困难任务中的临床推理能力，并探究其性能脆弱性的根源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着任务难度增加，模型性能退化至接近随机水平；医学微调未带来一致优势；模型对提示措辞高度敏感，微小改动导致准确率和拒绝率大幅波动；视觉编码器嵌入分析表明失败源于弱视觉表征和下游推理不足。
analysis.method: 设计描述式管道：模型生成图像描述，再由纯文本模型（GPT-5.1）基于描述进行诊断，以测试封闭式VQA是否抑制潜在知识。
contributions: 系统评估了四个开源VLM在四个医学成像任务上的表现，揭示了性能随难度增加而退化。
发现医学微调未提供一致优势，且模型对提示高度敏感。
引入描述式管道，证明恢复的额外信号有限，仍受任务难度限制。
analysis.experiments: 在脑肿瘤、肺炎、皮肤癌和组织病理学四个医学成像任务上评估了LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med、Gemma vs. MedGemma四对模型，并进行了视觉编码器嵌入分析。
limitations: 仅评估了四个开源VLM，可能不适用于其他架构。
描述式管道依赖GPT-5.1，可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医学微调VLM在困难任务上表现脆弱，性能接近随机，且对提示高度敏感。

papers.title: Steered LLM Activations are Non-Surjective
papers.abstract: Activation steering is a popular white-box control technique that modifies model activations to elicit an abstract change in its behavior. It has also become a standard tool in interpretability (e.g., probing truthfulness, or translating activations into human-readable explanations) and safety research (e.g., jailbreakability). However, it is unclear whether steered behavior is realizable by any textual prompt. In this work, we cast this question as a surjectivity problem: for a fixed model, does every steered activation admit a preimage under the model's natural forward pass? Under practical assumptions, we prove that activation steering pushes the residual stream off the manifold of states reachable from discrete prompts. Almost surely, no prompt can reproduce the same internal behavior induced by steering. We also illustrate this finding empirically across three widely used LLMs. Our results establish a formal separation between white-box steerability and black-box prompting. We therefore caution against interpreting the ease and success of activation steering as evidence of prompt-based interpretability or vulnerability, and argue for evaluation protocols that explicitly decouple white-box and black-box interventions.

analysis.tldr: 激活引导将残差流推离离散提示可达流形，因此几乎必然无法被任何文本提示复现。
analysis.research_motivation: 激活引导是解释性和安全性研究中常用的白盒控制技术，但其产生的行为是否能用文本提示实现尚不清楚，这关系到相关结论的有效性。
analysis.problem: 证明激活引导后的模型内部状态是否总能被某个文本提示的隐式前向传播所对应（即满射性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论证明激活引导将残差流推离离散提示可达的流形，几乎必然不存在提示能复现相同内部行为。
analysis.method: 将问题形式化为满射性，在实用假设下证明激活引导将残差流推出离散提示可达流形，并给出几乎必然无原像的结论。
contributions: 理论证明激活引导的模型状态几乎必然无法被任何文本提示复现，建立了白盒引导与黑盒提示之间的形式化分离。
在三个广泛使用的LLM上进行了实证验证。
analysis.experiments: 在三个广泛使用的LLM上进行了实证验证，但摘要未提供具体实验设置或结果。
limitations: 理论证明依赖于特定假设，可能不适用于所有模型或引导方法。
实证验证范围有限，未涵盖更多模型或引导技术。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 激活引导将残差流推离离散提示可达流形，因此几乎必然无法被任何文本提示复现。

papers.title: Vector Field Synthesis with Sparse Streamlines Using Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: We present a novel diffusion-based framework for synthesizing 2D vector fields from sparse, coherent inputs (i.e., streamlines) while maintaining physical plausibility. Our method employs a conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model with classifier-free guidance, enabling progressive reconstruction that preserves both geometric and physical constraints. Experimental results demonstrate our method's ability to synthesize plausible vector fields that adhere to physical laws while maintaining fidelity to sparse input observations, outperforming traditional optimization-based approaches in terms of flexibility and physical consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的稀疏流线向量场合成方法，兼顾物理合理性与输入保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统向量场合成方法依赖优化，难以同时满足稀疏输入约束与物理合理性，且灵活性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏流线输入合成物理上合理的二维向量场。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用条件去噪扩散概率模型，结合无分类器引导，逐步重建向量场以保持几何与物理约束。
contributions: 提出首个基于扩散模型的稀疏流线向量场合成框架
在保持物理合理性的同时优于传统优化方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对2D向量场，未扩展到3D
可能依赖流线质量，对噪声输入敏感

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于扩散模型的稀疏流线向量场合成方法，兼顾物理合理性与输入保真度。

papers.title: COMPOSITE-Stem
papers.abstract: AI agents hold growing promise for accelerating scientific discovery; yet, a lack of frontier evaluations hinders adoption into real workflows. Expert-written benchmarks have proven effective at measuring AI reasoning, but most at this stage have become saturated and only measure performance on constrained outputs. To help address this gap, we introduce COMPOSITE-STEM, a benchmark of 70 expert-written tasks in physics, biology, chemistry, and mathematics, curated by doctoral-level researchers. Our benchmark combines exact-match grading and criterion-based rubrics with an LLM-as-a-jury grading protocol, allowing more flexible assessment of scientifically meaningful outputs. Using an adapted multimodal Terminus-2 agent harness within the Harbor agentic evaluation framework, we evaluate four frontier models. The top-performing model achieves 21%, demonstrating that COMPOSITE-STEM captures capabilities beyond current agent reach. All tasks are open-sourced with contributor permission to support reproducibility and to promote additional research towards AI's acceleration of scientific progress in these domains.

analysis.tldr: COMPOSITE-STEM 是一个由博士级研究者编写的 70 道科学推理任务基准，用于评估 AI agent 在物理、生物、化学和数学方面的能力，当前最佳模型仅达 21%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI agent 基准多已饱和且仅测量受限输出，缺乏对真实科学工作流中前沿能力的评估，阻碍了 AI 在科学发现中的实际应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够衡量 AI agent 在科学领域（物理、生物、化学、数学）中开放、有意义输出的非饱和基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 70 个专家编写任务的基准，结合精确匹配评分和基于标准的评分协议（LLM-as-a-jury），并使用多模态 Terminus-2 agent 在 Harbor 框架中进行评估。
contributions: 提出了 COMPOSITE-STEM，一个由博士级研究者编写的 70 道科学推理任务基准，覆盖物理、生物、化学和数学。
引入了结合精确匹配和 LLM-as-a-jury 的灵活评分协议，以评估科学上有意义的输出。
评估了四个前沿模型，最佳模型仅达 21%，表明该基准捕捉了当前 agent 能力之外的任务。
analysis.experiments: 在 COMPOSITE-STEM 基准上评估了四个前沿模型，使用多模态 Terminus-2 agent 和 Harbor 框架，最佳模型准确率为 21%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（70 个任务），可能不足以全面覆盖科学领域。
LLM-as-a-jury 评分协议可能存在偏差或一致性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: COMPOSITE-STEM 是一个由博士级研究者编写的 70 道科学推理任务基准，用于评估 AI agent 在物理、生物、化学和数学方面的能力，当前最佳模型仅达 21%。

papers.title: F3G-Avatar : Face Focused Full-body Gaussian Avatar
papers.abstract: Existing full-body Gaussian avatar methods primarily optimize global reconstruction quality and often fail to preserve fine-grained facial geometry and expression details. This challenge arises from limited facial representational capacity that causes difficulties in modeling high-frequency pose-dependent deformations. To address this, we propose F3G-Avatar, a full-body, face-aware avatar synthesis method that reconstructs animatable human representations from multi-view RGB video and regressed pose/shape parameters. Starting from a clothed Momentum Human Rig (MHR) template, front/back positional maps are rendered and decoded into 3D Gaussians through a two-branch architecture: a body branch that captures pose-dependent non-rigid deformations and a face-focused deformation branch that refines head geometry and appearance. The predicted Gaussians are fused, posed with linear blend skinning (LBS), and rendered with differentiable Gaussian splatting. Training combines reconstruction and perceptual objectives with a face-specific adversarial loss to enhance realism in close-up views. Experiments demonstrate strong rendering quality, with face-view performance reaching PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS of 26.243/0.964/0.084 on the AvatarReX dataset. Ablations further highlight contributions of the MHR template and the face-focused deformation. F3G-Avatar provides a practical, high-quality pipeline for realistic, animatable full-body avatar synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向全身体验的面部聚焦高斯虚拟人方法，通过双分支架构和面部对抗损失提升面部细节质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全身高斯虚拟人方法主要优化全局重建质量，但难以保留精细的面部几何和表情细节，限制了高保真虚拟人应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在全身体验虚拟人合成中同时保持全局重建质量和面部细节的真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法因面部表示能力有限，难以建模高频姿态相关形变，导致面部细节丢失。
analysis.method: 提出F3G-Avatar，基于MHR模板，通过双分支架构（身体分支和面部聚焦形变分支）解码前后位置图为3D高斯，结合线性混合蒙皮和可微分高斯泼溅渲染，并引入面部对抗损失增强近景真实感。
contributions: 提出面部聚焦的全身高斯虚拟人方法，通过双分支架构分别处理身体和面部形变。
引入面部对抗损失和MHR模板，显著提升面部渲染质量。
analysis.experiments: 在AvatarReX数据集上，面部视角PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS达到26.243/0.964/0.084，消融实验验证了MHR模板和面部聚焦形变分支的有效性。
limitations: 依赖多视角RGB视频和回归的姿态/形状参数，可能限制单视角应用。
面部对抗损失可能引入额外训练不稳定因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向全身体验的面部聚焦高斯虚拟人方法，通过双分支架构和面部对抗损失提升面部细节质量。

papers.title: ProGAL-VLA: Grounded Alignment through Prospective Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision language action (VLA) models enable generalist robotic agents but often exhibit language ignorance, relying on visual shortcuts and remaining insensitive to instruction changes. We present Prospective Grounding and Alignment VLA (ProGAL-VLA), which constructs a 3D entity-centric graph (GSM), uses a slow planner to produce symbolic sub-goals, and aligns them with grounded entities via a Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC) loss. All actions are conditioned on a verified goal embedding $g_t$, whose attention entropy provides an intrinsic ambiguity signal. On LIBERO-Plus, ProGAL-VLA increases robustness under robot perturbations from 30.3 to 71.5 percent, reduces language ignorance by 3x-4x, and improves entity retrieval from 0.41 to 0.71 Recall@1. On the Custom Ambiguity Benchmark, it reaches AUROC 0.81 (vs. 0.52), AUPR 0.79, and raises clarification on ambiguous inputs from 0.09 to 0.81 without harming unambiguous success. The verification bottleneck increases mutual information of language-actions, the GAC loss imposes an entity-level InfoNCE bound, and attention entropy yields calibrated selective prediction, indicating that explicit verified grounding is an effective path toward instruction-sensitive, ambiguity-aware agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProGAL-VLA，通过3D实体图构建、符号子目标规划和对齐对比损失，解决VLA模型的语言忽视和指令不敏感问题。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在机器人操作中常依赖视觉捷径，对语言指令变化不敏感，导致语言忽视现象，限制了指令跟随的鲁棒性和安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何使VLA模型实现基于语言指令的鲁棒实体对齐，并在模糊指令下主动识别歧义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VLA模型存在语言忽视，即对指令变化不敏感，依赖视觉捷径；通过注意力熵可检测歧义，验证瓶颈能提升语言-动作互信息。
analysis.method: 构建3D实体中心图（GSM），使用慢速规划器生成符号子目标，通过Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC)损失对齐子目标与实体，所有动作基于验证后的目标嵌入g_t，其注意力熵作为内在歧义信号。
contributions: 提出ProGAL-VLA框架，结合3D实体图、符号规划和对比对齐损失，实现指令敏感的机器人操作。
在LIBERO-Plus和Custom Ambiguity Benchmark上显著提升鲁棒性、降低语言忽视、改进实体检索和歧义检测。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO-Plus上，机器人扰动下成功率从30.3%提升至71.5%，语言忽视降低3-4倍，实体检索Recall@1从0.41提升至0.71；在Custom Ambiguity Benchmark上，AUROC达0.81（对比0.52），AUPR 0.79，模糊输入澄清率从0.09提升至0.81。
limitations: 可能依赖3D场景图构建的准确性，在复杂动态环境中可能受限。
慢速规划器可能引入额外计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProGAL-VLA，通过3D实体图构建、符号子目标规划和对齐对比损失，解决VLA模型的语言忽视和指令不敏感问题。

papers.title: ACCIDENT: A Benchmark Dataset for Vehicle Accident Detection from Traffic Surveillance Videos
papers.abstract: We introduce ACCIDENT, a benchmark dataset for traffic accident detection in CCTV footage, designed to evaluate models in supervised (IID and OOD) and zero-shot settings, reflecting both data-rich and data-scarce scenarios. The benchmark consists of a curated set of 2,027 real and 2,211 synthetic clips annotated with the accident time, spatial location, and high-level collision type. We define three core tasks: (i) temporal localization of the accident, (ii) its spatial localization, and (iii) collision type classification. Each task is evaluated using custom metrics that account for the uncertainty and ambiguity inherent in CCTV footage. In addition to the benchmark, we provide a diverse set of baselines, including heuristic, motion-aware, and vision-language approaches, and show that ACCIDENT is challenging. You can access the ACCIDENT at: https://accidentbench.github.io

analysis.tldr: ACCIDENT是一个用于监控视频交通事故检测的基准数据集，包含真实和合成视频，支持监督和零样本评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交通事故检测数据集规模小、场景单一，缺乏对真实监控视频中不确定性和模糊性的考虑，且缺乏统一的评估标准。
analysis.problem: 构建一个全面、具有挑战性的基准数据集，用于评估交通事故检测模型在时间定位、空间定位和碰撞类型分类三个核心任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含2027个真实和2211个合成视频片段的数据集，标注事故时间、空间位置和碰撞类型，定义三个核心任务并设计考虑不确定性的评估指标，提供多种基线方法。
contributions: 提出了ACCIDENT数据集，包含大量真实和合成监控视频，支持监督和零样本评估。
定义了三个核心任务（时间定位、空间定位、碰撞类型分类）及相应的评估指标。
提供了多种基线方法，并展示了数据集的挑战性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含2D监控视频，缺乏3D信息。
合成视频与真实视频之间的域差异可能影响模型泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ACCIDENT是一个用于监控视频交通事故检测的基准数据集，包含真实和合成视频，支持监督和零样本评估。

papers.title: EE-MCP: Self-Evolving MCP-GUI Agents via Automated Environment Generation and Experience Learning
papers.abstract: Computer-use agents that combine GUI interaction with structured API calls via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) show promise for automating software tasks. However, existing approaches lack a principled understanding of how agents should balance these two modalities and how to enable iterative self-improvement across diverse applications. We formulate MCP-GUI interplay as a unified hybrid policy learning problem where the agent learns when each modality provides complementary advantages, and show that distillation and experience augmentation target fundamentally different failure modes - requiring application-aware mechanism selection. Built on this formulation, we propose a self-evolving framework with a fully automatic pipeline that orchestrates automatic environment generation and validation, trajectory collection, gap-driven task synthesis, and quality-filtered training - all without manual intervention. A key innovation is our experience bank, which accumulates LLM-learned rules from trajectory comparison, enabling inference-time improvement without fine-tuning. Systematic \textbf{cross-application analysis} across three desktop applications reveals that the optimal strategy depends on MCP-GUI composition: distillation achieves 77.8\% pass rate on MCP-dominant tasks (+17.8pp), while the experience bank excels on GUI-intensive tasks (+10.0pp).

analysis.tldr: 提出EE-MCP框架，通过自动环境生成和经验学习实现GUI-MCP混合智能体的自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体缺乏对GUI与MCP两种模态平衡使用的原则性理解，且无法在多样化应用中实现迭代自我改进。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体学习何时使用GUI交互、何时使用MCP API调用，并实现无需人工干预的自我进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过跨应用分析发现，最优策略取决于MCP-GUI组成：蒸馏在MCP主导任务上达到77.8%通过率（+17.8pp），而经验库在GUI密集型任务上提升+10.0pp。
analysis.method: 提出自进化框架，包含自动环境生成与验证、轨迹收集、差距驱动任务合成、质量过滤训练的全自动流水线，以及用于推理时改进的经验库。
contributions: 将MCP-GUI交互形式化为统一混合策略学习问题，并揭示蒸馏与经验增强针对不同失败模式。
提出无需人工干预的自动环境生成与经验学习框架，包含经验库实现推理时改进。
通过跨应用系统分析验证了方法在不同任务类型上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个桌面应用上进行跨应用分析，蒸馏在MCP主导任务上达到77.8%通过率（+17.8pp），经验库在GUI密集型任务上提升+10.0pp。
limitations: 可能仅适用于桌面应用场景，未验证其他领域。
经验库的规则积累可能受限于LLM的推理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EE-MCP框架，通过自动环境生成和经验学习实现GUI-MCP混合智能体的自我进化。

papers.title: RobustMedSAM: Degradation-Resilient Medical Image Segmentation via Robust Foundation Model Adaptation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation models built on Segment Anything Model (SAM) achieve strong performance on clean benchmarks, yet their reliability often degrades under realistic image corruptions such as noise, blur, motion artifacts, and modality-specific distortions. Existing approaches address either medical-domain adaptation or corruption robustness, but not both jointly. In SAM, we find that these capabilities are concentrated in complementary modules: the image encoder preserves medical priors, while the mask decoder governs corruption robustness. Motivated by this observation, we propose RobustMedSAM, which adopts module-wise checkpoint fusion by initializing the image encoder from MedSAM and the mask decoder from RobustSAM under a shared ViT-B architecture. We then fine-tune only the mask decoder on 35 medical datasets from MedSegBench, spanning six imaging modalities and 12 corruption types, while freezing the remaining components to preserve pretrained medical representations. We additionally investigate an SVD-based parameter-efficient variant for limited encoder adaptation. Experiments on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks show that RobustMedSAM improves degraded-image Dice from 0.613 to 0.719 (+0.106) over SAM, demonstrating that structured fusion of complementary pretrained models is an effective and practical approach for robust medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 通过模块级检查点融合，将医学先验与鲁棒性分离到不同模块，仅微调解码器即可显著提升医学图像分割在退化图像上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型在干净基准上表现优异，但在真实图像退化（如噪声、模糊、运动伪影）下可靠性下降，且现有方法未能同时解决医学域适应和退化鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲医学先验的前提下，提升SAM在多种图像退化下的医学图像分割鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现SAM中图像编码器主要保留医学先验，而掩码解码器控制退化鲁棒性，两者互补。
analysis.method: 提出模块级检查点融合：图像编码器初始化为MedSAM，掩码解码器初始化为RobustSAM，仅微调解码器，并探索基于SVD的参数高效变体。
contributions: 揭示了SAM中医学先验与退化鲁棒性分别由图像编码器和掩码解码器控制的现象。
提出RobustMedSAM，通过模块级融合和部分微调实现鲁棒医学图像分割。
在35个数据集、6种模态、12种退化类型上验证，退化图像Dice从0.613提升至0.719。
analysis.experiments: 在MedSegBench的35个医学数据集上微调，并在分布内和分布外基准上评估，退化图像Dice从0.613提升至0.719。
limitations: 仅微调解码器可能限制对复杂退化的适应能力。
SVD变体可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过模块级检查点融合，将医学先验与鲁棒性分离到不同模块，仅微调解码器即可显著提升医学图像分割在退化图像上的性能。

papers.title: Controllable and Verifiable Tool-Use Data Synthesis for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Existing synthetic tool-use corpora are primarily designed for offline supervised fine-tuning, yet reinforcement learning (RL) requires executable environments that support reward-checkable online rollouts. We propose COVERT, a two-stage pipeline that first generates reliable base tool-use trajectories through self-evolving synthesis with multi-level validation, and then applies oracle-preserving augmentations that systematically increase environmental complexity. These augmentations introduce distractor tools, indirect or ambiguous user queries, and noisy, multi-format, or erroneous tool outputs, while strictly preserving oracle tool calls and final answers as ground truth. This design enables automatic reward computation via reference matching for standard cases and lightweight judge-assisted verification for special behaviors such as error detection, supporting RL optimization of tool-calling policies. On Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B, COVERT-RL improves overall accuracy on BFCL v3 from 56.5 to 59.9 and on ACEBench from 53.0 to 59.3, with minimal regressions on general-ability benchmarks; when stacked on SFT, it further reaches 62.1 and 61.8, confirming additive gains. These results suggest that oracle-preserving synthetic environments offer a practical RL refinement stage, complementary to SFT, for improving tool-use robustness under ambiguity and unreliable tool feedback.

analysis.tldr: 提出COVERT两阶段流程，通过自演化合成和保真增强生成可验证工具使用数据，用于智能体强化学习，显著提升工具调用准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成工具使用语料主要面向离线监督微调，但强化学习需要可执行环境以支持可奖励检查的在线展开，缺乏此类数据。
analysis.problem: 如何生成适用于强化学习的、可验证奖励的工具使用数据，以提升智能体在复杂环境中的工具调用鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流程：第一阶段通过自演化合成与多级验证生成可靠的基础工具使用轨迹；第二阶段应用保真增强，引入干扰工具、模糊查询、噪声输出等，同时保留标准工具调用和最终答案作为真实标签，支持自动奖励计算和轻量级裁判辅助验证。
contributions: 提出COVERT，一种可控且可验证的工具使用数据合成方法，专为智能体强化学习设计。
通过保真增强生成复杂环境数据，支持自动奖励计算和裁判辅助验证，实现RL优化。
在Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B上验证，COVERT-RL在BFCL v3和ACEBench上分别提升3.4和6.3个百分点，且与SFT叠加获得额外增益。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B模型上评估，使用BFCL v3和ACEBench基准测试，COVERT-RL将BFCL v3准确率从56.5提升至59.9，ACEBench从53.0提升至59.3；叠加SFT后分别达到62.1和61.8，且通用能力基准退化最小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的工具调用任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
裁判辅助验证的可靠性可能受限于裁判模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COVERT两阶段流程，通过自演化合成和保真增强生成可验证工具使用数据，用于智能体强化学习，显著提升工具调用准确率。

papers.title: Explainable Human Activity Recognition: A Unified Review of Concepts and Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) has become a key component of intelligent systems for healthcare monitoring, assistive living, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. Although deep learning has substantially improved HAR performance on multivariate sensor data, the resulting models often remain opaque, limiting trust, reliability, and real-world deployment. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has therefore emerged as a critical direction for making HAR systems more transparent and human-centered. This paper presents a comprehensive review of explainable HAR methods across wearable, ambient, physiological, and multimodal sensing settings. We introduce a unified perspective that separates conceptual dimensions of explainability from algorithmic explanation mechanisms, reducing ambiguities in prior surveys. Building on this distinction, we present a mechanism-centric taxonomy of XAI-HAR methods covering major explanation paradigms. The review examines how these methods address the temporal, multimodal, and semantic complexities of HAR, and summarize their interpretability objectives, explanation targets, and limitations. In addition, we discuss current evaluation practices, highlight key challenges in achieving reliable and deployable XAI-HAR, and outline directions toward trustworthy activity recognition systems that better support human understanding and decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 综述可解释人工智能在人体活动识别中的应用，提出统一概念与机制分类法。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习提升了HAR性能但模型不透明，限制信任与部署，XAI成为关键方向。
analysis.problem: 现有XAI-HAR综述概念模糊、分类混乱，缺乏统一视角。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出概念维度与算法机制分离的统一视角，构建以机制为中心的XAI-HAR方法分类法。
contributions: 统一了可解释性的概念维度与算法机制，减少歧义
提出了机制中心的XAI-HAR分类法，覆盖主要解释范式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有新兴XAI方法
评估实践讨论可能不够深入
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述可解释人工智能在人体活动识别中的应用，提出统一概念与机制分类法。

papers.title: GIANTS: Generative Insight Anticipation from Scientific Literature
papers.abstract: Scientific breakthroughs often emerge from synthesizing prior ideas into novel contributions. While language models (LMs) show promise in scientific discovery, their ability to perform this targeted, literature-grounded synthesis remains underexplored. We introduce insight anticipation, a generation task in which a model predicts a downstream paper's core insight from its foundational parent papers. To evaluate this capability, we develop GiantsBench, a benchmark of 17k examples across eight scientific domains, where each example consists of a set of parent papers paired with the core insight of a downstream paper. We evaluate models using an LM judge that scores similarity between generated and ground-truth insights, and show that these similarity scores correlate with expert human ratings. Finally, we present GIANTS-4B, an LM trained via reinforcement learning (RL) to optimize insight anticipation using these similarity scores as a proxy reward. Despite its smaller open-source architecture, GIANTS-4B outperforms proprietary baselines and generalizes to unseen domains, achieving a 34% relative improvement in similarity score over gemini-3-pro. Human evaluations further show that GIANTS-4B produces insights that are more conceptually clear than those of the base model. In addition, SciJudge-30B, a third-party model trained to compare research abstracts by likely citation impact, predicts that insights generated by GIANTS-4B are more likely to lead to higher citations, preferring them over the base model in 68% of pairwise comparisons. We release our code, benchmark, and model to support future research in automated scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出洞察预测任务及GiantsBench基准，通过强化学习训练GIANTS-4B模型，在科学文献洞察生成上超越闭源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学突破常源于综合已有思想，但语言模型在基于文献的定向综合能力尚未充分探索，现有方法缺乏针对下游论文核心洞察的生成与评估。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型从一组父论文中预测出下游论文的核心洞察，并建立可靠的评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建GiantsBench基准（17k示例，8个科学领域），使用LM裁判评估生成洞察与真实洞察的相似度；训练GIANTS-4B模型，通过强化学习以相似度分数作为代理奖励优化洞察预测。
contributions: 提出洞察预测任务并构建跨领域基准GiantsBench
训练GIANTS-4B模型，在相似度分数上比gemini-3-pro提升34%，且泛化到未见领域
analysis.experiments: 在GiantsBench上评估，使用LM裁判评分与专家人工评分相关；人类评估显示GIANTS-4B洞察更清晰；第三方模型SciJudge-30B预测GIANTS-4B的洞察更可能获得高引用（68%偏好）。
limitations: 依赖LM裁判评分作为代理奖励，可能不完全反映真实洞察质量
仅评估文本相似度，未深入验证洞察的科学新颖性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出洞察预测任务及GiantsBench基准，通过强化学习训练GIANTS-4B模型，在科学文献洞察生成上超越闭源模型。

papers.title: Pioneer Agent: Continual Improvement of Small Language Models in Production
papers.abstract: Small language models are attractive for production deployment due to their low cost, fast inference, and ease of specialization. However, adapting them to a specific task remains a challenging engineering loop, driven not by training itself but by surrounding decisions: data curation, failure diagnosis, regression avoidance, and iteration control. We present Pioneer Agent, a closed-loop system that automates this lifecycle. In cold-start mode, given only a natural-language task description, the agent acquires data, constructs evaluation sets, and iteratively trains models by jointly optimizing data, hyperparameters, and learning strategy. In production mode, given a deployed model with labeled failures, it diagnoses error patterns, constructs targeted training data, and retrains under explicit regression constraints. To evaluate this setting, we introduce AdaptFT-Bench, a benchmark of synthetic inference logs with progressively increasing noise, designed to test the full adaptation loop: diagnosis, curriculum synthesis, retraining, and verification. Across eight cold-start benchmarks spanning reasoning, math, code generation, summarization, and classification, Pioneer Agent improves over base models by 1.6-83.8 points. On AdaptFT-Bench, it improves or preserves performance in all seven scenarios, while naive retraining degrades by up to 43 points. On two production-style deployments built from public benchmark tasks, it raises intent classification from 84.9% to 99.3% and Entity F1 from 0.345 to 0.810. Beyond performance gains, the agent often discovers effective training strategies, including chain-of-thought supervision, task-specific optimization, and quality-focused data curation, purely from downstream feedback.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个自动化闭环系统Pioneer Agent，持续改进小语言模型在生产中的性能，无需人工干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 小语言模型部署成本低、推理快，但针对特定任务的适配过程繁琐，主要挑战在于数据整理、故障诊断、回归避免和迭代控制等工程决策，而非训练本身。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化小语言模型从冷启动到生产部署的持续改进生命周期，包括数据获取、评估集构建、训练优化和回归约束下的重训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Pioneer Agent是一个闭环系统，包含冷启动模式和生产模式。冷启动模式下，仅根据自然语言任务描述自动获取数据、构建评估集并迭代训练模型；生产模式下，根据部署模型的失败案例诊断错误模式，构建针对性训练数据并在回归约束下重训练。
contributions: 提出Pioneer Agent，一个自动化小语言模型持续改进的闭环系统。
引入AdaptFT-Bench基准，用于评估完整的适配循环（诊断、课程合成、重训练和验证）。
在多个基准上展示显著性能提升，并发现有效的训练策略。
analysis.experiments: 在8个冷启动基准（涵盖推理、数学、代码生成、摘要和分类）上，Pioneer Agent相比基础模型提升1.6-83.8个点。在AdaptFT-Bench上，所有7个场景均提升或保持性能，而朴素重训练最多下降43个点。在两个生产风格部署中，意图分类从84.9%提升至99.3%，实体F1从0.345提升至0.810。
limitations: 可能依赖任务描述的质量和初始数据获取的多样性。
在极端噪声或复杂任务上可能仍需人工干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个自动化闭环系统Pioneer Agent，持续改进小语言模型在生产中的性能，无需人工干预。

papers.title: Biomarker-Based Pretraining for Chagas Disease Screening in Electrocardiograms
papers.abstract: Chagas disease screening via ECGs is limited by scarce and noisy labels in existing datasets. We propose a biomarker-based pretraining approach, where an ECG feature extractor is first trained to predict percentile-binned blood biomarkers from the MIMIC-IV-ECG dataset. The pretrained model is then fine-tuned on Brazilian datasets for Chagas detection. Our 5-model ensemble, developed by the Ahus AIM team, achieved a challenge score of 0.269 on the hidden test set, ranking 5th in Detection of Chagas Disease from the ECG: The George B. Moody PhysioNet Challenge 2025. Source code and the model are shared on GitHub: github.com/Ahus-AIM/physionet-challenge-2025

analysis.tldr: 提出基于生物标志物的预训练方法，利用MIMIC-IV-ECG数据预测血液生物标志物，再微调用于恰加斯病ECG筛查，在PhysioNet挑战赛中获得第5名。
analysis.research_motivation: 恰加斯病ECG筛查受限于现有数据集中标签稀少且噪声大，需要更有效的预训练方法来提升检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生物标志物作为监督信号进行ECG特征预训练，以改善恰加斯病筛查的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 首先在MIMIC-IV-ECG数据集上训练ECG特征提取器，预测百分位分箱的血液生物标志物；然后将预训练模型在巴西数据集上微调用于恰加斯病检测。
contributions: 提出了一种基于生物标志物的ECG预训练方法，利用血液生物标志物作为监督信号。
在PhysioNet Challenge 2025恰加斯病检测任务中取得第5名成绩，并开源代码和模型。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV-ECG数据集上进行预训练，在巴西数据集上微调，最终5模型集成在隐藏测试集上获得0.269的挑战分数，排名第5。
limitations: 预训练依赖MIMIC-IV-ECG数据集，可能无法完全覆盖恰加斯病ECG的特定特征。
仅使用生物标志物作为预训练目标，可能忽略其他重要生理信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于生物标志物的预训练方法，利用MIMIC-IV-ECG数据预测血液生物标志物，再微调用于恰加斯病ECG筛查，在PhysioNet挑战赛中获得第5名。

papers.title: Text-Guided 6D Object Pose Rearrangement via Closed-Loop VLM Agents
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit strong visual reasoning capabilities, yet they still struggle with 3D understanding. In particular, VLMs often fail to infer a text-consistent goal 6D pose of a target object in a 3D scene. However, we find that with some inference-time techniques and iterative reasoning, VLMs can achieve dramatic performance gains. Concretely, given a 3D scene represented by an RGB-D image (or a compositional scene of 3D meshes) and a text instruction specifying a desired state change, we repeat the following loop: observe the current scene; evaluate whether it is faithful to the instruction; propose a pose update for the target object; apply the update; and render the updated scene. Through this closed-loop interaction, the VLM effectively acts as an agent. We further introduce three inference-time techniques that are essential to this closed-loop process: (i) multi-view reasoning with supporting view selection, (ii) object-centered coordinate system visualization, and (iii) single-axis rotation prediction. Without any additional fine-tuning or new modules, our approach surpasses prior methods at predicting the text-guided goal 6D pose of the target object. It works consistently across both closed-source and open-source VLMs. Moreover, when combining our 6D pose prediction with simple robot motion planning, it enables more successful robot manipulation than existing methods. Finally, we conduct an ablation study to demonstrate the necessity of each proposed technique.

analysis.tldr: 通过闭环VLM智能体与推理时技术，无需微调即可实现文本引导的6D物体姿态重排。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在3D理解上存在局限，难以直接从文本推断目标物体的6D姿态，而现有方法依赖微调或额外模块，成本高且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在无需微调的情况下，准确预测文本指令对应的目标物体6D姿态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在3D场景理解中表现不佳，但通过推理时技术和迭代推理可显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 闭环VLM智能体：循环执行观察、评估、提出姿态更新、应用更新、渲染场景；结合多视角推理、物体中心坐标系可视化、单轴旋转预测三种推理时技术。
contributions: 提出一种闭环VLM智能体框架，无需微调即可实现文本引导的6D姿态预测。
引入三种推理时技术（多视角推理、物体中心坐标系可视化、单轴旋转预测），显著提升性能。
在多种VLM（闭源和开源）上验证有效性，并展示在机器人操作中的实际应用。
analysis.experiments: 在文本引导的6D姿态预测任务上，方法超越先前方法；结合机器人运动规划实现更成功的操作；消融实验验证各技术必要性。
limitations: 依赖RGB-D图像或3D网格场景表示，可能限制在纯RGB场景下的应用。
闭环迭代可能增加推理时间，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过闭环VLM智能体与推理时技术，无需微调即可实现文本引导的6D物体姿态重排。

papers.title: The Myth of Expert Specialization in MoEs: Why Routing Reflects Geometry, Not Necessarily Domain Expertise
papers.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoEs) are now ubiquitous in large language models, yet the mechanisms behind their "expert specialization" remain poorly understood. We show that, since MoE routers are linear maps, hidden state similarity is both necessary and sufficient to explain expert usage similarity, and specialization is therefore an emergent property of the representation space, not of the routing architecture itself. We confirm this at both token and sequence level across five pre-trained models. We additionally prove that load-balancing loss suppresses shared hidden state directions to maintain routing diversity, which might provide a theoretical explanation for specialization collapse under less diverse data, e.g. small batch. Despite this clean mechanistic account, we find that specialization patterns in pre-trained MoEs resist human interpretation: expert overlap between different models answering the same question is no higher than between entirely different questions ($\sim$60\%); prompt-level routing does not predict rollout-level routing; and deeper layers exhibit near-identical expert activation across semantically unrelated inputs, especially in reasoning models. We conclude that, while the efficiency perspective of MoEs is well understood, understanding expert specialization is at least as hard as understanding LLM hidden state geometry, a long-standing open problem in the literature.

analysis.tldr: MoE中的专家专业化并非源于路由架构，而是表征空间几何的涌现属性，且专业化模式难以被人类解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合专家模型（MoE）在大型语言模型中广泛应用，但其“专家专业化”的机制尚不明确，理解这一机制对于改进MoE设计和解释其行为至关重要。
analysis.problem: 揭示MoE中专家专业化的真正来源，并评估其可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：MoE路由器是线性映射，隐藏状态相似性足以解释专家使用相似性；负载均衡损失会抑制共享隐藏状态方向以维持路由多样性；专业化模式难以被人类解释，如不同模型对同一问题的专家重叠与不同问题相当，提示级路由无法预测展开级路由，深层专家激活在语义无关输入上几乎相同。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析（线性映射性质）和实证验证（五个预训练模型上的token和序列级实验）证明专家专业化是表征空间几何的涌现属性，而非路由架构本身。
contributions: 理论证明MoE路由器是线性映射，隐藏状态相似性既是专家使用相似性的必要条件也是充分条件。
实证验证了专业化是表征空间几何的涌现属性，并揭示了负载均衡损失对路由多样性的影响。
发现预训练MoE的专业化模式难以被人类解释，表明理解专业化与理解LLM隐藏状态几何同样困难。
analysis.experiments: 在五个预训练模型上进行了token和序列级实验，验证了理论分析。具体实验包括：专家使用相似性与隐藏状态相似性的关联、负载均衡损失的影响、不同模型间专家重叠、提示级与展开级路由一致性、深层专家激活的语义无关性。
limitations: 实验仅限于五个预训练模型，可能无法推广到所有MoE架构。
未提供具体量化结果或基准比较，仅定性描述现象。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE中的专家专业化并非源于路由架构，而是表征空间几何的涌现属性，且专业化模式难以被人类解释。

papers.title: Utterance-Level Methods for Identifying Reliable ASR-Output for Child Speech
papers.abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is increasingly used in applications involving child speech, such as language learning and literacy acquisition. However, the effectiveness of such applications is limited by high ASR error rates. The negative effects can be mitigated by identifying in advance which ASR-outputs are reliable. This work aims to develop two novel approaches for selecting reliable ASR-output at the utterance level, one for selecting reliable read speech and one for dialogue speech material. Evaluations were done on an English and a Dutch dataset, each with a baseline and finetuned model. The results show that utterance-level selection methods for identifying reliably transcribed speech recordings have high precision for the best strategy (P > 97.4) for both read speech and dialogue material, for both languages. Using the current optimal strategy allows 21.0% to 55.9% of dialogue/read speech datasets to be automatically selected with low (UER of < 2.6) error rates.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种语句级方法，用于识别儿童语音中可靠的ASR输出，在英语和荷兰语数据集上达到高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童语音ASR错误率高，影响语言学习等应用的效果，需要提前识别可靠输出来缓解负面影响。
analysis.problem: 如何从儿童语音的ASR输出中，在语句级别筛选出可靠转录的语音片段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种语句级选择方法，分别针对朗读语音和对话语音，结合基线模型和微调模型进行可靠性评估。
contributions: 提出两种新颖的语句级ASR输出可靠性选择方法，分别适用于朗读和对话场景。
在英语和荷兰语数据集上验证了方法的高精度，最优策略精确率>97.4%，可自动选择21.0%-55.9%的低错误率数据。
analysis.experiments: 在英语和荷兰语数据集上，使用基线模型和微调模型进行评估，最优策略精确率>97.4%，自动选择的数据错误率<2.6%。
limitations: 仅针对儿童语音，可能不适用于成人或其他领域。
方法依赖ASR模型和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种语句级方法，用于识别儿童语音中可靠的ASR输出，在英语和荷兰语数据集上达到高精度。

papers.title: Tango: Taming Visual Signals for Efficient Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Token pruning has emerged as a mainstream approach for developing efficient Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs). This work revisits and advances the two predominant token-pruning paradigms: attention-based selection and similarity-based clustering. Our study reveals two critical limitations in existing methods: (1) conventional top-k selection strategies fail to fully account for the attention distribution, which is often spatially multi-modal and long-tailed in magnitude; and (2) direct similarity-based clustering frequently generates fragmented clusters, resulting in distorted representations after pooling. To address these bottlenecks, we propose Tango, a novel framework designed to optimize the utilization of visual signals. Tango integrates a diversity-driven strategy to enhance attention-based token selection, and introduces Spatio-temporal Rotary Position Embedding (ST-RoPE) to preserve geometric structure via locality priors. Comprehensive experiments across various Video LLMs and video understanding benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our approach. Notably, when retaining only 10% of the video tokens, Tango preserves 98.9% of the original performance on LLaVA-OV while delivering a 1.88$\times$ inference speedup.

analysis.tldr: Tango通过多样性驱动选择和时空旋转位置嵌入优化视频大语言模型的token剪枝，仅用10%的token保留98.9%性能并实现1.88倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频大语言模型（Video LLMs）的token剪枝方法存在两个关键瓶颈：基于注意力的top-k选择未充分考虑注意力分布的多模态和长尾特性，而基于相似度的聚类常产生碎片化簇导致表征失真。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更有效的token剪枝策略，在保留视频关键视觉信息的同时显著提升Video LLMs的推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了两个现象：1）注意力分布具有空间多模态和长尾幅度特性，简单top-k选择会忽略重要token；2）直接相似度聚类会产生碎片化簇，池化后表征扭曲。
analysis.method: 提出Tango框架，包含两个核心组件：1）多样性驱动的注意力token选择策略，增强所选token的多样性；2）时空旋转位置嵌入（ST-RoPE），通过局部性先验保留几何结构。
contributions: 揭示了现有token剪枝方法在注意力分布和聚类表征上的关键缺陷
提出Tango框架，集成多样性驱动选择和ST-RoPE，有效提升剪枝效率
在多种Video LLMs和视频理解基准上验证了方法的有效性和泛化性，仅用10%token保持98.9%性能并加速1.88倍
analysis.experiments: 在多种Video LLMs和视频理解基准上进行实验，具体数据集和对比方法未在摘要中详述。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更长视频或更高分辨率下的表现
可能对特定注意力模式或视频内容敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Tango通过多样性驱动选择和时空旋转位置嵌入优化视频大语言模型的token剪枝，仅用10%的token保留98.9%性能并实现1.88倍加速。

papers.title: Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content Using a Distinct, Unified Mechanism
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) undergo alignment training to avoid harmful behaviors, yet the resulting safeguards remain brittle: jailbreaks routinely bypass them, and fine-tuning on narrow domains can induce ``emergent misalignment'' that generalizes broadly. Whether this brittleness reflects a fundamental lack of coherent internal organization for harmfulness remains unclear. Here we use targeted weight pruning as a causal intervention to probe the internal organization of harmfulness in LLMs. We find that harmful content generation depends on a compact set of weights that are general across harm types and distinct from benign capabilities. Aligned models exhibit a greater compression of harm generation weights than unaligned counterparts, indicating that alignment reshapes harmful representations internally--despite the brittleness of safety guardrails at the surface level. This compression explains emergent misalignment: if weights of harmful capabilities are compressed, fine-tuning that engages these weights in one domain can trigger broad misalignment. Consistent with this, pruning harm generation weights in a narrow domain substantially reduces emergent misalignment. Notably, LLMs harmful generation capability is dissociated from how they recognize and explain such content. Together, these results reveal a coherent internal structure for harmfulness in LLMs that may serve as a foundation for more principled approaches to safety.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成有害内容依赖一组紧凑且通用的权重，对齐训练会压缩这些权重，导致微调时出现广泛的不对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的安全防护（如对齐训练）容易被越狱或微调破坏，但其内部是否有统一的有害性组织机制尚不清楚，理解这一机制对构建更稳健的安全方法至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM生成有害内容的内部组织机制，以及对齐训练如何影响该机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出有害内容生成依赖一组紧凑且跨类型通用的权重，对齐模型比未对齐模型更压缩这些权重，且压缩解释了微调引发的广泛不对齐。
analysis.method: 使用目标权重剪枝作为因果干预手段，探测LLM中有害性相关的内部权重结构。
contributions: 发现有害内容生成依赖一组紧凑且通用的权重，与良性能力分离。
揭示对齐训练压缩了有害生成权重，解释了微调引发的广泛不对齐。
证明剪枝特定领域的有害生成权重可显著减少涌现的不对齐。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型架构或规模。
剪枝方法的泛化性和实际部署可行性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成有害内容依赖一组紧凑且通用的权重，对齐训练会压缩这些权重，导致微调时出现广泛的不对齐。

papers.title: DeepTutor: Towards Agentic Personalized Tutoring
papers.abstract: Education is one of the most promising real-world applications for Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current LLMs rely on static pre-training knowledge and lack adaptation to individual learners, while existing RAG systems fall short in delivering personalized, guided feedback. To bridge this gap, we present DeepTutor, a fully open-source agentic framework that unifies citation-grounded problem tutoring with difficulty-calibrated question generation. A hybrid personalization engine couples static knowledge grounding with dynamic learner memory, continuously adapting each interaction to the student's evolving needs. The same personalization substrate further extends to adaptive learning workflows, interactive books, and proactive multi-channel tutoring agents. To evaluate personalized tutoring, we introduce TutorBench, an interactive benchmark incorporating customized learner profiles grounded in university-level curricula across five domains. We further propose an LLM-based first-person interactive evaluation protocol that conducts assessments via a profile-driven student simulator. Complementary evaluations on established benchmarks, supported by human-alignment and ablation studies, confirm the framework's robustness and general utility. Results show that DeepTutor improves personalized metrics by 10.8\% on average and strengthens general agentic reasoning across five backbone models by 29.4\%.

analysis.tldr: DeepTutor 是一个开源智能辅导框架，通过混合个性化引擎和交互式基准 TutorBench，在个性化指标上平均提升 10.8%，并增强通用智能体推理能力 29.4%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 LLM 依赖静态预训练知识，缺乏对个体学习者的适应性，而现有 RAG 系统在提供个性化、引导式反馈方面不足，亟需一种能动态适应学生需求的智能辅导框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能结合引用式问题辅导与难度校准问题生成、并持续适应学习者动态需求的个性化辅导系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DeepTutor 框架，包含混合个性化引擎（静态知识基础+动态学习者记忆）、自适应学习工作流、交互式书籍和多通道辅导代理；并引入 TutorBench 交互式基准和基于 LLM 的第一人称交互评估协议。
contributions: 提出 DeepTutor，一个完全开源的智能个性化辅导框架，统一了引用式问题辅导与难度校准问题生成。
引入 TutorBench 交互式基准和基于 LLM 的第一人称交互评估协议，用于评估个性化辅导。
analysis.experiments: 在 TutorBench 和已有基准上进行了评估，包括人类对齐和消融研究，结果显示 DeepTutor 在个性化指标上平均提升 10.8%，并在五个骨干模型上增强通用智能体推理能力 29.4%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的学习者档案和课程内容。
评估协议基于模拟学生，真实场景效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeepTutor 是一个开源智能辅导框架，通过混合个性化引擎和交互式基准 TutorBench，在个性化指标上平均提升 10.8%，并增强通用智能体推理能力 29.4%。

papers.title: Case-Grounded Evidence Verification: A Framework for Constructing Evidence-Sensitive Supervision
papers.abstract: Evidence-grounded reasoning requires more than attaching retrieved text to a prediction: a model should make decisions that depend on whether the provided evidence supports the target claim. In practice, this often fails because supervision is weak, evidence is only loosely tied to the claim, and evaluation does not test evidence dependence directly. We introduce case-grounded evidence verification, a general framework in which a model receives a local case context, external evidence, and a structured claim, and must decide whether the evidence supports the claim for that case. Our key contribution is a supervision construction procedure that generates explicit support examples together with semantically controlled non-support examples, including counterfactual wrong-state and topic-related negatives, without manual evidence annotation. We instantiate the framework in radiology and train a standard verifier on the resulting support task. The learned verifier substantially outperforms both case-only and evidence-only baselines, remains strong under correct evidence, and collapses when evidence is removed or swapped, indicating genuine evidence dependence. This behavior transfers across unseen evidence articles and an external case distribution, though performance degrades under evidence-source shift and remains sensitive to backbone choice. Overall, the results suggest that a major bottleneck in evidence grounding is not only model capacity, but the lack of supervision that encodes the causal role of evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出案例基础证据验证框架，通过构造支持与非支持示例的监督信号，使模型真正依赖证据做决策，在放射学任务中显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有证据推理模型常因监督信号弱、证据与主张关联松散、评测不直接测试证据依赖性而失败，需要一种能编码证据因果角色的监督方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构造监督信号使模型在决策时真正依赖证据支持与否，而非仅凭上下文或检索文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出证据推理的主要瓶颈不仅是模型能力，更是缺乏编码证据因果角色的监督信号。
analysis.method: 提出案例基础证据验证框架，通过自动构造支持示例和语义控制的非支持示例（包括反事实错误状态和主题相关负例）来生成监督信号，无需人工证据标注。
contributions: 提出案例基础证据验证框架，将证据依赖性监督形式化。
设计无需人工标注的监督构造流程，生成支持与非支持示例。
在放射学任务上验证，学习到的验证器表现出真正的证据依赖性，并跨未见证据文章和外部病例分布泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在放射学任务上训练标准验证器，与仅案例和仅证据基线比较，验证器显著优于两者；在正确证据下表现强，移除或替换证据后性能崩溃；跨未见证据文章和外部病例分布泛化，但证据源偏移时性能下降，且对骨干网络选择敏感。
limitations: 性能在证据源偏移时下降。
对骨干网络选择敏感。
