analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出案例基础证据验证框架，通过构造支持与非支持示例的监督信号，使模型真正依赖证据做决策，在放射学任务中显著优于基线。

papers.title: EgoTL: Egocentric Think-Aloud Chains for Long-Horizon Tasks
papers.abstract: Large foundation models have made significant advances in embodied intelligence, enabling synthesis and reasoning over egocentric input for household tasks. However, VLM-based auto-labeling is often noisy because the primary data sources lack accurate human action labels, chain-of-thought (CoT), and spatial annotations; these errors are amplified during long-horizon spatial instruction following. These issues stem from insufficient coverage of minute-long, daily household planning tasks and from inaccurate spatial grounding. As a result, VLM reasoning chains and world-model synthesis can hallucinate objects, skip steps, or fail to respect real-world physical attributes. To address these gaps, we introduce EgoTL. EgoTL builds a think-aloud capture pipeline for egocentric data. It uses a say-before-act protocol to record step-by-step goals and spoken reasoning with word-level timestamps, then calibrates physical properties with metric-scale spatial estimators, a memory-bank walkthrough for scene context, and clip-level tags for navigation instructions and detailed manipulation actions. With EgoTL, we are able to benchmark VLMs and World Models on six task dimensions from three layers and long-horizon generation over minute-long sequences across over 100 daily household tasks. We find that foundation models still fall short as egocentric assistants or open-world simulators. Finally, we finetune foundation models with human CoT aligned with metric labels on the training split of EgoTL, which improves long-horizon planning and reasoning, step-wise reasoning, instruction following, and spatial grounding.

analysis.tldr: 提出EgoTL，一种通过“先说话后行动”协议收集第一人称思考链数据的方法，用于提升长时域家庭任务中VLM的规划与空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM自动标注方法因缺乏准确的人类动作标签、思维链和空间标注，在长时域空间指令跟随中错误放大，导致幻觉、步骤遗漏等问题，亟需高质量的第一人称数据。
analysis.problem: 长时域日常家庭规划任务中，VLM的推理链和世界模型合成存在物体幻觉、步骤跳跃、物理属性不符等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VLM自动标注噪声源于数据源缺乏准确动作标签、思维链和空间标注，且这些错误在长时域任务中被放大。
analysis.method: 构建“先说话后行动”的思考-出声采集流程，记录带词级时间戳的逐步目标和口语推理，结合度量空间估计器校准物理属性、记忆库漫游提供场景上下文、片段级标签标注导航指令和操作动作。
contributions: 提出EgoTL数据采集管道，生成高质量的第一人称思考链数据。
构建包含100+日常家庭任务、分钟级序列的基准，从三个层次六个维度评估VLM和世界模型。
通过微调基础模型，证明EgoTL数据能提升长时域规划、逐步推理、指令跟随和空间定位能力。
analysis.experiments: 在100+日常家庭任务上，从三个层次六个维度对VLM和世界模型进行基准测试，并微调基础模型验证改进效果。
limitations: 数据采集依赖特定协议，可能限制泛化性。
仅针对家庭任务，未涉及其他领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EgoTL，一种通过“先说话后行动”协议收集第一人称思考链数据的方法，用于提升长时域家庭任务中VLM的规划与空间推理能力。

papers.title: Seeing is Believing: Robust Vision-Guided Cross-Modal Prompt Learning under Label Noise
papers.abstract: Prompt learning is a parameter-efficient approach for vision-language models, yet its robustness under label noise is less investigated. Visual content contains richer and more reliable semantic information, which remains more robust under label noise. However, the prompt itself is highly susceptible to label noise. Motivated by this intuition, we propose VisPrompt, a lightweight and robust vision-guided prompt learning framework for noisy-label settings. Specifically, we exploit a cross-modal attention mechanism to reversely inject visual semantics into prompt representations. This enables the prompt tokens to selectively aggregate visual information relevant to the current sample, thereby improving robustness by anchoring prompt learning to stable instance-level visual evidence and reducing the influence of noisy supervision. To address the instability caused by using the same way of injecting visual information for all samples, despite differences in the quality of their visual cues, we further introduce a lightweight conditional modulation mechanism to adaptively control the strength of visual information injection, which strikes a more robust balance between text-side semantic priors and image-side instance evidence. The proposed framework effectively suppresses the noise-induced disturbances, reduce instability in prompt updates, and alleviate memorization of mislabeled samples. VisPrompt significantly improves robustness while keeping the pretrained VLM backbone frozen and introducing only a small amount of additional trainable parameters. Extensive experiments under synthetic and real-world label noise demonstrate that VisPrompt generally outperforms existing baselines on seven benchmark datasets and achieves stronger robustness. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/gezbww/Vis_Prompt.

analysis.tldr: 提出VisPrompt，通过视觉引导的跨模态提示学习，在标签噪声下提升视觉-语言模型的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 提示学习是视觉-语言模型的参数高效方法，但在标签噪声下的鲁棒性研究不足；视觉内容包含更可靠语义信息，而提示本身易受噪声影响。
analysis.problem: 解决标签噪声下提示学习鲁棒性差的问题，即如何利用视觉信息稳定提示学习并减少噪声监督的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉内容在标签噪声下比文本提示更鲁棒，但直接注入视觉信息对所有样本统一处理会导致不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出VisPrompt框架，包含跨模态注意力机制将视觉语义反向注入提示表示，以及条件调制机制自适应控制视觉信息注入强度。
contributions: 提出视觉引导的跨模态提示学习框架VisPrompt，利用视觉信息增强提示鲁棒性。
引入条件调制机制自适应平衡文本先验与图像证据，提升稳定性。
在七个基准数据集上验证了优于现有方法的鲁棒性，且仅增加少量可训练参数。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实标签噪声下，对七个基准数据集进行实验，VisPrompt普遍优于现有基线，实现更强鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉特征质量，在极端噪声下视觉信息也可能退化。
条件调制机制增加了额外超参数，调优成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VisPrompt，通过视觉引导的跨模态提示学习，在标签噪声下提升视觉-语言模型的鲁棒性。

papers.title: VisionFoundry: Teaching VLMs Visual Perception with Synthetic Images
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) still struggle with visual perception tasks such as spatial understanding and viewpoint recognition. One plausible contributing factor is that natural image datasets provide limited supervision for low-level visual skills. This motivates a practical question: can targeted synthetic supervision, generated from only a task keyword such as Depth Order, address these weaknesses? To investigate this question, we introduce VisionFoundry, a task-aware synthetic data generation pipeline that takes only the task name as input and uses large language models (LLMs) to generate questions, answers, and text-to-image (T2I) prompts, then synthesizes images with T2I models and verifies consistency with a proprietary VLM, requiring no reference images or human annotation. Using VisionFoundry, we construct VisionFoundry-10K, a synthetic visual question answering (VQA) dataset containing 10k image-question-answer triples spanning 10 tasks. Models trained on VisionFoundry-10K achieve substantial improvements on visual perception benchmarks: +7% on MMVP and +10% on CV-Bench-3D, while preserving broader capabilities and showing favorable scaling behavior as data size increases. Our results suggest that limited task-targeted supervision is an important contributor to this bottleneck and that synthetic supervision is a promising path toward more systematic training for VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出VisionFoundry，仅凭任务关键词即可生成合成图像数据，显著提升VLM视觉感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在空间理解、视角识别等视觉感知任务上表现不佳，自然图像数据集对低级视觉技能的监督有限，亟需高效、可扩展的合成数据方案。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从任务关键词出发，自动生成高质量的合成视觉问答数据，以弥补VLM在视觉感知任务上的监督不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自然图像数据集对低级视觉技能（如深度顺序、空间关系）的监督信号有限，导致VLM在这些任务上表现瓶颈。
analysis.method: VisionFoundry：利用LLM生成问题、答案和T2I提示，通过T2I模型合成图像，并用专有VLM验证一致性，无需参考图像或人工标注。
contributions: 提出VisionFoundry，一种仅需任务关键词的合成数据生成流水线，自动生成VQA三元组。
构建VisionFoundry-10K数据集，覆盖10个视觉感知任务，共10k样本。
实验表明，在该数据集上训练的模型在MMVP和CV-Bench-3D上分别提升7%和10%，且保持泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MMVP和CV-Bench-3D等视觉感知基准上评估，模型取得显著提升（+7%和+10%），并展示了随数据规模增加的良好扩展性。
limitations: 合成数据可能与真实场景存在分布差异，需进一步验证泛化性。
依赖T2I模型和VLM的质量，可能引入生成偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VisionFoundry，仅凭任务关键词即可生成合成图像数据，显著提升VLM视觉感知能力。

papers.title: VL-Calibration: Decoupled Confidence Calibration for Large Vision-Language Models Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) achieve strong multimodal reasoning but frequently exhibit hallucinations and incorrect responses with high certainty, which hinders their usage in high-stakes domains. Existing verbalized confidence calibration methods, largely developed for text-only LLMs, typically optimize a single holistic confidence score using binary answer-level correctness. This design is mismatched to LVLMs: an incorrect prediction may arise from perceptual failures or from reasoning errors given correct perception, and a single confidence conflates these sources while visual uncertainty is often dominated by language priors. To address these issues, we propose VL-Calibration, a reinforcement learning framework that explicitly decouples confidence into visual and reasoning confidence. To supervise visual confidence without ground-truth perception labels, we introduce an intrinsic visual certainty estimation that combines (i) visual grounding measured by KL-divergence under image perturbations and (ii) internal certainty measured by token entropy. We further propose token-level advantage reweighting to focus optimization on tokens based on visual certainty, suppressing ungrounded hallucinations while preserving valid perception. Experiments on thirteen benchmarks show that VL-Calibration effectively improves calibration while boosting visual reasoning accuracy, and it generalizes to out-of-distribution benchmarks across model scales and architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出VL-Calibration，通过强化学习解耦视觉与推理置信度，提升LVLM校准与推理准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM在多模态推理中常出现幻觉和高置信度错误，现有置信度校准方法仅优化单一整体置信度，无法区分感知失败与推理错误，且视觉不确定性常被语言先验主导。
analysis.problem: LVLM的置信度校准中，单一置信度无法解耦视觉与推理错误来源，导致校准效果差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LVLM的错误可能源于感知失败或推理错误，单一置信度混淆了这些来源；视觉不确定性常被语言先验主导。
analysis.method: 提出VL-Calibration，一种强化学习框架，显式解耦置信度为视觉置信度和推理置信度；通过KL散度（图像扰动下的视觉接地）和token熵（内部确定性）估计内在视觉确定性，并采用token级优势重加权优化。
contributions: 提出解耦视觉与推理置信度的校准框架VL-Calibration。
设计无监督的视觉确定性估计方法，结合视觉接地与内部确定性。
引入token级优势重加权，抑制无根据幻觉同时保留有效感知。
analysis.experiments: 在13个基准上评估，VL-Calibration有效提升校准效果和视觉推理准确性，并泛化到不同模型规模与架构的分布外基准。
limitations: 可能依赖图像扰动质量，对扰动类型敏感。
强化学习训练可能不稳定，需调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VL-Calibration，通过强化学习解耦视觉与推理置信度，提升LVLM校准与推理准确性。

papers.title: Envisioning the Future, One Step at a Time
papers.abstract: Accurately anticipating how complex, diverse scenes will evolve requires models that represent uncertainty, simulate along extended interaction chains, and efficiently explore many plausible futures. Yet most existing approaches rely on dense video or latent-space prediction, expending substantial capacity on dense appearance rather than on the underlying sparse trajectories of points in the scene. This makes large-scale exploration of future hypotheses costly and limits performance when long-horizon, multi-modal motion is essential. We address this by formulating the prediction of open-set future scene dynamics as step-wise inference over sparse point trajectories. Our autoregressive diffusion model advances these trajectories through short, locally predictable transitions, explicitly modeling the growth of uncertainty over time. This dynamics-centric representation enables fast rollout of thousands of diverse futures from a single image, optionally guided by initial constraints on motion, while maintaining physical plausibility and long-range coherence. We further introduce OWM, a benchmark for open-set motion prediction based on diverse in-the-wild videos, to evaluate accuracy and variability of predicted trajectory distributions under real-world uncertainty. Our method matches or surpasses dense simulators in predictive accuracy while achieving orders-of-magnitude higher sampling speed, making open-set future prediction both scalable and practical. Project page: http://compvis.github.io/myriad.

analysis.tldr: 提出自回归扩散模型，通过稀疏点轨迹逐步预测开放场景的未来动态，实现高效多样化的未来预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖密集视频或潜在空间预测，消耗大量容量在密集外观而非场景中点的稀疏轨迹上，导致大规模探索未来假设成本高昂，且难以处理长程多模态运动。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地从单张图像预测开放场景中复杂、多样的未来动态，同时建模不确定性并支持大规模多样化未来探索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自回归扩散模型，将开放场景未来动态预测建模为稀疏点轨迹的逐步推理，通过短时局部可预测的过渡推进轨迹，显式建模随时间增长的不确定性，并支持从单张图像快速生成数千个多样化未来。
contributions: 提出基于稀疏点轨迹的自回归扩散模型，实现高效、可扩展的开放场景未来预测。
引入OWM基准，用于评估真实世界不确定性下预测轨迹分布的准确性和多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在OWM基准上评估，方法在预测准确性上匹配或超越密集模拟器，同时采样速度提升数个数量级。
limitations: 可能依赖点轨迹的初始检测质量。
长程预测中不确定性累积可能导致发散。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自回归扩散模型，通过稀疏点轨迹逐步预测开放场景的未来动态，实现高效多样化的未来预测。

papers.title: Semantic Rate-Distortion for Bounded Multi-Agent Communication: Capacity-Derived Semantic Spaces and the Communication Cost of Alignment
papers.abstract: When two agents of different computational capacities interact with the same environment, they need not compress a common semantic alphabet differently; they can induce different semantic alphabets altogether. We show that the quotient POMDP $Q_{m,T}(M)$ - the unique coarsest abstraction consistent with an agent's capacity - serves as a capacity-derived semantic space for any bounded agent, and that communication between heterogeneous agents exhibits a sharp structural phase transition. Below a critical rate $R_{\text{crit}}$ determined by the quotient mismatch, intent-preserving communication is structurally impossible. In the supported one-way memoryless regime, classical side-information coding then yields exponential decay above the induced benchmark. Classical coding theorems tell you the rate once the source alphabet is fixed; our contribution is to derive that alphabet from bounded interaction itself. Concretely, we prove: (1) a fixed-$\varepsilon$ structural phase-transition theorem whose lower bound is fully general on the common-history quotient comparison; (2) a one-way Wyner-Ziv benchmark identification on quotient alphabets, with exact converse, exact operational equality for memoryless quotient sources, and an ergodic long-run bridge via explicit mixing bounds; (3) an asymptotic one-way converse in the shrinking-distortion regime $\varepsilon = O(1/T)$, proved from the message stream and decoder side information; and (4) alignment traversal bounds enabling compositional communication through intermediate capacity levels. Experiments on eight POMDP environments (including RockSample(4,4)) illustrate the phase transition, a structured-policy benchmark shows the one-way rate can drop by up to $19\times$ relative to the counting bound, and a shrinking-distortion sweep matches the regime of the asymptotic converse.

analysis.tldr: 从容量推导语义字母表，揭示异构智能体通信的结构相变与率失真极限。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构智能体（如人类与AI）通信时，传统率失真理论假设固定语义字母表，但实际中不同计算能力的智能体会从相同环境中归纳出不同的语义空间，导致意图保持通信在低速率下不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何从智能体的计算容量约束出发，自动推导出最优的语义字母表，并刻画异构智能体间通信的率失真极限与相变行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当通信速率低于由商POMDP失配决定的临界速率R_crit时，意图保持通信在结构上不可能；在支持的单向无记忆机制下，经典边信息编码在基准之上产生指数衰减。
analysis.method: 提出商POMDP Q_{m,T}(M)作为容量导出的语义空间，并建立固定ε结构相变定理、单向Wyner-Ziv基准识别、渐近单向逆定理以及对齐遍历界，从而将语义字母表的推导内化于有界交互本身。
contributions: 证明了固定ε结构相变定理，其下界在共同历史商比较上完全一般。
在商字母表上识别了单向Wyner-Ziv基准，包括精确逆、无记忆商源的精确操作等价性以及通过显式混合界建立的遍历长桥。
在收缩失真ε=O(1/T)机制下证明了渐近单向逆定理。
提出了对齐遍历界，使得通过中间容量级别进行组合通信成为可能。
analysis.experiments: 在8个POMDP环境（包括RockSample(4,4)）上实验，展示了相变；结构化策略基准显示单向速率相对于计数界可降低高达19倍；收缩失真扫描匹配了渐近逆定理的机制。
limitations: 实验仅涉及小规模POMDP环境，未在真实异构智能体系统（如人机对话）中验证。
理论结果主要针对单向无记忆通信，双向或记忆通信场景未覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从容量推导语义字母表，揭示异构智能体通信的结构相变与率失真极限。

papers.title: A Review of Large Language Models for Stock Price Forecasting from a Hedge-Fund Perspective
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in quantitative finance for stock price forecasting. This review synthesizes recent applications of LLMs in this domain, including extracting sentiment from financial news and social media, analyzing financial reports and earnings-call transcripts, tokenizing or symbolizing stock price series, and constructing multi-agent trading systems. Particular attention is paid to practical pitfalls that are often understated in the literature, such as fragility in sentiment analysis, dataset and horizon design, performance evaluation metrics, data leakage, illiquidity premia, and limits of stock price predictability. Organized from a hedge-fund perspective, the review is intended to guide both academic researchers and hedge fund managers in integrating LLMs into real-world trading pipelines and in stress-testing their robustness under realistic market frictions.

analysis.tldr: 从对冲基金视角综述LLM在股价预测中的应用，强调实际部署中的陷阱与鲁棒性挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在量化金融中的应用日益增多，但现有文献常忽略实际部署中的关键陷阱，如数据泄露、流动性溢价等，缺乏从对冲基金视角的系统性梳理。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在股价预测中的实际有效性，并识别从研究到真实交易管道中的关键障碍。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出常见陷阱包括情感分析脆弱性、数据集与时间窗口设计问题、性能评估指标偏差、数据泄露、非流动性溢价以及股价可预测性极限。
analysis.method: 综述性方法，从对冲基金视角组织，涵盖情感提取、财报分析、股价序列符号化、多智能体交易系统等应用，并重点讨论实际部署中的鲁棒性问题。
contributions: 首次从对冲基金视角系统综述LLM在股价预测中的应用。
识别并强调实际部署中常被忽视的陷阱，如数据泄露、流动性溢价和可预测性极限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或进行实证验证。
可能未覆盖所有新兴LLM架构或最新市场条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从对冲基金视角综述LLM在股价预测中的应用，强调实际部署中的陷阱与鲁棒性挑战。

papers.title: RIRF: Reasoning Image Restoration Framework
papers.abstract: Universal image restoration (UIR) aims to recover clean images from diverse and unknown degradations using a unified model. Existing UIR methods primarily focus on pixel reconstruction and often lack explicit diagnostic reasoning over degradation composition, severity, and scene semantics prior to restoration. We propose Reason and Restore (R\&R), a novel framework that integrates structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning into the image restoration pipeline. R\&R introduces an explicit reasoner, implemented by fine-tuning Qwen3-VL, to diagnose degradation types, quantify degradation severity, infer key degradation-related factors, and describe relevant scene and object semantics. The resulting structured reasoning provides interpretable and fine-grained diagnostic priors for the restorer. To further improve restoration quality, the quantified degradation severity produced by the reasoner is leveraged as reinforcement learning (RL) signals to guide and strengthen the restorer. Unlike existing multimodal LLM-based agentic systems that decouple reasoning from low-level vision tasks, R\&R tightly couples semantic diagnostic reasoning with pixel-level restoration in a unified framework. Extensive experiments across diverse UIR benchmarks demonstrate that R\&R achieves state-of-the-art performance while offering unique interpretability into the restoration process.

analysis.tldr: 提出Reason and Restore框架，将结构化CoT推理集成到图像恢复中，通过诊断退化类型和严重性提升恢复质量与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有通用图像恢复方法主要关注像素重建，缺乏对退化成分、严重程度和场景语义的显式诊断推理，导致恢复效果受限且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在统一框架中引入结构化推理，显式诊断退化类型、严重程度及相关语义，以提升图像恢复性能和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出R&R框架，包含一个通过微调Qwen3-VL实现的显式推理器，用于诊断退化类型、量化严重程度、推断退化相关因素并描述场景语义；推理器输出的量化严重程度作为强化学习信号指导恢复器。
contributions: 首次将结构化Chain-of-Thought推理紧密集成到图像恢复流程中，实现语义诊断与像素级恢复的耦合。
利用推理器输出的量化退化严重程度作为强化学习信号，增强恢复器性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个通用图像恢复基准上达到最先进性能，并提供独特的可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练VLM的推理能力，对未见退化类型泛化性待验证。
强化学习信号的设计可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Reason and Restore框架，将结构化CoT推理集成到图像恢复中，通过诊断退化类型和严重性提升恢复质量与可解释性。

papers.title: VISOR: Agentic Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Iterative Search and Over-horizon Reasoning
papers.abstract: Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation (VRAG) empowers Vision-Language Models to retrieve and reason over visually rich documents. To tackle complex queries requiring multi-step reasoning, agentic VRAG systems interleave reasoning with iterative retrieval.. However, existing agentic VRAG faces two critical bottlenecks. (1) Visual Evidence Sparsity: key evidence is scattered across pages yet processed in isolation, hindering cross-page reasoning; moreover, fine-grained intra-image evidence often requires precise visual actions, whose misuse degrades retrieval quality; (2) Search Drift in Long Horizons: the accumulation of visual tokens across retrieved pages dilutes context and causes cognitive overload, leading agents to deviate from their search objective. To address these challenges, we propose VISOR (Visual Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Iterative Search and Over-horizon Reasoning), a unified single-agent framework. VISOR features a structured Evidence Space for progressive cross-page reasoning, coupled with a Visual Action Evaluation and Correction mechanism to manage visual actions. Additionally, we introduce a Dynamic Trajectory with Sliding Window and Intent Injection to mitigate search drift. They anchor the evidence space while discarding earlier raw interactions, preventing context from being overwhelmed by visual tokens. We train VISOR using a Group Relative Policy Optimization-based Reinforcement Learning (GRPO-based RL) pipeline with state masking and credit assignment tailored for dynamic context reconstruction. Extensive experiments on ViDoSeek, SlideVQA, and MMLongBench demonstrate that VISOR achieves state-of-the-art performance with superior efficiency for long-horizon visual reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: VISOR通过结构化证据空间、视觉动作校正和滑动窗口轨迹注入，解决了长程视觉推理中的证据稀疏和搜索漂移问题，在多个基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agentic VRAG在处理复杂多步推理时，面临视觉证据稀疏（关键证据分散且跨页推理困难）和长程搜索漂移（视觉token累积导致上下文稀释和认知过载）两大瓶颈，亟需统一框架来提升检索与推理的协同效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的Agent框架，在长程视觉推理中实现跨页证据的渐进式整合、视觉动作的精确控制，并防止搜索目标因上下文膨胀而偏离。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键现象：1) 视觉证据稀疏：关键证据分散在不同页面，孤立处理阻碍跨页推理；细粒度图像证据需要精确视觉动作，误用会降低检索质量。2) 搜索漂移：检索页面的视觉token累积稀释上下文，导致认知过载，使Agent偏离搜索目标。
analysis.method: VISOR是一个统一的单Agent框架，包含：1) 结构化证据空间，用于渐进式跨页推理；2) 视觉动作评估与校正机制，管理视觉动作；3) 动态轨迹滑动窗口与意图注入，通过锚定证据空间并丢弃早期原始交互来缓解搜索漂移。训练采用基于GRPO的强化学习，结合状态掩码和信用分配。
contributions: 提出VISOR框架，通过结构化证据空间和视觉动作校正解决视觉证据稀疏问题。
引入动态轨迹滑动窗口与意图注入机制，有效缓解长程搜索漂移。
设计基于GRPO的强化学习训练流程，包含状态掩码和信用分配，适应动态上下文重建。
在ViDoSeek、SlideVQA和MMLongBench上取得SOTA性能，并展现出更高的效率。
analysis.experiments: 在ViDoSeek、SlideVQA和MMLongBench三个长程视觉推理基准上进行实验，VISOR取得了最先进的性能，并具有更高的效率。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的视觉动作集合，可能无法覆盖所有细粒度操作。
滑动窗口策略可能丢弃部分潜在有用的早期信息，影响极端长程任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VISOR通过结构化证据空间、视觉动作校正和滑动窗口轨迹注入，解决了长程视觉推理中的证据稀疏和搜索漂移问题，在多个基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Strategic Algorithmic Monoculture: Experimental Evidence from Coordination Games
papers.abstract: AI agents increasingly operate in multi-agent environments where outcomes depend on coordination. We distinguish primary algorithmic monoculture -- baseline action similarity -- from strategic algorithmic monoculture, whereby agents adjust similarity in response to incentives. We implement a simple experimental design that cleanly separates these forces, and deploy it on human and large language model (LLM) subjects. LLMs exhibit high levels of baseline similarity (primary monoculture) and, like humans, they regulate it in response to coordination incentives (strategic monoculture). While LLMs coordinate extremely well on similar actions, they lag behind humans in sustaining heterogeneity when divergence is rewarded.

analysis.tldr: LLM在协调博弈中表现出与人类相似的策略性算法单一文化，但在奖励异质性时落后于人类。
analysis.research_motivation: AI代理在多智能体环境中协调行为可能产生算法单一文化，影响系统多样性，但现有研究缺乏对策略性调整的分离分析。
analysis.problem: 区分基线行为相似性（初级单一文化）与响应激励调整的相似性（策略性单一文化），并比较人类与LLM的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM表现出高基线相似性，且能像人类一样根据协调激励调整相似性，但在奖励异质性时维持多样性能力不足。
analysis.method: 设计实验分离初级与策略性单一文化，在协调博弈中比较人类和LLM的行为。
contributions: 提出策略性算法单一文化的概念并设计实验分离其与初级单一文化
实证发现LLM在协调激励下调整相似性，但异质性维持能力弱于人类
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实验设计用于人类和LLM主体。
limitations: 实验设计可能简化了现实多智能体环境的复杂性
仅测试了特定博弈设置，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在协调博弈中表现出与人类相似的策略性算法单一文化，但在奖励异质性时落后于人类。

papers.title: BERT-as-a-Judge: A Robust Alternative to Lexical Methods for Efficient Reference-Based LLM Evaluation
papers.abstract: Accurate evaluation is central to the large language model (LLM) ecosystem, guiding model selection and downstream adoption across diverse use cases. In practice, however, evaluating generative outputs typically relies on rigid lexical methods to extract and assess answers, which can conflate a model's true problem-solving ability with its compliance with predefined formatting guidelines. While recent LLM-as-a-Judge approaches mitigate this issue by assessing semantic correctness rather than strict structural conformity, they also introduce substantial computational overhead, making evaluation costly. In this work, we first systematically investigate the limitations of lexical evaluation through a large-scale empirical study spanning 36 models and 15 downstream tasks, demonstrating that such methods correlate poorly with human judgments. To address this limitation, we introduce BERT-as-a-Judge, an encoder-driven approach for assessing answer correctness in reference-based generative settings, robust to variations in output phrasing, and requiring only lightweight training on synthetically annotated question-candidate-reference triplets. We show that it consistently outperforms the lexical baseline while matching the performance of much larger LLM judges, providing a compelling tradeoff between the two and enabling reliable, scalable evaluation. Finally, through extensive experimentation, we provide detailed insights into BERT-as-a-Judge's performance to offer practical guidance for practitioners, and release all project artifacts to foster downstream adoption.

analysis.tldr: 提出BERT-as-a-Judge，一种轻量级编码器方法，用于参考文本生成评估，兼顾准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估依赖刚性词汇方法，混淆模型真实能力与格式遵从性；而LLM-as-a-Judge虽语义正确但计算开销大，亟需高效且准确的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在参考文本生成场景中高效、准确地评估答案正确性，同时避免词汇方法的僵化与LLM法官的高成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大规模实验（36模型、15任务）表明词汇评估与人类判断相关性差，且LLM法官虽更准确但计算昂贵。
analysis.method: 基于BERT编码器的轻量级模型，在合成标注的三元组（问题-候选-参考）上训练，评估候选答案与参考的语义正确性，对输出措辞变化鲁棒。
contributions: 系统揭示词汇评估的局限性，通过大规模实证证明其与人类判断的低相关性。
提出BERT-as-a-Judge，一种轻量级编码器方法，在匹配大型LLM法官性能的同时显著降低计算开销。
提供详细性能分析及开源项目资源，促进实际应用。
analysis.experiments: 在36个模型和15个下游任务上进行评估，对比词汇基线、LLM法官及人类判断，BERT-as-a-Judge一致优于词汇方法，性能与更大LLM法官相当。
limitations: 依赖合成标注数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实分布。
仅适用于参考文本生成场景，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BERT-as-a-Judge，一种轻量级编码器方法，用于参考文本生成评估，兼顾准确性与效率。

papers.title: RecaLLM: Addressing the Lost-in-Thought Phenomenon with Explicit In-Context Retrieval
papers.abstract: We propose RecaLLM, a set of reasoning language models post-trained to make effective use of long-context information. In-context retrieval, which identifies relevant evidence from context, and reasoning are deeply intertwined: retrieval supports reasoning, while reasoning often determines what must be retrieved. However, their interaction remains largely underexplored. In preliminary experiments on several open-source LLMs, we observe that in-context retrieval performance substantially degrades even after a short reasoning span, revealing a key bottleneck for test-time scaling that we refer to as lost-in-thought: reasoning steps that improve performance also make subsequent in-context retrieval more challenging. To address this limitation, RecaLLM interleaves reasoning with explicit in-context retrieval, alternating between reasoning and retrieving context information needed to solve intermediate subproblems. We introduce a negligible-overhead constrained decoding mechanism that enables verbatim copying of evidence spans, improving the grounding of subsequent generation. Trained on diverse lexical and semantic retrieval tasks, RecaLLM achieves strong performance on two long-context benchmarks, RULER and HELMET, significantly outperforming baselines. Notably, we observe consistent gains at context windows of up to 128K tokens using training samples of at most 10K tokens, far shorter than those used by existing long-context approaches, highlighting a promising path toward improving long-context performance without expensive long-context training data.

analysis.tldr: RecaLLM通过显式交替推理与上下文检索，解决了长上下文推理中“思维迷失”问题，在短训练样本下实现长上下文性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理中，检索与推理相互依赖但交互机制未被充分探索，现有模型在推理步骤后上下文检索性能显著下降，成为测试时扩展的关键瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决长上下文推理中推理步骤导致后续上下文检索性能下降的“思维迷失”现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步实验发现，即使经过短推理步骤，开源LLM的上下文检索性能也会大幅下降，表明推理与检索之间存在冲突。
analysis.method: 提出RecaLLM，在推理过程中显式交替进行推理和上下文检索，并引入低开销的约束解码机制实现证据片段的逐字复制。
contributions: 识别并命名了长上下文推理中的“思维迷失”现象。
提出RecaLLM方法，通过交替推理与显式检索提升长上下文性能。
引入约束解码机制实现证据逐字复制，增强生成接地性。
在短训练样本（≤10K tokens）下实现128K上下文窗口的显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在RULER和HELMET两个长上下文基准上评估，RecaLLM显著优于基线，且训练样本长度远短于现有方法。
limitations: 约束解码机制可能增加推理延迟。
方法在更复杂推理任务上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RecaLLM通过显式交替推理与上下文检索，解决了长上下文推理中“思维迷失”问题，在短训练样本下实现长上下文性能提升。

papers.title: XFED: Non-Collusive Model Poisoning Attack Against Byzantine-Robust Federated Classifiers
papers.abstract: Model poisoning attacks pose a significant security threat to Federated Learning (FL). Most existing model poisoning attacks rely on collusion, requiring adversarial clients to coordinate by exchanging local benign models and synchronizing the generation of their poisoned updates. However, sustaining such coordination is increasingly impractical in real-world FL deployments, as it effectively requires botnet-like control over many devices. This approach is costly to maintain and highly vulnerable to detection. This context raises a fundamental question: Can model poisoning attacks remain effective without any communication between attackers? To address this challenge, we introduce and formalize the \textbf{non-collusive attack model}, in which all compromised clients share a common adversarial objective but operate independently. Under this model, each attacker generates its malicious update without communicating with other adversaries, accessing other clients' updates, or relying on any knowledge of server-side defenses. To demonstrate the feasibility of this threat model, we propose \textbf{XFED}, the first aggregation-agnostic, non-collusive model poisoning attack. Our empirical evaluation across six benchmark datasets shows that XFED bypasses eight state-of-the-art defenses and outperforms six existing model poisoning attacks. These findings indicate that FL systems are substantially less secure than previously believed and underscore the urgent need for more robust and practical defense mechanisms.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个无需攻击者间通信的非共谋模型投毒攻击XFED，可绕过多种拜占庭鲁棒防御。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型投毒攻击大多依赖攻击者间共谋（交换良性模型、同步生成恶意更新），这在现实中需要类似僵尸网络的控制，成本高且易被检测，因此需要探索无需共谋的攻击是否仍然有效。
analysis.problem: 在联邦学习中，攻击者之间不进行任何通信的情况下，模型投毒攻击能否保持有效性？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出XFED攻击，每个恶意客户端独立生成恶意更新，无需与其他攻击者通信、访问其他客户端更新或了解服务器端防御，是一种聚合无关的非共谋模型投毒攻击。
contributions: 形式化定义了非共谋攻击模型，其中所有被攻陷客户端共享共同对抗目标但独立操作。
提出XFED，首个聚合无关的非共谋模型投毒攻击，实验表明能绕过八种先进防御并优于六种现有攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上评估，XFED绕过八种最先进防御并优于六种现有模型投毒攻击。
limitations: 可能仅针对分类任务有效，对其他任务（如回归、生成）的适用性未知。
未讨论防御方可能采取的反制措施（如动态防御策略）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个无需攻击者间通信的非共谋模型投毒攻击XFED，可绕过多种拜占庭鲁棒防御。

papers.title: Process Reward Agents for Steering Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains remains challenging as intermediate steps are often not locally verifiable: unlike math or code, evaluating step correctness may require synthesizing clues across large external knowledge sources. As a result, subtle errors can propagate through reasoning traces, potentially never to be detected. Prior work has proposed process reward models (PRMs), including retrieval-augmented variants, but these methods operate post hoc, scoring completed trajectories, which prevents their integration into dynamic inference procedures. Here, we introduce Process Reward Agents (PRA), a test-time method for providing domain-grounded, online, step-wise rewards to a frozen policy. In contrast to prior retrieval-augmented PRMs, PRA enables search-based decoding to rank and prune candidate trajectories at every generation step. Experiments on multiple medical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PRA consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving 80.8% accuracy on MedQA with Qwen3-4B, a new state of the art at the 4B scale. Importantly, PRA generalizes to unseen frozen policy models ranging from 0.5B to 8B parameters, improving their accuracy by up to 25.7% without any policy model updates. More broadly, PRA suggests a paradigm in which frozen reasoners are decoupled from domain-specific reward modules, allowing the deployment of new backbones in complex domains without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出过程奖励智能体(PRA)，在知识密集型推理中提供在线、分步奖励，实现搜索式解码，显著提升冻结策略模型的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识密集型推理中，中间步骤难以局部验证，错误可能传播且不被发现；现有过程奖励模型(PRM)只能事后评分，无法集成到动态推理过程中。
analysis.problem: 如何为冻结的策略模型提供在线、分步的领域特定奖励，以在推理时引导搜索并纠正错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出过程奖励智能体(PRA)，一种测试时方法，为冻结策略提供领域基础、在线、分步奖励；与检索增强PRM不同，PRA支持基于搜索的解码，在每一步对候选轨迹进行排序和剪枝。
contributions: 提出PRA，一种在线、分步奖励方法，实现搜索式解码以提升知识密集型推理。
在多个医学推理基准上，PRA以Qwen3-4B达到80.8%准确率，创4B规模新SOTA。
PRA可泛化到0.5B至8B的未见冻结策略模型，无需更新策略即可提升准确率高达25.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个医学推理基准上评估，包括MedQA，PRA一致优于强基线，且泛化到不同规模的冻结策略模型。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的外部知识源进行奖励计算。
搜索式解码可能增加推理时计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出过程奖励智能体(PRA)，在知识密集型推理中提供在线、分步奖励，实现搜索式解码，显著提升冻结策略模型的准确性。

papers.title: Online3R: Online Learning for Consistent Sequential Reconstruction Based on Geometry Foundation Model
papers.abstract: We present Online3R, a new sequential reconstruction framework that is capable of adapting to new scenes through online learning, effectively resolving inconsistency issues. Specifically, we introduce a set of learnable lightweight visual prompts into a pretrained, frozen geometry foundation model to capture the knowledge of new environments while preserving the fundamental capability of the foundation model for geometry prediction. To solve the problems of missing groundtruth and the requirement of high efficiency when updating these visual prompts at test time, we introduce a local-global self-supervised learning strategy by enforcing the local and global consistency constraints on predictions. The local consistency constraints are conducted on intermediate and previously local fused results, enabling the model to be trained with high-quality pseudo groundtruth signals; the global consistency constraints are operated on sparse keyframes spanning long distances rather than per frame, allowing the model to learn from a consistent prediction over a long trajectory in an efficient way. Our experiments demonstrate that Online3R outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on various benchmarks. Project page: https://shunkaizhou.github.io/online3r-1.0/

analysis.tldr: Online3R 通过在线学习与轻量级视觉提示，实现基于几何基础模型的一致顺序重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有顺序重建方法在面对新场景时存在不一致性问题，且难以高效适应新环境。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏预训练几何基础模型能力的前提下，通过在线学习实现高效、一致的顺序重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在预训练冻结的几何基础模型中引入可学习的轻量级视觉提示，并采用局部-全局自监督学习策略，利用局部一致性约束（基于中间和局部融合结果）和全局一致性约束（基于稀疏关键帧）进行训练。
contributions: 提出 Online3R 框架，通过在线学习适应新场景，解决重建不一致问题。
引入轻量级视觉提示和局部-全局自监督学习策略，实现高效测试时更新。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上超越先前最先进方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练基础模型的质量。
在线学习效率在极端资源受限场景下可能仍需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Online3R 通过在线学习与轻量级视觉提示，实现基于几何基础模型的一致顺序重建。

papers.title: Investigating Trustworthiness of Nonparametric Deep Survival Models for Alzheimer's Disease Progression Analysis
papers.abstract: Alzheimer's Dementia (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease marked by irreversible decline, making reliable modeling of its progression essential for effective patient care. Progression-aware methods such as survival analysis are therefore crucial tools for the early detection and monitoring of AD. Recent advancements in deep learning have demonstrated remarkable performance in survival tasks, but alarmingly fewer studies have been conducted in the domain of AD. Further, the studies that do exist do not consider learned bias within the model itself, which could result in unfair and unreliable predictions toward certain marginalized groups. As such, we conduct a rigorous study of fairness in AD progression analysis along with a thorough feature importance study to determine the characteristics which are most important for reliable AD predictions. Furthermore, we propose two novel fairness metrics, called Time-Dependent Concordance Impurity and Kaplan-Meier Fairness, to quantify bias with respect to sensitive attributes such as sex, race, and education in nonparametric survival models. Our study demonstrates that while deep learning powered survival models are robust tools which can aid clinicians in AD care decisions, they often exhibit considerable bias, representing important avenues for future research.

analysis.tldr: 研究非参数深度生存模型在阿尔茨海默病进展分析中的可信度，发现模型存在显著偏见并提出了新的公平性度量。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病进展建模对患者护理至关重要，但现有深度生存模型在AD领域缺乏公平性研究，可能导致对边缘群体的不可靠预测。
analysis.problem: 评估非参数深度生存模型在AD进展分析中的公平性和特征重要性，并量化对敏感属性的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出深度学习生存模型在AD任务中表现出显著偏见。
analysis.method: 提出两个新的公平性度量：时间依赖一致性不纯度（Time-Dependent Concordance Impurity）和Kaplan-Meier公平性（Kaplan-Meier Fairness），用于量化非参数生存模型中对性别、种族、教育等敏感属性的偏见。
contributions: 首次对AD进展分析中的深度生存模型进行严格的公平性研究。
提出两个新的公平性度量指标，用于量化非参数生存模型中的偏见。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对非参数生存模型，未涵盖参数模型。
公平性度量可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究非参数深度生存模型在阿尔茨海默病进展分析中的可信度，发现模型存在显著偏见并提出了新的公平性度量。

papers.title: Incremental Semantics-Aided Meshing from LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and RGB Direct Label Transfer
papers.abstract: Geometric high-fidelity mesh reconstruction from LiDAR-inertial scans remains challenging in large, complex indoor environments -- such as cultural buildings -- where point cloud sparsity, geometric drift, and fixed fusion parameters produce holes, over-smoothing, and spurious surfaces at structural boundaries. We propose a modular, incremental RGB+LiDAR pipeline that generates incremental semantics-aided high-quality meshes from indoor scans through scan frame-based direct label transfer. A vision foundation model labels each incoming RGB frame; labels are incrementally projected and fused onto a LiDAR-inertial odometry map; and an incremental semantics-aware Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) fusion step produces the final mesh via marching cubes. This frame-level fusion strategy preserves the geometric fidelity of LiDAR while leveraging rich visual semantics to resolve geometric ambiguities at reconstruction boundaries caused by LiDAR point-cloud sparsity and geometric drift. We demonstrate that semantic guidance improves geometric reconstruction quality; quantitative evaluation is therefore performed using geometric metrics on the Oxford Spires dataset, while results from the NTU VIRAL dataset are analyzed qualitatively. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art geometric baselines ImMesh and Voxblox, demonstrating the benefit of semantics-aided fusion for geometric mesh quality. The resulting semantically labelled meshes are of value when reconstructing Universal Scene Description (USD) assets, offering a path from indoor LiDAR scanning to XR and digital modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出增量语义辅助的RGB+LiDAR网格重建方法，通过帧级标签融合提升几何保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型复杂室内环境（如文化建筑）中，LiDAR点云稀疏、几何漂移和固定融合参数导致重建网格存在孔洞、过度平滑和边界伪影，现有方法难以兼顾几何精度与语义信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用RGB帧的语义标签增量辅助LiDAR-惯性里程计地图，生成高保真几何网格并解决边界歧义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LiDAR点云稀疏和几何漂移会在结构边界产生孔洞、过度平滑和伪影，而语义引导可缓解这些几何歧义。
analysis.method: 模块化增量RGB+LiDAR流水线：视觉基础模型标注RGB帧，标签增量投影融合到LiDAR-惯性里程计地图，再通过语义感知的TSDF融合和marching cubes生成网格。
contributions: 提出帧级直接标签转移的增量语义辅助网格重建方法
在Oxford Spires数据集上定量优于ImMesh和Voxblox，在NTU VIRAL上定性分析
analysis.experiments: 在Oxford Spires数据集上使用几何指标进行定量评估，在NTU VIRAL数据集上定性分析。
limitations: 依赖视觉基础模型的标签质量
可能受LiDAR-惯性里程计漂移累积影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出增量语义辅助的RGB+LiDAR网格重建方法，通过帧级标签融合提升几何保真度。

papers.title: SafeMind: A Risk-Aware Differentiable Control Framework for Adaptive and Safe Quadruped Locomotion
papers.abstract: Learning-based quadruped controllers achieve impressive agility but typically lack formal safety guarantees under model uncertainty, perception noise, and unstructured contact conditions. We introduce SafeMind, a differentiable stochastic safety-control framework that unifies probabilistic Control Barrier Functions with semantic context understanding and meta-adaptive risk calibration. SafeMind explicitly models epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty through a variance-aware barrier constraint embedded in a differentiable quadratic program, thereby preserving gradient flow for end-to-end training. A semantics-to-constraint encoder modulates safety margins using perceptual or language cues, while a meta-adaptive learner continuously adjusts risk sensitivity across environments. We provide theoretical conditions for probabilistic forward invariance, feasibility, and stability under stochastic dynamics. SafeMind is deployed on Unitree A1 and ANYmal C at 200~Hz and validated across 12 terrain types, dynamic obstacles, morphology perturbations, and semantically defined tasks. Experiments show that SafeMind reduces safety violations by 3--10x and energy consumption by 10--15% relative to state-of-the-art CBF, MPC, and hybrid RL baselines, while maintaining real-time control performance.

analysis.tldr: SafeMind 提出一种可微随机安全控制框架，通过概率控制障碍函数和元自适应风险校准，在四足机器人上实现安全、节能且实时的运动控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于学习的四足控制器在模型不确定性、感知噪声和非结构化接触条件下缺乏形式化安全保证，现有方法难以兼顾安全、效率和实时性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不确定性环境下为四足机器人提供形式化的安全保证，同时保持端到端可训练性和实时控制性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出可微随机安全控制框架 SafeMind，融合概率控制障碍函数（嵌入可微二次规划）、语义到约束编码器（利用感知或语言线索调节安全裕度）和元自适应学习器（跨环境连续调整风险敏感度）。
contributions: 提出统一概率CBF、语义理解和元自适应风险校准的可微安全控制框架。
给出随机动力学下概率前向不变性、可行性和稳定性的理论条件。
在Unitree A1和ANYmal C上以200Hz频率部署，实验表明相比SOTA基线安全违规减少3-10倍，能耗降低10-15%。
analysis.experiments: 在12种地形、动态障碍物、形态扰动和语义定义任务上验证，与CBF、MPC和混合RL基线对比，安全违规减少3-10倍，能耗降低10-15%。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的动力学模型或感知输入质量。
元自适应学习器的泛化能力可能受限于训练环境分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeMind 提出一种可微随机安全控制框架，通过概率控制障碍函数和元自适应风险校准，在四足机器人上实现安全、节能且实时的运动控制。

papers.title: Realizing Immersive Volumetric Video: A Multimodal Framework for 6-DoF VR Engagement
papers.abstract: Fully immersive experiences that tightly integrate 6-DoF visual and auditory interaction are essential for virtual and augmented reality. While such experiences can be achieved through computer-generated content, constructing them directly from real-world captured videos remains largely unexplored. We introduce Immersive Volumetric Videos, a new volumetric media format designed to provide large 6-DoF interaction spaces, audiovisual feedback, and high-resolution, high-frame-rate dynamic content. To support IVV construction, we present ImViD, a multi-view, multi-modal dataset built upon a space-oriented capture philosophy. Our custom capture rig enables synchronized multi-view video-audio acquisition during motion, facilitating efficient capture of complex indoor and outdoor scenes with rich foreground--background interactions and challenging dynamics. The dataset provides 5K-resolution videos at 60 FPS with durations of 1-5 minutes, offering richer spatial, temporal, and multimodal coverage than existing benchmarks. Leveraging this dataset, we develop a dynamic light field reconstruction framework built upon a Gaussian-based spatio-temporal representation, incorporating flow-guided sparse initialization, joint camera temporal calibration, and multi-term spatio-temporal supervision for robust and accurate modeling of complex motion. We further propose, to our knowledge, the first method for sound field reconstruction from such multi-view audiovisual data. Together, these components form a unified pipeline for immersive volumetric video production. Extensive benchmarks and immersive VR experiments demonstrate that our pipeline generates high-quality, temporally stable audiovisual volumetric content with large 6-DoF interaction spaces. This work provides both a foundational definition and a practical construction methodology for immersive volumetric videos.

analysis.tldr: 提出沉浸式体积视频（IVV）格式及配套多模态数据集ImViD，构建动态光场与声场重建的统一管线，实现6自由度VR交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VR体验多依赖计算机生成内容，从真实世界视频直接构建大6-DoF交互空间、视听反馈和高分辨率动态内容的方法尚属空白。
analysis.problem: 如何从多视角视频-音频数据中重建高质量、时间稳定的动态光场和声场，以生成支持大6-DoF交互的沉浸式体积视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于高斯时空表示构建动态光场重建框架，包含流引导稀疏初始化、联合相机时间标定和多术语时空监督；并提出首个从多视角视听数据重建声场的方法。
contributions: 定义沉浸式体积视频（IVV）这一新媒体格式，并给出完整构建管线。
构建多视角多模态数据集ImViD，提供5K/60FPS、1-5分钟时长、丰富场景的视频-音频数据。
提出动态光场重建框架和首个多视角声场重建方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ImViD数据集上进行基准测试和沉浸式VR实验，结果表明管线能生成高质量、时间稳定的视听体积内容，支持大6-DoF交互空间。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（仅包含特定场景），泛化性待验证。
声场重建方法可能依赖特定硬件配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出沉浸式体积视频（IVV）格式及配套多模态数据集ImViD，构建动态光场与声场重建的统一管线，实现6自由度VR交互。

papers.title: DSVTLA: Deep Swin Vision Transformer-Based Transfer Learning Architecture for Multi-Type Cancer Histopathological Cancer Image Classification
papers.abstract: In this study, we proposed a deep Swin-Vision Transformer-based transfer learning architecture for robust multi-cancer histopathological image classification. The proposed framework integrates a hierarchical Swin Transformer with ResNet50-based convolution features extraction, enabling the model to capture both long-range contextual dependencies and fine-grained local morphological patterns within histopathological images. To validate the efficiency of the proposed architecture, an extensive experiment was executed on a comprehensive multi-cancer dataset including Breast Cancer, Oral Cancer, Lung and Colon Cancer, Kidney Cancer, and Acute Lymphocytic Leukemia (ALL), including both original and segmented images were analyzed to assess model robustness across heterogeneous clinical imaging conditions. Our approach is benchmarked alongside several state-of-the-art CNN and transfer models, including DenseNet121, DenseNet201, InceptionV3, ResNet50, EfficientNetB3, multiple ViT variants, and Swin Transformer models. However, all models were trained and validated using a unified pipeline, incorporating balanced data preprocessing, transfer learning, and fine-tuning strategies. The experimental results demonstrated that our proposed architecture consistently gained superior performance, reaching 100% test accuracy for lung-colon cancer, segmented leukemia datasets, and up to 99.23% accuracy for breast cancer classification. The model also achieved near-perfect precision, f1 score, and recall, indicating highly stable scores across divers cancer types. Overall, the proposed model establishes a highly accurate, interpretable, and also robust multi-cancer classification system, demonstrating strong benchmark for future research and provides a unified comparative assessment useful for designing reliable AI-assisted histopathological diagnosis and clinical decision-making.

analysis.tldr: 提出DSVTLA架构，融合Swin Transformer和ResNet50，在多癌种病理图像分类上达到近100%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多癌种病理图像分类需要同时捕捉长程上下文依赖和细粒度局部形态特征，现有CNN或纯Transformer方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个鲁棒的深度学习架构，在多种癌症组织病理图像上实现高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DSVTLA架构，结合层次化Swin Transformer和ResNet50卷积特征提取，通过迁移学习和微调策略在统一流水线上训练。
contributions: 提出融合Swin Transformer与ResNet50的混合架构，同时捕获全局和局部特征。
在包含5种癌症类型（含原始和分割图像）的大规模数据集上取得SOTA性能，最高100%准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在乳腺癌、口腔癌、肺癌和结肠癌、肾癌、急性淋巴细胞白血病数据集上实验，与DenseNet121、InceptionV3、ResNet50、EfficientNetB3、ViT变体及Swin Transformer对比，DSVTLA在肺结肠癌和分割白血病数据集上达到100%测试准确率，乳腺癌达99.23%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
未讨论模型计算复杂度和推理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DSVTLA架构，融合Swin Transformer和ResNet50，在多癌种病理图像分类上达到近100%准确率。

papers.title: E3-TIR: Enhanced Experience Exploitation for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR), existing training paradigms face significant limitations: Zero-RL suffers from inefficient exploration and mode degradation due to a lack of prior guidance, while SFT-then-RL is limited by high data costs and capability plateaus caused by low-entropy collapse. To address these challenges, we propose E3-TIR (Enhanced Experience Exploitation), a warm-up paradigm for the early stages of agent training. Specifically, we formulate training as the dynamic integration of three experience types: Expert Prefixes, Expert Guided, and Self-Exploration. By executing diverse branching exploration around expert "anchors" and employing a mix policy optimization mechanism, we effectively mitigate distribution shifts and resolve optimization conflicts arising from shared prefixes. Our method dynamically adapts the model's knowledge boundaries, effectively balancing exploration diversity with training efficiency.Experimental results demonstrate that E3-TIR achieves a 6 performance improvement over traditional paradigms on tool-use tasks, while requiring less than 10 of the synthetic data. Furthermore, in terms of ROI, a comprehensive metric integrating performance, data cost, and training efficiency we achieve a 1.46x gain compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/E3-TIR.

analysis.tldr: 提出E3-TIR热身范式，通过动态整合三种经验类型提升工具集成推理的训练效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM工具集成推理训练范式存在零强化学习（Zero-RL）探索低效、模式退化，以及SFT-then-RL数据成本高、能力瓶颈等问题，亟需一种高效且低成本的早期训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种热身训练范式，在工具集成推理任务中平衡探索多样性与训练效率，同时降低数据成本并避免分布偏移和优化冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出Zero-RL因缺乏先验引导导致低效探索和模式退化，SFT-then-RL因低熵崩溃导致能力平台期，且共享前缀引发优化冲突。
analysis.method: E3-TIR通过动态整合三种经验类型（Expert Prefixes、Expert Guided、Self-Exploration），围绕专家锚点执行多样化分支探索，并采用混合策略优化机制缓解分布偏移和优化冲突。
contributions: 提出E3-TIR热身范式，有效提升工具集成推理的训练效率与性能。
通过动态经验整合与混合策略优化，在降低数据成本的同时实现显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在工具使用任务上，E3-TIR相比传统范式提升6%性能，且所需合成数据少于10%；在综合指标ROI上获得1.46倍增益。
limitations: 可能仅适用于工具集成推理的早期训练阶段，泛化性待验证。
混合策略优化的计算开销未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出E3-TIR热身范式，通过动态整合三种经验类型提升工具集成推理的训练效率与性能。

papers.title: SafeAdapt: Provably Safe Policy Updates in Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Safety guarantees are a prerequisite to the deployment of reinforcement learning (RL) agents in safety-critical tasks. Often, deployment environments exhibit non-stationary dynamics or are subject to changing performance goals, requiring updates to the learned policy. This leads to a fundamental challenge: how to update an RL policy while preserving its safety properties on previously encountered tasks? The majority of current approaches either do not provide formal guarantees or verify policy safety only a posteriori. We propose a novel a priori approach to safe policy updates in continual RL by introducing the Rashomon set: a region in policy parameter space certified to meet safety constraints within the demonstration data distribution. We then show that one can provide formal, provable guarantees for arbitrary RL algorithms used to update a policy by projecting their updates onto the Rashomon set. Empirically, we validate this approach across grid-world navigation environments (Frozen Lake and Poisoned Apple) where we guarantee an a priori provably deterministic safety on the source task during downstream adaptation. In contrast, we observe that regularisation-based baselines experience catastrophic forgetting of safety constraints while our approach enables strong adaptation with provable guarantees that safety is preserved.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Rashomon 集概念，通过将策略更新投影到该集合上，为持续强化学习中的安全策略更新提供先验可证明保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 在安全关键任务中部署强化学习智能体需要安全保证，但部署环境常呈现非平稳动态或性能目标变化，需要更新策略，而现有方法要么缺乏形式化保证，要么仅事后验证安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何在更新强化学习策略的同时，保留其在先前任务上的安全属性？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于正则化的基线方法在适应新任务时会灾难性遗忘安全约束。
analysis.method: 引入 Rashomon 集，即策略参数空间中在演示数据分布内被证明满足安全约束的区域；通过将任意 RL 算法的策略更新投影到该集合上，提供形式化、可证明的安全保证。
contributions: 提出 Rashomon 集概念，用于持续 RL 中先验安全策略更新
证明通过投影到 Rashomon 集可为任意 RL 算法提供形式化安全保证
在网格世界导航环境中验证方法能保证源任务上的确定性安全，同时实现强适应
analysis.experiments: 在 Frozen Lake 和 Poisoned Apple 网格世界导航环境中进行实验，与基于正则化的基线对比，显示本方法能避免灾难性遗忘安全约束。
limitations: 实验环境为简单网格世界，未在复杂高维任务上验证
Rashomon 集的计算可能随参数空间维度增长而变得困难
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Rashomon 集概念，通过将策略更新投影到该集合上，为持续强化学习中的安全策略更新提供先验可证明保证。

papers.title: ECHO: Efficient Chest X-ray Report Generation with One-step Block Diffusion
papers.abstract: Chest X-ray report generation (CXR-RG) has the potential to substantially alleviate radiologists' workload. However, conventional autoregressive vision--language models (VLMs) suffer from high inference latency due to sequential token decoding. Diffusion-based models offer a promising alternative through parallel generation, but they still require multiple denoising iterations. Compressing multi-step denoising to a single step could further reduce latency, but often degrades textual coherence due to the mean-field bias introduced by token-factorized denoisers. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{ECHO}, an efficient diffusion-based VLM (dVLM) for chest X-ray report generation. ECHO enables stable one-step-per-block inference via a novel Direct Conditional Distillation (DCD) framework, which mitigates the mean-field limitation by constructing unfactorized supervision from on-policy diffusion trajectories to encode joint token dependencies. In addition, we introduce a Response-Asymmetric Diffusion (RAD) training strategy that further improves training efficiency while maintaining model effectiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ECHO surpasses state-of-the-art autoregressive methods, improving RaTE and SemScore by \textbf{64.33\%} and \textbf{60.58\%} respectively, while achieving an \textbf{$8\times$} inference speedup without compromising clinical accuracy.

analysis.tldr: ECHO通过一步块扩散和直接条件蒸馏，在胸部X光报告生成中实现8倍加速并超越自回归方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部X光报告生成可减轻放射科医生负担，但自回归VLM推理延迟高，扩散模型虽支持并行生成但仍需多步去噪，压缩为单步会因均值场偏差导致文本连贯性下降。
analysis.problem: 如何将扩散模型的多步去噪压缩为单步推理，同时避免均值场偏差以保持文本连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，将多步去噪压缩为单步时，token分解去噪器引入的均值场偏差会降低文本连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出ECHO，包含直接条件蒸馏（DCD）框架，利用在线策略扩散轨迹构建非分解监督以编码联合token依赖；以及响应非对称扩散（RAD）训练策略提升训练效率。
contributions: 提出ECHO，首个实现一步块推理的扩散VLM，用于胸部X光报告生成。
设计直接条件蒸馏（DCD）缓解均值场偏差，保持文本连贯性。
引入响应非对称扩散（RAD）训练策略，提升训练效率。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部X光报告生成任务上，ECHO在RaTE和SemScore上分别提升64.33%和60.58%，实现8倍推理加速，且不牺牲临床准确性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于医学报告生成领域，泛化性未验证。
一步块扩散的稳定性可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ECHO通过一步块扩散和直接条件蒸馏，在胸部X光报告生成中实现8倍加速并超越自回归方法。

papers.title: MedLVR: Latent Visual Reasoning for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.abstract: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for medical visual question answering (VQA), yet their reasoning remains largely text-centric: images are encoded once as static context, and subsequent inference is dominated by language. This paradigm is fundamentally limited in clinical scenarios, where accurate answers often depend on subtle, localized visual evidence that cannot be reliably preserved in static embeddings. We propose \textsc{MedLVR}, a latent visual reasoning framework that introduces an explicit visual evidence state into autoregressive decoding. Instead of relying solely on text-based intermediate reasoning, \textsc{MedLVR} interleaves a short latent reasoning segment within the decoder by reusing hidden states as continuous latent steps, enabling iterative preservation and refinement of query-relevant visual evidence before answer generation. To support effective visual supervision, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: region of interest (ROI)-supervised fine-tuning aligns latent states with clinically relevant image evidence, and Visual-Latent Policy Optimization (VLPO) further optimizes latent reasoning and answer generation under outcome-level rewards. Experiments on OmniMedVQA and five external medical VQA benchmarks show that \textsc{MedLVR} consistently outperforms recent reasoning baselines and improves the average score over the Qwen2.5-VL-7B backbone from 48.3\% to 53.4\%. These results show that latent visual reasoning provides an effective mechanism for preserving diagnostically relevant visual evidence and improving the reliability of medical VQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedLVR框架，通过潜在视觉推理增强医学VQA的视觉证据保留与推理可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学VLM的推理以文本为中心，图像仅编码为静态上下文，难以保留细微局部视觉证据，导致临床场景下答案不准确。
analysis.problem: 医学VQA中静态图像编码无法有效保留和利用诊断相关的局部视觉证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在自回归解码中插入潜在推理段，重用隐藏状态作为连续潜在步骤，迭代保留和细化查询相关视觉证据；采用两阶段训练：ROI监督微调对齐潜在状态与临床图像证据，VLPO优化潜在推理和答案生成。
contributions: 提出MedLVR，首个在解码器中引入显式视觉证据状态的潜在视觉推理框架。
设计两阶段训练策略（ROI监督微调+VLPO），有效监督潜在推理过程。
在多个医学VQA基准上取得一致提升，验证了潜在视觉推理的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniMedVQA和五个外部医学VQA基准上评估，MedLVR优于近期推理基线，将Qwen2.5-VL-7B的平均得分从48.3%提升至53.4%。
limitations: 可能依赖ROI标注，获取成本高。
潜在推理段的长度和位置可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedLVR框架，通过潜在视觉推理增强医学VQA的视觉证据保留与推理可靠性。

papers.title: AsymLoc: Towards Asymmetric Feature Matching for Efficient Visual Localization
papers.abstract: Precise and real-time visual localization is critical for applications like AR/VR and robotics, especially on resource-constrained edge devices such as smart glasses, where battery life and heat dissipation can be a primary concerns. While many efficient models exist, further reducing compute without sacrificing accuracy is essential for practical deployment. To address this, we propose asymmetric visual localization: a large Teacher model processes pre-mapped database images offline, while a lightweight Student model processes the query image online. This creates a challenge in matching features from two different models without resorting to heavy, learned matchers. We introduce AsymLoc, a novel distillation framework that aligns a Student to its Teacher through a combination of a geometry-driven matching objective and a joint detector-descriptor distillation objective, enabling fast, parameter-less nearest-neighbor matching. Extensive experiments on HPatches, ScanNet, IMC2022, and Aachen show that AsymLoc achieves up to 95% of the teacher's localization accuracy using an order of magnitude smaller models, significantly outperforming existing baselines and establishing a new state-of-the-art efficiency-accuracy trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称视觉定位框架AsymLoc，通过师生蒸馏实现轻量模型高效匹配，在资源受限设备上达到95%教师模型精度。
analysis.research_motivation: AR/VR和机器人等应用需要高精度实时视觉定位，但边缘设备（如智能眼镜）受限于电池和散热，现有高效模型仍需进一步降低计算量。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用重型学习匹配器的情况下，实现轻量学生模型与大型教师模型之间的特征匹配，以兼顾精度和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AsymLoc蒸馏框架，包含几何驱动匹配目标和联合检测器-描述子蒸馏目标，使轻量学生模型能够与教师模型进行快速、无参数的最近邻匹配。
contributions: 提出非对称视觉定位范式，教师模型离线处理数据库图像，学生模型在线处理查询图像。
设计AsymLoc蒸馏框架，通过几何匹配目标和联合蒸馏目标实现高效特征对齐。
在多个基准上达到95%教师精度，模型规模小一个数量级，建立新的效率-精度权衡最优。
analysis.experiments: 在HPatches、ScanNet、IMC2022和Aachen数据集上进行实验，学生模型达到教师模型95%的定位精度，显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量和预训练数据。
非对称设置可能限制在教师模型不可用场景下的应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称视觉定位框架AsymLoc，通过师生蒸馏实现轻量模型高效匹配，在资源受限设备上达到95%教师模型精度。

papers.title: Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model agents receive instructions from many sources-system messages, user prompts, tool outputs, other agents, and more-each carrying different levels of trust and authority. When these instructions conflict, agents must reliably follow the highest-privilege instruction to remain safe and effective. The dominant paradigm, instruction hierarchy (IH), assumes a fixed, small set of privilege levels (typically fewer than five) defined by rigid role labels (e.g., system > user). This is inadequate for real-world agentic settings, where conflicts can arise across far more sources and contexts. In this work, we propose Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy (ManyIH), a paradigm for resolving instruction conflicts among instructions with arbitrarily many privilege levels. We introduce ManyIH-Bench, the first benchmark for ManyIH. ManyIH-Bench requires models to navigate up to 12 levels of conflicting instructions with varying privileges, comprising 853 agentic tasks (427 coding and 426 instruction-following). ManyIH-Bench composes constraints developed by LLMs and verified by humans to create realistic and difficult test cases spanning 46 real-world agents. Our experiments show that even the current frontier models perform poorly (~40% accuracy) when instruction conflict scales. This work underscores the urgent need for methods that explicitly target fine-grained, scalable instruction conflict resolution in agentic settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出多层级指令层次范式（ManyIH）解决LLM智能体在复杂多源指令冲突下的安全问题，并构建包含12级权限的基准测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指令层次方法仅支持固定少量权限层级（如系统>用户），无法应对真实智能体场景中来自系统消息、用户提示、工具输出等多达12级指令源的冲突，导致安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体在任意多级权限指令冲突中可靠遵循最高权限指令。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前前沿模型在指令冲突规模增大时准确率仅约40%，表明现有方法无法处理细粒度、可扩展的指令冲突。
analysis.method: 提出Many-Tier Instruction Hierarchy (ManyIH)范式，支持任意多级权限的指令冲突解决；并构建ManyIH-Bench基准，包含853个智能体任务（427编码+426指令跟随），由LLM生成约束并经人工验证，覆盖46个真实智能体场景。
contributions: 提出ManyIH范式，突破传统指令层次固定少量权限层级的限制，支持任意多级指令冲突解决。
构建ManyIH-Bench基准，包含12级权限冲突、853个任务，覆盖46个真实智能体场景，为评估指令冲突解决能力提供标准化测试。
实验揭示当前前沿模型在指令冲突扩展时性能显著下降（~40%准确率），凸显细粒度冲突解决方法的迫切需求。
analysis.experiments: 在ManyIH-Bench上评估当前前沿模型，显示在指令冲突规模扩展时准确率约40%，但摘要未提供具体模型名称或对比基线细节。
limitations: 基准任务由LLM生成并经人工验证，可能仍存在分布偏差或未覆盖所有冲突类型。
未提出具体解决方法，仅提出范式和基准，缺乏实际解决冲突的算法或训练策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多层级指令层次范式（ManyIH）解决LLM智能体在复杂多源指令冲突下的安全问题，并构建包含12级权限的基准测试。

papers.title: TME-PSR: Time-aware, Multi-interest, and Explanation Personalization for Sequential Recommendation
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a sequential recommendation model that integrates Time-aware personalization, Multi-interest personalization, and Explanation personalization for Personalized Sequential Recommendation (TME-PSR). That is, we consider the differences across different users in temporal rhythm preference, multiple fine-grained latent interests, and the personalized semantic alignment between recommendations and explanations. Specifically, the proposed TME-PSR model employs a dual-view gated time encoder to capture personalized temporal rhythms, a lightweight multihead Linear Recurrent Unit architecture that enables fine-grained sub-interest modeling with improved efficiency, and a dynamic dual-branch mutual information weighting mechanism to achieve personalized alignment between recommendations and explanations. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that our method consistently improves recommendation accuracy and explanation quality, at a lower computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出TME-PSR模型，通过时间感知、多兴趣和解释个性化提升序列推荐的准确性与解释质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有序列推荐模型忽略用户间时间节奏偏好差异、细粒度多兴趣建模不足，且推荐与解释之间缺乏个性化语义对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模用户的时间节奏偏好、多粒度潜在兴趣以及推荐与解释的个性化对齐，以提升推荐准确性和解释质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TME-PSR模型，包含双视角门控时间编码器（捕获个性化时间节奏）、轻量多头线性循环单元（细粒度子兴趣建模）和动态双分支互信息加权机制（推荐与解释的个性化对齐）。
contributions: 提出时间感知、多兴趣和解释个性化的序列推荐框架TME-PSR。
设计双视角门控时间编码器和轻量多头线性循环单元，提升效率与细粒度建模。
引入动态双分支互信息加权机制实现推荐与解释的个性化对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据集上进行了实验，结果表明方法在推荐准确性和解释质量上均有提升，且计算成本更低。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的解释数据。
多兴趣建模的粒度可能受限于线性循环单元的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TME-PSR模型，通过时间感知、多兴趣和解释个性化提升序列推荐的准确性与解释质量。

papers.title: SCoRe: Clean Image Generation from Diffusion Models Trained on Noisy Images
papers.abstract: Diffusion models trained on noisy datasets often reproduce high-frequency training artifacts, significantly degrading generation quality. To address this, we propose SCoRe (Spectral Cutoff Regeneration), a training-free, generation-time spectral regeneration method for clean image generation from diffusion models trained on noisy images. Leveraging the spectral bias of diffusion models, which infer high-frequency details from low-frequency cues, SCoRe suppresses corrupted high-frequency components of a generated image via a frequency cutoff and regenerates them via SDEdit. Crucially, we derive a theoretical mapping between the cutoff frequency and the SDEdit initialization timestep based on Radially Averaged Power Spectral Density (RAPSD), which prevents excessive noise injection during regeneration. Experiments on synthetic (CIFAR-10) and real-world (SIDD) noisy datasets demonstrate that SCoRe substantially outperforms post-processing and noise-robust baselines, restoring samples closer to clean image distributions without any retraining or fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的频谱再生方法SCoRe，从噪声训练扩散模型中生成干净图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在噪声数据集上训练会复制高频训练伪影，严重降低生成质量，现有方法需要重新训练或微调，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练或微调的情况下，从噪声图像训练的扩散模型中生成干净图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型具有频谱偏差，能从低频线索推断高频细节，但噪声训练导致高频分量被污染。
analysis.method: SCoRe：对生成图像进行频率截止抑制污染的高频分量，然后通过SDEdit再生高频细节，并基于RAPSD理论推导截止频率与SDEdit初始化时间步的映射。
contributions: 提出训练无关的频谱再生方法SCoRe，无需重新训练或微调即可从噪声训练扩散模型生成干净图像。
推导了截止频率与SDEdit初始化时间步之间的理论映射，避免再生过程中过度噪声注入。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据集CIFAR-10和真实噪声数据集SIDD上实验，SCoRe显著优于后处理和噪声鲁棒基线。
limitations: 依赖扩散模型的频谱偏差假设，可能不适用于所有模型。
需要手动设置截止频率，可能需针对不同噪声水平调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练无关的频谱再生方法SCoRe，从噪声训练扩散模型中生成干净图像。

papers.title: Physics-guided surrogate learning enables zero-shot control of turbulent wings
papers.abstract: Turbulent boundary layers over aerodynamic surfaces are a major source of aircraft drag, yet their control remains challenging due to multiscale dynamics and spatial variability, particularly under adverse pressure gradients. Reinforcement learning has outperformed state-of-the-art strategies in canonical flows, but its application to realistic geometries is limited by computational cost and transferability. Here we show that these limitations can be overcome by exploiting local structures of wall-bounded turbulence. Policies are trained in turbulent channel flows matched to wing boundary-layer statistics and deployed directly onto a NACA4412 wing at $Re_c=2\times10^5$ without further training, being the so-called zero-shot control. This achieves a 28.7% reduction in skin-friction drag and a 10.7% reduction in total drag, outperforming the state-of-the-art opposition control by 40% in friction drag reduction and 5% in total drag. Training cost is reduced by four orders of magnitude relative to on-wing training, enabling scalable flow control.

analysis.tldr: 利用湍流局部结构，在通道流中训练强化学习策略，零样本迁移到机翼实现减阻。
analysis.research_motivation: 机翼湍流边界层是飞机阻力的主要来源，但现有控制方法受限于多尺度动力学和空间变异性，强化学习在真实几何上的应用计算成本高且迁移性差。
analysis.problem: 如何高效训练可迁移的湍流控制策略，实现零样本控制真实机翼。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用壁面湍流的局部结构，在匹配机翼边界层统计特性的槽道流中训练强化学习策略，然后直接部署到NACA4412机翼上，无需再训练。
contributions: 提出一种零样本湍流控制方法，在通道流中训练策略直接迁移到机翼。
在NACA4412机翼上实现28.7%摩擦减阻和10.7%总减阻，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在NACA4412机翼上以Re_c=2×10^5进行数值实验，与反对称控制对比，摩擦减阻提升40%，总减阻提升5%，训练成本降低四个数量级。
limitations: 仅验证了单一翼型和雷诺数，泛化性未知。
零样本迁移可能对更复杂几何或流动条件失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用湍流局部结构，在通道流中训练强化学习策略，零样本迁移到机翼实现减阻。

papers.title: EdgeRazor: A Lightweight Framework for Large Language Models via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed an increasing interest in deploying LLMs on resource-constrained devices, among which quantization has emerged as a promising lightweight technique that converts full-precision model weights and activations into lower-bit formats. Existing weight quantization approaches can be roughly divided into three categories: Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) that calibrates quantized parameters on a small dataset without retraining but suffers from severe performance degradation below 4-bit, Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) that searches low-bit parameters using surrogate gradients but demands substantial computational resources, and Quantization-Aware Distillation that integrates QAT with knowledge transfer from a full-precision teacher but manually selects features to distill and relies heavily on teacher-specific data. In this paper, we propose EdgeRazor, a lightweight framework for LLMs with mixed-precision and extremely low-bit weight quantization. The EdgeRazor framework contains three modules: Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation for the fine-grained control of precision, Adaptive Feature Distillation that derives an $n$-bit student from its 16-bit teacher, and Entropy-Aware KL Divergence on both human-annotated and distilled datasets, whose forward-reverse balance is determined solely by the teacher's output distribution. Empirical investigations of EdgeRazor are conducted on base, instruction-tuned, and multimodal LLMs. Notably, EdgeRazor with 1.88-bit surpasses all contenders with the 3-bit precision, especially outperforms the leading 2-bit PTQ methods by 11.3 points, within a 4-10$\times$ lower training budget than the leading QAT approach. EdgeRazor delivers higher compression ratios at all bit width; the 1.58-bit Qwen3-0.6B reduces storage from 1.41 GB to 0.28 GB while accelerating decoding by 15.1$\times$ relative to the 16-bit baseline.

analysis.tldr: EdgeRazor通过混合精度量化感知蒸馏，在极低比特下显著提升LLM压缩效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 在资源受限设备上部署LLM时，量化是关键技术，但现有方法如PTQ在低于4比特时性能严重下降，QAT计算成本高，而量化感知蒸馏依赖特定数据和手动特征选择，缺乏高效轻量级方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量级框架，实现LLM的混合精度极低比特量化，同时保持高精度和低训练成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: EdgeRazor包含三个模块：混合精度量化感知蒸馏（细粒度精度控制）、自适应特征蒸馏（从16位教师导出n位学生）、熵感知KL散度（在人工标注和蒸馏数据集上，前向-反向平衡由教师输出分布决定）。
contributions: 提出EdgeRazor框架，结合混合精度量化感知蒸馏、自适应特征蒸馏和熵感知KL散度，实现极低比特量化。
在1.88比特下超越所有3比特方法，比领先的2比特PTQ方法高11.3个点，训练预算比领先QAT方法低4-10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在基础、指令微调和多模态LLM上进行实验，1.58比特Qwen3-0.6B存储从1.41GB降至0.28GB，解码加速15.1倍。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，蒸馏效果受教师性能影响。
混合精度策略的自动化程度未明确，可能需手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeRazor通过混合精度量化感知蒸馏，在极低比特下显著提升LLM压缩效率与性能。

papers.title: On the Representational Limits of Quantum-Inspired 1024-D Document Embeddings: An Experimental Evaluation Framework
papers.abstract: Text embeddings are central to modern information retrieval and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). While dense models derived from Large Language Models (LLMs) dominate current practice, recent work has explored quantum-inspired alternatives motivated by the geometric properties of Hilbert-like spaces and their potential to encode richer semantic structure. This paper presents an experimental framework for constructing quantum-inspired 1024-dimensional document embeddings based on overlapping windows and multi-scale aggregation. The pipeline combines semantic projections (e.g., EigAngle), circuit-inspired feature mappings, and optional teacher-student distillation, together with a fingerprinting mechanism for reproducibility and controlled evaluation. We introduce a set of diagnostic tools for hybrid retrieval, including static and dynamic interpolation between BM25 and embedding-based scores, candidate union strategies, and a conceptual alpha-oracle that provides an upper bound for score-level fusion. Experiments on controlled corpora of Italian and English documents across technical, narrative, and legal domains, using synthetic queries, show that BM25 remains a strong baseline, teacher embeddings provide stable semantic structure, and standalone quantum-inspired embeddings exhibit weak and unstable ranking signals. Distillation yields mixed effects, improving alignment in some cases but not consistently enhancing retrieval performance, while hybrid retrieval can recover competitive results when lexical and embedding-based signals are combined. Overall, the results highlight structural limitations in the geometry of quantum-inspired embeddings, including distance compression and ranking instability, and clarify their role as auxiliary components rather than standalone retrieval representations.

analysis.tldr: 量子启发式1024维文档嵌入在检索中表现不稳定，仅适合作为辅助组件。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的稠密嵌入主导检索，但量子启发式嵌入因希尔伯特空间几何特性可能编码更丰富的语义结构，值得探索其实际效果。
analysis.problem: 评估量子启发式1024维文档嵌入在混合检索中的表示能力与局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子启发式嵌入存在距离压缩和排序不稳定性，独立使用时检索信号弱且不稳定；蒸馏效果不一致，混合检索可恢复竞争力。
analysis.method: 构建基于重叠窗口和多尺度聚合的量子启发式嵌入管道，结合语义投影（EigAngle）、电路特征映射、师生蒸馏及指纹机制，并引入混合检索诊断工具（静态/动态插值、候选联合、alpha-oracle）。
contributions: 提出量子启发式1024维文档嵌入的实验框架及混合检索诊断工具集。
揭示量子启发式嵌入的几何结构限制（距离压缩、排序不稳定），明确其仅适合作为辅助组件。
analysis.experiments: 在意大利语和英语文档（技术、叙事、法律领域）上使用合成查询进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估1024维嵌入，其他维度可能表现不同。
实验基于合成查询，真实查询场景可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 量子启发式1024维文档嵌入在检索中表现不稳定，仅适合作为辅助组件。

papers.title: Rays as Pixels: Learning A Joint Distribution of Videos and Camera Trajectories
papers.abstract: Recovering camera parameters from images and rendering scenes from novel viewpoints have been treated as separate tasks in computer vision and graphics. This separation breaks down when image coverage is sparse or poses are ambiguous, since each task depends on what the other produces. We propose Rays as Pixels, a Video Diffusion Model (VDM) that learns a joint distribution over videos and camera trajectories. To our knowledge, this is the first model to predict camera poses and do camera-controlled video generation within a single framework. We represent each camera as dense ray pixels (raxels), a pixel-aligned encoding that lives in the same latent space as video frames, and denoise the two jointly through a Decoupled Self-Cross Attention mechanism. A single trained model handles three tasks: predicting camera trajectories from video, generating video from input images along a pre-defined trajectory, and jointly synthesizing video and trajectory from input images. We evaluate on pose estimation and camera-controlled video generation, and introduce a closed-loop self-consistency test showing that the model's predicted poses and its renderings conditioned on those poses agree. Ablations against Plücker embeddings confirm that representing cameras in a shared latent space with video is subtantially more effective.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种视频扩散模型，联合学习视频与相机轨迹的分布，首次在单一框架内实现相机位姿预测和相机可控视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法将相机参数恢复和新视角渲染视为独立任务，在图像覆盖稀疏或位姿模糊时，两者相互依赖导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在单一框架中联合建模视频和相机轨迹，实现相机位姿预测与相机可控视频生成的统一。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每个相机表示为密集射线像素（raxels），一种像素对齐编码，与视频帧共享同一潜在空间；通过解耦自交叉注意力机制联合去噪视频和相机轨迹。
contributions: 首次在单一框架内实现相机位姿预测和相机可控视频生成。
提出射线像素（raxels）表示，将相机参数编码到与视频相同的潜在空间。
设计解耦自交叉注意力机制，实现视频与相机轨迹的联合去噪。
analysis.experiments: 在相机位姿估计和相机可控视频生成任务上评估，并引入闭环自一致性测试，消融实验表明与Plücker嵌入相比，共享潜在空间表示更有效。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或长视频的泛化能力有限。
raxels表示的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种视频扩散模型，联合学习视频与相机轨迹的分布，首次在单一框架内实现相机位姿预测和相机可控视频生成。

papers.title: Three Modalities, Two Design Probes, One Prototype, and No Vision: Experience-Based Co-Design of a Multi-modal 3D Data Visualization Tool
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) data visualizations, such as surface plots, are vital in STEM fields from biomedical imaging to spectroscopy, yet remain largely inaccessible to blind and low-vision (BLV) people. To address this gap, we conducted an Experience-Based Co-Design with BLV co-designers with expertise in non-visual data representations to create an accessible, multi-modal, web-native visualization tool. Using a multi-phase methodology, our team of five BLV and one non-BLV researcher(s) participated in two iterative sessions, comparing a low-fidelity tactile probe with a high-fidelity digital prototype. This process produced a prototype with empirically grounded features, including reference sonification, stereo and volumetric audio, and configurable buffer aggregation, which our co-designers validated as improving analytic accuracy and learnability. In this study, we target core analytic tasks essential for non-visual 3D data exploration: orientation, landmark and peak finding, comparing local maxima versus global trends, gradient tracing, and identifying occluded or partially hidden features. Our work offers accessibility researchers and developers a co-design protocol for translating tactile knowledge to digital interfaces, concrete design guidance for future systems, and opportunities to extend accessible 3D visualization into embodied data environments.

analysis.tldr: 通过体验式协同设计，为盲人和低视力用户开发多模态3D数据可视化工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D数据可视化在STEM领域至关重要，但盲人和低视力（BLV）人群难以访问，现有工具缺乏可访问性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可访问的多模态3D数据可视化工具，支持BLV用户完成核心分析任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用体验式协同设计（EBCD），通过两轮迭代（低保真触觉探针和高保真数字原型），与5名BLV和1名非BLV研究人员共同设计，生成具有经验支持特征的原型。
contributions: 提出一种将触觉知识转化为数字界面的协同设计协议。
提供具体的设计指导，包括参考声化、立体和体积音频、可配置缓冲区聚合等特征。
验证了原型在提高分析准确性和可学习性方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（5名BLV参与者），可能影响泛化性。
仅针对特定分析任务，未覆盖所有3D数据探索场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过体验式协同设计，为盲人和低视力用户开发多模态3D数据可视化工具。

papers.title: Do Vision Language Models Need to Process Image Tokens?
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success by integrating visual encoders with large language models (LLMs). While VLMs process dense image tokens across deep transformer stacks (incurring substantial computational overhead), it remains fundamentally unclear whether sustained image-token processing is necessary for their performance or visual representations meaningfully evolve from early to later layers. In this work, we systematically investigate the functional role of image tokens in VLMs and show that visual representations rapidly converge to a bounded-complexity regime, \ie their entropy stabilizes, intrinsic dimensionality compresses, and trajectory curvature approaches a near-constant profile. In contrast, textual representations continue to undergo substantial restructuring across depth.
