Once stabilized, visual representations become largely interchangeable between layers, indicating limited additional transformation in deeper stages. Further, depth-wise visual truncation reveals that the necessity of visual processing is task-dependent, where single-token predictions remain comparatively robust to truncated visual depth, but multi-token generation require sustained access to visual representations. Under deterministic decoding, reducing visual depth perturbs intermediate reasoning trajectories more strongly than final outputs, suggesting that image tokens influence the structure of reasoning more than the ultimate conclusions. Collectively, these findings \textbf{question the assumption} that deeper visual processing is uniformly essential in VLMs, challenging the current paradigm of multimodal LLM architectures.

analysis.tldr: VLM中图像标记的视觉表征在浅层快速收敛，深层处理对多数任务并非必需，挑战了当前多模态LLM架构范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM处理大量图像标记导致巨大计算开销，但深层视觉处理是否必要尚不明确，缺乏对图像标记功能角色的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 探究VLM中图像标记在深层Transformer中的功能必要性，以及视觉表征是否在深层仍有意义地演化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉表征在浅层快速收敛到有界复杂度（熵稳定、内在维度压缩、轨迹曲率接近常数），而文本表征持续重构；稳定后视觉表征在层间可互换；视觉处理必要性依赖任务（单标记预测鲁棒，多标记生成需持续访问）。
analysis.method: 通过熵、内在维度、轨迹曲率等指标分析视觉表征演化，并采用深度视觉截断实验评估不同任务下视觉深度的影响。
contributions: 揭示VLM中视觉表征在浅层快速收敛，深层处理对多数任务非必要。
提出任务依赖的视觉处理必要性：单标记预测鲁棒，多标记生成需持续视觉访问。
发现减少视觉深度主要扰动推理轨迹结构而非最终输出，挑战深层视觉处理统一必要的假设。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLM架构和任务，泛化性需验证。
未探讨训练阶段视觉深度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM中图像标记的视觉表征在浅层快速收敛，深层处理对多数任务并非必需，挑战了当前多模态LLM架构范式。

papers.title: Multi-task Just Recognizable Difference for Video Coding for Machines: Database, Model, and Coding Application
papers.abstract: Just Recognizable Difference (JRD) boosts coding efficiency for machine vision through visibility threshold modeling, but is currently limited to a single-task scenario. To address this issue, we propose a Multi-Task JRD (MT-JRD) dataset and an Attribute-assisted MT-JRD (AMT-JRD) model for Video Coding for Machines (VCM), enhancing both prediction accuracy and coding efficiency. First, we construct a dataset comprising 27,264 JRD annotations from machines, supporting three representative tasks including object detection, instance segmentation, and keypoint detection. Secondly, we propose the AMT-JRD prediction model, which integrates Generalized Feature Extraction Module (GFEM) and Specialized Feature Extraction Module (SFEM) to facilitate joint learning across multiple tasks. Thirdly, we innovatively incorporate object attribute information into object-wise JRD prediction through the Attribute Feature Fusion Module (AFFM), which introduces prior knowledge about object size and location. This design effectively compensates for the limitations of relying solely on image features and enhances the model's capacity to represent the perceptual mechanisms of machine vision. Finally, we apply the AMT-JRD model to VCM, where the accurately predicted JRDs are applied to reduce the coding bit rate while preserving accuracy across multiple machine vision tasks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that AMT-JRD achieves precise and robust multi-task prediction with a mean absolute error of 3.781 and error variance of 5.332 across three tasks, outperforming the state-of-the-art single-task prediction model by 6.7% and 6.3%, respectively. Coding experiments further reveal that compared to the baseline VVC and JPEG, the AMT-JRD-based VCM improves an average of 3.861% and 7.886% Bjontegaard Delta-mean Average Precision (BD-mAP), respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出多任务JRD数据集和模型，提升机器视觉视频编码效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有JRD仅支持单任务场景，无法满足多任务机器视觉编码需求，限制了编码效率。
analysis.problem: 如何构建多任务JRD数据集和预测模型，以提升多任务机器视觉视频编码的率失真性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含27,264个JRD标注的多任务数据集，提出AMT-JRD模型，包含通用特征提取模块（GFEM）、专用特征提取模块（SFEM）和属性特征融合模块（AFFM），利用物体属性信息辅助预测。
contributions: 构建了首个多任务JRD数据集，支持目标检测、实例分割和关键点检测。
提出AMT-JRD模型，通过GFEM和SFEM实现多任务联合学习，AFFM引入物体属性先验提升预测精度。
将AMT-JRD应用于VCM，在保持精度的同时降低码率，显著提升编码效率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务上，AMT-JRD平均绝对误差3.781，误差方差5.332，优于单任务模型6.7%和6.3%；编码实验中，相比VVC和JPEG，BD-mAP分别提升3.861%和7.886%。
limitations: 仅支持三种任务，扩展性待验证。
属性信息依赖物体检测，可能引入额外误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多任务JRD数据集和模型，提升机器视觉视频编码效率。

papers.title: Do We Really Need to Approach the Entire Pareto Front in Many-Objective Bayesian Optimisation?
papers.abstract: Many-objective optimisation, a subset of multi-objective optimisation, involves optimisation problems with more than three objectives. As the number of objectives increases, the number of solutions needed to adequately represent the entire Pareto front typically grows substantially. This makes it challenging, if not infeasible, to design a search algorithm capable of effectively exploring the entire Pareto front. This difficulty is particularly acute in the Bayesian optimisation paradigm, where sample efficiency is critical and only a limited number of solutions (often a few hundred) are evaluated. Moreover, after the optimisation process, the decision-maker eventually selects just one solution for deployment, regardless of how many high-quality, diverse solutions are available. In light of this, we argue an idea that under a very limited evaluation budget, it may be more useful to focus on finding a single solution of the highest possible quality for the decision-maker, rather than aiming to approximate the entire Pareto front as existing many-/multi-objective Bayesian optimisation methods typically do. Bearing this idea in mind, this paper proposes a \underline{s}ingle \underline{p}oint-based \underline{m}ulti-\underline{o}bjective search framework (SPMO) that aims to improve the quality of solutions along a direction that leads to a good tradeoff between objectives. Within SPMO, we present a simple acquisition function, called expected single-point improvement (ESPI), working under both noiseless and noisy scenarios. We show that ESPI can be optimised effectively with gradient-based methods via the sample average approximation (SAA) approach and theoretically prove its convergence guarantees under the SAA. We also empirically demonstrate that the proposed SPMO is computationally tractable and outperforms state-of-the-arts on a wide range of benchmark and real-world problems.

analysis.tldr: 针对高维多目标贝叶斯优化，提出单点搜索框架SPMO，聚焦于为决策者找到单个高质量解而非近似整个Pareto前沿。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维多目标优化中，充分表示整个Pareto前沿所需解的数量随目标数急剧增长，在贝叶斯优化样本效率受限且最终只选一个解部署的背景下，现有方法追求近似整个前沿可能效率低下。
analysis.problem: 在有限评估预算下，如何高效地为决策者找到单个高质量折衷解，而非近似整个Pareto前沿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，随着目标数增加，表示整个Pareto前沿所需解的数量大幅增长，在贝叶斯优化中仅能评估少量解（通常几百个），且决策者最终只部署一个解，因此追求整个前沿可能不必要。
analysis.method: 提出单点多目标搜索框架SPMO，包含期望单点改进（ESPI）采集函数，通过样本平均近似（SAA）结合梯度方法优化，并给出收敛保证。
contributions: 提出SPMO框架，将高维多目标贝叶斯优化从近似整个Pareto前沿转向寻找单个高质量解。
设计ESPI采集函数，支持无噪声和有噪声场景，可通过SAA和梯度方法高效优化，并证明收敛性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和真实世界问题上，SPMO优于现有最先进方法，且计算可行。
limitations: 可能不适用于需要多个多样化解的场景。
ESPI的优化依赖于梯度方法，可能对非平滑问题敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对高维多目标贝叶斯优化，提出单点搜索框架SPMO，聚焦于为决策者找到单个高质量解而非近似整个Pareto前沿。

papers.title: PhysInOne: Visual Physics Learning and Reasoning in One Suite
papers.abstract: We present PhysInOne, a large-scale synthetic dataset addressing the critical scarcity of physically-grounded training data for AI systems. Unlike existing datasets limited to merely hundreds or thousands of examples, PhysInOne provides 2 million videos across 153,810 dynamic 3D scenes, covering 71 basic physical phenomena in mechanics, optics, fluid dynamics, and magnetism. Distinct from previous works, our scenes feature multiobject interactions against complex backgrounds, with comprehensive ground-truth annotations including 3D geometry, semantics, dynamic motion, physical properties, and text descriptions. We demonstrate PhysInOne's efficacy across four emerging applications: physics-aware video generation, long-/short-term future frame prediction, physical property estimation, and motion transfer. Experiments show that fine-tuning foundation models on PhysInOne significantly enhances physical plausibility, while also exposing critical gaps in modeling complex physical dynamics and estimating intrinsic properties. As the largest dataset of its kind, orders of magnitude beyond prior works, PhysInOne establishes a new benchmark for advancing physics-grounded world models in generation, simulation, and embodied AI.

analysis.tldr: PhysInOne 是一个大规模合成物理数据集，包含 200 万视频和 71 种物理现象，用于提升 AI 的物理理解与生成能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 系统缺乏大规模物理真实训练数据，已有数据集规模小（仅数百或数千样本），限制了物理世界模型的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、多物理现象、带丰富标注的合成数据集，以支撑物理感知视频生成、未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移等任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 200 万视频、153,810 个动态 3D 场景的合成数据集，覆盖力学、光学、流体和磁学 71 种基本物理现象，提供 3D 几何、语义、运动、物理属性和文本描述等完整标注。
contributions: 提出 PhysInOne，目前最大规模的物理合成视频数据集，比先前工作大数个数量级。
在物理感知视频生成、未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移四个任务上验证了数据集的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在物理感知视频生成、长/短期未来帧预测、物理属性估计和运动迁移四个任务上进行了实验，微调基础模型显著提升了物理合理性，同时揭示了复杂物理动力学建模和内在属性估计方面的关键差距。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，与真实世界物理场景可能存在域差异。
摘要未提及对复杂物理交互（如非刚体、多材料）的覆盖程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysInOne 是一个大规模合成物理数据集，包含 200 万视频和 71 种物理现象，用于提升 AI 的物理理解与生成能力。

papers.title: Yes, But Not Always. Generative AI Needs Nuanced Opt-in
papers.abstract: This paper argues that a one-size-fits-all approach to specifying consent for the use of creative works in generative AI is insufficient. Real-world ownership and rights holder structures, the imitation of artistic styles and likeness, and the limitless contexts of use of AI outputs make the status quo of binary consent with opt-in by default untenable. To move beyond the current impasse, we consider levers of control in generative AI workflows at training, inference, and dissemination. Based on these insights, we position inference-time opt-in as an overlooked opportunity for nuanced consent verification. We conceptualize nuanced consent conditions for opt-in and propose an agent-based inference-time opt-in architecture to verify if user intent requests meet conditional consent granted by rights holders. In a case study for music, we demonstrate that nuanced opt-in at inference can account for established rights and re-establish a balance of power between rights holders and AI developers.

analysis.tldr: 本文主张生成式AI需要细粒度的选择加入机制，而非一刀切的二元同意。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前生成式AI对创意作品的使用采用二元同意（默认选择加入）模式，但现实中的所有权结构、艺术风格模仿和AI输出的无限使用场景使这种模式不可持续，导致权利持有者与AI开发者之间的权力失衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种细粒度的选择加入机制，在推理阶段验证用户意图是否符合权利持有者授予的条件性同意。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现实中的所有权结构复杂、艺术风格和肖像的模仿难以界定、AI输出的使用场景无限，使得一刀切的同意模式失效。
analysis.method: 提出推理时选择加入机制，概念化细粒度同意条件，并设计基于智能体的推理时选择加入架构，用于验证用户意图请求是否满足权利持有者授予的条件性同意。
contributions: 识别了生成式AI工作流中训练、推理和传播阶段的可控杠杆，并定位推理时选择加入为被忽视的细粒度同意验证机会。
概念化了细粒度同意条件，并提出了基于智能体的推理时选择加入架构。
通过音乐案例研究，展示了细粒度推理时选择加入如何维护既有权利并重新平衡权利持有者与AI开发者之间的权力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 案例研究仅限于音乐领域，可能无法直接推广到其他创意领域。
架构的实际部署和可扩展性尚未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文主张生成式AI需要细粒度的选择加入机制，而非一刀切的二元同意。

papers.title: SynFlow: Scaling Up LiDAR Scene Flow Estimation with Synthetic Data
papers.abstract: Reliable 3D dynamic perception requires models that can anticipate motion beyond predefined categories, yet progress is hindered by the scarcity of dense, high-quality motion annotations. While self-supervision on unlabeled real data offers a path forward, empirical evidence suggests that scaling unlabeled data fails to close the performance gap due to noisy proxy signals. In this paper, we propose a shift in paradigm: learning robust real-world motion priors entirely from scalable simulation. We introduce SynFlow, a data generation pipeline that generates large-scale synthetic dataset specifically designed for LiDAR scene flow. Unlike prior works that prioritize sensor-specific realism, SynFlow employs a motion-oriented strategy to synthesize diverse kinematic patterns across 4,000 sequences ($\sim$940k frames), termed SynFlow-4k. This represents a 34x scale-up in annotated volume over existing real-world benchmarks. Our experiments demonstrate that SynFlow-4k provides a highly domain-invariant motion prior. In a zero-shot regime, models trained exclusively on our synthetic data generalize across multiple real-world benchmarks, rivaling in-domain supervised baselines on nuScenes and outperforming state-of-the-art methods on TruckScenes by 31.8%. Furthermore, SynFlow-4k serves as a label-efficient foundation: fine-tuning with only 5% of real-world labels surpasses models trained from scratch on the full available budget. We open-source the pipeline and dataset to facilitate research in generalizable 3D motion estimation. More detail can be found at https://kin-zhang.github.io/SynFlow.

analysis.tldr: SynFlow通过大规模合成数据（SynFlow-4k）实现LiDAR场景流估计的零样本泛化，仅用5%真实标签微调即超越全监督基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D动态感知需要模型能预测未预定义类别的运动，但高质量运动标注稀缺；自监督方法因噪声代理信号无法通过扩大未标注数据来缩小性能差距。
analysis.problem: LiDAR场景流估计中真实标注数据不足，现有合成数据方法过度追求传感器真实性而忽略运动多样性，导致域迁移性能有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩大未标注真实数据无法提升性能，因为自监督代理信号存在噪声；合成数据若采用运动导向策略可提供高度域不变的运动先验。
analysis.method: 提出SynFlow数据生成管线，采用运动导向策略合成多样化运动模式，生成包含4000序列（约94万帧）的大规模合成数据集SynFlow-4k，标注量是现有真实基准的34倍。
contributions: 提出SynFlow数据生成管线，以运动为导向合成多样化运动模式，生成大规模合成数据集SynFlow-4k（4000序列，94万帧）。
零样本下，仅用合成数据训练的模型在多个真实基准上泛化，在TruckScenes上超越SOTA 31.8%，在nuScenes上媲美有监督基线。
SynFlow-4k作为标签高效基础，仅用5%真实标签微调即超越全监督模型。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes、TruckScenes等多个真实基准上进行零样本评估和微调实验，零样本下在TruckScenes上超越SOTA 31.8%，微调仅用5%真实标签即超越全监督基线。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据之间仍可能存在域差异，极端场景下泛化能力未知。
方法依赖仿真环境，可能无法完全覆盖真实世界中的罕见运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SynFlow通过大规模合成数据（SynFlow-4k）实现LiDAR场景流估计的零样本泛化，仅用5%真实标签微调即超越全监督基线。

papers.title: HiL-Bench (Human-in-Loop Benchmark): Do Agents Know When to Ask for Help?
papers.abstract: Frontier coding agents solve complex tasks when given complete context but collapse when specifications are incomplete or ambiguous. The bottleneck is not raw capability, but judgment: knowing when to act autonomously and when to ask for help. Current benchmarks are blind to this failure mode. They supply unambiguous detailed instructions and solely reward execution correctness, so an agent that makes a lucky guess for a missing requirement will score identically to one that would have asked to be certain. We present HiL-Bench (Human-in-the-Loop Benchmark) to measure this selective escalation skill. Each task contains human-validated blockers (missing information, ambiguous requests, contradictory information) that surface only through progressive exploration, not upfront inspection. Our core metric, Ask-F1, the harmonic mean of question precision and blocker recall, captures the tension between over-asking and silent guessing; its structure architecturally prevents gaming through question spam. Evaluation across SWE and text-to-SQL domains reveals a large universal judgment gap: no frontier model recovers more than a fraction of its full-information performance when deciding whether to ask. Failure analysis identifies three key help-seeking patterns: overconfident wrong beliefs with no gap detection; high uncertainty detection yet persistent errors; broad, imprecise escalation without self-correction. These consistent patterns confirm poor help-seeking is a model-level flaw, not task-specific. RL training on shaped Ask-F1 reward shows judgment is trainable: a 32B model improves both help-seeking quality and task pass rate, with gains that transfer across domains. The model does not learn domain-specific heuristics for when to ask; it learns to detect unresolvable uncertainty and act on it.

analysis.tldr: 提出HiL-Bench基准测试，评估AI Agent在任务不完整时是否知道何时向人类求助，发现前沿模型存在普遍判断缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前编码Agent在任务规范不完整或模糊时性能骤降，但现有基准只奖励执行正确性，忽略了Agent是否应主动求助的关键判断能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏衡量Agent在不确定情境下选择性求助（selective escalation）能力的基准和指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在完整上下文下表现优异，但在需要判断是否求助时，恢复的全信息性能比例很低，存在普遍判断差距。失败模式包括：过度自信错误、高不确定性但持续错误、广泛不精确求助。
analysis.method: 提出HiL-Bench基准，包含人工验证的阻塞点（缺失信息、模糊请求、矛盾信息），核心指标Ask-F1（问题精确率与阻塞点召回率的调和平均），并验证了基于Ask-F1奖励的RL训练可提升求助质量。
contributions: 提出HiL-Bench基准，专门评估Agent在任务不完整时的选择性求助能力。
设计Ask-F1指标，平衡过度提问与沉默猜测，防止游戏化。
揭示前沿模型在求助判断上的普遍缺陷，并证明该缺陷可通过RL训练改善。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE和text-to-SQL两个领域进行评估，发现所有前沿模型在求助判断上恢复的全信息性能比例很低；RL训练使32B模型在求助质量和任务通过率上均有提升，且跨领域迁移。
limitations: 仅覆盖SWE和text-to-SQL两个领域，泛化性需更多验证。
RL训练可能依赖特定奖励设计，实际部署中人类反馈成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiL-Bench基准测试，评估AI Agent在任务不完整时是否知道何时向人类求助，发现前沿模型存在普遍判断缺陷。

papers.title: EGLOCE: Training-Free Energy-Guided Latent Optimization for Concept Erasure
papers.abstract: As text-to-image diffusion models grow increasingly prevalent, the ability to remove specific concepts-mostly explicit content and many copyrighted characters or styles-has become essential for safety and compliance. Existing unlearning approaches often require costly re-training, modify parameters at the cost of degradation of unrelated concept fidelity, or depend on indirect inference-time adjustment that compromise the effectiveness of concept erasure. Inspired by the success of energy-guided sampling for preservation of the condition of diffusion models, we introduce Energy-Guided Latent Optimization for Concept Erasure (EGLOCE), a training-free approach that removes unwanted concepts by re-directing noisy latent during inference. Our method employs a dual-objective framework: a repulsion energy that steers generation away from target concepts via gradient descent in latent space, and a retention energy that preserves semantic alignment to the original prompt. Combined with previous approaches that either require erroneous modified model weights or provide weak inference-time guidance, EGLOCE operates entirely at inference and enhances erasure performance, enabling plug-and-play integration. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EGLOCE improves concept removal while maintaining image quality and prompt alignment across baselines, even with adversarial attacks. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to establish a new paradigm for safe and controllable image generation through dual energy-based guidance during sampling.

analysis.tldr: EGLOCE 是一种无需训练的推理时能量引导潜变量优化方法，用于从文本到图像扩散模型中擦除特定概念。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念擦除方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练并损害无关概念保真度，要么依赖间接推理时调整导致效果不佳，亟需一种高效且无损的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练且不降低图像质量和提示对齐的前提下，有效擦除扩散模型中的特定概念（如色情内容、版权角色或风格）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双目标能量引导框架：排斥能量通过潜空间梯度下降引导生成远离目标概念，保留能量维持与原始提示的语义对齐，全部在推理时完成。
contributions: 提出首个基于双能量引导的推理时概念擦除范式，无需训练即可实现即插即用。
在多个基线上显著提升概念擦除效果，同时保持图像质量和提示对齐，并能抵御对抗攻击。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验表明EGLOCE在概念移除、图像质量和提示对齐方面优于基线，包括对抗攻击场景，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂或重叠概念擦除效果有限。
能量引导的梯度下降可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EGLOCE 是一种无需训练的推理时能量引导潜变量优化方法，用于从文本到图像扩散模型中擦除特定概念。

papers.title: Efficient Unlearning through Maximizing Relearning Convergence Delay
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning poses challenges in removing mislabeled, contaminated, or problematic data from a pretrained model. Current unlearning approaches and evaluation metrics are solely focused on model predictions, which limits insight into the model's true underlying data characteristics. To address this issue, we introduce a new metric called relearning convergence delay, which captures both changes in weight space and prediction space, providing a more comprehensive assessment of the model's understanding of the forgotten dataset. This metric can be used to assess the risk of forgotten data being recovered from the unlearned model. Based on this, we propose the Influence Eliminating Unlearning framework, which removes the influence of the forgetting set by degrading its performance and incorporates weight decay and injecting noise into the model's weights, while maintaining accuracy on the retaining set. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing metrics and our proposed relearning convergence delay metric, approaching ideal unlearning performance. We provide theoretical guarantees, including exponential convergence and upper bounds, as well as empirical evidence of strong retention and resistance to relearning in both classification and generative unlearning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出最大化重学习收敛延迟的遗忘框架，通过权重衰减和噪声注入实现更彻底的模型遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法和评估指标仅关注模型预测，无法全面反映模型对遗忘数据的真实理解，存在遗忘数据被恢复的风险。
analysis.problem: 如何更全面地评估遗忘效果并设计更有效的遗忘方法，防止遗忘数据被恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出影响消除遗忘框架，通过降低遗忘集性能、引入权重衰减和噪声注入来消除其影响，同时保持保留集精度。
contributions: 提出新指标重学习收敛延迟，综合权重空间和预测空间评估遗忘效果。
提出影响消除遗忘框架，在分类和生成遗忘任务中接近理想遗忘性能，并提供理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 在分类和生成遗忘任务上进行实验，表明方法优于现有指标，并接近理想遗忘性能。
limitations: 可能对噪声注入的幅度敏感，需要调参。
理论保证可能依赖于特定假设，实际泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出最大化重学习收敛延迟的遗忘框架，通过权重衰减和噪声注入实现更彻底的模型遗忘。

papers.title: The AI Codebase Maturity Model: From Assisted Coding to Fully Autonomous Systems
papers.abstract: AI coding tools are widely adopted, but most teams plateau at prompt-and-review without a framework for systematic progression. This paper presents the AI Codebase Maturity Model (ACMM), a 6-level framework describing how codebases evolve from basic AI-assisted coding to fully autonomous systems. Inspired by CMMI, each level is defined by its feedback loop topology - the specific mechanisms that must exist before the next level becomes possible. I validate the model through a 100-day experience report maintaining KubeStellar Console, a CNCF Kubernetes dashboard built from scratch with Claude Code (Opus) and GitHub Copilot, and through the initial production deployment of Hive - an open-source multi-agent orchestration system that realizes Level 6: full autonomy. The system currently operates with 74 CI/CD workflows, 32 nightly test suites, 91% code coverage, and achieves bug-to-fix times under 30 minutes - 24 hours a day. The central finding: the intelligence of an AI-driven development system resides not in the AI model itself, but in the infrastructure of instructions, tests, metrics, and feedback loops that surround it. You cannot skip levels, and at each level, the thing that unlocks the next one is another feedback mechanism. Testing - the volume of test cases, the coverage thresholds, and the reliability of test execution - proved to be the single most important investment in the entire journey. v2 extends the model from 5 to 6 levels, adding Level 6 (Fully Autonomous) with Hive as reference implementation and Beads for cross-agent memory continuity, plus throughput acceleration data showing 5x PR throughput and 37x issue throughput from Level 2 to Level 6.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI代码库成熟度模型（ACMM），通过反馈循环拓扑定义6级演进，经验证可实现全自主系统。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码工具广泛使用，但多数团队停留在提示-审查模式，缺乏系统化演进框架。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和实现代码库从AI辅助编码到完全自主系统的渐进式演进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI驱动开发系统的智能不在于AI模型本身，而在于指令、测试、指标和反馈循环的基础设施；测试是唯一最重要的投资；不能跳过级别。
analysis.method: 提出ACMM 6级成熟度模型，每级由反馈循环拓扑定义，并通过KubeStellar Console的100天经验报告和Hive多智能体编排系统的生产部署验证。
contributions: 提出AI代码库成熟度模型（ACMM），包含6个级别和反馈循环拓扑定义。
通过实际项目验证模型，展示从Level 2到Level 6的吞吐量提升（5x PR吞吐量，37x问题吞吐量）。
开源Hive多智能体编排系统作为Level 6参考实现，并引入Beads实现跨智能体记忆连续性。
analysis.experiments: 通过KubeStellar Console的100天经验报告和Hive的生产部署验证，报告了74个CI/CD工作流、32个夜间测试套件、91%代码覆盖率、30分钟内修复bug。
limitations: 模型基于单一项目经验，泛化性需更多验证。
Level 6的完全自主性可能仅适用于特定场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI代码库成熟度模型（ACMM），通过反馈循环拓扑定义6级演进，经验证可实现全自主系统。

papers.title: Region-Constrained Group Relative Policy Optimization for Flow-Based Image Editing
papers.abstract: Instruction-guided image editing requires balancing target modification with non-target preservation. Recently, flow-based models have emerged as a strong and increasingly adopted backbone for instruction-guided image editing, thanks to their high fidelity and efficient deterministic ODE sampling. Building on this foundation, GRPO-based reward-driven post-training has been explored to directly optimize editing-specific rewards, improving instruction following and editing consistency. However, existing methods often suffer from noisy credit assignment: global exploration also perturbs non-target regions, inflating within-group reward variance and yielding noisy GRPO advantages. To address this, we propose RC-GRPO-Editing, a region-constrained GRPO post-training framework for flow-based image editing under deterministic ODE sampling. It suppresses background-induced nuisance variance to enable cleaner localized credit assignment, improving editing region instruction adherence while preserving non-target content. Concretely, we localize exploration via region-decoupled initial noise perturbations to reduce background-induced reward variance and stabilize GRPO advantages, and introduce an attention concentration reward that aligns cross-attention with the intended editing region throughout the rollout, reducing unintended changes in non-target regions. Experiments on CompBench show consistent improvements in editing region instruction adherence and non-target preservation.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域约束的GRPO后训练框架，提升流模型图像编辑的指令遵循与背景保持。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令引导图像编辑需要在目标修改与非目标保持间平衡，现有GRPO后训练方法因全局探索导致噪声信用分配，影响编辑质量。
analysis.problem: 流模型图像编辑中，GRPO后训练的全局探索扰动非目标区域，增大组内奖励方差，产生噪声优势函数，导致编辑区域指令遵循不足和非目标内容改变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局探索导致背景区域奖励方差增大，GRPO优势函数噪声化，降低编辑区域指令遵循和背景保持。
analysis.method: 提出RC-GRPO-Editing框架，通过区域解耦初始噪声扰动限制探索范围，并引入注意力集中奖励对齐交叉注意力与编辑区域，减少非目标区域意外变化。
contributions: 提出区域约束GRPO后训练框架，解决流模型图像编辑中噪声信用分配问题。
设计区域解耦初始噪声扰动和注意力集中奖励，提升编辑区域指令遵循与非目标保持。
analysis.experiments: 在CompBench上实验，显示编辑区域指令遵循和非目标保持的一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖编辑区域掩码的准确性。
未在更多样化数据集或真实场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域约束的GRPO后训练框架，提升流模型图像编辑的指令遵循与背景保持。

papers.title: BadSkill: Backdoor Attacks on Agent Skills via Model-in-Skill Poisoning
papers.abstract: Agent ecosystems increasingly rely on installable skills to extend functionality, and some skills bundle learned model artifacts as part of their execution logic. This creates a supply-chain risk that is not captured by prompt injection or ordinary plugin misuse: a third-party skill may appear benign while concealing malicious behavior inside its bundled model. We present BadSkill, a backdoor attack formulation that targets this model-in-skill threat surface. In BadSkill, an adversary publishes a seemingly benign skill whose embedded model is backdoor-fine-tuned to activate a hidden payload only when routine skill parameters satisfy attacker-chosen semantic trigger combinations. To realize this attack, we train the embedded classifier with a composite objective that combines classification loss, margin-based separation, and poison-focused optimization, and evaluate it in an OpenClaw-inspired simulation environment that preserves third-party skill installation and execution while enabling controlled multi-model study. Our benchmark spans 13 skills, including 8 triggered tasks and 5 non-trigger control skills, with a combined main evaluation set of 571 negative-class queries and 396 trigger-aligned queries. Across eight architectures (494M--7.1B parameters) from five model families, BadSkill achieves up to 99.5\% average attack success rate (ASR) across the eight triggered skills while maintaining strong benign-side accuracy on negative-class queries. In poison-rate sweeps on the standard test split, a 3\% poison rate already yields 91.7\% ASR. The attack remains effective across the evaluated model scales and under five text perturbation types. These findings identify model-bearing skills as a distinct model supply-chain risk in agent ecosystems and motivate stronger provenance verification and behavioral vetting for third-party skill artifacts.

analysis.tldr: BadSkill 提出一种针对 Agent 技能中嵌入模型的投毒攻击，在保持良性功能的同时实现高成功率后门触发。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent 生态系统依赖可安装技能扩展功能，但技能可能捆绑学习模型，形成供应链风险，现有提示注入或插件滥用方法无法覆盖。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种后门攻击，使第三方技能中的嵌入模型在特定触发条件下执行隐藏恶意行为，同时保持正常功能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过复合目标（分类损失、基于间隔的分离和投毒优化）对嵌入分类器进行后门微调，使模型在特定语义触发组合下激活隐藏载荷。
contributions: 提出 BadSkill 攻击框架，针对 Agent 技能中模型投毒的后门攻击。
在 13 个技能、8 种架构（494M-7.1B 参数）上验证，平均攻击成功率高达 99.5%，且良性准确率保持。
analysis.experiments: 在 OpenClaw 模拟环境中评估，包含 13 个技能（8 个触发任务和 5 个控制技能），主评估集有 571 个负类查询和 396 个触发对齐查询，测试了五种文本扰动类型。
limitations: 仅针对分类器模型，未覆盖其他类型模型。
模拟环境可能无法完全反映真实 Agent 生态系统的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BadSkill 提出一种针对 Agent 技能中嵌入模型的投毒攻击，在保持良性功能的同时实现高成功率后门触发。

papers.title: On-Meter Graph Machine Learning: A Case Study of PV Power Forecasting for Grid Edge Intelligence
papers.abstract: This paper presents a detailed study of how graph neural networks can be used on edge intelligent meters in a microgrid to forecast photovoltaic power generation. The problem background and the adopted technologies are introduced, including ONNX and ONNX Runtime. The hardware and software specifications of the smart meter are also briefly described. Then, the paper focuses on the training and deployment of two graph machine learning models, GCN and GraphSAGE, with particular emphasis on developing and deploying a customized ONNX operator for GCN. Finally, a case study is conducted using real datasets from a village microgrid. The performance of the two models is compared on both the PC and the smart meter, exhibiting successful deployments and executions on the smart meter.

analysis.tldr: 在智能电表上部署GCN和GraphSAGE进行光伏功率预测，并开发了自定义ONNX算子。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘智能电表计算资源有限，传统深度学习模型难以直接部署，需要轻量化且高效的图机器学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的智能电表上高效部署图神经网络模型进行光伏功率预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用GCN和GraphSAGE两种图神经网络模型，通过ONNX和ONNX Runtime进行模型转换和部署，并开发了自定义ONNX算子以支持GCN。
contributions: 展示了在智能电表上部署图神经网络进行光伏功率预测的可行性。
开发并部署了自定义ONNX算子以支持GCN模型。
analysis.experiments: 使用真实微电网数据集，在PC和智能电表上比较了GCN和GraphSAGE的性能，部署和执行成功。
limitations: 仅针对光伏功率预测场景，泛化性未验证。
未与其他非图神经网络方法进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在智能电表上部署GCN和GraphSAGE进行光伏功率预测，并开发了自定义ONNX算子。

papers.title: Cluster-First Labelling: An Automated Pipeline for Segmentation and Morphological Clustering in Histology Whole Slide Images
papers.abstract: Labelling tissue components in histology whole slide images (WSIs) is prohibitively labour-intensive: a single slide may contain tens of thousands of structures--cells, nuclei, and other morphologically distinct objects--each requiring manual boundary delineation and classification. We present a cloudnative, end-to-end pipeline that automates this process through a cluster-first paradigm. Our system tiles WSIs, filters out tiles deemed unlikely to contain valuable information, segments tissue components with Cellpose-SAM (including cells, nuclei, and other morphologically similar structures), extracts neural embeddings via a pretrained ResNet-50, reduces dimensionality with UMAP, and groups morphologically similar objects using DBSCAN clustering. Under this paradigm, a human annotator labels representative clusters rather than individual objects, reducing annotation effort by orders of magnitude. We evaluate the pipeline on 3,696 tissue components across 13 diverse tissue types from three species (human, rat, rabbit), measuring how well unsupervised clusters align with independent human labels via per-tile Hungarian-algorithm matching. Our system achieves a weighted cluster-label alignment accuracy of 96.8%, with 7 of 13 tissue types reaching perfect agreement. The pipeline, a companion labelling web application, and all evaluation code are released as open-source software.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种先聚类再标注的自动化流水线，通过聚类减少组织学全切片图像中人工标注工作量，达到96.8%的聚类-标签对齐准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 组织学全切片图像中组织成分标注极其耗时，一张切片可能包含数万个结构，手动标注边界和分类成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化组织学WSI中组织成分的标注过程，并大幅减少人工标注工作量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用先聚类后标注的范式：对WSI进行分块、过滤、用Cellpose-SAM分割、ResNet-50提取嵌入、UMAP降维、DBSCAN聚类，然后人工标注代表性聚类而非单个对象。
contributions: 提出一种先聚类后标注的自动化流水线，显著减少标注工作量。
在13种组织类型、3个物种的3696个组织成分上评估，达到96.8%的加权聚类-标签对齐准确率。
开源了流水线、标注Web应用和评估代码。
analysis.experiments: 在3,696个组织成分、13种组织类型、3个物种（人、大鼠、兔）上评估，使用逐块匈牙利算法匹配，加权聚类-标签对齐准确率96.8%，其中7种组织类型达到完全一致。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型（Cellpose-SAM、ResNet-50）的泛化能力。
聚类结果可能受DBSCAN参数影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种先聚类再标注的自动化流水线，通过聚类减少组织学全切片图像中人工标注工作量，达到96.8%的聚类-标签对齐准确率。

papers.title: Through Their Eyes: Fixation-aligned Tuning for Personalized User Emulation
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed as scalable user simulators for recommender system evaluation. Yet existing simulators perceive recommendations through text or structured metadata rather than the visual interfaces real users browse-a critical gap, since attention over recommendation layouts is both visually driven and highly personalized. We investigate whether aligning a vision-language model's (VLM's) visual attention with user-specific gaze patterns can improve simulation fidelity. Analysis of a real-world eye-tracking dataset collected in a carousel-based recommendation setting reveals that users exhibit stable individual gaze patterns strongly predictive of click behavior. Building on this finding, we propose Fixation-Aligned Tuning for user Emulation (FixATE). Our approach first probes the VLM's internal visual attention via interpretability operators to obtain a slot-level relevance distribution comparable with human fixation, and then learns personalized soft prompts to steer the model's attention toward each user's characteristic fixation pattern. Experiments across three interpretability-based probing operators and two architecturally distinct VLM backbones demonstrate consistent improvements in both attention alignment and click prediction accuracy. These results suggest that making the model "see like the user" is a viable path toward simulators that more faithfully reproduce how users perceive and act in recommendation interfaces.

analysis.tldr: 通过对齐VLM视觉注意力与用户眼动模式，提升推荐系统用户模拟的保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM用户模拟器仅通过文本或结构化元数据感知推荐，忽略了真实用户浏览的视觉界面和个性化注意力模式，导致模拟保真度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何使视觉语言模型（VLM）的视觉注意力与用户个体眼动模式对齐，以提高推荐系统用户模拟的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实世界眼动数据集分析显示，用户在轮播推荐界面中具有稳定的个体注视模式，且这些模式与点击行为强相关。
analysis.method: 提出FixATE方法：先通过可解释性算子探测VLM内部视觉注意力，获得与人类注视可比的槽级相关性分布；然后学习个性化软提示，引导模型注意力朝向每个用户的特征注视模式。
contributions: 首次将用户眼动数据用于对齐VLM注意力以提升用户模拟保真度。
提出FixATE框架，结合可解释性探测和个性化软提示实现注意力对齐。
在多种探测算子和VLM骨干上验证了注意力对齐和点击预测的一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界眼动数据集上，使用三种可解释性探测算子和两种架构不同的VLM骨干进行实验，结果表明注意力对齐和点击预测准确性均有持续提升。
limitations: 仅针对轮播推荐界面，可能不适用于其他布局。
依赖眼动数据采集，实际部署成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对齐VLM视觉注意力与用户眼动模式，提升推荐系统用户模拟的保真度。

papers.title: EpiAgent: An Agent-Centric System for Ancient Inscription Restoration
papers.abstract: Ancient inscriptions, as repositories of cultural memory, have suffered from centuries of environmental and human-induced degradation. Restoring their intertwined visual and textual integrity poses one of the most demanding challenges in digital heritage preservation. However, existing AI-based approaches often rely on rigid pipelines, struggling to generalize across such complex and heterogeneous real-world degradations. Inspired by the skill-coordinated workflow of human epigraphers, we propose EpiAgent, an agent-centric system that formulates inscription restoration as a hierarchical planning problem. Following an Observe-Conceive-Execute-Reevaluate paradigm, an LLM-based central planner orchestrates collaboration among multimodal analysis, historical experience, specialized restoration tools, and iterative self-refinement. This agent-centric coordination enables a flexible and adaptive restoration process beyond conventional single-pass methods. Across real-world degraded inscriptions, EpiAgent achieves superior restoration quality and stronger generalization compared to existing methods. Our work marks an important step toward expert-level agent-driven restoration of cultural heritage. The code is available at https://github.com/blackprotoss/EpiAgent.

analysis.tldr: EpiAgent 是一个基于智能体的铭文修复系统，通过分层规划和多模态协作实现优于传统方法的修复效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 古代铭文因自然和人为因素严重退化，现有 AI 方法依赖刚性流水线，难以泛化到复杂多样的真实退化场景。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个灵活、自适应的系统，能够像人类金石学家一样协作修复铭文的视觉和文本完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EpiAgent，采用观察-构思-执行-再评估范式，由基于 LLM 的中心规划器协调多模态分析、历史经验、专用修复工具和迭代自优化，将修复建模为分层规划问题。
contributions: 提出智能体中心的铭文修复系统 EpiAgent，将修复建模为分层规划问题。
采用观察-构思-执行-再评估范式，实现灵活自适应的修复流程。
在真实退化铭文上取得优于现有方法的修复质量和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界退化铭文上评估，EpiAgent 相比现有方法实现了更优的修复质量和更强的泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，在资源受限场景下效率受限。
未提及对极端退化或缺失铭文的修复效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EpiAgent 是一个基于智能体的铭文修复系统，通过分层规划和多模态协作实现优于传统方法的修复效果。

papers.title: Robust 4D Visual Geometry Transformer with Uncertainty-Aware Priors
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 4D scenes is an important yet challenging task. While 3D foundation models like VGGT excel in static settings, they often struggle with dynamic sequences where motion causes significant geometric ambiguity. To address this, we present a framework designed to disentangle dynamic and static components by modeling uncertainty across different stages of the reconstruction process. Our approach introduces three synergistic mechanisms: (1) Entropy-Guided Subspace Projection, which leverages information-theoretic weighting to adaptively aggregate multi-head attention distributions, effectively isolating dynamic motion cues from semantic noise; (2) Local-Consistency Driven Geometry Purification, which enforces spatial continuity via radius-based neighborhood constraints to eliminate structural outliers; and (3) Uncertainty-Aware Cross-View Consistency, which formulates multi-view projection refinement as a heteroscedastic maximum likelihood estimation problem, utilizing depth confidence as a probabilistic weight. Experiments on dynamic benchmarks show that our approach outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, reducing Mean Accuracy error by 13.43\% and improving segmentation F-measure by 10.49\%. Our framework maintains the efficiency of feed-forward inference and requires no task-specific fine-tuning or per-scene optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒4D视觉几何Transformer，通过不确定性感知先验解耦动态与静态成分，在动态场景重建中取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态4D场景重建因运动导致几何歧义，现有3D基础模型（如VGGT）在动态序列中表现不佳，亟需鲁棒且高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 动态4D场景中运动引起的几何模糊和结构异常，导致重建精度下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出3D基础模型在动态序列中因运动产生显著几何歧义，且现有方法难以有效分离动态与静态成分。
analysis.method: 提出包含三个协同机制的框架：熵引导子空间投影（自适应聚合多头注意力）、局部一致性几何净化（半径约束消除离群点）、不确定性感知跨视图一致性（异方差最大似然估计优化多视图投影）。
contributions: 提出不确定性感知先验的4D视觉几何Transformer，有效解耦动态与静态成分。
设计三种协同机制（熵引导子空间投影、局部一致性几何净化、不确定性感知跨视图一致性）提升动态场景重建鲁棒性。
在动态基准上超越SOTA，平均准确率误差降低13.43%，分割F值提升10.49%，且无需微调或逐场景优化。
analysis.experiments: 在动态基准上评估，与当前SOTA方法对比，报告了平均准确率误差和分割F-measure的改进。
limitations: 可能对极端动态或遮挡场景的鲁棒性有限。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种鲁棒4D视觉几何Transformer，通过不确定性感知先验解耦动态与静态成分，在动态场景重建中取得SOTA。

papers.title: Arbitration Failure, Not Perceptual Blindness: How Vision-Language Models Resolve Visual-Linguistic Conflicts
papers.abstract: When a Vision-Language Model (VLM) sees a blue banana and answers "yellow", is the problem of perception or arbitration? We explore the question in ten VLMs with various sizes and reveal an Encoding-Grounding Dissociation: models that fail to report what they see (and thus provide a wrong answer) still encode the visual evidence as strongly as models that provide the correct answer. Using Multimodal Arbitration Crossover (MAC) analysis with layer-by-layer Logit Lens probing, we track the competition between visual and prior signals across every layer of each model. We show that visual attributes can be linearly decodable from early layers (AUC > 0.86). The accuracy remains nearly identical for both successful and failed samples. However, the gap in the final-layer logit - not the strength of encoding - better predicts grounding outcomes with a correlation of $ρ=$ 0.847. After having studied when VLMs base their answers on image clues rather than prior knowledge, we want to understand the causal relationships. We establish causality through full-sequence activation patching. The standard last-token interventions in LLM interpretability do not affect VLMs. In contrast, replacing the full token sequence at layers identified by MAC alters 60 to 84% of outputs. Partial-token decomposition shows that image tokens carry almost all of the causal impact, while text tokens have none. Scaling addresses the remaining architectural differences to achieve perfect retention. Moving from diagnosis to intervention, we show that training-free activation steering - both linear and sparse autoencoder-guided - in early layers can improve visual grounding by up to +3.8% with degrading performance in some setups. Overall, these findings lead to a clear conclusion: VLMs already see well, but the challenge is acting on what they see. Targeted interventions can help to bridge this gap.

analysis.tldr: VLM 视觉感知正常但仲裁失败，早期层激活干预可提升视觉接地。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM 在视觉-语言冲突（如蓝色香蕉回答黄色）时，错误原因不明，是感知失败还是仲裁失败？理解这一机制对改进模型可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 揭示 VLM 在视觉-语言冲突中错误回答的根本原因，并探索无训练干预方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现编码-接地分离：模型即使回答错误，视觉证据编码强度与正确回答时几乎相同；最终层 logit 差距比编码强度更能预测接地结果（ρ=0.847）。
analysis.method: 提出多模态仲裁交叉（MAC）分析，结合逐层 Logit Lens 探测视觉与先验信号的竞争；通过全序列激活修补建立因果；使用无训练激活引导（线性与稀疏自编码器）改善视觉接地。
contributions: 揭示 VLM 的编码-接地分离现象，证明错误源于仲裁而非感知盲点。
提出 MAC 分析方法及因果验证，发现图像令牌承载几乎所有因果影响。
展示无训练激活引导可在早期层提升视觉接地达 +3.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在 10 个不同规模的 VLM 上进行实验，使用 MAC 分析、Logit Lens 探测、激活修补和激活引导，报告 AUC > 0.86、相关性 ρ=0.847、输出改变 60-84%、视觉接地提升 +3.8%。
limitations: 激活引导在某些设置下性能下降。
仅针对视觉-语言冲突场景，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM 视觉感知正常但仲裁失败，早期层激活干预可提升视觉接地。

papers.title: A-IO: Adaptive Inference Orchestration for Memory-Bound NPUs
papers.abstract: During the deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs), the autoregressive decoding phase on heterogeneous NPU platforms (e.g., Ascend 910B) faces severe memory-bound challenges. This study reveals the ``Model Scaling Paradox'' caused by the static deployment of single-sized models. It also points out the kernel synchronization overhead of fine-grained speculative decoding \cite{leviathan2023fast, chen2023speculative} under NPU computational graph compilation, and the severe limitations of purely relying on micro-level acceleration algorithms like Prompt LookUp Decoding (PLD)

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应推理编排框架A-IO，通过动态模型缩放和粗粒度推测解码缓解NPU内存瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在异构NPU平台（如Ascend 910B）上自回归解码时面临严重的内存受限问题，现有静态部署和微级加速算法（如PLD）效果有限。
analysis.problem: 解决NPU上LLM推理的内存瓶颈，包括单尺寸模型静态部署导致的“模型缩放悖论”和细粒度推测解码的核同步开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 揭示了“模型缩放悖论”：静态部署单尺寸模型无法适应动态内存需求；细粒度推测解码在NPU计算图编译下存在核同步开销；纯微级加速算法（如PLD）受严重限制。
analysis.method: 提出A-IO框架，结合动态模型缩放（根据可用内存调整模型大小）和粗粒度推测解码（减少核同步开销）来优化推理。
contributions: 揭示了NPU上LLM推理的“模型缩放悖论”和细粒度推测解码的核同步开销问题。
提出了A-IO自适应推理编排框架，通过动态模型缩放和粗粒度推测解码缓解内存瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定NPU架构（如Ascend 910B）优化，泛化性未知。
动态模型缩放可能引入精度损失或额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应推理编排框架A-IO，通过动态模型缩放和粗粒度推测解码缓解NPU内存瓶颈。

papers.title: LLM-Rosetta: A Hub-and-Spoke Intermediate Representation for Cross-Provider LLM API Translation
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of Large Language Model (LLM) providers--each exposing proprietary API formats--has created a fragmented ecosystem where applications become tightly coupled to individual vendors. Switching or bridging providers requires $O(N^2)$ bilateral adapters, impeding portability and multi-provider architectures. We observe that despite substantial syntactic divergence, the major LLM APIs share a common semantic core: the practical challenge is the combinatorial surface of syntactic variations, not deep semantic incompatibility. Based on this finding, we present LLM-Rosetta, an open-source translation framework built on a hub-and-spoke Intermediate Representation (IR) that captures the shared semantic core--messages, content parts, tool calls, reasoning traces, and generation controls--in a 9-type content model and 10-type stream event schema. A modular Ops-composition converter architecture enables each API standard to be added independently. LLM-Rosetta supports bidirectional conversion (provider-to-IR-to-provider) for both request and response payloads, including chunk-level streaming with stateful context management. We implement converters for four API standards (OpenAI Chat Completions, OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Messages, and Google GenAI), covering the vast majority of commercial providers. Empirical evaluation demonstrates lossless round-trip fidelity, correct streaming behavior, and sub-100 microsecond conversion overhead--competitive with LiteLLM's single-pass approach while providing bidirectionality and provider neutrality. LLM-Rosetta passes the Open Responses compliance suite and is deployed in production at Argonne National Laboratory. Code is available at https://github.com/Oaklight/llm-rosetta.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Hub-and-Spoke中间表示的跨提供商LLM API翻译框架，实现双向无损转换和低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM提供商API格式碎片化，应用与特定供应商紧耦合，切换或桥接需要O(N²)双边适配器，阻碍可移植性和多提供商架构。
analysis.problem: 解决不同LLM提供商API之间高效、无损、双向的翻译问题，避免N²适配器复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到主要LLM API尽管语法差异大，但共享共同语义核心，挑战在于语法变体的组合表面而非深层语义不兼容。
analysis.method: 提出LLM-Rosetta，基于Hub-and-Spoke中间表示（IR）的翻译框架，IR捕获共享语义核心（消息、内容部分、工具调用、推理轨迹、生成控制），采用9类型内容模型和10类型流事件模式，模块化Ops组合转换器架构。
contributions: 提出基于Hub-and-Spoke IR的跨提供商LLM API翻译框架，支持双向转换和流式处理。
实现四种API标准（OpenAI Chat Completions、OpenAI Responses、Anthropic Messages、Google GenAI）的转换器，覆盖大多数商业提供商。
实验证明无损往返保真度、正确流式行为、亚100微秒转换开销，通过Open Responses合规套件并部署于生产环境。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及经验评估显示无损往返保真度、正确流式行为、亚100微秒转换开销，并通过Open Responses合规套件。
limitations: 当前仅支持四种API标准，更多提供商需额外实现转换器。
可能未覆盖所有API特性或非标准扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Hub-and-Spoke中间表示的跨提供商LLM API翻译框架，实现双向无损转换和低延迟。

papers.title: LuMon: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Development Suite with Novel Datasets for Lunar Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) is crucial for autonomous lunar rover navigation using electro-optical cameras. However, deploying terrestrial MDE networks to the Moon brings a severe domain gap due to harsh shadows, textureless regolith, and zero atmospheric scattering. Existing evaluations rely on analogs that fail to replicate these conditions and lack actual metric ground truth. To address this, we present LuMon, a comprehensive benchmarking framework to evaluate MDE methods for lunar exploration. We introduce novel datasets featuring high-quality stereo ground truth depth from the real Chang'e-3 mission and the CHERI dark analog dataset. Utilizing this framework, we conduct a systematic zero-shot evaluation of state-of-the-art architectures across synthetic, analog, and real datasets. We rigorously assess performance against mission critical challenges like craters, rocks, extreme shading, and varying depth ranges. Furthermore, we establish a sim-to-real domain adaptation baseline by fine tuning a foundation model on synthetic data. While this adaptation yields drastic in-domain performance gains, it exhibits minimal generalization to authentic lunar imagery, highlighting a persistent cross-domain transfer gap. Our extensive analysis reveals the inherent limitations of current networks and sets a standard foundation to guide future advancements in extraterrestrial perception and domain adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出月球单目深度估计基准LuMon，包含真实嫦娥三号数据集和暗模拟数据集，系统评估现有方法并揭示跨域迁移差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 月球环境（强阴影、无纹理月壤、无大气散射）导致地球MDE网络存在严重域差异，现有评估依赖模拟数据且缺乏真实度量深度真值，亟需真实场景基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏包含真实度量深度真值的月球单目深度估计基准，现有方法在真实月球图像上泛化能力未知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在合成数据上微调的基础模型在域内性能提升显著，但对真实月球图像泛化极差，表明存在持续的跨域迁移差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含真实嫦娥三号立体深度数据和CHERI暗模拟数据集的基准框架，对多种SOTA架构进行零样本评估，并建立基于合成数据微调基础模型的sim-to-real域适应基线。
contributions: 首次引入真实嫦娥三号任务的高质量立体深度真值数据集和CHERI暗模拟数据集
系统评估现有MDE方法在月球关键挑战（陨石坑、岩石、极端阴影等）下的性能
揭示合成数据微调在真实月球图像上泛化不足的跨域迁移差距
analysis.experiments: 在合成、模拟和真实数据集上对多种SOTA架构进行零样本评估，并测试了sim-to-real域适应基线。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 真实数据集规模可能有限
域适应方法仅测试了微调基础模型一种基线
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出月球单目深度估计基准LuMon，包含真实嫦娥三号数据集和暗模拟数据集，系统评估现有方法并揭示跨域迁移差距。

papers.title: Visually-Guided Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning ability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, the inherent text-dominated nature of VLMs often leads to insufficient visual faithfulness, characterized by sparse attention activation to visual tokens. More importantly, our empirical analysis reveals that temporal visual forgetting along reasoning steps exacerbates this deficiency. To bridge this gap, we propose Visually-Guided Policy Optimization (VGPO), a novel framework to reinforce visual focus during policy optimization. Specifically, VGPO initially introduces a Visual Attention Compensation mechanism that leverages visual similarity to localize and amplify visual cues, while progressively elevating visual expectations in later steps to counteract visual forgetting. Building on this mechanism, we implement a dual-grained advantage re-weighting strategy: the intra-trajectory level highlights tokens exhibiting relatively high visual activation, while the inter-trajectory level prioritizes trajectories demonstrating superior visual accumulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGPO achieves better visual activation and superior performance in mathematical multimodal reasoning and visual-dependent tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉引导策略优化（VGPO），通过视觉注意力补偿和双粒度优势重加权增强VLM的视觉忠实度与推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在推理时视觉忠实度不足，表现为视觉token的稀疏注意力激活，且随推理步骤出现时间性视觉遗忘，限制了多模态推理性能。
analysis.problem: VLM在强化学习优化中视觉注意力不足及推理过程中视觉信息逐渐遗忘的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过实证分析发现VLM存在视觉token注意力稀疏激活，且推理步骤中视觉遗忘随时间加剧。
analysis.method: 提出VGPO框架，包含视觉注意力补偿机制（利用视觉相似性定位并放大视觉线索，逐步提升后期视觉期望）和双粒度优势重加权策略（轨迹内突出高视觉激活token，轨迹间优先高视觉累积轨迹）。
contributions: 揭示了VLM在推理中的视觉遗忘现象并进行了实证分析
提出VGPO框架，通过视觉注意力补偿和双粒度优势重加权提升视觉忠实度
analysis.experiments: 在数学多模态推理和视觉依赖任务上进行了广泛实验，VGPO取得了更好的视觉激活和优越性能。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉相似性计算的准确性
双粒度重加权策略的泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉引导策略优化（VGPO），通过视觉注意力补偿和双粒度优势重加权增强VLM的视觉忠实度与推理能力。

papers.title: Mind the Gap Between Spatial Reasoning and Acting! Step-by-Step Evaluation of Agents With Spatial-Gym
papers.abstract: Spatial reasoning is central to navigation and robotics, yet measuring model capabilities on these tasks remains difficult. Existing benchmarks evaluate models in a one-shot setting, requiring full solution generation in a single response, unlike humans, who work in interactive environments step-by-step. We introduce Spatial-Gym, a Gymnasium environment that isolates spatial constraint reasoning by testing pathfinding in 2D-grid puzzles as a sequential decision task with optional backtracking. We evaluate eight models in three settings (one-shot, step-by-step, step-by-step with backtracking) against human, random, and A* baselines on 500 episodes. The best model, GPT-OSS 120B, achieves a solve rate of 16.0%, 82 points below the human baseline (98.0%). Step-by-step format helps weaker models (up to +5.4%) by removing formatting errors, but hurts stronger models (up to 5.6%) by constraining global planning. Backtracking improves episode completion, but increases solve rate only for weaker models; stronger models rarely backtrack and do not benefit from it. Our experiments have three key findings: (1) models fail to scale reasoning effort with difficulty, (2) vision models receiving images of the spatial environment reduce solve rate by 73%, and (3) extended chain-of-thought reasoning retains a 3-5x accuracy advantage over standard inference even in the step-by-step setting. Spatial-Gym enables diagnosis of model limitations and provides a framework for improving spatial reasoning through reinforcement learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Spatial-Gym 环境，通过逐步决策任务评估模型空间推理能力，发现模型在交互式规划中远逊于人类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有空间推理基准采用一次性设置，要求模型单次生成完整解决方案，无法反映人类在交互环境中逐步推理的能力，导致模型真实空间推理能力评估不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能隔离空间约束推理、支持逐步决策和回溯的评估环境，以准确诊断模型在交互式空间推理中的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 逐步格式帮助弱模型减少格式错误，但限制强模型的全局规划；回溯仅提升弱模型解决率；视觉输入大幅降低解决率；扩展思维链推理在逐步设置中仍保持优势。
analysis.method: 构建 Spatial-Gym 环境，将 2D 网格寻路作为顺序决策任务，支持回溯，并在一次性、逐步、逐步+回溯三种设置下评估模型。
contributions: 提出 Spatial-Gym，一个用于隔离空间约束推理的 Gymnasium 环境，支持逐步决策和回溯。
系统评估 8 个模型在三种设置下的表现，揭示模型在交互式空间推理中的关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在 500 个 episode 上评估 8 个模型，与人类、随机和 A* 基线对比，报告解决率等指标。
limitations: 仅测试 2D 网格寻路，未涉及更复杂的 3D 或动态环境。
模型数量有限，可能未覆盖所有前沿模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Spatial-Gym 环境，通过逐步决策任务评估模型空间推理能力，发现模型在交互式规划中远逊于人类。

papers.title: VAG: Dual-Stream Video-Action Generation for Embodied Data Synthesis
papers.abstract: Recent advances in robot foundation models trained on large-scale human teleoperation data have enabled robots to perform increasingly complex real-world tasks. However, scaling these systems remains difficult because collecting task-specific demonstrations is expensive and labor-intensive. Synthetic data, especially generated videos, offer a promising direction, but existing World Models (WMs) are not directly suitable for policy learning since they do not provide paired action trajectories. World-Action (WA) models partially address this by predicting actions with visual outputs, yet often lack strong video-action alignment, while two-stage pipelines that generate video first and then infer actions introduce inefficiency and error accumulation. To address these limitations, we propose VAG, a unified flow-matching-based dual-stream framework that jointly generates video and action under visual and language conditioning. By synchronizing denoising in both branches and using an adaptive 3D pooling mechanism to transfer compact global video context to the action branch, VAG improves cross-modal consistency during generation. Across both simulated and real-world settings, VAG produces aligned video-action pairs with competitive prediction quality, supports executable trajectory replay, and provides useful synthetic pretraining data that improves downstream policy generalization, indicating its potential as a practical world-action model for embodied data synthesis.

analysis.tldr: VAG提出双流流匹配框架联合生成视频和动作，解决机器人数据合成中视频-动作对齐问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人基础模型依赖大规模遥操作数据，但收集任务特定演示昂贵且劳动密集；合成视频虽有望但现有世界模型不提供配对动作轨迹，世界-动作模型视频-动作对齐弱，两阶段流水线效率低且误差累积。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成高质量、对齐的视频-动作对，用于机器人策略学习的合成数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有世界模型不输出动作，世界-动作模型对齐不足，两阶段方法存在误差累积。
analysis.method: 基于流匹配的双流框架，联合去噪视频和动作分支，通过自适应3D池化将紧凑全局视频上下文传递到动作分支，实现跨模态一致性。
contributions: 提出VAG，统一流匹配双流框架联合生成视频和动作，增强视频-动作对齐。
在模拟和真实环境中验证生成的对齐视频-动作对可用于轨迹回放和下游策略泛化提升。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实环境中评估，生成视频-动作对具有竞争性预测质量，支持可执行轨迹回放，并提供有用合成预训练数据改善下游策略泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务条件，泛化到全新任务需进一步验证。
生成质量受限于训练数据多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VAG提出双流流匹配框架联合生成视频和动作，解决机器人数据合成中视频-动作对齐问题。

papers.title: From Frames to Events: Rethinking Evaluation in Human-Centric Video Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Pose-based Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) has gained significant attention for its privacy-preserving nature and robustness to environmental variations. However, traditional frame-level evaluations treat video as a collection of isolated frames, fundamentally misaligned with how anomalies manifest and are acted upon in the real world. In operational surveillance systems, what matters is not the flagging of individual frames, but the reliable detection, localization, and reporting of a coherent anomalous event, a contiguous temporal episode with an identifiable onset and duration. Frame-level metrics are blind to this distinction, and as a result, they systematically overestimate model performance for any deployment that requires actionable, event-level alerts. In this work, we propose a shift toward an event-centric perspective in VAD. We first audit widely used VAD benchmarks, including SHT[19], CHAD[6], NWPUC[4], and HuVAD[25], to characterize their event structure. We then introduce two strategies for temporal event localization: a score-refinement pipeline with hierarchical Gaussian smoothing and adaptive binarization, and an end-to-end Dual-Branch Model that directly generates event-level detections. Finally, we establish the first event-based evaluation standard for VAD by adapting Temporal Action Localization metrics, including tIoU-based event matching and multi-threshold F1 evaluation. Our results quantify a substantial performance gap: while all SoTA models achieve frame-level AUC-ROC exceeding 52% on the NWPUC[4], their event-level localization precision falls below 10% even at a minimal tIoU=0.2, with an average event-level F1 of only 0.11 across all thresholds. The code base for this work is available at https://github.com/TeCSAR-UNCC/EventCentric-VAD.

analysis.tldr: 提出从帧级到事件级的评估范式转变，揭示现有视频异常检测方法在事件级定位上的严重性能高估。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统帧级评估与真实世界中异常作为连续事件存在的本质不匹配，导致模型性能被系统性高估，无法满足实际监控系统对事件级警报的需求。
analysis.problem: 现有视频异常检测评估方法以帧为单位，忽略了异常事件的连续性和可操作边界，缺乏事件级定位和评估标准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在NWPUC数据集上，所有SOTA模型的帧级AUC-ROC超过52%，但事件级定位精度在最小tIoU=0.2下低于10%，平均事件级F1仅为0.11，揭示了帧级评估的严重误导性。
analysis.method: 提出事件中心视角：1) 审计现有基准数据集的事件结构；2) 提出两种时间事件定位策略（分层高斯平滑+自适应二值化的分数细化流程，以及端到端双分支模型）；3) 基于时间动作定位指标（tIoU事件匹配和多阈值F1评估）建立首个事件级评估标准。
contributions: 揭示了帧级评估在视频异常检测中的根本性缺陷，并量化了性能高估程度。
提出了事件级评估标准，包括事件结构审计、两种事件定位策略和基于tIoU的评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在SHT、CHAD、NWPUC和HuVAD四个基准上进行了实验，对比了帧级与事件级性能，结果显示了巨大差距。
limitations: 事件定义可能依赖数据集标注，不同场景下事件边界可能模糊。
提出的定位策略在复杂长尾事件上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从帧级到事件级的评估范式转变，揭示现有视频异常检测方法在事件级定位上的严重性能高估。

papers.title: Multimodal Anomaly Detection for Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: Ensuring safety and reliability in human-robot interaction (HRI) requires the timely detection of unexpected events that could lead to system failures or unsafe behaviours. Anomaly detection thus plays a critical role in enabling robots to recognize and respond to deviations from normal operation during collaborative tasks. While reconstruction models have been actively explored in HRI, approaches that operate directly on feature vectors remain largely unexplored. In this work, we propose MADRI, a framework that first transforms video streams into semantically meaningful feature vectors before performing reconstruction-based anomaly detection. Additionally, we augment these visual feature vectors with the robot's internal sensors' readings and a Scene Graph, enabling the model to capture both external anomalies in the visual environment and internal failures within the robot itself. To evaluate our approach, we collected a custom dataset consisting of a simple pick-and-place robotic task under normal and anomalous conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that reconstruction on vision-based feature vectors alone is effective for detecting anomalies, while incorporating other modalities further improves detection performance, highlighting the benefits of multimodal feature reconstruction for robust anomaly detection in human-robot collaboration.

analysis.tldr: 提出MADRI框架，通过多模态特征重建实现人机交互中的异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机交互中需要及时检测异常事件以确保安全，现有重建模型多直接操作原始数据，而基于特征向量的方法尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态特征向量进行重建以实现人机交互中的异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MADRI框架：将视频流转换为语义特征向量，结合机器人内部传感器读数和场景图，进行多模态特征重建异常检测。
contributions: 提出基于特征向量的重建异常检测方法，避免直接处理高维原始数据。
融合视觉、内部传感器和场景图多模态信息，提升异常检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在自建的简单拾放机器人任务数据集上评估，结果表明视觉特征重建有效，多模态融合进一步提升性能。
limitations: 仅在简单任务上验证，复杂场景效果未知。
数据集规模较小，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MADRI框架，通过多模态特征重建实现人机交互中的异常检测。

papers.title: Structure-Aware Fine-Grained Gaussian Splatting for Expressive Avatar Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing photorealistic and topology-aware human avatars from monocular videos remains a significant challenge in the fields of computer vision and graphics. While existing 3D human avatar modeling approaches can effectively capture body motion, they often fail to accurately model fine details such as hand movements and facial expressions. To address this, we propose Structure-aware Fine-grained Gaussian Splatting (SFGS), a novel method for reconstructing expressive and coherent full-body 3D human avatars from a monocular video sequence. The SFGS use both spatial-only triplane and time-aware hexplane to capture dynamic features across consecutive frames. A structure-aware gaussian module is designed to capture pose-dependent details in a spatially coherent manner and improve pose and texture expression. To better model hand deformations, we also propose a residual refinement module based on fine-grained hand reconstruction. Our method requires only a single-stage training and outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, generating high-fidelity avatars with natural motion and fine details. The code is on Github: https://github.com/Su245811YZ/SFGS

analysis.tldr: 提出结构感知细粒度高斯泼溅方法，从单目视频重建高保真、拓扑感知的全身3D虚拟人，尤其擅长手部和面部细节。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法能捕捉身体运动，但对手部运动和面部表情等细节建模不足，难以生成拓扑感知的高保真虚拟人。
analysis.problem: 从单目视频序列重建具有精细细节（如手部、面部）且拓扑一致的全身3D虚拟人。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合空间三平面和时间感知六平面捕捉动态特征，设计结构感知高斯模块以空间一致方式建模姿态依赖细节，并引入基于细粒度手部重建的残差精化模块。
contributions: 提出SFGS方法，仅需单阶段训练即可从单目视频重建高保真、拓扑感知的全身虚拟人。
设计结构感知高斯模块和残差精化模块，显著提升手部和面部等细节的建模质量。
analysis.experiments: 在定量和定性评估中均优于现有基线，生成具有自然运动和精细细节的高保真虚拟人。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标数值。
limitations: 可能对极端姿态或遮挡鲁棒性有限。
单目视频输入可能限制重建的几何精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构感知细粒度高斯泼溅方法，从单目视频重建高保真、拓扑感知的全身3D虚拟人，尤其擅长手部和面部细节。

papers.title: UHD Low-Light Image Enhancement via Real-Time Enhancement Methods with Clifford Information Fusion
papers.abstract: Considering efficiency, ultra-high-definition (UHD) low-light image restoration is extremely challenging. Existing methods based on Transformer architectures or high-dimensional complex convolutional neural networks often suffer from the "memory wall" bottleneck, failing to achieve millisecond-level inference on edge devices. To address this issue, we propose a novel real-time UHD low-light enhancement network based on geometric feature fusion using Clifford algebra in 2D Euclidean space. First, we construct a four-layer feature pyramid with gradually increasing resolution, which decomposes input images into low-frequency and high-frequency structural components via a Gaussian blur kernel, and adopts a lightweight U-Net based on depthwise separable convolution for dual-branch feature extraction. Second, to resolve structural information loss and artifacts from traditional high-low frequency feature fusion, we introduce spatially aware Clifford algebra, which maps feature tensors to a multivector space (scalars, vectors, bivectors) and uses Clifford similarity to aggregate features while suppressing noise and preserving textures. In the reconstruction stage, the network outputs adaptive Gamma and Gain maps, which perform physically constrained non-linear brightness adjustment via Retinex theory. Integrated with FP16 mixed-precision computation and dynamic operator fusion, our method achieves millisecond-level inference for 4K/8K images on a single consumer-grade device, while outperforming state-of-the-art (SOTA) models on several restoration metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Clifford代数的实时UHD低光图像增强网络，实现4K/8K图像毫秒级推理并超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: UHD低光图像增强在边缘设备上受限于内存瓶颈，现有Transformer或高维CNN方法无法达到毫秒级推理，亟需高效实时方案。
analysis.problem: 解决UHD低光图像增强中效率与质量难以兼顾的问题，实现边缘设备上的实时推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建四层特征金字塔，通过高斯模糊分解低频/高频分量，采用轻量U-Net双分支提取；引入空间感知Clifford代数将特征映射到多向量空间，利用Clifford相似性融合特征并抑制噪声；重建阶段输出自适应Gamma和Gain图，结合Retinex理论进行非线性亮度调整，并集成FP16混合精度与动态算子融合。
contributions: 提出基于Clifford代数几何特征融合的实时UHD低光增强网络。
设计空间感知Clifford代数模块，解决高低频融合中的结构信息损失和伪影。
实现4K/8K图像在消费级设备上的毫秒级推理，并在多个恢复指标上超越SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个恢复指标上超越SOTA。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景的泛化能力有限。
Clifford代数模块的计算开销在更复杂任务中可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Clifford代数的实时UHD低光图像增强网络，实现4K/8K图像毫秒级推理并超越SOTA。

papers.title: Compositional-Degradation UAV Image Restoration: Conditional Decoupled MoE Network and A Benchmark
papers.abstract: UAV images are critical for applications such as large-area mapping, infrastructure inspection, and emergency response. However, in real-world flight environments, a single image is often affected by multiple degradation factors, including rain, haze, and noise, undermining downstream task performance. Current unified restoration approaches typically rely on implicit degradation representations that entangle multiple factors into a single condition, causing mutual interference among heterogeneous corrections. To this end, we propose DAME-Net, a Degradation-Aware Mixture-of-Experts Network that decouples explicit degradation perception from degradation-conditioned reconstruction for compositional UAV image restoration. Specifically, we design a Factor-wise Degradation Perception module(FDPM) to provide explicit per-factor degradation cues for the restoration stage through multi-label prediction with label-similarity-guided soft alignment, replacing implicit entangled conditions with interpretable and generalizable degradation descriptions. Moreover, we develop a Conditioned Decoupled MoE module(CDMM) that leverages these cues for stage-wise conditioning, spatial-frequency hybrid processing, and mask-constrained decoupled expert routing, enabling selective factor-specific correction while suppressing irrelevant interference. In addition, we construct the Multi-Degradation UAV Restoration benchmark (MDUR), the first large-scale UAV benchmark for compositional UAV image restoration, with 43 degradation configurations from single degradations to four-factor composites and standardized seen/unseen splits.Extensive experiments on MDUR demonstrate consistent improvements over representative unified restoration methods, with greater gains on unseen and higher-order composite degradations. Downstream experiments further validate benefits for UAV object detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦式MoE网络DAME-Net和首个多退化无人机图像恢复基准MDUR，实现显式退化感知与条件解耦重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机图像在真实飞行中常受雨、雾、噪声等多重退化因素叠加影响，现有统一恢复方法将多种退化隐式纠缠为单一条件，导致异质校正相互干扰，影响下游任务性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现组合退化无人机图像中多种退化因素的显式解耦与针对性恢复，避免隐式纠缠带来的相互干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前统一恢复方法依赖隐式退化表示，将多种退化因素纠缠为单一条件，导致异质校正间相互干扰，在组合退化场景下性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出DAME-Net，包含因子级退化感知模块（FDPM）通过多标签预测与标签相似度引导的软对齐提供显式逐因子退化线索，以及条件解耦MoE模块（CDMM）利用这些线索进行阶段式条件控制、空间-频率混合处理和掩码约束的解耦专家路由，实现选择性因子特定校正并抑制无关干扰。
contributions: 提出DAME-Net，实现显式退化感知与条件解耦重建，解决组合退化恢复中的相互干扰问题。
构建MDUR基准，首个大规模多退化无人机图像恢复基准，包含43种退化配置和标准化的可见/未见划分。
analysis.experiments: 在MDUR基准上，DAME-Net在可见和未见组合退化上均一致优于代表性统一恢复方法，尤其在未见和高阶组合退化上增益更大；下游无人机目标检测实验进一步验证了恢复效果。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂退化组合的泛化能力有限。
MoE架构可能带来额外的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦式MoE网络DAME-Net和首个多退化无人机图像恢复基准MDUR，实现显式退化感知与条件解耦重建。

papers.title: CCCE: A Continuous Code Calibration Engine for Autonomous Enterprise Codebase Maintenance via Knowledge Graph Traversal and Adaptive Decision Gating
papers.abstract: Enterprise software organizations face an escalating challenge in maintaining the integrity, security, and freshness of codebases that span hundreds of repositories, multiple programming languages, and thousands of interdependent packages. Existing approaches to codebase maintenance -- including static analysis, software composition analysis (SCA), and dependency management tools -- operate in isolation, address only narrow subsets of maintenance concerns, and require substantial manual intervention to propagate changes across interconnected systems. We present the Continuous Code Calibration Engine (CCCE), an event-driven, AI-agentic system that autonomously maintains enterprise codebases throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). The CCCE introduces three key technical innovations: (1) a dynamic knowledge graph with bidirectional traversal algorithms that simultaneously compute forward impact propagation and backward test adequacy analysis; (2) an adaptive multi-stage gating framework that classifies calibration actions into four risk tiers using learned risk-confidence scoring rather than static rules; and (3) a multi-model continuous learning architecture operating at multiple temporal scales to refine calibration strategies, risk models, and organizational policies from operational feedback. We formalize the system's graph model, traversal algorithms, and decision logic, and demonstrate through three representative enterprise scenarios that the CCCE reduces mean time to remediation by enabling coordinated, cross-repository calibrations with human-in-the-loop (HITL) oversight where appropriate. The system generates atomic, semantically verified patches with progressive validation and intelligent rollback capabilities, providing end-to-end traceability from triggering events through calibration execution and outcome learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出CCCE，一个基于知识图谱遍历和自适应决策门控的自主企业代码库维护引擎。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业软件组织面临维护跨数百个仓库、多语言和数千个依赖包的代码库的完整性、安全性和新鲜度的挑战，现有方法孤立运行、覆盖范围窄且需要大量人工干预。
analysis.problem: 如何实现企业代码库的自主、持续维护，减少人工干预并协调跨仓库的变更传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CCCE系统包含三个创新：动态知识图谱与双向遍历算法（前向影响传播和后向测试充分性分析）、自适应多阶段门控框架（基于学习风险置信分数将校准动作分为四个风险等级）、多模型连续学习架构（多时间尺度优化策略、风险模型和组织策略）。
contributions: 提出CCCE系统，实现事件驱动的自主企业代码库维护。
引入动态知识图谱双向遍历算法和自适应多阶段门控框架。
通过三个企业场景展示CCCE减少平均修复时间并支持跨仓库协调校准。
analysis.experiments: 通过三个代表性企业场景展示CCCE减少平均修复时间，但摘要未提供具体数值或对比基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱初始构建。
多模型连续学习架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CCCE，一个基于知识图谱遍历和自适应决策门控的自主企业代码库维护引擎。

papers.title: Constraint-Aware Corrective Memory for Language-Based Drug Discovery Agents
papers.abstract: Large language models are making autonomous drug discovery agents increasingly feasible, but reliable success in this setting is not determined by any single action or molecule. It is determined by whether the final returned set jointly satisfies protocol-level requirements such as set size, diversity, binding quality, and developability. This creates a fundamental control problem: the agent plans step by step, while task validity is decided at the level of the whole candidate set. Existing language-based drug discovery systems therefore tend to rely on long raw history and under-specified self-reflection, making failure localization imprecise and planner-facing agent states increasingly noisy. We present CACM (Constraint-Aware Corrective Memory), a language-based drug discovery framework built around precise set-level diagnosis and a concise memory write-back mechanism. CACM introduces protocol auditing and a grounded diagnostician, which jointly analyze multimodal evidence spanning task requirements, pocket context, and candidate-set evidence to localize protocol violations, generate actionable remediation hints, and bias the next action toward the most relevant correction. To keep planning context compact, CACM organizes memory into static, dynamic, and corrective channels and compresses them before write-back, thereby preserving persistent task information while exposing only the most decision-relevant failures. Our experimental results show that CACM improves the target-level success rate by 36.4% over the state-of-the-art baseline. The results show that reliable language-based drug discovery benefits not only from more powerful molecular tools, but also from more precise diagnosis and more economical agent states.

analysis.tldr: 提出约束感知纠正记忆框架，通过集合级诊断和紧凑记忆写回提升语言药物发现代理的协议级成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言药物发现代理依赖长原始历史和模糊的自我反思，导致失败定位不精确、规划状态噪声大，难以满足协议级约束（如集合大小、多样性、结合质量等）。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言药物发现代理在逐步规划中精准诊断集合级协议违规，并生成可操作的纠正提示以提升最终候选集的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有系统失败定位不精确，规划状态因长历史而噪声累积，导致协议级约束难以满足。
analysis.method: CACM框架包含协议审计和接地诊断器，分析多模态证据（任务需求、口袋上下文、候选集证据）定位违规，生成纠正提示；记忆组织为静态、动态和纠正通道，写回前压缩以保持规划上下文紧凑。
contributions: 提出约束感知纠正记忆框架，实现集合级诊断和紧凑记忆写回。
在药物发现任务上，目标级成功率比最先进基线提升36.4%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验结果显示目标级成功率提升36.4%，但未提供具体数据集、基线细节或消融实验。
limitations: 可能仅在特定药物发现场景验证，泛化性未知。
记忆压缩可能丢失部分上下文信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出约束感知纠正记忆框架，通过集合级诊断和紧凑记忆写回提升语言药物发现代理的协议级成功率。

papers.title: SatQNet: Satellite-assisted Quantum Network Entanglement Routing Using Directed Line Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Quantum networks are expected to become a key enabler for interconnecting quantum devices. In contrast to classical communication networks, however, information transfer in quantum networks is usually restricted to short distances due to physical constraints of entanglement distribution. Satellites can extend entanglement distribution over long distances, but routing in such networks is challenging because satellite motion and stochastic link generation create a highly dynamic quantum topology. Existing routing methods often rely on global topology information that quickly becomes outdated due to delays in the classical control plane, while decentralized methods typically act on incomplete local information. We propose SatQNet, a reinforcement learning approach for entanglement routing in satellite-assisted quantum networks that can be decentralized at runtime. Its key innovation is an edge-centric directed line graph neural network that performs local message passing on directed edge embeddings, enabling it to better capture link properties in high-degree and time-varying topologies. By exchanging messages with neighboring repeaters, SatQNet learns a local graph representation at runtime that supports agents in establishing high-fidelity end-to-end entanglements. Trained on random graphs, SatQNet outperforms heuristic and learning-based approaches across diverse settings, including a real-world European backbone topology, and generalizes to unseen topologies without retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出SatQNet，一种基于有向线图神经网络的强化学习方法，用于卫星辅助量子网络中的纠缠路由，在动态拓扑下优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子网络信息传输受限于短距离，卫星可扩展纠缠分发距离，但卫星运动和随机链路生成导致高度动态的量子拓扑，现有路由方法依赖全局信息易过时或基于局部信息不完整。
analysis.problem: 在卫星辅助量子网络中，如何实现高效、可泛化的纠缠路由，以应对高度动态的拓扑变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SatQNet，一种可运行时去中心化的强化学习方法，核心创新是使用有向线图神经网络（edge-centric directed line graph neural network）在动态拓扑中进行局部消息传递，学习局部图表示以支持智能体建立高保真端到端纠缠。
contributions: 提出SatQNet，一种针对卫星辅助量子网络纠缠路由的去中心化强化学习方法。
设计有向线图神经网络，通过局部消息传递捕获高动态拓扑中的链路属性。
在随机图、真实欧洲骨干拓扑等多样设置下，SatQNet优于启发式和基于学习的方法，且无需重新训练即可泛化到未见拓扑。
analysis.experiments: 在随机图、真实欧洲骨干拓扑等设置下评估，SatQNet优于启发式和基于学习的方法，并泛化到未见拓扑。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真环境，实际部署时卫星通信延迟和噪声影响未明确。
仅考虑纠缠路由，未涉及量子存储等硬件约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SatQNet，一种基于有向线图神经网络的强化学习方法，用于卫星辅助量子网络中的纠缠路由，在动态拓扑下优于现有方法。

papers.title: VAGNet: Vision-based Accident Anticipation with Global Features
papers.abstract: Traffic accidents are a leading cause of fatalities and injuries across the globe. Therefore, the ability to anticipate hazardous situations in advance is essential. Automated accident anticipation enables timely intervention through driver alerts and collision avoidance maneuvers, forming a key component of advanced driver assistance systems. In autonomous driving, such predictive capabilities support proactive safety behaviors, such as initiating defensive driving and human takeover when required. Using dashcam video as input offers a cost-effective solution, but it is challenging due to the complexity of real-world driving scenes. Accident anticipation systems need to operate in real-time. However, current methods involve extracting features from each detected object, which is computationally intensive. We propose VAGNet, a deep neural network that learns to predict accidents from dash-cam video using global features of traffic scenes without requiring explicit object-level features. The network consists of transformer and graph modules, and we use the vision foundation model VideoMAE-V2 for global feature extraction. Experiments on four benchmark datasets (DAD, DoTA, DADA, and Nexar) show that our method anticipates accidents with higher average precision and mean time-to-accident while being computationally more efficient compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出VAGNet，利用全局特征和Transformer+图模块实现高效交通事故预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 交通事故是致死致伤主因，现有方法依赖逐目标特征提取计算量大，难以满足实时性需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用显式目标级特征的情况下，从行车记录仪视频中高效、准确地预测交通事故。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VAGNet，使用VideoMAE-V2提取全局特征，结合Transformer和图模块进行事故预测。
contributions: 提出基于全局特征的事故预测方法，避免逐目标特征提取，降低计算开销。
在四个基准数据集上取得更高平均精度和平均事故提前时间，同时计算效率更优。
analysis.experiments: 在DAD、DoTA、DADA和Nexar四个数据集上评估，平均精度和平均事故提前时间优于现有方法，计算效率更高。
limitations: 可能对极端罕见场景泛化能力有限。
全局特征可能丢失小目标细节信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VAGNet，利用全局特征和Transformer+图模块实现高效交通事故预测。

papers.title: GeRM: A Generative Rendering Model From Physically Realistic to Photorealistic
papers.abstract: For decades, Physically-Based Rendering (PBR) is the fundation of synthesizing photorealisitic images, and therefore sometimes roughly referred as Photorealistic Rendering (PRR). While PBR is indeed a mathematical simulation of light transport that guarantees physical reality, photorealism has additional reliance on the realistic digital model of geometry and appearance of the real world, leaving a barely explored gap from PBR to PRR (P2P).
