Consequently, the path toward photorealism faces a critical dilemma: the explicit simulation of PRR encumbered by unreachable realistic digital models for real-world existence, while implicit generation models sacrifice controllability and geometric consistency. Based on this insight, this paper presents the problem, data, and approach of mitigating P2P gap, followed by the first multi-modal generative rendering model, dubbed GeRM, to unify PBR and PRR. GeRM integrates physical attributes like G-buffers with text prompts, and progressive incremental injection to generate controllable photorealistic images, allowing users to fluidly navigate the continuum between strict physical fidelity and perceptual photorealism. Technically, we model the transition between PBR and PRR images as a distribution transfer and aim to learn a distribution transfer vector field (DTV Field) to guide this process. To define the learning objective, we first leverage a multi-agent VLM framework to construct an expert-guided pairwise P2P transfer dataset, named P2P-50K, where each paired sample in the dataset corresponds to a transfer vector in the DTV Field. Subsequently, we propose a multi-condition ControlNet to learn the DTV Field, which synthesizes PBR images and progressively transitions them into PRR images, guided by G-buffers, text prompts, and cues for enhanced regions.

analysis.tldr: GeRM 提出一种多模态生成渲染模型，通过分布转移向量场弥合物理真实渲染与照片真实渲染之间的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理真实渲染（PBR）虽能模拟光传输，但依赖难以获取的真实世界数字模型；而隐式生成模型则牺牲了可控性和几何一致性。
analysis.problem: 弥合从物理真实渲染（PBR）到照片真实渲染（PRR）之间的差距（P2P gap），实现可控且几何一致的照片真实感图像生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 PBR 与 PRR 之间存在未被充分探索的鸿沟：PBR 保证物理真实性但受限于数字模型，PRR 依赖隐式生成却缺乏可控性。
analysis.method: 将 PBR 到 PRR 的图像转换建模为分布转移，学习分布转移向量场（DTV Field）；利用多智能体 VLM 框架构建成对 P2P 数据集 P2P-50K；提出多条件 ControlNet 学习 DTV Field，通过 G-buffer、文本提示和增强区域线索逐步将 PBR 图像过渡为 PRR 图像。
contributions: 首次提出多模态生成渲染模型 GeRM，统一 PBR 和 PRR。
构建专家引导的成对 P2P 数据集 P2P-50K。
提出分布转移向量场（DTV Field）和多条件 ControlNet 实现可控过渡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集 P2P-50K 的规模和多样性可能有限。
多条件 ControlNet 的训练和推理复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeRM 提出一种多模态生成渲染模型，通过分布转移向量场弥合物理真实渲染与照片真实渲染之间的差距。

papers.title: SkillMOO: Multi-Objective Optimization of Agent Skills for Software Engineering
papers.abstract: Agent skills provide modular, task-specific guidance for LLM- based coding agents, but manually tuning skill bundles to balance success rate, cost, and runtime is expensive and fragile. We present SkillMOO, a multi-objective optimization framework that automatically evolves skill bundles using LLM-proposed edits and NSGA-II survivor selection: a solver agent evaluates candidate skill bundles on coding tasks and an optimizer agent proposes bundle edits based on failure analysis. On three SkillsBench software engineering tasks, SkillMOO improves pass rate by up to 131% while reducing cost up to 32% relative to the best baseline per task at low optimization overhead. Pattern analysis reveals pruning and substitution as primary drivers of improvement, suggesting effective bundles favor minimal, focused content over accumulated instructions.

analysis.tldr: SkillMOO通过多目标优化自动进化LLM编码Agent的技能包，在提升通过率的同时降低成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动调整LLM编码Agent的技能包以平衡成功率、成本和运行时间既昂贵又脆弱，需要自动化优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动优化Agent技能包，使其在多个目标（成功率、成本、运行时间）上达到帕累托最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模式分析表明，剪枝和替换是改进的主要驱动力，有效的技能包倾向于最小化、聚焦的内容而非累积的指令。
analysis.method: 提出SkillMOO框架，使用LLM提出编辑和NSGA-II幸存者选择的多目标优化，包含求解器Agent评估候选技能包和优化器Agent基于失败分析提出包编辑。
contributions: 提出SkillMOO，一个自动进化Agent技能包的多目标优化框架。
在SkillsBench任务上，SkillMOO将通过率提升高达131%，同时成本降低32%。
揭示了剪枝和替换是技能包优化的关键策略。
analysis.experiments: 在SkillsBench的三个软件工程任务上评估，与每个任务的最佳基线相比，SkillMOO将通过率提升高达131%，成本降低32%，且优化开销低。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的编辑质量，LLM的失败分析可能不准确。
框架在更复杂或多样化的任务上的泛化能力未在摘要中明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillMOO通过多目标优化自动进化LLM编码Agent的技能包，在提升通过率的同时降低成本。

papers.title: Building Trust in the Skies: A Knowledge-Grounded LLM-based Framework for Aviation Safety
papers.abstract: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into aviation safety decision-making represents a significant technological advancement, yet their standalone application poses critical risks due to inherent limitations such as factual inaccuracies, hallucination, and lack of verifiability. These challenges undermine the reliability required for safety-critical environments where errors can have catastrophic consequences. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a novel, end-to-end framework that synergistically combines LLMs and Knowledge Graphs (KGs) to enhance the trustworthiness of safety analytics. The framework introduces a dual-phase pipeline: it first employs LLMs to automate the construction and dynamic updating of an Aviation Safety Knowledge Graph (ASKG) from multimodal sources. It then leverages this curated KG within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture to ground, validate, and explain LLM-generated responses. The implemented system demonstrates improved accuracy and traceability over LLM-only approaches, effectively supporting complex querying and mitigating hallucination. Results confirm the framework's capability to deliver context-aware, verifiable safety insights, addressing the stringent reliability requirements of the aviation industry. Future work will focus on enhancing relationship extraction and integrating hybrid retrieval mechanisms.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合LLM与知识图谱的双阶段框架，提升航空安全分析的准确性与可验证性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在航空安全等关键领域存在事实错误、幻觉和缺乏可验证性，单独使用风险极高。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可信赖的航空安全分析系统，克服LLM的幻觉和不可验证问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM单独应用时存在事实不准确、幻觉和缺乏可验证性，这些在安全关键环境中可能导致灾难性后果。
analysis.method: 双阶段流水线：1) 利用LLM从多模态数据自动构建和动态更新航空安全知识图谱(ASKG)；2) 在检索增强生成(RAG)架构中使用该知识图谱来约束、验证和解释LLM生成的响应。
contributions: 提出一种结合LLM与知识图谱的端到端框架，用于航空安全分析。
引入双阶段流水线，包括自动知识图谱构建和基于RAG的可信生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到系统在准确性和可追溯性上优于纯LLM方法，但未提供具体实验数据。
limitations: 关系抽取能力有待增强。
当前仅使用单一检索机制，未来需集成混合检索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合LLM与知识图谱的双阶段框架，提升航空安全分析的准确性与可验证性。

papers.title: SAGE: A Service Agent Graph-guided Evaluation Benchmark
papers.abstract: The development of Large Language Models (LLMs) has catalyzed automation in customer service, yet benchmarking their performance remains challenging. Existing benchmarks predominantly rely on static paradigms and single-dimensional metrics, failing to account for diverse user behaviors or the strict adherence to structured Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) required in real-world deployments. To bridge this gap, we propose SAGE (Service Agent Graph-guided Evaluation), a universal multi-agent benchmark for automated, dual-axis assessment. SAGE formalizes unstructured SOPs into Dynamic Dialogue Graphs, enabling precise verification of logical compliance and comprehensive path coverage. We introduce an Adversarial Intent Taxonomy and a modular Extension Mechanism, enabling low-cost deployment across domains and facilitating automated dialogue data synthesis. Evaluation is conducted via a framework where Judge Agents and a Rule Engine analyze interactions between User and Service Agents to generate deterministic ground truth. Extensive experiments on 27 LLMs across 6 industrial scenarios reveal a significant ``Execution Gap'' where models accurately classify intents but fail to derive correct subsequent actions. We also observe ``Empathy Resilience'', a phenomenon where models maintain polite conversational facades despite underlying logical failures under high adversarial intensity. Code and resources are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SAGE-Bench-4CD3/.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAGE基准，通过动态对话图评估LLM在客服场景中的逻辑合规性和路径覆盖，发现执行差距和共情韧性现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有客服基准依赖静态范式和单维指标，无法反映真实部署中多样用户行为和对结构化标准操作流程的严格遵循。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估LLM在客服场景中逻辑合规性和路径覆盖的自动化、多轴基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现执行差距（模型能正确分类意图但无法推导后续动作）和共情韧性（在高对抗强度下模型保持礼貌对话外表但逻辑失败）。
analysis.method: 将非结构化SOP形式化为动态对话图，引入对抗意图分类和模块化扩展机制，使用裁判智能体和规则引擎生成确定性真实值。
contributions: 提出SAGE，一个通用多智能体基准，支持双轴评估（逻辑合规性和路径覆盖）。
引入对抗意图分类和模块化扩展机制，实现低成本的跨领域部署和自动化对话数据合成。
在27个LLM和6个工业场景中揭示执行差距和共情韧性现象。
analysis.experiments: 在27个LLM和6个工业场景上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于客服场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态对话图的构建可能依赖领域专家，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAGE基准，通过动态对话图评估LLM在客服场景中的逻辑合规性和路径覆盖，发现执行差距和共情韧性现象。

papers.title: Characterizing Lidar Range-Measurement Ambiguity due to Multiple Returns
papers.abstract: Reliable position and attitude sensing is critical for highly automated vehicles that operate on conventional roadways. Lidar sensors are increasingly incorporated into pose-estimation systems. Despite its great utility, lidar is a complex sensor, and its performance in roadway environments is not yet well understood. For instance, it is often assumed in lidar-localization algorithms that a lidar will always identify a unique surface along a given raypath. However, this assumption is not always true, as ample prior evidence exists to suggest that lidar units may generate measurements probabilistically when more than one scattering surface appears within the lidar's conical beam. In this paper, we analyze lidar datasets to characterize cases with probabilistic returns along particular raypaths. Our contribution is to present representative cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) for raypaths observed by two different mechanically rotating lidar units with stationary bases. In subsequent discussion, we outline a qualitative methodology to assess the effect of probabilistic multi-return cases on lidar-based localization.

analysis.tldr: 本文通过分析激光雷达数据集，表征了多回波场景下距离测量的概率性模糊现象，并提出了评估其对定位影响的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 激光雷达在自动驾驶中广泛用于定位，但其在道路环境中的性能尚未被充分理解，尤其是当波束内存在多个散射表面时，测量结果可能具有概率性，这会影响定位可靠性。
analysis.problem: 激光雷达在多回波场景下距离测量的概率性模糊问题，以及这种模糊对基于激光雷达的定位算法的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，激光雷达在波束内存在多个散射表面时，测量结果可能不是唯一的，而是概率性的，这违背了传统定位算法中假设的唯一表面假设。
analysis.method: 通过分析两个不同机械旋转式激光雷达单元的数据集，为特定射线路径构建了代表性的累积分布函数（CDF），并提出了定性评估多回波概率情况对定位影响的方法。
contributions: 提供了激光雷达在多回波场景下距离测量概率性的实证分析。
提出了使用累积分布函数表征射线路径测量不确定性的方法。
概述了评估概率性多回波对激光雷达定位影响的定性方法论。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及分析了两个激光雷达单元的数据集并构建了CDF。
limitations: 仅针对两种特定型号的机械旋转式激光雷达，泛化性有限。
提出的评估方法为定性，缺乏定量验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文通过分析激光雷达数据集，表征了多回波场景下距离测量的概率性模糊现象，并提出了评估其对定位影响的方法。

papers.title: AMO-ENE: Attention-based Multi-Omics Fusion Model for Outcome Prediction in Extra Nodal Extension and HPV-associated Oropharyngeal Cancer
papers.abstract: Extranodal extension (ENE) is an emerging prognostic factor in human papillomavirus (HPV)-associated oropharyngeal cancer (OPC), although it is currently omitted as a clinical staging criteria. Recent works have advocated for the inclusion of iENE as a prognostic marker in HPV-positive OPC staging. However, several practical limitations continue to hinder its clinical integration, including inconsistencies in segmentation, low contrast in the periphery of metastatic lymph nodes on CT imaging, and laborious manual annotations. To address these limitations, we propose a fully automated end-to-end pipeline that uses computed tomography (CT) images with clinical data to assess the status of nodal ENE and predict treatment outcomes. Our approach includes a hierarchical 3D semi-supervised segmentation model designed to detect and delineate relevant iENE from radiotherapy planning CT scans. From these segmentations, a set of radiomics and deep features are extracted to train an imaging-detected ENE grading classifier. The predicted ENE status is then evaluated for its prognostic value and compared with existing staging criteria. Furthermore, we integrate these nodal features with primary tumor characteristics in a multimodal, attention-based outcome prediction model, providing a dynamic framework for outcome prediction. Our method is validated in an internal cohort of 397 HPV-positive OPC patients treated with radiation therapy or chemoradiotherapy between 2009 and 2020. For outcome prediction at the 2-year mark, our pipeline surpassed baseline models with 88.2% (4.8) in AUC for metastatic recurrence, 79.2% (7.4) for overall survival, and 78.1% (8.6) for disease-free survival. We also obtain a concordance index of 83.3% (6.5) for metastatic recurrence, 71.3% (8.9) for overall survival, and 70.0% (8.1) for disease-free survival, making it feasible for clinical decision making.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力机制的多模态融合模型，利用CT影像和临床数据自动评估HPV相关口咽癌的结外扩展状态并预测治疗结果。
analysis.research_motivation: ENE是HPV阳性OPC的重要预后因素，但临床整合受限于分割不一致、CT影像对比度低和手动标注繁琐。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化评估ENE状态并融合多模态特征进行预后预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 包含层次化3D半监督分割模型、影像组学与深度特征提取、ENE分级分类器，以及基于注意力机制的多模态预后预测模型。
contributions: 提出全自动端到端流水线，整合CT影像与临床数据评估ENE状态并预测治疗结果。
在397例HPV阳性OPC患者内部队列中验证，AUC和C-index均优于基线模型。
analysis.experiments: 内部队列397例患者，2年预后预测：转移复发AUC 88.2%，总生存79.2%，无病生存78.1%；C-index分别为83.3%、71.3%、70.0%。
limitations: 仅基于单一内部队列验证，缺乏外部验证。
方法依赖CT影像，可能受扫描参数影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于注意力机制的多模态融合模型，利用CT影像和临床数据自动评估HPV相关口咽癌的结外扩展状态并预测治疗结果。

papers.title: Measuring Creativity in the Age of Generative AI: Distinguishing Human and AI-Generated Creative Performance in Hiring and Talent Systems
papers.abstract: Generative AI is rapidly transforming how organizations create value and evaluate talent. While large language models enhance baseline output quality, they simultaneously introduce ambiguity in assessing human creativity, as observable artifacts may be partially or fully AI-generated. This paper reconceptualizes creativity as a distributional and process-based property that emerges under shared constraints and competitive incentives. We introduce a quantitative framework for measuring creativity as novelty in synthesis, operationalized through idea generation and idea transformation within embedding space. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that the proposed metrics align with intuitive judgments of creativity while capturing distinctions that surface-level quality assessments miss. We further identify a structural shift toward bimodal distributions of creative output in AI-mediated environments, with implications for hiring, leadership, and competitive strategy. The findings suggest that in the age of generative AI, distinctiveness rather than fluency becomes the primary signal of human creative capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出在生成式AI时代衡量创造力的框架，强调独特性而非流畅性作为人类创造力的核心信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI模糊了人类与AI创造力的界限，传统评估方法无法区分AI辅助下的真实人类创造力，影响招聘和人才系统。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并区分人类与AI在创意生成中的贡献，特别是在AI增强基线质量后。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI介导环境中创意输出呈现双峰分布，表面质量评估无法捕捉深层差异，独特性成为关键信号。
analysis.method: 将创造力重新概念化为分布性和过程性属性，在嵌入空间中通过想法生成和想法转化来量化新颖性。
contributions: 提出基于分布和过程的创造力量化框架，区分人类与AI创意表现
识别AI介导环境中创意输出的双峰分布结构及其对招聘策略的影响
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖嵌入空间表示，可能受预训练模型偏差影响
未讨论跨领域或文化差异下的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在生成式AI时代衡量创造力的框架，强调独特性而非流畅性作为人类创造力的核心信号。

papers.title: Beyond Segmentation: Structurally Informed Facade Parsing from Imperfect Images
papers.abstract: Standard object detectors typically treat architectural elements independently, often resulting in facade parsings that lack the structural coherence required for downstream procedural reconstruction. We address this limitation by augmenting the YOLOv8 training objective with a custom lightweight alignment loss. This regularization encourages grid-consistent arrangements of bounding boxes during training, effectively injecting geometric priors without altering the standard inference pipeline. Experiments on the CMP dataset demonstrate that our method successfully improves structural regularity, correcting alignment errors caused by perspective and occlusion while maintaining a controllable trade-off with standard detection accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量对齐损失增强YOLOv8，提升建筑立面解析的结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准目标检测器独立处理建筑元素，导致立面解析缺乏结构连贯性，影响后续程序化重建。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变标准推理流程的前提下，提升立面解析中边界框的结构规则性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 透视和遮挡导致边界框对齐错误，标准检测器无法保证网格一致性。
analysis.method: 在YOLOv8训练目标中添加自定义轻量对齐损失，正则化边界框的网格一致排列，注入几何先验。
contributions: 提出一种轻量对齐损失，增强立面解析的结构规则性
在CMP数据集上验证了方法在保持检测精度的同时改善结构一致性
analysis.experiments: 在CMP数据集上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于建筑立面等具有规则网格结构的场景
对齐损失与检测精度的权衡需要手动调节
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量对齐损失增强YOLOv8，提升建筑立面解析的结构一致性。

papers.title: Mosaic: Multimodal Jailbreak against Closed-Source VLMs via Multi-View Ensemble Optimization
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are powerful but remain vulnerable to multimodal jailbreak attacks. Existing attacks mainly rely on either explicit visual prompt attacks or gradient-based adversarial optimization. While the former is easier to detect, the latter produces subtle perturbations that are less perceptible, but is usually optimized and evaluated under homogeneous open-source surrogate-target settings, leaving its effectiveness on commercial closed-source VLMs under heterogeneous settings unclear. To examine this issue, we study different surrogate-target settings and observe a consistent gap between homogeneous and heterogeneous settings, a phenomenon we term surrogate dependency. Motivated by this finding, we propose Mosaic, a Multi-view ensemble optimization framework for multimodal jailbreak against closed-source VLMs, which alleviates surrogate dependency under heterogeneous surrogate-target settings by reducing over-reliance on any single surrogate model and visual view. Specifically, Mosaic incorporates three core components: a Text-Side Transformation module, which perturbs refusal-sensitive lexical patterns; a Multi-View Image Optimization module, which updates perturbations under diverse cropped views to avoid overfitting to a single visual view; and a Surrogate Ensemble Guidance module, which aggregates optimization signals from multiple surrogate VLMs to reduce surrogate-specific bias. Extensive experiments on safety benchmarks demonstrate that Mosaic achieves state-of-the-art Attack Success Rate and Average Toxicity against commercial closed-source VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Mosaic多视图集成优化框架，缓解异构代理依赖，实现对闭源VLM的高效多模态越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM越狱攻击在闭源模型上效果有限，存在代理依赖问题，亟需更有效的攻击方法以评估模型安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种针对闭源VLM的多模态越狱攻击方法，以克服异构代理设置下的代理依赖问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到同构与异构代理设置之间存在一致的攻击成功率差距，即代理依赖现象。
analysis.method: 提出Mosaic框架，包含文本侧变换模块（扰动拒绝敏感词汇）、多视图图像优化模块（多裁剪视图更新扰动）和代理集成引导模块（聚合多个代理VLM的优化信号）。
contributions: 揭示了闭源VLM越狱攻击中的代理依赖现象。
提出了Mosaic多视图集成优化框架，有效缓解代理依赖。
在安全基准上实现了对商业闭源VLM的最优攻击成功率和平均毒性。
analysis.experiments: 在安全基准上进行了大量实验，攻击成功率和平均毒性达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定代理模型集合，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论防御机制的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Mosaic多视图集成优化框架，缓解异构代理依赖，实现对闭源VLM的高效多模态越狱攻击。

papers.title: DRBENCHER: Can Your Agent Identify the Entity, Retrieve Its Properties and Do the Math?
papers.abstract: Deep research agents increasingly interleave web browsing with multi-step computation, yet existing benchmarks evaluate these capabilities in isolation, creating a blind spot in assessing real-world performance. We introduce DRBENCHER, a synthetic benchmark generator for questions that require both browsing and computation. It enforces four criteria: verifiability (gold answers are computed by executing parameterized code over knowledge-graph values), complexity (multi-hop entity identification, property retrieval, and domain-specific computation), difficulty (a two-stage verification cascade filters out questions solvable by the generating model), and diversity (a greedy max-min embedding filter maximizes coverage). These criteria are realized via a unified answer-first pipeline spanning five domains: biochemistry, financial, geophysical, security, and history. Human evaluation shows 76% validity (84% excluding stale data), with 35% of errors due to outdated knowledge-graph entries, highlighting an inherent limitation of systems that reason over evolving data. Automatic evaluation shows that the strongest frontier model achieves only 20% answer accuracy. Compared to manually constructed benchmarks (BrowseComp+, MATH-500, GPQA), DRBENCHER achieves the highest semantic diversity.

analysis.tldr: DRBENCHER是一个合成基准生成器，用于评估需要同时进行网页浏览和多步计算的深度研究智能体，发现最强模型仅达20%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准将网页浏览与多步计算能力分开评估，无法反映真实世界中两者交织的复杂场景，导致对深度研究智能体实际性能的评估存在盲区。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够同时评估智能体在网页浏览与多步计算（包括实体识别、属性检索和领域特定计算）综合能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，但指出人类评估中35%的错误源于知识图谱条目过时，揭示了系统在演化数据上推理的固有限制。
analysis.method: 提出DRBENCHER，一个合成基准生成器，通过统一答案优先的流水线生成问题，涵盖五个领域，并强制满足可验证性、复杂性、难度和多样性四个标准。
contributions: 提出了DRBENCHER，一个可验证、复杂、困难且多样化的合成基准生成器，用于评估深度研究智能体的浏览与计算综合能力。
通过人类评估和自动评估揭示了当前最强模型仅达到20%准确率，并指出知识图谱过时是主要误差来源。
analysis.experiments: 人类评估显示76%有效性（排除过时数据后84%），自动评估显示最强前沿模型仅达20%答案准确率。与BrowseComp+、MATH-500、GPQA相比，DRBENCHER实现了最高的语义多样性。
limitations: 基准依赖知识图谱，过时条目导致35%错误，可能影响评估的时效性。
仅覆盖五个领域，可能无法完全代表所有需要浏览与计算的真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DRBENCHER是一个合成基准生成器，用于评估需要同时进行网页浏览和多步计算的深度研究智能体，发现最强模型仅达20%准确率。

papers.title: FashionStylist: An Expert Knowledge-enhanced Multimodal Dataset for Fashion Understanding
papers.abstract: Fashion understanding requires both visual perception and expert-level reasoning about style, occasion, compatibility, and outfit rationale. However, existing fashion datasets remain fragmented and task-specific, often focusing on item attributes, outfit co-occurrence, or weak textual supervision, and thus provide limited support for holistic outfit understanding. In this paper, we introduce FashionStylist, an expert-annotated benchmark for holistic and expert-level fashion understanding. Constructed through a dedicated fashion-expert annotation pipeline, FashionStylist provides professionally grounded annotations at both the item and outfit levels. It supports three representative tasks: outfit-to-item grounding, outfit completion, and outfit evaluation. These tasks cover realistic item recovery from complex outfits with layering and accessories, compatibility-aware composition beyond co-occurrence matching, and expert-level assessment of style, season, occasion, and overall coherence. Experimental results show that FashionStylist serves not only as a unified benchmark for multiple fashion tasks, but also as an effective training resource for improving grounding, completion, and outfit-level semantic evaluation in MLLM-based fashion systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个专家标注的多模态时尚数据集FashionStylist，支持整体搭配理解与评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时尚数据集碎片化、任务特定，缺乏对整体搭配的专家级推理支持。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、专家标注的基准来支持多任务时尚理解（如单品定位、搭配补全、搭配评估）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过时尚专家标注流程构建数据集，包含单品和搭配级别标注，支持三个代表性任务。
contributions: 提出FashionStylist，一个专家标注的时尚理解基准数据集
支持三个任务：单品定位、搭配补全、搭配评估，覆盖整体搭配理解
analysis.experiments: 实验表明该数据集可作为统一基准和训练资源，提升基于MLLM的时尚系统的性能。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限
专家标注成本高，可能难以扩展
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个专家标注的多模态时尚数据集FashionStylist，支持整体搭配理解与评估。

papers.title: DDSP-QbE++: Improving Speech Quality for Speech Anonymisation for Atypical Speech
papers.abstract: Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP) pipelines for voice conversion rely on subtractive synthesis, where a periodic excitation signal is shaped by a learned spectral envelope to reconstruct the target voice. In DDSP-QbE, the excitation is generated via phase accumulation, producing a sawtooth-like waveform whose abrupt discontinuities introduce aliasing artefacts that manifest perceptually as buzziness and spectral distortion, particularly at higher fundamental frequencies. We propose two targeted improvements to the excitation stage of the DDSP-QbE subtractive synthesizer. First, we incorporate explicit voicing detection to gate the harmonic excitation, suppressing the periodic component in unvoiced regions and replacing it with filtered noise, thereby avoiding aliased harmonic content where it is most perceptually disruptive. Second, we apply Polynomial Band-Limited Step (PolyBLEP) correction to the phase-accumulated oscillator, substituting the hard waveform discontinuity at each phase wrap with a smooth polynomial residual that cancels alias-generating components without oversampling or spectral truncation. Together, these modifications yield a cleaner harmonic roll-off, reduced high-frequency artefacts, and improved perceptual naturalness, as measured by MOS. The proposed approach is lightweight, differentiable, and integrates seamlessly into the existing DDSP-QbE training pipeline with no additional learnable parameters.

analysis.tldr: 通过改进DDSP-QbE的激励阶段（加入浊音检测和PolyBLEP校正），提升非典型语音匿名化的语音质量。
analysis.research_motivation: DDSP-QbE语音转换中，锯齿波激励因相位累积产生混叠伪影，导致听觉上的嗡嗡声和频谱失真，尤其在基频较高时更明显，影响非典型语音匿名化的自然度。
analysis.problem: DDSP-QbE减法合成器中激励阶段的锯齿波不连续性引入混叠伪影，降低语音质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，相位累积产生的锯齿波在相位回绕处存在硬不连续性，导致混叠伪影，表现为感知上的嗡嗡声和频谱失真，尤其在较高基频时更突出。
analysis.method: 提出两项改进：1) 显式浊音检测门控谐波激励，在清音段用滤波噪声替代周期分量；2) 对相位累积振荡器应用PolyBLEP校正，用平滑多项式残差替代硬波形不连续性，消除混叠成分。
contributions: 提出结合浊音检测和PolyBLEP校正的激励改进方法，有效减少混叠伪影。
方法轻量、可微，无需额外可学习参数，可无缝集成到现有DDSP-QbE训练流程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于减法合成的DDSP语音转换框架。
对极高基频或极端非典型语音的效果未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过改进DDSP-QbE的激励阶段（加入浊音检测和PolyBLEP校正），提升非典型语音匿名化的语音质量。

papers.title: 2D or 3D: Who Governs Salience in VLA Models? -- Tri-Stage Token Pruning Framework with Modality Salience Awareness
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as the mainstream of embodied intelligence. Recent VLA models have expanded their input modalities from 2D-only to 2D+3D paradigms, forming multi-visual-modal VLA (MVLA) models. Despite achieving improved spatial perception, MVLA faces a greater acceleration demand due to the increased number of input tokens caused by modal expansion. Token pruning is an effective optimization methods tailored to MVLA models. However, existing token pruning schemes are designed for 2D-only VLA models, ignoring 2D/3D modality salience differences. In this paper, we follow the application process of multi-modal data in MVLA models and develop a tri-stage analysis to capture the discrepancy and dynamics of 2D/3D modality salience. Based on these, we propose a corresponding tri-stage token pruning framework for MVLA models to achieve optimal 2D/3D token selection and efficient pruning. Experiments show that our framework achieves up to a 2.55x inference speedup with minimal accuracy loss, while only costing 5.8% overhead. Our Code is coming soon.

analysis.tldr: 针对多视觉模态VLA模型，提出三阶段token剪枝框架，利用2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型从2D扩展到2D+3D多模态后，输入token数量激增导致推理负担加重，现有剪枝方法仅针对2D模型，未考虑2D/3D模态的显著性差异。
analysis.problem: 如何为多视觉模态VLA模型设计一种感知2D/3D模态显著性差异的token剪枝方法，以在保持精度的同时最大化推理加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出2D和3D模态在VLA模型中的显著性存在差异且动态变化，但未提供具体现象细节。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段token剪枝框架：首先分析多模态数据在MVLA模型中的应用过程，捕捉2D/3D模态显著性的差异和动态变化，然后基于此设计三阶段剪枝策略，实现最优的2D/3D token选择和高效剪枝。
contributions: 首次针对多视觉模态VLA模型提出三阶段token剪枝框架，利用2D/3D模态显著性差异。
实验表明该方法在仅增加5.8%开销的情况下，实现高达2.55倍推理加速且精度损失极小。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及推理加速倍数和开销。
limitations: 可能仅在特定MVLA架构上验证，泛化性未知。
三阶段剪枝策略的复杂度可能随模态数量增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对多视觉模态VLA模型，提出三阶段token剪枝框架，利用2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理加速。

papers.title: Conflicts Make Large Reasoning Models Vulnerable to Attacks
papers.abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their decision-making under conflicting objectives remains insufficiently understood. This work investigates how LRMs respond to harmful queries when confronted with two categories of conflicts: internal conflicts that pit alignment values against each other and dilemmas, which impose mutually contradictory choices, including sacrificial, duress, agent-centered, and social forms. Using over 1,300 prompts across five benchmarks, we evaluate three representative LRMs - Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B, QwQ-32B, and DeepSeek R1 - and find that conflicts significantly increase attack success rates, even under single-round non-narrative queries without sophisticated auto-attack techniques. Our findings reveal through layerwise and neuron-level analyses that safety-related and functional representations shift and overlap under conflict, interfering with safety-aligned behavior. This study highlights the need for deeper alignment strategies to ensure the robustness and trustworthiness of next-generation reasoning models. Our code is available at https://github.com/DataArcTech/ConflictHarm. Warning: This paper contains inappropriate, offensive and harmful content.

analysis.tldr: 冲突目标使大型推理模型更容易被攻击成功，安全与功能表征在冲突下发生重叠。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大型推理模型在冲突目标下的决策行为尚不明确，而现实场景中常面临内部冲突（如对齐价值矛盾）和两难困境（如牺牲、胁迫等），这可能导致模型安全机制失效。
analysis.problem: 研究冲突目标如何影响大型推理模型对有害查询的响应，并揭示其内部表征变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 冲突显著提升攻击成功率，即使使用单轮非叙事查询且无复杂自动攻击技术；层和神经元分析表明，安全相关与功能表征在冲突下发生偏移和重叠，干扰安全对齐行为。
analysis.method: 设计两类冲突（内部冲突和两难困境），构建1300+提示词在五个基准上评估三个LRM（Llama-3.1-Nemotron-8B、QwQ-32B、DeepSeek R1），并进行层和神经元级分析。
contributions: 首次系统研究冲突目标对大型推理模型安全性的影响，发现冲突显著提升攻击成功率。
通过层和神经元分析揭示冲突下安全与功能表征重叠的机制。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准上使用1300+提示词评估三个模型，报告攻击成功率提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅评估了三个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
未探索多轮或更复杂攻击场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 冲突目标使大型推理模型更容易被攻击成功，安全与功能表征在冲突下发生重叠。

papers.title: Statistical Properties of the King Wen Sequence: An Anti-Habituation Structure That Does Not Improve Neural Network Training
papers.abstract: The King Wen sequence of the I-Ching (c. 1000 BC) orders 64 hexagrams -- states of a six-dimensional binary space -- in a pattern that has puzzled scholars for three millennia. We present a rigorous statistical characterization of this ordering using Monte Carlo permutation analysis against 100,000 random baselines. We find that the sequence has four statistically significant properties: higher-than-random transition distance (98.2nd percentile), negative lag-1 autocorrelation (p=0.037), yang-balanced groups of four (p=0.002), and asymmetric within-pair vs. between-pair distances (99.2nd percentile). These properties superficially resemble principles from curriculum learning and curiosity-driven exploration, motivating the hypothesis that they might benefit neural network training. We test this hypothesis through three experiments: learning rate schedule modulation, curriculum ordering, and seed sensitivity analysis, conducted across two hardware platforms (NVIDIA RTX 2060 with PyTorch and Apple Silicon with MLX). The results are uniformly negative. King Wen LR modulation degrades performance at all tested amplitudes. As curriculum ordering, King Wen is the worst non-sequential ordering on one platform and within noise on the other. A 30-seed sweep confirms that only King Wen's degradation exceeds natural seed variance. We explain why: the sequence's high variance -- the very property that makes it statistically distinctive -- destabilizes gradient-based optimization. Anti-habituation in a fixed combinatorial sequence is not the same as effective training dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 易经卦序虽具有统计显著性反习惯结构，但对神经网络训练无益甚至有害。
analysis.research_motivation: 易经卦序（King Wen sequence）作为古老排列，其统计特性长期未解，且表面类似课程学习与好奇心驱动探索原则，可能启发神经网络训练改进。
analysis.problem: 验证易经卦序的统计特性是否对神经网络训练有正面影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 卦序具有高转移距离、负自相关、阳平衡四元组、不对称距离等统计显著特性，但这些特性导致高方差，反而破坏梯度优化稳定性。
analysis.method: 通过蒙特卡洛置换分析（10万随机基线）统计表征卦序特性，并在两个硬件平台（RTX 2060+PyTorch、Apple Silicon+MLX）上测试学习率调度、课程排序和种子敏感性三种实验。
contributions: 首次对易经卦序进行严格统计表征，发现四个显著特性。
通过实验证明该序列对神经网络训练无益，并解释其高方差破坏优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明三种实验（学习率调度、课程排序、种子敏感性）结果均为负面。
limitations: 实验仅在简单任务上验证，未涉及复杂模型或大规模数据集。
未探索其他可能的训练机制（如正则化、初始化）。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 易经卦序虽具有统计显著性反习惯结构，但对神经网络训练无益甚至有害。

papers.title: Neural Distribution Prior for LiDAR Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: LiDAR-based perception is critical for autonomous driving due to its robustness to poor lighting and visibility conditions. Yet, current models operate under the closed-set assumption and often fail to recognize unexpected out-of-distribution (OOD) objects in the open world. Existing OOD scoring functions exhibit limited performance because they ignore the pronounced class imbalance inherent in LiDAR OOD detection and assume a uniform class distribution. To address this limitation, we propose the Neural Distribution Prior (NDP), a framework that models the distributional structure of network predictions and adaptively reweights OOD scores based on alignment with a learned distribution prior. NDP dynamically captures the logit distribution patterns of training data and corrects class-dependent confidence bias through an attention-based module. We further introduce a Perlin noise-based OOD synthesis strategy that generates diverse auxiliary OOD samples from input scans, enabling robust OOD training without external datasets. Extensive experiments on the SemanticKITTI and STU benchmarks demonstrate that NDP substantially improves OOD detection performance, achieving a point-level AP of 61.31% on the STU test set, which is more than 10$\times$ higher than the previous best result. Our framework is compatible with various existing OOD scoring formulations, providing an effective solution for open-world LiDAR perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经分布先验（NDP）框架，通过建模网络预测的分布结构并自适应重加权OOD分数，显著提升LiDAR开放世界感知的异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR感知在自动驾驶中至关重要，但现有模型基于封闭集假设，无法识别开放世界中的分布外（OOD）物体；现有OOD评分函数因忽略LiDAR数据固有的类别不平衡问题而性能有限。
analysis.problem: 解决LiDAR OOD检测中类别不平衡导致的置信度偏差，以及缺乏有效OOD训练数据的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有OOD评分函数假设均匀类别分布，忽略了LiDAR OOD检测中严重的类别不平衡，导致性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出神经分布先验（NDP）框架，包含：1）基于注意力的模块动态捕获训练数据的logit分布模式并校正类别依赖的置信度偏差；2）基于Perlin噪声的OOD合成策略，从输入扫描生成多样辅助OOD样本，无需外部数据集。
contributions: 提出NDP框架，通过建模分布先验并自适应重加权OOD分数，有效处理类别不平衡问题。
引入Perlin噪声驱动的OOD合成策略，无需外部数据即可生成多样OOD样本进行鲁棒训练。
在SemanticKITTI和STU基准上取得显著提升，STU测试集点级AP达61.31%，较之前最佳结果提升10倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在SemanticKITTI和STU基准上进行实验，STU测试集点级AP达61.31%，较之前最佳结果提升10倍以上。
limitations: 可能对Perlin噪声合成策略的多样性依赖较强，极端OOD场景下泛化性待验证。
框架计算开销未在摘要中提及，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经分布先验（NDP）框架，通过建模网络预测的分布结构并自适应重加权OOD分数，显著提升LiDAR开放世界感知的异常检测性能。

papers.title: Hitem3D 2.0: Multi-View Guided Native 3D Texture Generation
papers.abstract: Although recent advances have improved the quality of 3D texture generation, existing methods still struggle with incomplete texture coverage, cross-view inconsistency, and misalignment between geometry and texture. To address these limitations, we propose Hitem3D 2.0, a multi-view guided native 3D texture generation framework that enhances texture quality through the integration of 2D multi-view generation priors and native 3D texture representations. Hitem3D 2.0 comprises two key components: a multi-view synthesis framework and a native 3D texture generation model. The multi-view generation is built upon a pre-trained image editing backbone and incorporates plug-and-play modules that explicitly promote geometric alignment, cross-view consistency, and illumination uniformity, thereby enabling the synthesis of high-fidelity multi-view images. Conditioned on the generated views and 3D geometry, the native 3D texture generation model projects multi-view textures onto 3D surfaces while plausibly completing textures in unseen regions. Through the integration of multi-view consistency constraints with native 3D texture modeling, Hitem3D 2.0 significantly improves texture completeness, cross-view coherence, and geometric alignment. Experimental results demonstrate that Hitem3D 2.0 outperforms existing methods in terms of texture detail, fidelity, consistency, coherence, and alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视图引导的原生3D纹理生成框架，解决纹理不完整、跨视图不一致和几何纹理错位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D纹理生成方法存在纹理覆盖不完整、跨视图不一致以及几何与纹理错位等问题，限制了生成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、完整、跨视图一致且与几何对齐的3D纹理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在纹理覆盖、跨视图一致性和几何对齐方面存在不足。
analysis.method: 提出Hitem3D 2.0框架，包含多视图合成模块（基于预训练图像编辑骨干，加入几何对齐、跨视图一致性和光照均匀性模块）和原生3D纹理生成模型（将多视图纹理投影到3D表面并补全不可见区域）。
contributions: 提出多视图引导的原生3D纹理生成框架，整合2D多视图先验和原生3D纹理表示。
设计多视图合成模块，显式促进几何对齐、跨视图一致性和光照均匀性。
原生3D纹理生成模型实现纹理投影与不可见区域补全。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练图像编辑模型的质量。
对于复杂几何或极端视角的纹理生成效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视图引导的原生3D纹理生成框架，解决纹理不完整、跨视图不一致和几何纹理错位问题。

papers.title: The Fast Lane Hypothesis: Von Economo Neurons Implement a Biological Speed-Accuracy Tradeoff
papers.abstract: Von Economo neurons (VENs) are large bipolar projection neurons found exclusively in the anterior cingulate cortex (ACC) and frontal insula of species with complex social cognition, including humans, great apes, and cetaceans. Their selective depletion in frontotemporal dementia (FTD) and altered development in autism implicate them in rapid social decision-making, yet no computational model of VEN function has previously existed. We introduce the Fast Lane Hypothesis: VENs implement a biological speed-accuracy tradeoff (SAT) by providing a sparse, fast projection pathway that enables rapid social decisions at the cost of deliberate processing accuracy. We model VENs as fast leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons with membrane time constant 5 ms and sparse dendritic fan-in of eight afferents, compared to 20 ms and eighty afferents for standard pyramidal neurons, within a spiking cortical circuit of 2,000 neurons trained on a social discrimination task. Networks are evaluated under three clinically motivated conditions across 10 independent random seeds: typical (2% VENs), autism-like (0.4% VENs), and FTD-like (post-training VEN ablation). All configurations achieve equivalent asymptotic classification accuracy (99.4%), consistent with the prediction that VENs modulate decision speed rather than representational capacity. Temporal analysis confirms that VENs produce median first-spike latencies 4 ms earlier than pyramidal neurons. At a fixed decision threshold, the typical condition is significantly faster than FTD-like (t=-23.31, p<0.0001), while autism-like is intermediate (mean RT=26.91+/-9.01 ms vs. typical 20.70+/-2.02 ms; p=0.078). A preliminary evolutionary analysis shows qualitative correspondence between model-optimal VEN fraction and the primate phylogenetic gradient. To our knowledge, this is the first computational model that asks what a Von Economo neuron actually computes.

analysis.tldr: 提出快车道假说：Von Economo神经元通过快速稀疏投射实现生物速度-精度权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: Von Economo神经元（VENs）存在于复杂社会认知物种中，其选择性耗损与额颞叶痴呆和自闭症相关，但缺乏计算模型解释其功能。
analysis.problem: 建立首个VEN计算模型，验证VEN是否通过快速稀疏通路实现速度-精度权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将VEN建模为膜时间常数5ms、树突扇入8的快速LIF神经元，与标准锥体神经元（20ms、80扇入）对比，在2000神经元脉冲皮层网络中训练社会辨别任务。
contributions: 提出Fast Lane Hypothesis，首次为VEN功能提供计算模型。
通过模拟典型、自闭样和FTD样条件，验证VEN调节决策速度而非表征能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三种临床条件下（典型2% VEN、自闭样0.4% VEN、FTD样训练后VEN消融）评估网络，10个随机种子，所有配置达到相同渐近分类准确率（99.4%），典型条件比FTD样显著更快（t=-23.31, p<0.0001），自闭样中间（p=0.078）。
limitations: 模型仅基于社会辨别任务，可能不泛化到其他认知功能。
进化分析仅为定性对应，缺乏定量验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出快车道假说：Von Economo神经元通过快速稀疏投射实现生物速度-精度权衡。

papers.title: Training-free, Perceptually Consistent Low-Resolution Previews with High-Resolution Image for Efficient Workflows of Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Image generative models have become indispensable tools to yield exquisite high-resolution (HR) images for everyone, ranging from general users to professional designers. However, a desired outcome often requires generating a large number of HR images with different prompts and seeds, resulting in high computational cost for both users and service providers. Generating low-resolution (LR) images first could alleviate computational burden, but it is not straightforward how to generate LR images that are perceptually consistent with their HR counterparts. Here, we consider the task of generating high-fidelity LR images, called Previews, that preserve perceptual similarity of their HR counterparts for an efficient workflow, allowing users to identify promising candidates before generating the final HR image. We propose the commutator-zero condition to ensure the LR-HR perceptual consistency for flow matching models, leading to the proposed training-free solution with downsampling matrix selection and commutator-zero guidance. Extensive experiments show that our method can generate LR images with up to 33\% computation reduction while maintaining HR perceptual consistency. When combined with existing acceleration techniques, our method achieves up to 3$\times$ speedup. Moreover, our formulation can be extended to image manipulations, such as warping and translation, demonstrating its generalizability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的扩散模型低分辨率预览生成方法，通过commutator-zero条件保证与高分辨率图像的感知一致性，实现最高33%计算量减少和3倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成高分辨率图像需要大量计算资源，用户常需多次尝试不同提示和种子，导致高昂成本。先产生低分辨率预览可缓解计算负担，但现有方法难以保证低分辨率图像与高分辨率版本在感知上一致。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，生成与高分辨率图像感知一致的低分辨率预览，以加速扩散模型工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出commutator-zero条件，通过下采样矩阵选择和commutator-zero引导，在流匹配模型中实现低分辨率与高分辨率图像的感知一致性，无需训练。
contributions: 提出commutator-zero条件，确保流匹配模型中低分辨率预览与高分辨率图像的感知一致性。
设计无需训练的解决方案，包括下采样矩阵选择和commutator-zero引导，显著降低计算成本。
方法可扩展至图像变形、平移等操作，展示通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在扩散模型上实验，显示方法可减少最高33%计算量，结合现有加速技术实现3倍加速。摘要未提供具体数据集或对比基线细节。
limitations: 方法可能仅适用于流匹配模型，对其他生成模型需调整。
感知一致性依赖下采样矩阵选择，可能对特定图像类型不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的扩散模型低分辨率预览生成方法，通过commutator-zero条件保证与高分辨率图像的感知一致性，实现最高33%计算量减少和3倍加速。

papers.title: GRM: Utility-Aware Jailbreak Attacks on Audio LLMs via Gradient-Ratio Masking
papers.abstract: Audio large language models (ALLMs) enable rich speech-text interaction, but they also introduce jailbreak vulnerabilities in the audio modality. Existing audio jailbreak methods mainly optimize jailbreak success while overlooking utility preservation, as reflected in transcription quality and question answering performance. In practice, stronger attacks often come at the cost of degraded utility. To study this trade-off, we revisit existing attacks by varying their perturbation coverage in the frequency domain, from partial-band to full-band, and find that broader frequency coverage does not necessarily improve jailbreak performance, while utility consistently deteriorates. This suggests that concentrating perturbation on a subset of bands can yield a better attack-utility trade-off than indiscriminate full-band coverage. Based on this insight, we propose GRM, a utility-aware frequency-selective jailbreak framework. It ranks Mel bands by their attack contribution relative to utility sensitivity, perturbs only a selected subset of bands, and learns a reusable universal perturbation under a semantic-preservation objective. Experiments on four representative ALLMs show that GRM achieves an average Jailbreak Success Rate (JSR) of 88.46% while providing a better attack-utility trade-off than representative baselines. These results highlight the potential of frequency-selective perturbation for better balancing attack effectiveness and utility preservation in audio jailbreak. Content Warning: This paper includes harmful query examples and unsafe model responses.

analysis.tldr: 提出GRM框架，通过频率选择性扰动在音频大语言模型上实现高越狱成功率同时保持效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频大语言模型存在越狱漏洞，现有方法只优化攻击成功率而忽略效用（如转录质量、问答性能），导致强攻击常伴随效用下降，需要平衡攻击与效用。
analysis.problem: 如何在音频大语言模型上实现高越狱成功率的同时保持效用（转录质量和问答性能）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过改变频域扰动覆盖范围（从部分频带到全频带）发现，更宽的频率覆盖不一定提升越狱性能，但效用持续下降，表明集中扰动于部分频带可获得更好的攻击-效用权衡。
analysis.method: 提出GRM框架，基于梯度比掩码（Gradient-Ratio Masking）对Mel频带按攻击贡献与效用敏感性排序，选择子集进行扰动，并在语义保持目标下学习可复用的通用扰动。
contributions: 揭示了音频越狱中攻击与效用的权衡，并发现频率选择性扰动优于全频带扰动。
提出GRM，一种效用感知的频率选择性越狱框架，实现高越狱成功率同时保持效用。
analysis.experiments: 在四个代表性音频大语言模型上实验，GRM平均越狱成功率88.46%，且攻击-效用权衡优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的音频大语言模型。
通用扰动的可迁移性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GRM框架，通过频率选择性扰动在音频大语言模型上实现高越狱成功率同时保持效用。

papers.title: TinyNeRV: Compact Neural Video Representations via Capacity Scaling, Distillation, and Low-Precision Inference
papers.abstract: Implicit neural video representations encode entire video sequences within the parameters of a neural network and enable constant time frame reconstruction. Recent work on Neural Representations for Videos (NeRV) has demonstrated competitive reconstruction performance while avoiding the sequential decoding process of conventional video codecs. However, most existing studies focus on moderate or high capacity models, leaving the behavior of extremely compact configurations required for constrained environments insufficiently explored. This paper presents a systematic study of tiny NeRV architectures designed for efficient deployment. Two lightweight configurations, NeRV-T and NeRV-T+, are introduced and evaluated across multiple video datasets in order to analyze how aggressive capacity reduction affects reconstruction quality, computational complexity, and decoding throughput. Beyond architectural scaling, the work investigates strategies for improving the performance of compact models without increasing inference cost. Knowledge distillation with frequency-aware focal supervision is explored to enhance reconstruction fidelity in low-capacity networks. In addition, the impact of lowprecision inference is examined through both post training quantization and quantization aware training to study the robustness of tiny models under reduced numerical precision. Experimental results demonstrate that carefully designed tiny NeRV variants can achieve favorable quality efficiency trade offs while substantially reducing parameter count, computational cost, and memory requirements. These findings provide insight into the practical limits of compact neural video representations and offer guidance for deploying NeRV style models in resource constrained and real-time environments. The official implementation is available at https: //github.com/HannanAkhtar/TinyNeRV-Implementation.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究极紧凑NeRV视频表示，提出TinyNeRV架构及蒸馏、量化策略，实现参数与计算量大幅降低下的质量-效率平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐式神经视频表示（NeRV）研究多关注中高容量模型，缺乏对资源受限场景下极紧凑配置的探索，而实际部署需要低参数、低计算量的高效模型。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并优化极紧凑的NeRV架构，使其在保持可接受重建质量的同时，显著降低参数数量、计算成本和内存需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种轻量配置NeRV-T和NeRV-T+；采用频率感知焦点监督的知识蒸馏提升紧凑模型重建保真度；通过训练后量化与量化感知训练研究低精度推理的影响。
contributions: 系统研究了极紧凑NeRV架构在资源受限场景下的性能表现，并引入两种轻量配置。
探索了频率感知焦点监督的知识蒸馏和低精度推理策略，在不增加推理成本的前提下提升紧凑模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频数据集上评估重建质量、计算复杂度和解码吞吐量，显示TinyNeRV变体在显著降低参数、计算和内存的同时实现有利的质量-效率权衡。
limitations: 可能仅在特定视频数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
蒸馏和量化策略的通用性可能受限于NeRV架构本身。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究极紧凑NeRV视频表示，提出TinyNeRV架构及蒸馏、量化策略，实现参数与计算量大幅降低下的质量-效率平衡。

papers.title: Lookahead Drifting Model
papers.abstract: Recently, a new paradigm named \emph{drifting model} has been proposed for mapping distributions, which achieves the SOTA image generation performance over ImageNet via one-step neural functional evaluation (NFE). The basic idea is to compute a drifting term at each training iteration and then push the output of the model towards the direction of the drifting term. In this paper, we propose a \emph{lookahead drifting model}. At each training iteration, we compute a set of drifting terms sequentially. Each drifting term is calculated by making use of previously computed ones as well as the positive samples and the output of the model. %One key step is to properly scale the drifting terms so that their magnitudes are in a comparable range. In principle, the drifting terms obtained at a later stage capture higher order gradient information towards the positive samples. At each training iteration, the model is optimized by pushing its output towards the direction of the (weighted) summation of the drifting terms. Experimental results on toy examples and CIFAR10 demonstrate the better performance of the new method than the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项来改进分布映射，在 CIFAR10 上优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有漂移模型在分布映射中仅使用单一漂移项，可能无法充分捕捉高阶梯度信息，限制了生成性能。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多步漂移项计算来提升分布映射模型在图像生成任务中的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在每次训练迭代中顺序计算一组漂移项，每个漂移项利用先前计算的漂移项、正样本和模型输出，最终用加权和优化模型。
contributions: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过多步漂移项捕获高阶梯度信息。
在 toy 示例和 CIFAR10 上验证了方法优于基线漂移模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 toy 示例和 CIFAR10 数据集上进行实验，结果表明新方法优于基线。
limitations: 仅在小规模数据集（CIFAR10）上验证，未在更大规模数据集（如 ImageNet）上测试。
计算开销可能因顺序计算多个漂移项而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Lookahead Drifting Model，通过顺序计算多个漂移项来改进分布映射，在 CIFAR10 上优于基线。

papers.title: SHIFT: Steering Hidden Intermediates in Flow Transformers
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have become leading approaches for high-fidelity image generation. Recent DiT-based diffusion models, in particular, achieve strong prompt adherence while producing high-quality samples. We propose SHIFT, a simple but effective and lightweight framework for concept removal in DiT diffusion models via targeted manipulation of intermediate activations at inference time, inspired by activation steering in large language models. SHIFT learns steering vectors that are dynamically applied to selected layers and timesteps to suppress unwanted visual concepts while preserving the prompt's remaining content and overall image quality. Beyond suppression, the same mechanism can shift generations into a desired \emph{style domain} or bias samples toward adding or changing target objects. We demonstrate that SHIFT provides effective and flexible control over DiT generation across diverse prompts and targets without time-consuming retraining.

analysis.tldr: SHIFT通过推理时动态调整中间激活，实现DiT扩散模型的概念移除与风格迁移，无需重训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在概念移除或风格控制上通常需要重训练或复杂修改，缺乏轻量且灵活的推理时控制方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需重训练的前提下，通过推理时干预DiT扩散模型的中间激活，实现特定视觉概念的抑制、风格迁移或目标对象添加/修改。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SHIFT学习一组引导向量，在推理时动态应用于选定的层和时间步，以抑制不需要的视觉概念或引导生成朝向目标风格/对象。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级推理时概念移除框架SHIFT，灵感来自LLM激活引导。
展示同一机制可扩展至风格迁移和目标对象添加/修改，无需重训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂或细粒度概念的控制效果有限。
引导向量的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SHIFT通过推理时动态调整中间激活，实现DiT扩散模型的概念移除与风格迁移，无需重训练。

papers.title: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that are absent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding is disproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We observe that this inequity in attention allocation is a root cause of object hallucination: when rare, small, or contextually peripheral objects receive insufficient attention, the model fails to ground its generation in the full visual scene. We argue that every object in an image, regardless of its size, frequency or visual salience, deserves equal representational opportunity during decoding. To this end, we propose DOP-OBC, a training-free and architecture-agnostic decoding strategy built on the principle of equitable attention. Two complementary object-aware signals work in tandem: a Dominant Object Penalty (DOP) that softly suppresses attention over-concentration on visually dominant regions, and an Outlier Boost Coefficient (OBC) that amplifies attention toward rare yet confidently detected objects. These signals are injected as per-row logit modulations within the causal attention mask, requiring no weight updates and preserving autoregressive decoding properties. Extensive experiments across image and video MLLMs demonstrate consistent reductions in object hallucination on CHAIR and POPE benchmarks, alongside improvements in GPT-4o assessed captioning quality across correctness, consistency, detail, context and temporal dimensions. DOP-OBC establishes that fairness in attention allocation is not merely a design principle but a practical and effective path toward more faithful multimodal generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、架构无关的解码策略DOP-OBC，通过公平分配注意力来减少多模态大模型的物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型常因注意力不均衡而幻觉出视觉输入中不存在的物体，尤其对小、罕见或边缘物体关注不足，影响生成的真实性。
analysis.problem: 解码过程中注意力分配不公导致物体幻觉，模型无法基于完整视觉场景进行生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力分配不均是物体幻觉的根本原因：当罕见、小或上下文边缘物体获得不足注意力时，模型无法在完整视觉场景中接地生成。
analysis.method: 提出DOP-OBC，一种无需训练、架构无关的解码策略，包含两个互补信号：主导物体惩罚（DOP）抑制对视觉主导区域的过度关注，异常提升系数（OBC）放大对罕见但置信度高的物体的注意力，通过因果注意力掩码中的逐行logit调制实现。
contributions: 提出注意力分配公平性作为减少物体幻觉的设计原则
开发无需训练、架构无关的解码策略DOP-OBC，在图像和视频MLLM上一致减少幻觉并提升字幕质量
analysis.experiments: 在图像和视频MLLM上使用CHAIR和POPE基准评估物体幻觉，并使用GPT-4o评估字幕质量（正确性、一致性、细节、上下文和时间维度），结果显示幻觉一致减少且质量提升。
limitations: 可能依赖物体检测器的质量
未在更多样化的MLLM架构上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、架构无关的解码策略DOP-OBC，通过公平分配注意力来减少多模态大模型的物体幻觉。

papers.title: Adding Another Dimension to Image-based Animal Detection
papers.abstract: Monocular imaging of animals inherently reduces 3D structures to 2D projections. Detection algorithms lead to 2D bounding boxes that lack information about animal's orientation relative to the camera. To build 3D detection methods for RGB animal images, there is a lack of labeled datasets; such labeling processes require 3D input streams along with RGB data. We present a pipeline that utilises Skinned Multi Animal Linear models to estimate 3D bounding boxes and to project them as robust labels into 2D image space using a dedicated camera pose refinement algorithm. To assess which sides of the animal are captured, cuboid face visibility metrics are computed. These 3D bounding boxes and metrics form a crucial step toward developing and benchmarking future monocular 3D animal detection algorithms. We evaluate our method on the Animal3D dataset, demonstrating accurate performance across species and settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用3D动物模型生成3D边界框标签的流水线，推动单目动物3D检测发展。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目动物图像检测缺乏3D信息，现有方法仅输出2D边界框，无法获取动物朝向等关键信息，且缺少标注数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目RGB图像中生成3D动物检测所需的标注数据（3D边界框及朝向信息）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用Skinned Multi Animal Linear模型估计3D边界框，通过相机姿态精化算法投影到2D图像空间，并计算长方体面可见性指标。
contributions: 提出从单目RGB图像生成3D动物边界框标签的流水线
引入长方体面可见性指标用于评估动物朝向
analysis.experiments: 在Animal3D数据集上评估，展示了跨物种和场景的准确性能。
limitations: 依赖预定义的3D动物模型，可能不适用于所有物种
未在真实野外场景中验证鲁棒性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用3D动物模型生成3D边界框标签的流水线，推动单目动物3D检测发展。

papers.title: Long-SCOPE: Fully Sparse Long-Range Cooperative 3D Perception
papers.abstract: Cooperative 3D perception via Vehicle-to-Everything communication is a promising paradigm for enhancing autonomous driving, offering extended sensing horizons and occlusion resolution. However, the practical deployment of existing methods is hindered at long distances by two critical bottlenecks: the quadratic computational scaling of dense BEV representations and the fragility of feature association mechanisms under significant observation and alignment errors. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Long-SCOPE, a fully sparse framework designed for robust long-distance cooperative 3D perception. Our method features two novel components: a Geometry-guided Query Generation module to accurately detect small, distant objects, and a learnable Context-Aware Association module that robustly matches cooperative queries despite severe positional noise. Experiments on the V2X-Seq and Griffin datasets validate that Long-SCOPE achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging 100-150 m long-range settings, while maintaining highly competitive computation and communication costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出全稀疏框架Long-SCOPE，通过几何引导查询生成和上下文感知关联模块，实现鲁棒的长距离协同3D感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有协同3D感知方法在长距离场景下受限于密集BEV表示的二次计算复杂度和特征关联机制对观测/对齐误差的脆弱性，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 长距离协同3D感知中计算效率低和特征关联鲁棒性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出长距离下密集BEV表示导致计算量二次增长，且观测和对齐误差使特征关联机制脆弱。
analysis.method: 全稀疏框架Long-SCOPE，包含几何引导查询生成模块（准确检测小远目标）和可学习上下文感知关联模块（鲁棒匹配协同查询）。
contributions: 提出首个全稀疏长距离协同3D感知框架，解决计算和关联瓶颈。
设计几何引导查询生成和上下文感知关联两个创新模块。
analysis.experiments: 在V2X-Seq和Griffin数据集上验证，在100-150米长距离设置下达到SOTA，且计算和通信成本有竞争力。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏场景或传感器配置敏感。
未讨论跨域泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全稀疏框架Long-SCOPE，通过几何引导查询生成和上下文感知关联模块，实现鲁棒的长距离协同3D感知。

papers.title: On the Role of DAG topology in Energy-Aware Cloud Scheduling : A GNN-Based Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
papers.abstract: Cloud providers must assign heterogeneous compute resources to workflow DAGs while balancing competing objectives such as completion time, cost, and energy consumption. In this work, we study a single-workflow, queue-free scheduling setting and consider a graph neural network (GNN)-based deep reinforcement learning scheduler designed to minimize workflow completion time and energy usage. We identify specific out-of-distribution (OOD) conditions under which GNN-based deep reinforcement learning schedulers fail and provide a principled explanation of why these failures occur. Through controlled OOD evaluations, we demonstrate that performance degradation stems from structural mismatches between training and deployment environments, which disrupt message passing and undermine policy generalization. Our analysis exposes fundamental limitations of current GNN-based schedulers and highlights the need for more robust representations to ensure reliable scheduling performance under distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: GNN深度强化学习调度器在云工作流调度中因训练与部署环境的图结构分布偏移而性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 云提供商需在完成时间、成本和能耗间权衡，现有GNN调度器在分布偏移下泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: GNN深度强化学习调度器在分布外条件下性能退化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能退化源于训练与部署环境之间的结构不匹配，破坏了消息传递机制并削弱了策略泛化。
analysis.method: 通过控制分布外评估，分析GNN调度器在结构偏移下的失败模式。
contributions: 识别了GNN深度强化学习调度器失效的特定分布外条件
提供了基于结构不匹配导致消息传递失效的原理性解释
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑单工作流、无队列设置，实际场景更复杂
未提出缓解分布偏移的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GNN深度强化学习调度器在云工作流调度中因训练与部署环境的图结构分布偏移而性能下降。

papers.title: CT-1: Vision-Language-Camera Models Transfer Spatial Reasoning Knowledge to Camera-Controllable Video Generation
papers.abstract: Camera-controllable video generation aims to synthesize videos with flexible and physically plausible camera movements. However, existing methods either provide imprecise camera control from text prompts or rely on labor-intensive manual camera trajectory parameters, limiting their use in automated scenarios. To address these issues, we propose a novel Vision-Language-Camera model, termed CT-1 (Camera Transformer 1), a specialized model designed to transfer spatial reasoning knowledge to video generation by accurately estimating camera trajectories. Built upon vision-language modules and a Diffusion Transformer model, CT-1 employs a Wavelet-based Regularization Loss in the frequency domain to effectively learn complex camera trajectory distributions. These trajectories are integrated into a video diffusion model to enable spatially aware camera control that aligns with user intentions. To facilitate the training of CT-1, we design a dedicated data curation pipeline and construct CT-200K, a large-scale dataset containing over 47M frames. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework successfully bridges the gap between spatial reasoning and video synthesis, yielding faithful and high-quality camera-controllable videos and improving camera control accuracy by 25.7% over prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出CT-1模型，将视觉-语言模型的空间推理能力迁移到相机可控视频生成，通过小波正则化损失学习相机轨迹，并构建大规模数据集CT-200K，实现精确相机控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机可控视频生成方法要么依赖文本提示导致控制不精确，要么需要人工标注相机轨迹，限制了自动化应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从视觉-语言模型中迁移空间推理知识，实现精确且自动化的相机轨迹估计与可控视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CT-1模型，基于视觉-语言模块和扩散Transformer，采用频域小波正则化损失学习相机轨迹分布，并将轨迹集成到视频扩散模型中实现空间感知的相机控制。同时构建了包含4700万帧的大规模数据集CT-200K。
contributions: 提出CT-1模型，首次将视觉-语言模型的空间推理能力迁移到相机可控视频生成。
设计小波正则化损失，有效学习复杂相机轨迹分布。
构建大规模数据集CT-200K，包含超过4700万帧，促进模型训练。
analysis.experiments: 在CT-200K数据集上评估，相机控制准确率相比先前方法提升25.7%，生成视频忠实且高质量。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉-语言模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
数据集CT-200K的多样性可能有限，影响复杂场景表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CT-1模型，将视觉-语言模型的空间推理能力迁移到相机可控视频生成，通过小波正则化损失学习相机轨迹，并构建大规模数据集CT-200K，实现精确相机控制。

papers.title: Artificial intelligence can persuade people to take political actions
papers.abstract: There is substantial concern about the ability of advanced artificial intelligence to influence people's behaviour. A rapidly growing body of research has found that AI can produce large persuasive effects on people's attitudes, but whether AI can persuade people to take consequential real-world actions has remained unclear. In two large preregistered experiments N=17,950 responses from 14,779 people), we used conversational AI models to persuade participants on a range of attitudinal and behavioural outcomes, including signing real petitions and donating money to charity. We found sizable AI persuasion effects on these behavioural outcomes (e.g. +19.7 percentage points on petition signing). However, we observed no evidence of a correlation between AI persuasion effects on attitudes and behaviour. Moreover, we replicated prior findings that information provision drove effects on attitudes, but found no such evidence for our behavioural outcomes. In a test of eight behavioural persuasion strategies, all outperformed the most effective attitudinal persuasion strategy, but differences among the eight were small. Taken together, these results suggest that previous findings relying on attitudinal outcomes may generalize poorly to behaviour, and therefore risk substantially mischaracterizing the real-world behavioural impact of AI persuasion.

analysis.tldr: AI能有效说服人们采取政治行动，但态度改变与行为改变之间无显著关联。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI对态度的说服效果，但缺乏对实际行为影响的实证证据，而行为改变才是社会影响的关键。
analysis.problem: AI能否说服人们采取有实际后果的政治行动（如签署请愿书、捐款），以及态度改变与行为改变之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现AI对行为有显著说服效果（如请愿签署率提升19.7个百分点），但态度改变与行为改变之间无相关性；信息提供驱动态度改变，但对行为无效；八种行为说服策略均优于最佳态度策略，但彼此差异小。
analysis.method: 通过两个大规模预注册实验（N=17,950），使用对话式AI模型对参与者进行说服，测量态度和行为结果（包括签署真实请愿书和捐款）。
contributions: 首次提供AI说服对实际行为影响的因果证据
揭示态度改变与行为改变之间的脱节，挑战了基于态度研究推断行为影响的普遍做法
analysis.experiments: 两个大规模预注册实验，共17,950份回复，来自14,779人，测量了签署请愿书和捐款等行为结果。
limitations: 实验环境可能无法完全代表现实世界中的复杂说服场景
未探讨长期行为改变或不同AI模型间的差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI能有效说服人们采取政治行动，但态度改变与行为改变之间无显著关联。

papers.title: Globally Optimal Pose from Orthographic Silhouettes
papers.abstract: We solve the problem of determining the pose of known shapes in $\mathbb{R}^3$ from their unoccluded silhouettes. The pose is determined up to global optimality using a simple yet under-explored property of the area-of-silhouette: its continuity w.r.t trajectories in the rotation space. The proposed method utilises pre-computed silhouette-signatures, modelled as a response surface of the area-of-silhouettes. Querying this silhouette-signature response surface for pose estimation leads to a strong branching of the rotation search space, making resolution-guided candidate search feasible. Additionally, we utilise the aspect ratio of 2D ellipses fitted to projected silhouettes as an auxiliary global shape signature to accelerate the pose search. This combined strategy forms the first method to efficiently estimate globally optimal pose from just the silhouettes, without being guided by correspondences, for any shape, irrespective of its convexity and genus. We validate our method on synthetic and real examples, demonstrating significantly improved accuracy against comparable approaches. Code, data, and supplementary in: https://agnivsen.github.io/pose-from-silhouette/

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用轮廓面积连续性实现全局最优姿态估计的方法，无需对应点，适用于任意形状。
analysis.research_motivation: 从无遮挡轮廓确定已知三维形状的姿态是计算机视觉中的基础问题，现有方法依赖对应点或局部优化，难以保证全局最优性。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从二维轮廓高效且全局最优地估计三维形状的旋转姿态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轮廓面积在旋转空间中具有连续性，可建模为响应曲面，从而支持强分支搜索。
analysis.method: 预计算轮廓签名（轮廓面积响应曲面），结合投影椭圆的长宽比作为辅助全局形状签名，通过分辨率引导的候选搜索实现全局最优姿态估计。
contributions: 首次提出仅从轮廓（无需对应点）实现任意形状（无论凸性）的全局最优姿态估计方法。
利用轮廓面积连续性和椭圆长宽比加速搜索，显著提升精度。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上验证，与可比方法相比精度显著提升。
limitations: 依赖预计算轮廓签名，可能对形状库规模敏感。
未讨论遮挡或部分轮廓的情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种利用轮廓面积连续性实现全局最优姿态估计的方法，无需对应点，适用于任意形状。

papers.title: Vision Transformers for Preoperative CT-Based Prediction of Histopathologic Chemotherapy Response Score in High-Grade Serous Ovarian Carcinoma
papers.abstract: Purpose. High-grade serous ovarian carcinoma (HGSOC) is characterized by pronounced biological and spatial heterogeneity and is frequently diagnosed at an advanced stage. Neoadjuvant chemotherapy (NACT) followed by delayed primary surgery is commonly employed in patients unsuitable for primary cytoreduction. The Chemotherapy Response Score (CRS) is a validated histopathological biomarker of response to NACT, but it is only available postoperatively. In this study, we investigate whether pre-treatment computed tomography (CT) imaging and clinical data can be used to predict CRS as an investigational decision-support adjunct to inform multidisciplinary team (MDT) discussions regarding expected treatment response. Methods. We proposed a 2.5D multimodal deep learning framework that processes lesion-dense omental slices using a pre-trained Vision Transformer encoder and integrates the resulting visual representations with clinical variables through an intermediate fusion module to predict CRS. Results. Our multimodal model, integrating imaging and clinical data, achieved a ROC-AUC of 0.95 alongside 95% accuracy and 80% precision on the internal test cohort (IEO, n=41 patients). On the external test set (OV04, n=70 patients), it achieved a ROC-AUC of 0.68, alongside 67% accuracy and 75% precision. Conclusion. These preliminary results demonstrate the feasibility of transformer-based deep learning for preoperative prediction of CRS in HGSOC using routine clinical data and CT imaging. As an investigational, pre-treatment decision-support tool, this approach may assist MDT discussions by providing early, non-invasive estimates of treatment response.

analysis.tldr: 利用Vision Transformer从术前CT预测高级别浆液性卵巢癌化疗反应评分，内部测试AUC达0.95。
analysis.research_motivation: 化疗反应评分（CRS）是评估NACT疗效的重要术后病理指标，但无法术前获取，导致多学科团队讨论时缺乏早期治疗反应信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用术前CT影像和临床数据非侵入性地预测CRS，以辅助治疗决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出2.5D多模态深度学习框架，使用预训练Vision Transformer编码器处理网膜切片影像，并通过中间融合模块整合临床变量预测CRS。
contributions: 首次将Vision Transformer用于术前CT预测HGSOC的CRS。
构建多模态融合框架，结合影像和临床数据提升预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 内部测试集（n=41）ROC-AUC 0.95，准确率95%，精确率80%；外部测试集（n=70）ROC-AUC 0.68，准确率67%，精确率75%。
limitations: 样本量较小，外部测试集性能下降明显。
仅针对网膜切片，未利用全腹CT信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用Vision Transformer从术前CT预测高级别浆液性卵巢癌化疗反应评分，内部测试AUC达0.95。

papers.title: Camera Artist: A Multi-Agent Framework for Cinematic Language Storytelling Video Generation
papers.abstract: We propose Camera Artist, a multi-agent framework that models a real-world filmmaking workflow to generate narrative videos with explicit cinematic language. While recent multi-agent systems have made substantial progress in automating filmmaking workflows from scripts to videos, they often lack explicit mechanisms to structure narrative progression across adjacent shots and deliberate use of cinematic language, resulting in fragmented storytelling and limited filmic quality. To address this, Camera Artist builds upon established agentic pipelines and introduces a dedicated Cinematography Shot Agent, which integrates recursive storyboard generation to strengthen shot-to-shot narrative continuity and cinematic language injection to produce more expressive, film-oriented shot designs. Extensive quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines in narrative consistency, dynamic expressiveness, and perceived film quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架Camera Artist，通过递归故事板和电影语言注入提升视频生成的叙事连贯性与电影感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动化电影制作系统缺乏显式的叙事结构机制和电影语言运用，导致故事碎片化、电影质量有限。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有连贯叙事和电影语言表达的视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在镜头间叙事连贯性和电影语言运用上存在不足，导致故事碎片化。
analysis.method: 多智能体框架，包含专门的Cinematography Shot Agent，通过递归故事板生成和电影语言注入增强镜头间叙事连贯性和表现力。
contributions: 提出Camera Artist多智能体框架，模拟真实电影制作流程。
引入Cinematography Shot Agent，实现递归故事板生成和电影语言注入。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量脚本输入。
电影语言注入的自动化程度可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架Camera Artist，通过递归故事板和电影语言注入提升视频生成的叙事连贯性与电影感。

papers.title: Continual Distillation of Teachers from Different Domains
papers.abstract: Deep learning models continue to scale, with some requiring more storage than many large-scale datasets. Thus, we introduce a new paradigm: Continual Distillation (CD), where a student learns sequentially from a stream of teacher models without retaining access to earlier teachers. CD faces two challenges: teacher training data is unavailable, and teachers have varying expertise. We show that external unlabeled data enables Unseen Knowledge Transfer (UKT), allowing the student to acquire information from domains not present in the training data, while known to the teacher. We also show that sequential distillation causes Unseen Knowledge Forgetting (UKF) when transferred knowledge is lost after training on later teachers. To better trade off between UKT and UKF, we propose Self External Data Distillation (SE2D), a method that preserves logits on external data to stabilize learning across heterogeneous teachers. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that SE2D reduces UKF and improves cross-domain generalization. The code and implementation for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Nicolas1203/continual_distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出持续蒸馏范式，让模型从多个教师模型序列中学习，并利用外部无标签数据缓解遗忘与知识迁移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型规模持续增长，存储多个教师模型成本高昂，且教师训练数据常不可用，亟需一种能从不同领域教师序列中持续学习的高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问原始训练数据且教师模型来自不同领域的情况下，让学生模型从教师序列中持续蒸馏知识，同时平衡未知知识迁移与遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到两个现象：外部无标签数据可实现未知知识迁移（UKT），即学生能从教师处获取训练数据中不存在的领域知识；但顺序蒸馏会导致未知知识遗忘（UKF），即后续教师训练会覆盖先前学到的知识。
analysis.method: 提出自外部数据蒸馏（SE2D），在外部无标签数据上保存教师logits，作为稳定学习信号，以平衡UKT和UKF。
contributions: 提出持续蒸馏（CD）新范式，学生从教师模型序列中学习，无需访问原始训练数据。
识别并形式化未知知识迁移（UKT）和未知知识遗忘（UKF）两个关键挑战。
提出SE2D方法，利用外部数据上的logits缓解遗忘，提升跨域泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，SE2D减少了未知知识遗忘并提升了跨域泛化。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖外部无标签数据的质量和领域覆盖。
可能无法完全消除遗忘，尤其在教师领域差异极大时。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出持续蒸馏范式，让模型从多个教师模型序列中学习，并利用外部无标签数据缓解遗忘与知识迁移问题。

papers.title: Diagnosing Urban Street Vitality via a Visual-Semantic and Spatiotemporal Framework for Street-Level Economics
papers.abstract: Micro-scale street-level economic assessment is fundamental for precision spatial resource allocation. While Street View Imagery (SVI) advances urban sensing, existing approaches remain semantically superficial and overlook brand hierarchy heterogeneity and structural recession. To address this, we propose a visual-semantic and field-based spatiotemporal framework, operationalized via the Street Economic Vitality Index (SEVI). Our approach integrates physical and semantic streetscape parsing through instance segmentation of signboards, glass interfaces, and storefront closures. A dual-stage VLM-LLM pipeline standardizes signage into global hierarchies to quantify a spatially smoothed brand premium index. To overcome static SVI limitations, we introduce a temporal lag design using Location-Based Services (LBS) data to capture realized demand. Combined with a category-weighted Gaussian spillover model, we construct a three-dimensional diagnostic system covering Commercial Activity, Spatial Utilization, and Physical Environment. Experiments based on time-lagged geographically weighted regression across eight tidal periods in Nanjing reveal quasi-causal spatiotemporal heterogeneity. Street vibrancy arises from interactions between hierarchical brand clustering and mall-induced externalities. High-quality interfaces show peak attraction during midday and evening, while structural recession produces a lagged nighttime repulsion effect. The framework offers evidence-based support for precision spatial governance.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉-语义与时空框架SEVI，通过街景图像与LBS数据诊断街道经济活力，揭示品牌层级与结构衰退的时空异质性。
analysis.research_motivation: 微观尺度街道经济评估对精准空间资源配置至关重要，但现有方法语义浅层、忽略品牌层级异质性和结构衰退。
analysis.problem: 如何整合视觉语义与时空动态，量化街道经济活力并揭示其驱动因素？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 街道活力源于层级品牌聚类与商场外部性的交互；高质量界面在中午和傍晚吸引力峰值，结构衰退产生滞后夜间排斥效应。
analysis.method: 提出SEVI框架：实例分割解析招牌、玻璃界面和店面关闭；双阶段VLM-LLM流水线标准化招牌为全球层级；利用LBS数据设计时间滞后捕捉实际需求；结合类别加权高斯溢出模型构建三维诊断系统（商业活动、空间利用、物理环境）。
contributions: 提出视觉-语义与时空框架SEVI，整合街景图像和LBS数据评估街道经济活力。
揭示品牌层级异质性和结构衰退对街道活力的准因果时空异质性影响。
analysis.experiments: 基于南京八个潮汐时段的时间滞后地理加权回归实验，验证了框架的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定城市数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
VLM-LLM流水线可能引入品牌层级标准化的偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉-语义与时空框架SEVI，通过街景图像与LBS数据诊断街道经济活力，揭示品牌层级与结构衰退的时空异质性。

papers.title: Do LLMs Follow Their Own Rules? A Reflexive Audit of Self-Stated Safety Policies
papers.abstract: LLMs internalize safety policies through RLHF, yet these policies are never formally specified and remain difficult to inspect. Existing benchmarks evaluate models against external standards but do not measure whether models understand and enforce their own stated boundaries. We introduce the Symbolic-Neural Consistency Audit (SNCA), a framework that (1) extracts a model's self-stated safety rules via structured prompts, (2) formalizes them as typed predicates (Absolute, Conditional, Adaptive), and (3) measures behavioral compliance via deterministic comparison against harm benchmarks. Evaluating four frontier models across 45 harm categories and 47,496 observations reveals systematic gaps between stated policy and observed behavior: models claiming absolute refusal frequently comply with harmful prompts, reasoning models achieve the highest self-consistency but fail to articulate policies for 29% of categories, and cross-model agreement on rule types is remarkably low (11%). These results demonstrate that the gap between what LLMs say and what they do is measurable and architecture-dependent, motivating reflexive consistency audits as a complement to behavioral benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出符号-神经一致性审计框架，发现LLM自述安全策略与实际行为存在系统性差距。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM通过RLHF内化安全策略，但这些策略从未被正式指定且难以检查；现有基准仅评估模型对外部标准的遵守，不衡量模型是否理解并执行自身声明的边界。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地审计LLM自述安全策略与实际行为之间的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：声称绝对拒绝的模型经常顺从有害提示；推理模型自一致性最高但29%类别无法阐述策略；跨模型规则类型一致性极低（11%）。
analysis.method: 符号-神经一致性审计（SNCA）框架：通过结构化提示提取模型自述安全规则，形式化为类型谓词（绝对、条件、自适应），并通过确定性比较测量行为合规性。
contributions: 提出SNCA框架，用于审计LLM自述安全策略与行为的一致性。
在4个前沿模型、45个危害类别、47496个观测上揭示系统性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在4个前沿模型、45个危害类别、47496个观测上进行评估，发现自述策略与行为之间的系统性差距。
limitations: 仅针对安全策略，可能不适用于其他类型规则。
依赖结构化提示提取规则，可能遗漏隐含策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出符号-神经一致性审计框架，发现LLM自述安全策略与实际行为存在系统性差距。

papers.title: MixFlow: Mixed Source Distributions Improve Rectified Flows
papers.abstract: Diffusion models and their variations, such as rectified flows, generate diverse and high-quality images, but they are still hindered by slow iterative sampling caused by the highly curved generative paths they learn. An important cause of high curvature, as shown by previous work, is independence between the source distribution (standard Gaussian) and the data distribution. In this work, we tackle this limitation by two complementary contributions. First, we attempt to break away from the standard Gaussian assumption by introducing $κ\texttt{-FC}$, a general formulation that conditions the source distribution on an arbitrary signal $κ$ that aligns it better with the data distribution. Then, we present MixFlow, a simple but effective training strategy that reduces the generative path curvatures and considerably improves sampling efficiency. MixFlow trains a flow model on linear mixtures of a fixed unconditional distribution and a $κ\texttt{-FC}$-based distribution. This simple mixture improves the alignment between the source and data, provides better generation quality with less required sampling steps, and accelerates the training convergence considerably. On average, our training procedure improves the generation quality by 12\% in FID compared to standard rectified flow and 7\% compared to previous baselines under a fixed sampling budget. Code available at: $\href{https://github.com/NazirNayal8/MixFlow}{https://github.com/NazirNayal8/MixFlow}$

analysis.tldr: MixFlow通过混合源分布降低生成路径曲率，显著提升整流流模型的采样效率与生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型和整流流虽能生成高质量图像，但高度弯曲的生成路径导致迭代采样缓慢，而源分布与数据分布之间的独立性是造成高曲率的重要原因。
analysis.problem: 如何通过改进源分布设计来降低生成路径曲率，从而提高整流流模型的采样效率和生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 源分布（标准高斯）与数据分布之间的独立性导致生成路径高度弯曲，这是采样缓慢的主要原因。
analysis.method: 提出κ-FC框架，将源分布条件化于任意信号κ以更好地对齐数据分布；进而提出MixFlow训练策略，在线性混合固定无条件分布和κ-FC分布上训练流模型，以降低曲率并提高采样效率。
contributions: 提出κ-FC，一种通用的源分布条件化框架，可打破标准高斯假设，使源分布与数据分布更对齐。
提出MixFlow，一种简单有效的训练策略，通过混合源分布显著降低生成路径曲率，提升采样效率和生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在固定采样预算下，MixFlow相比标准整流流FID提升12%，相比先前基线提升7%。摘要未提供具体数据集和实验设置细节。
limitations: κ-FC中信号κ的选择可能影响性能，需进一步探索最优设计。
混合比例可能需针对不同任务调整，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MixFlow通过混合源分布降低生成路径曲率，显著提升整流流模型的采样效率与生成质量。

papers.title: Generalization and Scaling Laws for Mixture-of-Experts Transformers
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of generalization and scaling for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) Transformers that cleanly separates \emph{active} per-input capacity from routing combinatorics.
