papers.title: Nested Radially Monotone Polar Occupancy Estimation: Clinically-Grounded Optic Disc and Cup Segmentation for Glaucoma Screening
papers.abstract: Valid segmentation of the optic disc (OD) and optic cup (OC) from fundus photographs is essential for glaucoma screening. Unfortunately, existing deep learning methods do not guarantee clinical validness including star-convexity and nested structure of OD and OC, resulting corruption in diagnostic metric, especially under cross-dataset domain shift. To adress this issue, this paper proposed NPS-Net (Nested Polar Shape Network), the first framework that formulates the OD/OC segmentation as nested radially monotone polar occupancy estimation.This output representation can guarantee the aforementioned clinical validness and achieve high accuracy. Evaluated across seven public datasets, NPS-Net shows strong zero-shot generalization. On RIM-ONE, it maintains 100% anatomical validity and improves Cup Dice by 12.8% absolute over the best baseline, reducing vCDR MAE by over 56%. On PAPILA, it achieves Disc Dice of 0.9438 and Disc HD95 of 2.78 px, an 83% reduction over the best competing method.

analysis.tldr: 提出NPS-Net，通过嵌套径向单调极坐标占用估计保证视盘/视杯分割的临床有效性，在跨数据集零样本泛化中显著提升杯体Dice和vCDR精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习分割方法不保证视盘和视杯的星凸性和嵌套结构等临床有效性，尤其在跨数据集域迁移时导致诊断指标恶化，影响青光眼筛查可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现既满足临床解剖约束（星凸性、嵌套结构）又具有高精度和跨数据集泛化能力的视盘/视杯分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NPS-Net，将OD/OC分割建模为嵌套径向单调极坐标占用估计问题，通过极坐标表示天然保证星凸性和嵌套结构，并设计网络直接预测该表示。
contributions: 首个将OD/OC分割形式化为嵌套径向单调极坐标占用估计的框架，保证临床有效性。
在七个公开数据集上展示强零样本泛化能力，显著提升杯体Dice和vCDR精度。
analysis.experiments: 在RIM-ONE上保持100%解剖有效性，杯体Dice绝对提升12.8%，vCDR MAE降低56%以上；在PAPILA上Disc Dice达0.9438，Disc HD95为2.78 px，较最佳方法降低83%。
limitations: 可能依赖极坐标表示对复杂形状的适应性有限。
未提及对严重病变或低质量图像的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NPS-Net，通过嵌套径向单调极坐标占用估计保证视盘/视杯分割的临床有效性，在跨数据集零样本泛化中显著提升杯体Dice和vCDR精度。

papers.title: Structured Progressive Knowledge Activation for LLM-Driven Neural Architecture Search
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on a key challenge in Neural Architecture Search (NAS): integrating established architectural knowledge while exploring new designs under expensive evaluations. Large language models (LLMs) are a promising assistant for NAS because they can translate rich architectural and coding priors into executable code edits. However, in practice, seemingly local revisions often propagate into non-local behavioral and performance shifts because a single edit can inadvertently couple multiple interacting functional factors, a phenomenon we refer to as functional entanglement. To make LLM knowledge usable under such entanglement, we propose Structured Progressive Knowledge Activation (SPARK), which activates relevant priors by explicitly selecting the functional factor to modify and conditioning the edit on that factor. This factor-conditioned editing reduces entangled side effects and yields more targeted, reliable architecture modifications. On CLRS-DFS, SPARK achieves a 28.1x sample-efficient architecture evolution speedup and yields a 22.9 percent relative improvement in OOD accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化渐进知识激活方法，通过因子条件编辑解决LLM驱动NAS中的功能纠缠问题，显著提升样本效率与泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经架构搜索（NAS）面临昂贵评估与知识整合的挑战，LLM虽能利用架构与编码先验，但局部编辑常引发非局部行为变化（功能纠缠），导致知识难以有效利用。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM在NAS中有效激活相关先验知识，避免编辑时的功能纠缠，实现高效、可靠的架构修改。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM进行局部编辑时，由于单个编辑可能耦合多个交互功能因子，导致非局部的行为与性能偏移，即功能纠缠现象。
analysis.method: 提出结构化渐进知识激活（SPARK），通过显式选择待修改的功能因子，并基于该因子条件化编辑，减少纠缠副作用，实现更精准的架构修改。
contributions: 识别并形式化了LLM驱动NAS中的功能纠缠问题
提出SPARK方法，通过因子条件编辑激活相关先验，提升编辑的针对性与可靠性
analysis.experiments: 在CLRS-DFS任务上，SPARK实现28.1倍样本效率的架构进化加速，并带来22.9%的OOD准确率相对提升。
limitations: 方法可能依赖对功能因子的先验定义，在未知因子场景下适用性待验证
实验仅在单一任务上验证，泛化性需更多基准测试
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化渐进知识激活方法，通过因子条件编辑解决LLM驱动NAS中的功能纠缠问题，显著提升样本效率与泛化性能。

papers.title: Learning Vision-Language-Action World Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently achieved notable progress in end-to-end autonomous driving by integrating perception, reasoning, and control within a unified multimodal framework. However, they often lack explicit modeling of temporal dynamics and global world consistency, which limits their foresight and safety. In contrast, world models can simulate plausible future scenes but generally struggle to reason about or evaluate the imagined future they generate. In this work, we present VLA-World, a simple yet effective VLA world model that unifies predictive imagination with reflective reasoning to improve driving foresight. VLA-World first uses an action-derived feasible trajectory to guide the generation of the next-frame image, capturing rich spatial and temporal cues that describe how the surrounding environment evolves. The model then reasons over this self-generated future imagined frame to refine the predicted trajectory, achieving higher performance and better interpretability. To support this pipeline, we curate nuScenes-GR-20K, a generative reasoning dataset derived from nuScenes, and employ a three-stage training strategy that includes pretraining, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VLA-World consistently surpasses state-of-the-art VLA and world-model baselines on both planning and future-generation benchmarks. Project page: https://vlaworld.github.io

analysis.tldr: VLA-World 将预测想象与反思推理统一，通过自生成未来帧优化驾驶轨迹，在规划与未来生成基准上超越 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 模型缺乏对时间动态和全局世界一致性的显式建模，限制了其预见性和安全性；而世界模型虽能模拟未来场景，但难以对想象结果进行推理和评估。
analysis.problem: 如何将预测性想象与反思性推理统一，使自动驾驶模型具备更好的前瞻能力和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 VLA-World，首先利用动作导出的可行轨迹生成下一帧图像，捕捉时空线索；然后对自生成的未来帧进行推理以优化轨迹；采用三阶段训练（预训练、监督微调、强化学习），并构建 nuScenes-GR-20K 数据集。
contributions: 提出 VLA-World，一种统一预测想象与反思推理的 VLA 世界模型，提升驾驶前瞻性。
构建 nuScenes-GR-20K 生成推理数据集，并设计三阶段训练策略。
在规划与未来生成基准上超越现有 VLA 和世界模型基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 nuScenes 数据集上进行了规划与未来生成任务的实验，结果一致超越 SOTA 基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹生成，对复杂场景的泛化性待验证。
三阶段训练策略计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLA-World 将预测想象与反思推理统一，通过自生成未来帧优化驾驶轨迹，在规划与未来生成基准上超越 SOTA。

papers.title: PDE-regularized Dynamics-informed Diffusion with Uncertainty-aware Filtering for Long-Horizon Dynamics
papers.abstract: Long-horizon spatiotemporal prediction remains a challenging problem due to cumulative errors, noise amplification, and the lack of physical consistency in existing models. While diffusion models provide a probabilistic framework for modeling uncertainty, conventional approaches often rely on mean squared error objectives and fail to capture the underlying dynamics governed by physical laws. In this work, we propose PDYffusion, a dynamics-informed diffusion framework that integrates PDE-based regularization and uncertainty-aware forecasting for stable long-term prediction. The proposed method consists of two key components: a PDE-regularized interpolator and a UKF-based forecaster. The interpolator incorporates a differential operator to enforce physically consistent intermediate states, while the forecaster leverages the Unscented Kalman Filter to explicitly model uncertainty and mitigate error accumulation during iterative prediction. We provide theoretical analyses showing that the proposed interpolator satisfies PDE-constrained smoothness properties, and that the forecaster converges under the proposed loss formulation. Extensive experiments on multiple dynamical datasets demonstrate that PDYffusion achieves superior performance in terms of CRPS and MSE, while maintaining stable uncertainty behavior measured by SSR. We further analyze the inherent trade-off between prediction accuracy and uncertainty, showing that our method provides a balanced and robust solution for long-horizon forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 提出PDYffusion，结合PDE正则化与UKF不确定性滤波的扩散模型，实现长期时空动力学的稳定预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期时空预测面临累积误差、噪声放大和物理不一致性挑战，现有扩散模型依赖MSE损失，无法捕捉物理规律。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种动力学感知的扩散框架，在长期预测中保持物理一致性和不确定性量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出长期预测中误差累积和噪声放大是主要瓶颈，且传统扩散模型缺乏物理约束。
analysis.method: PDYffusion包含两个组件：PDE正则化插值器（强制物理一致中间状态）和UKF预测器（显式建模不确定性并缓解误差累积）。
contributions: 提出动力学感知扩散框架PDYffusion，集成PDE正则化和UKF不确定性滤波。
理论分析证明插值器满足PDE约束平滑性，预测器在给定损失下收敛。
实验在多个动力学数据集上取得CRPS和MSE的优越性能，并保持稳定的不确定性行为。
analysis.experiments: 在多个动力学数据集上评估，使用CRPS、MSE和SSR指标，显示PDYffusion优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定PDE形式，泛化到未知物理系统需调整。
UKF计算复杂度较高，可能限制大规模应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PDYffusion，结合PDE正则化与UKF不确定性滤波的扩散模型，实现长期时空动力学的稳定预测。

papers.title: Tora3: Trajectory-Guided Audio-Video Generation with Physical Coherence
papers.abstract: Audio-video (AV) generation has recently made strong progress in perceptual quality and multimodal coherence, yet generating content with plausible motion-sound relations remains challenging. Existing methods often produce object motions that are visually unstable and sounds that are only loosely aligned with salient motion or contact events, largely because they lack an explicit motion-aware structure shared by video and audio generation. We present Tora3, a trajectory-guided AV generation framework that improves physical coherence by using object trajectories as a shared kinematic prior. Rather than treating trajectories as a video-only control signal, Tora3 uses them to jointly guide visual motion and acoustic events. Specifically, we design a trajectory-aligned motion representation for video, a kinematic-audio alignment module driven by trajectory-derived second-order kinematic states, and a hybrid flow matching scheme that preserves trajectory fidelity in trajectory-conditioned regions while maintaining local coherence elsewhere. We further curate PAV, a large-scale AV dataset emphasizing motion-relevant patterns with automatically extracted motion annotations. Extensive experiments show that Tora3 improves motion realism, motion-sound synchronization, and overall AV generation quality over strong open-source baselines.

analysis.tldr: Tora3 通过轨迹引导实现音视频生成中的物理一致性，提升运动真实感和声画同步。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音视频生成方法缺乏显式的运动感知结构，导致物体运动不稳定、声音与运动/接触事件对齐松散，难以生成具有合理运动-声音关系的物理一致内容。
analysis.problem: 如何利用物体轨迹作为共享运动先验，联合引导视频运动生成和音频事件生成，以提升音视频生成的物理一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法生成的物体运动视觉不稳定，声音仅与显著运动或接触事件粗略对齐，根本原因是缺乏视频和音频生成共享的显式运动感知结构。
analysis.method: 提出 Tora3 框架，包含：轨迹对齐的视频运动表征、基于轨迹二阶运动学状态的声学对齐模块、以及混合流匹配方案（在轨迹条件区域保持轨迹保真度，其他区域维持局部一致性）。同时构建大规模音视频数据集 PAV，包含自动提取的运动标注。
contributions: 提出轨迹引导的音视频生成框架 Tora3，利用物体轨迹作为共享运动先验联合引导视觉运动和声学事件。
设计轨迹对齐的运动表征、运动学-音频对齐模块和混合流匹配方案，提升物理一致性和声画同步。
构建大规模音视频数据集 PAV，强调运动相关模式并包含自动运动标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在强开源基线上展示了运动真实感、运动-声音同步和整体音视频生成质量的提升。
limitations: 可能依赖轨迹标注质量，自动提取的轨迹可能引入噪声。
混合流匹配方案在复杂场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Tora3 通过轨迹引导实现音视频生成中的物理一致性，提升运动真实感和声画同步。

papers.title: Fine-Grained Action Segmentation for Renorrhaphy in Robot-Assisted Partial Nephrectomy
papers.abstract: Fine-grained action segmentation during renorrhaphy in robot-assisted partial nephrectomy requires frame-level recognition of visually similar suturing gestures with variable duration and substantial class imbalance. The SIA-RAPN benchmark defines this problem on 50 clinical videos acquired with the da Vinci Xi system and annotated with 12 frame-level labels. The benchmark compares four temporal models built on I3D features: MS-TCN++, AsFormer, TUT, and DiffAct. Evaluation uses balanced accuracy, edit score, segmental F1 at overlap thresholds of 10, 25, and 50, frame-wise accuracy, and frame-wise mean average precision. In addition to the primary evaluation across five released split configurations on SIA-RAPN, the benchmark reports cross-domain results on a separate single-port RAPN dataset. Across the strongest reported values over those five runs on the primary dataset, DiffAct achieves the highest F1, frame-wise accuracy, edit score, and frame mAP, while MS-TCN++ attains the highest balanced accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 针对机器人辅助肾部分切除术中肾缝合的细粒度动作分割，SIA-RAPN基准比较了四种时序模型，DiffAct在多数指标上最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人辅助手术中肾缝合阶段的细粒度动作分割面临帧级识别视觉相似手势、可变时长和严重类别不平衡的挑战，现有方法缺乏系统比较。
analysis.problem: 在机器人辅助肾部分切除术的肾缝合阶段，实现帧级细粒度动作分割，并处理视觉相似手势、时长变化和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建SIA-RAPN基准，使用I3D特征提取，比较四种时序模型（MS-TCN++、AsFormer、TUT、DiffAct），并在五个数据划分和跨域数据集上评估。
contributions: 提出了SIA-RAPN基准，包含50个临床视频和12个帧级标签，用于机器人辅助肾部分切除术中肾缝合的细粒度动作分割。
系统比较了四种时序模型，发现DiffAct在F1、帧准确率、编辑分数和帧mAP上最优，MS-TCN++在平衡准确率上最优。
analysis.experiments: 在SIA-RAPN基准的五个划分上评估，并报告了跨域结果（单端口RAPN数据集）。指标包括平衡准确率、编辑分数、分段F1（阈值10/25/50）、帧准确率和帧mAP。
limitations: 仅基于I3D特征，未探索其他特征提取方法。
数据集规模有限（50个视频），可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对机器人辅助肾部分切除术中肾缝合的细粒度动作分割，SIA-RAPN基准比较了四种时序模型，DiffAct在多数指标上最优。

papers.title: ADAM: A Systematic Data Extraction Attack on Agent Memory via Adaptive Querying
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have achieved rapid adoption and demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a wide range of applications. To improve reasoning and task execution, modern LLM agents would incorporate memory modules or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mechanisms, enabling them to further leverage prior interactions or external knowledge. However, such a design also introduces a group of critical privacy vulnerabilities: sensitive information stored in memory can be leaked through query-based attacks. Although feasible, existing attacks often achieve only limited performance, with low attack success rates (ASR). In this paper, we propose ADAM, a novel privacy attack that features data distribution estimation of a victim agent's memory and employs an entropy-guided query strategy for maximizing privacy leakage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our attack substantially outperforms state-of-the-art ones, achieving up to 100% ASRs. These results thus underscore the urgent need for robust privacy-preserving methods for current LLM agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADAM攻击方法，通过自适应查询和分布估计高效窃取LLM Agent记忆中的隐私数据。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent广泛使用记忆模块和RAG机制，但现有隐私攻击成功率低，亟需更有效的攻击方法以暴露漏洞并推动防御研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高成功率的查询攻击，从LLM Agent的记忆中系统性地提取敏感信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有攻击成功率低，而ADAM通过估计记忆数据分布和熵引导查询策略显著提升攻击效果。
analysis.method: ADAM：先估计受害者Agent记忆的数据分布，然后采用熵引导的查询策略最大化隐私泄露。
contributions: 提出ADAM攻击方法，结合数据分布估计与熵引导查询，实现高效隐私窃取。
实验证明ADAM在攻击成功率上显著优于现有方法，最高可达100%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM Agent上评估，ADAM攻击成功率最高达100%，优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖对Agent记忆分布的准确估计，实际场景中分布未知时效果可能下降。
未讨论防御措施，仅揭示漏洞。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADAM攻击方法，通过自适应查询和分布估计高效窃取LLM Agent记忆中的隐私数据。

papers.title: Watt Counts: Energy-Aware Benchmark for Sustainable LLM Inference on Heterogeneous GPU Architectures
papers.abstract: While the large energy consumption of Large Language Models (LLMs) is recognized by the community, system operators lack guidance for energy-efficient LLM inference deployments that leverage energy trade-offs of heterogeneous hardware due to a lack of energy-aware benchmarks and data. In this work we address this gap with Watt Counts: the largest open-access dataset of energy consumption of LLMs, with over 5,000 experiments for 50 LLMs across 10 NVIDIA Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) in batch and server scenarios along with a reproducible, open-source benchmark that enables community submissions to expand this dataset. Leveraging this dataset, we conduct a system-level study of LLM inference across heterogeneous GPU architectures and show that GPU selection is crucial for energy efficiency outcomes and that optimal hardware choices vary significantly across models and deployment scenarios, demonstrating the critical importance of hardware-aware deployment in heterogeneous LLM systems. Guided by our data and insights, we show that practitioners can reduce energy consumption by up to 70% in server scenarios with negligible impact on user experience, and by up to 20% in batch scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模LLM能耗数据集和基准，揭示异构GPU选择可节能70%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM能耗巨大，但缺乏能耗感知的基准和数据，导致系统运营商无法利用异构硬件的能耗权衡进行节能部署。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对异构GPU架构的LLM推理能耗基准和数据集，难以指导节能部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPU选择对能效至关重要，最优硬件因模型和部署场景而异，异构系统中硬件感知部署至关重要。
analysis.method: 构建最大开源LLM能耗数据集（5000+实验，50个LLM，10种NVIDIA GPU），提供可复现基准，并基于数据进行分析。
contributions: 发布最大开源LLM能耗数据集和可复现基准
揭示异构GPU架构下硬件选择对能效的关键影响，并提供节能指导（服务器场景节能70%，批处理场景节能20%）
analysis.experiments: 在10种NVIDIA GPU上对50个LLM进行5000+实验，覆盖批处理和服务器场景。
limitations: 仅覆盖NVIDIA GPU，未涉及其他厂商硬件
能耗测量可能受实验环境波动影响
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模LLM能耗数据集和基准，揭示异构GPU选择可节能70%。

papers.title: Text-Conditioned Multi-Expert Regression Framework for Fully Automated Multi-Abutment Design
papers.abstract: Dental implant abutments serve as the geometric and biomechanical interface between the implant fixture and the prosthetic crown, yet their design relies heavily on manual effort and is time-consuming. Although deep neural networks have been proposed to assist dentists in designing abutments, most existing approaches remain largely manual or semi-automated, requiring substantial clinician intervention and lacking scalability in multi-abutment scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose TEMAD, a fully automated, text-conditioned multi-expert architecture for multi-abutment design. This framework integrates implant site localization and implant system, compatible abutment parameter regression into a unified pipeline. Specifically, we introduce an Implant Site Identification Network (ISIN) to automatically localize implant sites and provide this information to the subsequent multi-abutment regression network. We further design a Tooth-Conditioned Feature-wise Linear Modulation (TC-FiLM) module, which adaptively calibrates mesh representations using tooth embeddings to enable position-specific feature modulation. Additionally, a System-Prompted Mixture-of-Experts (SPMoE) mechanism leverages implant system prompts to guide expert selection, ensuring system-aware regression. Extensive experiments on a large-scale abutment design dataset show that TEMAD achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing methods, particularly in multi-abutment settings, validating its effectiveness for fully automated dental implant planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种文本条件多专家回归框架，实现全自动多基台设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 牙科种植基台设计依赖人工，耗时且缺乏可扩展性，现有深度学习方法多为半自动，需要大量临床医生干预。
analysis.problem: 实现全自动、可扩展的多基台设计，包括种植位点定位、系统识别和基台参数回归。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TEMAD框架，包含种植位点识别网络(ISIN)、牙齿条件特征线性调制模块(TC-FiLM)和系统提示混合专家机制(SPMoE)。
contributions: 首次提出全自动文本条件多专家架构用于多基台设计。
设计ISIN、TC-FiLM和SPMoE三个创新模块，实现端到端统一流水线。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模基台设计数据集上，TEMAD相比现有方法达到最先进性能，尤其在多基台场景下。
limitations: 可能依赖特定牙科数据集，泛化性需验证。
未提及计算效率或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种文本条件多专家回归框架，实现全自动多基台设计。

papers.title: Scene-Agnostic Object-Centric Representation Learning for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Recent works on 3D scene understanding leverage 2D masks from visual foundation models (VFMs) to supervise radiance fields, enabling instance-level 3D segmentation. However, the supervision signals from foundation models are not fundamentally object-centric and often require additional mask pre/post-processing or specialized training and loss design to resolve mask identity conflicts across views. The learned identity of the 3D scene is scene-dependent, limiting generalizability across scenes. Therefore, we propose a dataset-level, object-centric supervision scheme to learn object representations in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Building on a pre-trained slot attention-based Global Object Centric Learning (GOCL) module, we learn a scene-agnostic object codebook that provides consistent, identity-anchored representations across views and scenes. By coupling the codebook with the module's unsupervised object masks, we can directly supervise the identity features of 3D Gaussians without additional mask pre-/post-processing or explicit multi-view alignment. The learned scene-agnostic codebook enables object supervision and identification without per-scene fine-tuning or retraining. Our method thus introduces unsupervised object-centric learning (OCL) into 3DGS, yielding more structured representations and better generalization for downstream tasks such as robotic interaction, scene understanding, and cross-scene generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出场景无关的物体中心表征学习，利用预训练槽注意力模块和物体码本直接监督3D高斯溅射的物体特征，无需逐场景微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法依赖视觉基础模型的2D掩码，但监督信号非物体中心化，且需要掩码预处理/后处理或专门训练来解决跨视图掩码身份冲突，学习到的场景身份依赖特定场景，泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何实现场景无关的、物体中心的3D表征学习，使3D高斯溅射能直接利用无监督物体掩码进行监督，无需额外处理或逐场景微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练的槽注意力全局物体中心学习模块，学习场景无关的物体码本，提供跨视图和场景的一致身份锚定表征；将该码本与模块的无监督物体掩码耦合，直接监督3D高斯的身份特征。
contributions: 提出将无监督物体中心学习引入3D高斯溅射，实现场景无关的物体表征学习。
设计场景无关的物体码本，无需逐场景微调即可进行物体监督和识别。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练槽注意力模块的质量，若模块在复杂场景下掩码不准确，会影响码本学习。
场景无关性可能限制对高度动态或罕见物体类别的表征能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出场景无关的物体中心表征学习，利用预训练槽注意力模块和物体码本直接监督3D高斯溅射的物体特征，无需逐场景微调。

papers.title: U-Cast: A Surprisingly Simple and Efficient Frontier Probabilistic AI Weather Forecaster
papers.abstract: AI-based weather forecasting now rivals traditional physics-based ensembles, but state-of-the-art (SOTA) models rely on specialized architectures and massive computational budgets, creating a high barrier to entry. We demonstrate that such complexity is unnecessary for frontier performance. We introduce U-Cast, a probabilistic forecaster built on a standard U-Net backbone trained with a simple recipe: deterministic pre-training on Mean Absolute Error followed by short probabilistic fine-tuning on the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) using Monte Carlo Dropout for stochasticity. As a result, our model matches or exceeds the probabilistic skill of GenCast and IFS ENS at 1.5$^\circ\$ resolution while reducing training compute by over 10$\times$ compared to leading CRPS-based models and inference latency by over 10$\times$ compared to diffusion-based models. U-Cast trains in under 12 H200 GPU-days and generates a 60-step ensemble forecast in 11 seconds. These results suggest that scalable, general-purpose architectures paired with efficient training curricula can match complex domain-specific designs at a fraction of the cost, opening the training of frontier probabilistic weather models to the broader community. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Rose-STL-Lab/u-cast.

analysis.tldr: U-Cast 用标准 U-Net 加简单训练策略，以十分之一计算成本达到前沿概率天气预报水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 天气预报模型依赖专用架构和巨大计算预算，门槛高，阻碍社区参与。
analysis.problem: 如何用简单通用架构和高效训练方法实现与复杂专用模型相当的概率天气预报性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于标准 U-Net 骨干，先进行 MAE 确定性预训练，再使用 CRPS 损失和 Monte Carlo Dropout 进行短时间概率微调。
contributions: 提出 U-Cast，一个简单高效的概率天气预报模型，训练计算量降低超 10 倍，推理延迟降低超 10 倍。
证明通用架构配合高效训练策略可匹配复杂领域专用模型的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 1.5° 分辨率下，U-Cast 匹配或超过 GenCast 和 IFS ENS 的概率技能；训练少于 12 H200 GPU 天，60 步集合预报仅需 11 秒。
limitations: 可能仅在特定分辨率下验证，更高分辨率性能未知。
Monte Carlo Dropout 的不确定性估计可能不如专用概率模型灵活。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: U-Cast 用标准 U-Net 加简单训练策略，以十分之一计算成本达到前沿概率天气预报水平。

papers.title: Towards Lifelong Aerial Autonomy: Geometric Memory Management for Continual Visual Place Recognition in Dynamic Environments
papers.abstract: Robust geo-localization in changing environmental conditions is critical for long-term aerial autonomy. While visual place recognition (VPR) models perform well when airborne views match the training domain, adapting them to shifting distributions during sequential missions triggers catastrophic forgetting. Existing continual learning (CL) methods often fail here because geographic features exhibit severe intra-class variations. In this work, we formulate aerial VPR as a mission-based domain-incremental learning (DIL) problem and propose a novel heterogeneous memory framework. To respect strict onboard storage constraints, our "Learn-and-Dispose" pipeline decouples geographic knowledge into static satellite anchors (preserving global geometric priors) and a dynamic experience replay buffer (retaining domain-specific features). We introduce a spatially-constrained allocation strategy that optimizes buffer selection based on sample difficulty or feature space diversity. To facilitate systematic assessment, we provide three evaluation criteria and a comprehensive benchmark derived from 21 diverse mission sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our architecture significantly boosts spatial generalization; our diversity-driven buffer selection outperforms the random baseline by 7.8% in knowledge retention. Unlike class-mean preservation methods that fail in unstructured environments, maximizing structural diversity achieves a superior plasticity-stability balance and ensures order-agnostic robustness across randomized sequences. These results prove that maintaining structural feature coverage is more critical than sample difficulty for resolving catastrophic forgetting in lifelong aerial autonomy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向无人机终身视觉定位的几何记忆管理框架，通过解耦静态与动态记忆缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机长期自主飞行需要鲁棒的视觉定位，但环境变化导致模型分布偏移，现有持续学习方法因地理特征类内差异大而失效。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机视觉定位在连续任务中因分布偏移导致的灾难性遗忘问题，同时满足严格的机载存储约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 地理特征存在严重类内变异，传统类均值保留方法在非结构化环境中失效，最大化结构多样性比样本难度更能平衡可塑性与稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出异构记忆框架，将地理知识解耦为静态卫星锚点（保留全局几何先验）和动态经验回放缓冲区（保留域特定特征），并采用空间约束的分配策略基于样本难度或特征多样性优化缓冲区选择。
contributions: 将无人机视觉定位形式化为基于任务的域增量学习问题，并提出新的异构记忆框架。
引入空间约束的缓冲区分配策略，支持基于样本难度或特征多样性的选择。
提供三个评估标准和包含21个任务序列的综合基准。
analysis.experiments: 在21个多样化任务序列上评估，多样性驱动的缓冲区选择在知识保留上比随机基线提升7.8%，且顺序无关鲁棒性优于类均值保留方法。
limitations: 可能依赖卫星锚点的先验质量，在无卫星图像场景下受限。
仅针对视觉定位任务，泛化到其他持续学习场景需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向无人机终身视觉定位的几何记忆管理框架，通过解耦静态与动态记忆缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: SiMing-Bench: Evaluating Procedural Correctness from Continuous Interactions in Clinical Skill Videos
papers.abstract: Current video benchmarks for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) focus on event recognition, temporal ordering, and long-context recall, but overlook a harder capability required for expert procedural judgment: tracking how ongoing interactions update the procedural state and thereby determine the correctness of later actions. We introduce SiMing-Bench, the first benchmark for evaluating this capability from full-length clinical skill videos. It targets rubric-grounded process-level judgment of whether interaction-driven state updates preserve procedural correctness across an entire workflow. SiMing-Bench is instantiated with SiMing-Score, a physician-annotated dataset of real clinical skill examination videos spanning cardiopulmonary resuscitation, automated external defibrillator operation, and bag-mask ventilation, each paired with a standardized step-wise rubric and dual-expert labels. Across diverse open- and closed-source MLLMs, we observe consistently weak agreement with physician judgments. Moreover, weak performance on rubric-defined intermediate steps persists even when overall procedure-level correlation appears acceptable, suggesting that coarse global assessment substantially overestimates current models' procedural judgment ability. Additional analyses with binary step judgment and step-aligned clips indicate that the bottleneck is not merely fine-grained scoring or temporal localization, but modeling how continuous interactions update procedural state over time.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估MLLM在临床技能视频中跟踪交互状态更新以判断过程正确性的基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频基准仅关注事件识别、时序和长上下文回忆，缺乏对专家级过程判断所需的核心能力——跟踪持续交互如何更新过程状态并决定后续动作正确性——的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在完整临床技能视频中，基于交互驱动的状态更新判断过程正确性的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLMs与医生判断的一致性普遍较弱；即使整体过程相关性可接受，在规则定义的中间步骤上表现仍差，表明粗粒度全局评估高估了模型的过程判断能力；瓶颈不在于细粒度评分或时间定位，而在于建模连续交互如何随时间更新过程状态。
analysis.method: 构建SiMing-Bench基准，包含SiMing-Score数据集（真实临床技能考试视频，含心肺复苏、AED操作、面罩通气，配标准化步骤规则和双专家标注），并设计基于规则的过程级正确性评估任务。
contributions: 首次提出评估MLLMs在临床技能视频中跟踪交互状态更新以判断过程正确性的基准。
构建了带专家标注的SiMing-Score数据集，覆盖多种临床技能。
通过实验揭示当前MLLMs在过程判断上的瓶颈，并证明粗粒度评估的误导性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种开源和闭源MLLMs上评估，观察与医生判断的一致性弱；分析二元步骤判断和步骤对齐片段，表明瓶颈在于状态更新建模。
limitations: 数据集仅包含三种临床技能，泛化性有限。
未提供具体数值结果，仅定性描述。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估MLLM在临床技能视频中跟踪交互状态更新以判断过程正确性的基准。

papers.title: Advantage-Guided Diffusion for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) with autoregressive world models suffers from compounding errors, whereas diffusion world models mitigate this by generating trajectory segments jointly. However, existing diffusion guides are either policy-only, discarding value information, or reward-based, which becomes myopic when the diffusion horizon is short. We introduce Advantage-Guided Diffusion for MBRL (AGD-MBRL), which steers the reverse diffusion process using the agent's advantage estimates so that sampling concentrates on trajectories expected to yield higher long-term return beyond the generated window. We develop two guides: (i) Sigmoid Advantage Guidance (SAG) and (ii) Exponential Advantage Guidance (EAG). We prove that a diffusion model guided through SAG or EAG allows us to perform reweighted sampling of trajectories with weights increasing in state-action advantage-implying policy improvement under standard assumptions. Additionally, we show that the trajectories generated from AGD-MBRL follow an improved policy (that is, with higher value) compared to an unguided diffusion model. AGD integrates seamlessly with PolyGRAD-style architectures by guiding the state components while leaving action generation policy-conditioned, and requires no change to the diffusion training objective. On MuJoCo control tasks (HalfCheetah, Hopper, Walker2D and Reacher), AGD-MBRL improves sample efficiency and final return over PolyGRAD, an online Diffuser-style reward guide, and model-free baselines (PPO/TRPO), in some cases by a margin of 2x. These results show that advantage-aware guidance is a simple, effective remedy for short-horizon myopia in diffusion-model MBRL.

analysis.tldr: 提出优势引导扩散用于模型强化学习，通过优势估计引导扩散过程生成高回报轨迹，提升样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于自回归世界模型的MBRL存在累积误差，扩散世界模型虽能联合生成轨迹片段，但现有引导方法要么仅使用策略信息忽略价值，要么基于奖励导致短视。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型在MBRL中因引导方式短视（仅用奖励或策略）而无法在有限生成窗口内关注长期回报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出优势引导扩散（AGD-MBRL），利用智能体的优势估计引导反向扩散过程，包括Sigmoid优势引导（SAG）和指数优势引导（EAG），并证明其实现策略改进。
contributions: 提出两种优势引导机制（SAG和EAG），理论证明其能实现重加权轨迹采样并保证策略改进。
在MuJoCo任务上验证AGD-MBRL相比PolyGRAD、在线Diffuser风格奖励引导及无模型基线显著提升样本效率和最终回报。
analysis.experiments: 在MuJoCo控制任务（HalfCheetah, Hopper, Walker2D, Reacher）上评估，AGD-MBRL相比PolyGRAD、在线Diffuser风格奖励引导及PPO/TRPO等基线提升样本效率和最终回报，部分任务提升达2倍。
limitations: 仅在MuJoCo连续控制任务上验证，未涉及更复杂环境。
优势估计的准确性可能影响引导效果，未讨论估计误差的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出优势引导扩散用于模型强化学习，通过优势估计引导扩散过程生成高回报轨迹，提升样本效率。

papers.title: PriHA: A RAG-Enhanced LLM Framework for Primary Healthcare Assistant in Hong Kong
papers.abstract: To address the unsustainable rise in public health expenditures, the Hong Kong SAR Government is shifting its strategic focus to primary healthcare and encouraging citizens to use community resources to self-manage their health. However, official clinical guidelines are fragmented across disparate departments and formats, creating significant access barriers. While general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and DeepSeek offer potential solutions for information accessibility, they are prone to generating factually inaccurate content due to a lack of localized and domain-specific knowledge. To this end, we propose a Retrieval-Augmented Generation-Enhanced LLM system as Primary Healthcare Assistant (PriHA) in Hong Kong. Specifically, a tri-stage pipeline is proposed that leverages a query optimizer to generalize user intent-oriented sub-queries, followed by a novel Dual Retrieval Augmented Generation (DRAG) architecture for mixed-source retrieval and context-reorganized generation. Comprehensive experiments and a detailed case study demonstrate that our proposed method can outperform both ablations and baseline in terms of accuracy and clarity. Our research provides a reliable and traceable dialogue retrieval framework for exploring other high-risk, localized application scenarios.

analysis.tldr: PriHA 是一个基于 RAG 的 LLM 框架，专为香港基层医疗设计，通过三阶段流水线和双检索增强生成提升回答准确性与清晰度。
analysis.research_motivation: 香港公共卫生支出不可持续增长，政府转向基层医疗，但官方临床指南分散且格式不一，通用 LLM 因缺乏本地化知识易产生事实错误。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可靠、可追溯的对话检索框架，为香港基层医疗提供准确、清晰的健康信息辅助。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用 LLM 在缺乏本地化领域知识时容易生成不准确内容；官方指南碎片化导致访问障碍。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段流水线：查询优化器将用户意图泛化为子查询，然后通过双检索增强生成（DRAG）架构进行混合源检索和上下文重组生成。
contributions: 提出 PriHA 框架，结合查询优化和双检索增强生成，提升本地化医疗问答的准确性和清晰度。
通过实验和案例研究验证了方法优于消融和基线模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到综合实验和详细案例研究，表明方法在准确性和清晰度上优于消融和基线，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅针对香港本地化场景，泛化性未验证。
未提及对多语言或复杂医疗问题的处理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PriHA 是一个基于 RAG 的 LLM 框架，专为香港基层医疗设计，通过三阶段流水线和双检索增强生成提升回答准确性与清晰度。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 The 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) Challenge: Multi-Exposure Image Fusion in Dynamic Scenes (Track 2)
papers.abstract: This paper presents NTIRE 2026, the 3rd Restore Any Image Model (RAIM) challenge on multi-exposure image fusion in dynamic scenes. We introduce a benchmark that targets a practical yet difficult HDR imaging setting, where exposure bracketing must be fused under scene motion, illumination variation, and handheld camera jitter. The challenge data contains 100 training sequences with 7 exposure levels and 100 test sequences with 5 exposure levels, reflecting real-world scenarios that frequently cause misalignment and ghosting artefacts. We evaluate submissions with a leaderboard score derived from PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS, while also considering perceptual quality, efficiency, and reproducibility during the final review. This track attracted 114 participating teams and received 987 submissions. The winning methods significantly improved the ability to remove artifacts from multi-exposure fusion and recover fine details. The dataset and the code of each team can be found at the repository: https://github.com/qulishen/RAIM-HDR.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026 挑战赛提出动态场景多曝光图像融合基准，吸引114支队伍参赛，获胜方法显著提升去伪影和细节恢复能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多曝光图像融合在动态场景中面临运动、光照变化和手持抖动导致的错位和鬼影问题，现有方法难以兼顾高动态范围成像质量与实时性，亟需标准化基准和高效解决方案。
analysis.problem: 动态场景下多曝光图像融合中的错位和鬼影伪影去除问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含100个训练序列（7曝光级）和100个测试序列（5曝光级）的基准数据集，采用PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS及感知质量、效率、可复现性综合评分排名。
contributions: 发布了动态场景多曝光图像融合的标准化基准数据集和挑战赛结果。
获胜方法显著提升了去伪影和细节恢复能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及挑战赛吸引了114支队伍、987份提交，获胜方法表现优异。
limitations: 基准数据规模有限（100训练/100测试序列），可能无法覆盖所有动态场景。
评分指标侧重图像质量，未明确评估计算效率或内存占用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026 挑战赛提出动态场景多曝光图像融合基准，吸引114支队伍参赛，获胜方法显著提升去伪影和细节恢复能力。

papers.title: CONDESION-BENCH: Conditional Decision-Making of Large Language Models in Compositional Action Space
papers.abstract: Large language models have been widely explored as decision-support tools in high-stakes domains due to their contextual understanding and reasoning capabilities. However, existing decision-making benchmarks rely on two simplifying assumptions: actions are selected from a finite set of pre-defined candidates, and explicit conditions restricting action feasibility are not incorporated into the decision-making process. These assumptions fail to capture the compositional structure of real-world actions and the explicit conditions that constrain their validity. To address these limitations, we introduce CONDESION-BENCH, a benchmark designed to evaluate conditional decision-making in compositional action space. In CONDESION-BENCH, actions are defined as allocations to decision variables and are restricted by explicit conditions at the variable, contextual, and allocation levels. By employing oracle-based evaluation of both decision quality and condition adherence, we provide a more rigorous assessment of LLMs as decision-support tools.

analysis.tldr: 提出CONDESION-BENCH基准，评估LLM在组合动作空间中的条件决策能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有决策基准假设动作来自有限预定义候选集，且未考虑显式条件约束，无法反映真实世界动作的组合结构和条件限制。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LLM在组合动作空间中遵循显式条件进行决策的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建CONDESION-BENCH基准，动作定义为对决策变量的分配，受变量、上下文和分配级别的显式条件约束，采用基于oracle的评估方法衡量决策质量和条件遵循度。
contributions: 提出首个评估LLM在组合动作空间中进行条件决策的基准CONDESION-BENCH。
引入基于oracle的评估方法，同时衡量决策质量和条件遵循度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实世界条件类型。
oracle评估可能无法完全反映实际应用中的不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CONDESION-BENCH基准，评估LLM在组合动作空间中的条件决策能力。

papers.title: Skill-Conditioned Visual Geolocation for Vision-Language
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown a promising ability in image geolocation, but they still lack structured geographic reasoning and the capacity for autonomous self-evolution. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit parametric memory, which often exploits outdated knowledge and generates hallucinated reasoning. Furthermore, current inference is a "one-off" process, lacking the feedback loops necessary for self-evolution based on reasoning outcomes. To address these issues, we propose GeoSkill, a training-free framework based on an evolving Skill-Graph. We first initialize the graph by refining human expert trajectories into atomic, natural-language skills. For execution, GeoSkill employs an inference model to perform direct reasoning guided by the current Skill-Graph. For continuous growth, an Autonomous Evolution mechanism leverages a larger model to conduct multiple reasoning rollouts on image-coordinate pairs sourced from web-scale data and verified real-world reasoning. By analyzing both successful and failed trajectories from these rollouts, the mechanism iteratively synthesizes and prunes skills, effectively expanding the Skill-Graph and correcting geographic biases without any parameter updates. Experiments demonstrate that GeoSkill achieves promising performance in both geolocation accuracy and reasoning faithfulness on GeoRC, while maintaining superior generalization across diverse external datasets. Furthermore, our autonomous evolution fosters the emergence of novel, verifiable skills, significantly enhancing the system's cognition of real-world geographic knowledge beyond isolated case studies.

analysis.tldr: GeoSkill 通过可演化的技能图实现无需训练的视觉地理定位，提升推理准确性与自主进化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 在地理定位中依赖隐式参数记忆，导致知识过时、推理幻觉且缺乏自我进化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需参数更新的结构化地理推理与自主进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在知识过时、推理幻觉以及一次性推理缺乏反馈循环的问题。
analysis.method: 提出 GeoSkill，基于可演化的技能图（Skill-Graph），通过初始化专家轨迹、推理模型直接推理、以及利用大模型进行多轮推理回滚并分析成功/失败轨迹来迭代合成和剪枝技能，实现无参数更新的自主进化。
contributions: 提出 GeoSkill，一种无需训练的视觉地理定位框架，结合技能图与自主进化机制。
在 GeoRC 上实现高地理定位准确率和推理忠实度，并在多个外部数据集上展现良好泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在 GeoRC 数据集上评估地理定位准确率和推理忠实度，并在多个外部数据集上测试泛化性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖大模型进行推理回滚，可能带来计算开销。
技能图的初始构建需要人工专家轨迹，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoSkill 通过可演化的技能图实现无需训练的视觉地理定位，提升推理准确性与自主进化能力。

papers.title: Leave My Images Alone: Preventing Multi-Modal Large Language Models from Analyzing Images via Visual Prompt Injection
papers.abstract: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for analyzing Internet-scale image data, offering significant benefits but also raising critical safety and societal concerns. In particular, open-weight MLLMs may be misused to extract sensitive information from personal images at scale, such as identities, locations, or other private details. In this work, we propose ImageProtector, a user-side method that proactively protects images before sharing by embedding a carefully crafted, nearly imperceptible perturbation that acts as a visual prompt injection attack on MLLMs. As a result, when an adversary analyzes a protected image with an MLLM, the MLLM is consistently induced to generate a refusal response such as "I'm sorry, I can't help with that request." We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of ImageProtector across six MLLMs and four datasets. Additionally, we evaluate three potential countermeasures, Gaussian noise, DiffPure, and adversarial training, and show that while they partially mitigate the impact of ImageProtector, they simultaneously degrade model accuracy and/or efficiency. Our study focuses on the practically important setting of open-weight MLLMs and large-scale automated image analysis, and highlights both the promise and the limitations of perturbation-based privacy protection.

analysis.tldr: 提出ImageProtector，通过视觉提示注入在图像中添加微小扰动，使MLLM在分析时拒绝响应，从而保护图像隐私。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLM）可能被滥用于大规模提取个人图像中的敏感信息（如身份、位置等），现有隐私保护方法不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响图像正常使用的前提下，防止MLLM从图像中提取隐私信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ImageProtector：在图像上嵌入精心设计的、几乎不可察觉的扰动，作为视觉提示注入攻击，使MLLM在分析时一致生成拒绝响应（如“I'm sorry, I can't help with that request.”）。
contributions: 提出一种用户端的图像隐私保护方法ImageProtector，通过视觉提示注入防止MLLM分析图像。
在六个MLLM和四个数据集上验证了有效性，并评估了三种潜在反制措施的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个MLLM和四个数据集上评估ImageProtector的有效性，并测试了Gaussian noise、DiffPure和adversarial training三种反制措施。
limitations: 反制措施（如高斯噪声、DiffPure、对抗训练）可部分削弱保护效果。
扰动可能影响图像质量或下游任务性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ImageProtector，通过视觉提示注入在图像中添加微小扰动，使MLLM在分析时拒绝响应，从而保护图像隐私。

papers.title: CAD 100K: A Comprehensive Multi-Task Dataset for Car Related Visual Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Multi-task visual anomaly detection is critical for car-related manufacturing quality assessment. However, existing methods remain task-specific, hindered by the absence of a unified benchmark for multi-task evaluation. To fill in this gap, We present the CAD Dataset, a large-scale and comprehensive benchmark designed for car-related multi-task visual anomaly detection. The dataset contains over 100 images crossing 7 vehicle domains and 3 tasks, providing models a comprehensive view for car-related anomaly detection. It is the first car-related anomaly dataset specialized for multi-task learning(MTL), while combining synthesis data augmentation for few-shot anomaly images. We implement a multi-task baseline and conduct extensive empirical studies. Results show MTL promotes task interaction and knowledge transfer, while also exposing challenging conflicts between tasks. The CAD dataset serves as a standardized platform to drive future advances in car-related multi-task visual anomaly detection.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向汽车多任务视觉异常检测的大规模基准数据集CAD 100K，支持7个车辆域和3个任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有汽车异常检测方法多为任务特定，缺乏统一的多任务评估基准，阻碍了模型泛化与知识迁移。
analysis.problem: 构建一个大规模、多任务、多领域的汽车视觉异常检测基准数据集，以支持统一评估和推动多任务学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多任务学习能促进任务交互和知识迁移，但也暴露了任务间的冲突。
analysis.method: 收集超过100K张图像，覆盖7个车辆域和3个异常检测任务，并采用合成数据增强处理少样本异常图像。
contributions: 首个面向汽车多任务视觉异常检测的大规模基准数据集CAD 100K
提供了多任务基线模型和实证研究，揭示了任务交互与冲突
analysis.experiments: 在多任务基线上进行广泛实证研究，结果表明多任务学习促进知识迁移但存在任务冲突。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖7个车辆域，可能无法完全代表真实工业场景的多样性
合成数据增强的保真度可能影响模型在真实异常上的泛化
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向汽车多任务视觉异常检测的大规模基准数据集CAD 100K，支持7个车辆域和3个任务。

papers.title: BlendFusion -- Scalable Synthetic Data Generation for Diffusion Model Training
papers.abstract: With the rapid adoption of diffusion models, synthetic data generation has emerged as a promising approach for addressing the growing demand for large-scale image datasets. However, images generated purely by diffusion models often exhibit visual inconsistencies, and training models on such data can create an autophagous feedback loop that leads to model collapse, commonly referred to as Model Autophagy Disorder (MAD). To address these challenges, we propose BlendFusion, a scalable framework for synthetic data generation from 3D scenes using path tracing. Our pipeline incorporates an object-centric camera placement strategy, robust filtering mechanisms, and automatic captioning to produce high-quality image-caption pairs. Using this pipeline, we curate FineBLEND, an image-caption dataset constructed from a diverse set of 3D scenes. We empirically analyze the quality of FineBLEND and compare it to several widely used image-caption datasets. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of our object-centric camera placement strategy relative to object-agnostic sampling approaches. Our open-source framework is designed for high configurability, enabling the community to create their own datasets from 3D scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出 BlendFusion 框架，通过 3D 场景路径追踪生成高质量合成图像-文本对，用于扩散模型训练，避免模型崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型训练对大规模图像数据集需求日益增长，但纯合成图像存在视觉不一致性，且训练模型时可能陷入自噬反馈循环导致模型崩溃（MAD），亟需高质量、可扩展的合成数据生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何生成视觉一致、高质量且可扩展的合成图像-文本对，以支持扩散模型训练并避免模型自噬障碍（MAD）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出纯扩散模型生成的图像存在视觉不一致性，且训练模型时可能引发自噬反馈循环导致模型崩溃（MAD）。
analysis.method: 提出 BlendFusion 框架，基于 3D 场景路径追踪，包含以物体为中心的相机放置策略、鲁棒过滤机制和自动字幕生成，用于生成高质量图像-文本对；并构建 FineBLEND 数据集。
contributions: 提出 BlendFusion，一个可扩展的合成数据生成框架，利用 3D 场景路径追踪生成高质量图像-文本对。
构建 FineBLEND 数据集，并实证分析其质量，与多个广泛使用的图像-文本数据集进行比较。
验证以物体为中心的相机放置策略相对于物体无关采样方法的有效性。
开源高可配置框架，支持社区从 3D 场景创建自定义数据集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对 FineBLEND 数据集进行质量分析并与多个数据集比较，以及验证相机放置策略的有效性。
limitations: 依赖 3D 场景资源，可能限制数据多样性和规模。
未在真实下游扩散模型训练任务中验证 FineBLEND 的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 BlendFusion 框架，通过 3D 场景路径追踪生成高质量合成图像-文本对，用于扩散模型训练，避免模型崩溃。

papers.title: Noise-Aware In-Context Learning for Hallucination Mitigation in ALLMs
papers.abstract: Auditory large language models (ALLMs) have demonstrated strong general capabilities in audio understanding and reasoning tasks. However, their reliability is still undermined by hallucination issues. Existing hallucination evaluation methods are formulated as binary classification tasks, which are insufficient to characterize the more complex hallucination patterns that arise in generative tasks. Moreover, current hallucination mitigation strategies rely on fine-tuning, resulting in high computational costs. To address the above limitations, we propose a plug-and-play Noise-Aware In-Context Learning (NAICL) method. Specifically, we construct a noise prior library, retrieve noise examples relevant to the input audio, and incorporate them as contextual priors, thereby guiding the model to reduce speculative associations when acoustic evidence is insufficient and to adopt a more conservative generation strategy. In addition, we establish a hallucination benchmark for audio caption tasks including the construction of the Clotho-1K multi-event benchmark dataset, the definition of four types of auditory hallucinations, and the introduction of metrics such as hallucination type distribution to support fine-grained analysis. Experimental results show that all evaluated ALLMs exhibit same hallucination behaviors. Moreover, the proposed NAICL method reduces the overall hallucination rate from 26.53% to 16.98%.

analysis.tldr: 提出噪声感知上下文学习（NAICL）方法，通过构建噪声先验库和检索相关噪声示例作为上下文先验，有效缓解听觉大语言模型（ALLM）的幻觉问题，无需微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 听觉大语言模型在音频理解任务中表现优异，但幻觉问题严重影响其可靠性。现有幻觉评估方法仅作为二分类任务，无法刻画生成任务中更复杂的幻觉模式；且现有缓解策略依赖微调，计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调的前提下，有效缓解听觉大语言模型在生成任务中的幻觉问题，并建立更细粒度的幻觉评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有评估的ALLM均表现出相同的幻觉行为，表明幻觉是模型共性问题；通过引入噪声先验可引导模型在声学证据不足时减少推测性关联，采用更保守的生成策略。
analysis.method: 提出即插即用的噪声感知上下文学习（NAICL）方法：构建噪声先验库，检索与输入音频相关的噪声示例作为上下文先验，指导模型在声学证据不足时减少推测性关联，采用更保守的生成策略。同时构建Clotho-1K多事件基准数据集，定义四种听觉幻觉类型，引入幻觉类型分布等指标。
contributions: 提出NAICL方法，无需微调即可缓解ALLM的幻觉问题，将整体幻觉率从26.53%降至16.98%。
建立音频字幕任务的幻觉基准，包括Clotho-1K多事件数据集、四种幻觉类型定义及细粒度评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在音频字幕任务上评估多个ALLM，所有模型均表现出相同幻觉行为；NAICL方法将整体幻觉率从26.53%降至16.98%。
limitations: 方法依赖噪声先验库的构建质量，可能影响泛化性。
仅针对音频字幕任务验证，其他音频生成任务效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出噪声感知上下文学习（NAICL）方法，通过构建噪声先验库和检索相关噪声示例作为上下文先验，有效缓解听觉大语言模型（ALLM）的幻觉问题，无需微调。

papers.title: CONSCIENTIA: Can LLM Agents Learn to Strategize? Emergent Deception and Trust in a Multi-Agent NYC Simulation
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents, understanding how strategic behavior emerges in multi-agent environments has become an important alignment challenge. We take a neutral empirical stance and construct a controlled environment in which strategic behavior can be directly observed and measured. We introduce a large-scale multi-agent simulation in a simplified model of New York City, where LLM-driven agents interact under opposing incentives. Blue agents aim to reach their destinations efficiently, while Red agents attempt to divert them toward billboard-heavy routes using persuasive language to maximize advertising revenue. Hidden identities make navigation socially mediated, forcing agents to decide when to trust or deceive. We study policy learning through an iterative simulation pipeline that updates agent policies across repeated interaction rounds using Kahneman-Tversky Optimization (KTO). Blue agents are optimized to reduce billboard exposure while preserving navigation efficiency, whereas Red agents adapt to exploit remaining weaknesses. Across iterations, the best Blue policy improves task success from 46.0% to 57.3%, although susceptibility remains high at 70.7%. Later policies exhibit stronger selective cooperation while preserving trajectory efficiency. However, a persistent safety-helpfulness trade-off remains: policies that better resist adversarial steering do not simultaneously maximize task completion. Overall, our results show that LLM agents can exhibit limited strategic behavior, including selective trust and deception, while remaining highly vulnerable to adversarial persuasion.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体在多智能体纽约模拟中展现出有限的策略行为，包括选择性信任和欺骗，但仍易受对抗性说服影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM作为自主智能体部署，理解多智能体环境中策略行为的涌现成为重要的对齐挑战，现有研究缺乏可控的实证观察。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM驱动智能体在隐藏身份、对立激励的多智能体环境中如何学习策略行为（信任与欺骗）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 最优策略将任务成功率从46.0%提升至57.3%，但易感性仍高达70.7%；2) 后期策略表现出更强的选择性合作；3) 存在安全-帮助性权衡：更好抵抗对抗引导的策略未同时最大化任务完成。
analysis.method: 构建大规模多智能体纽约模拟，蓝方智能体高效到达目的地，红方智能体用说服性语言引导蓝方至广告路线；通过Kahneman-Tversky优化（KTO）迭代更新策略。
contributions: 构建了可观察和测量策略行为的多智能体模拟环境
实证发现LLM智能体可展现有限策略行为（选择性信任与欺骗）但易受对抗性说服
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及策略迭代后的成功率变化。
limitations: 模拟环境简化，可能不反映真实世界复杂性
仅测试了特定激励设置，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体在多智能体纽约模拟中展现出有限的策略行为，包括选择性信任和欺骗，但仍易受对抗性说服影响。

papers.title: Regime-Conditional Retrieval: Theory and a Transferable Router for Two-Hop QA
papers.abstract: Two-hop QA retrieval splits queries into two regimes determined by whether the hop-2 entity is explicitly named in the question (Q-dominant) or only in the bridge passage (B-dominant). We formalize this split with three theorems: (T1) per-query AUC is a monotone function of the cosine separation margin, with R^2 >= 0.90 for six of eight type-encoder pairs; (T2) regime is characterized by two surface-text predicates, with P1 decisive for routing and P2 qualifying the B-dominant case, holding across three encoders and three datasets; and (T3) bridge advantage requires the relation-bearing sentence, not entity name alone, with removal causing an 8.6-14.1 pp performance drop (p < 0.001). Building on this theory, we propose RegimeRouter, a lightweight binary router that selects between question-only and question-plus-relation-sentence retrieval using five text features derived directly from the predicate definitions. Trained on 2WikiMultiHopQA (n = 881, 5-fold cross-fitted) and applied zero-shot to MuSiQue and HotpotQA, RegimeRouter achieves +5.6 pp (p < 0.001), +5.3 pp (p = 0.002), and +1.1 pp (non-significant, no-regret) R@5 improvement, respectively, with artifact-driven.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于理论驱动的两跳QA检索路由方法，通过形式化查询类型并设计轻量路由器提升检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 两跳QA检索中，查询类型（Q-dominant vs B-dominant）影响检索策略，但现有方法未充分利用这一区分，导致检索效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据查询类型自适应选择检索策略（仅问题检索 vs 问题加关系句检索）以提升两跳QA的检索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过三个定理揭示了查询类型与检索性能的关系：AUC与余弦分离边界的单调性、表面文本谓词对路由的决策作用、桥接优势依赖于关系句而非实体名。
analysis.method: 提出RegimeRouter，一个轻量级二分类路由器，利用五个文本特征（源自谓词定义）在问题仅检索和问题加关系句检索之间进行选择。
contributions: 形式化了两跳QA检索的两种查询类型（Q-dominant和B-dominant），并给出三个理论定理。
提出RegimeRouter，一种轻量级、可迁移的路由器，在多个数据集上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在2WikiMultiHopQA上训练（5折交叉验证），零样本迁移到MuSiQue和HotpotQA，分别实现R@5提升+5.6 pp、+5.3 pp和+1.1 pp（不显著，无遗憾）。
limitations: 路由器仅基于表面文本特征，可能无法捕捉深层语义差异。
在HotpotQA上的提升不显著，泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于理论驱动的两跳QA检索路由方法，通过形式化查询类型并设计轻量路由器提升检索性能。

papers.title: Domain-generalizable Face Anti-Spoofing with Patch-based Multi-tasking and Artifact Pattern Conversion
papers.abstract: Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) algorithms, designed to secure face recognition systems against spoofing, struggle with limited dataset diversity, impairing their ability to handle unseen visual domains and spoofing methods. We introduce the Pattern Conversion Generative Adversarial Network (PCGAN) to enhance domain generalization in FAS. PCGAN effectively disentangles latent vectors for spoof artifacts and facial features, allowing to generate images with diverse artifacts. We further incorporate patch-based and multi-task learning to tackle partial attacks and overfitting issues to facial features. Our extensive experiments validate PCGAN's effectiveness in domain generalization and detecting partial attacks, giving a substantial improvement in facial recognition security.

analysis.tldr: 提出PCGAN，通过解耦伪影与面部特征并生成多样伪影图像，提升人脸防伪的域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FAS算法因数据集多样性有限，难以泛化到未见过的视觉域和攻击方式，亟需提升域泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何增强人脸防伪算法对未知域和部分攻击的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Pattern Conversion GAN (PCGAN)，解耦伪影与面部特征的潜在向量，生成具有多样伪影的图像；结合基于块的多任务学习处理部分攻击和过拟合。
contributions: 提出PCGAN框架，通过解耦和生成多样伪影增强域泛化。
引入基于块的多任务学习，提升对部分攻击的检测能力并缓解过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖GAN生成质量，伪影多样性有限。
多任务学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PCGAN，通过解耦伪影与面部特征并生成多样伪影图像，提升人脸防伪的域泛化能力。

papers.title: Identification and Anonymization of Named Entities in Unstructured Information Sources for Use in Social Engineering Detection
papers.abstract: This study addresses the challenge of creating datasets for cybercrime analysis while complying with the requirements of regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Organic Law 10/1995 of the Penal Code. To this end, a system is proposed for collecting information from the Telegram platform, including text, audio, and images; the implementation of speech-to-text transcription models incorporating signal enhancement techniques; and the evaluation of different Named Entity Recognition (NER) solutions, including Microsoft Presidio and AI models designed using a transformer-based architecture. Experimental results indicate that Parakeet achieves the best performance in audio transcription, while the proposed NER solutions achieve the highest f1-score values in detecting sensitive information. In addition, anonymization metrics are presented that allow evaluation of the preservation of structural coherence in the data, while simultaneously guaranteeing the protection of personal information and supporting cybersecurity research within the current legal framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出从Telegram收集多模态数据、语音转文本及命名实体识别与匿名化系统，用于社会工程检测数据集构建。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络犯罪分析数据集构建需遵守GDPR等隐私法规，现有方法在敏感信息检测与数据匿名化方面存在挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在符合隐私法规前提下，从非结构化信息源（文本、音频、图像）中识别并匿名化命名实体，以支持社会工程检测研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Parakeet在音频转录中表现最佳；基于Transformer的NER方案在敏感信息检测中取得最高F1分数。
analysis.method: 系统包括Telegram数据收集、语音转文本（含信号增强）、NER（Microsoft Presidio与Transformer模型）及匿名化指标评估。
contributions: 提出多模态数据收集与处理流水线，覆盖文本、音频、图像。
评估多种NER方案，并引入匿名化指标以平衡数据可用性与隐私保护。
analysis.experiments: 在Telegram数据上评估音频转录（Parakeet最优）和NER（Transformer模型F1最高），并给出匿名化指标。
limitations: 可能仅针对Telegram平台，泛化性未验证。
匿名化指标对结构连贯性的评估可能不全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从Telegram收集多模态数据、语音转文本及命名实体识别与匿名化系统，用于社会工程检测数据集构建。

papers.title: Robust by Design: A Continuous Monitoring and Data Integration Framework for Medical AI
papers.abstract: Adaptive medical AI models often face performance drops in dynamic clinical environments due to data drift. We propose an autonomous continuous monitoring and data integration framework that maintains robust performance over time. Focusing on glomerular pathology image classification (proliferative vs. non-proliferative lupus nephritis), our three-stage method uses multi-metric feature analysis and Monte Carlo dropout-based uncertainty gating to decide when to retrain on new data. Only images statistically similar to the training distribution (via Euclidean, cosine, Mahalanobis metrics) and with low predictive entropy are integrated. The model is then incrementally retrained with these images under strict performance safeguards (no metric degradation >5%). In experiments with a ResNet18 ensemble on a multi-center dataset, the framework prevents performance degradation: new images were added without significant change in AUC (~0.92) or accuracy (~89%). This approach addresses data shift and avoids catastrophic forgetting, enabling sustained learning in medical imaging AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种持续监控与数据集成框架，通过不确定性门控和相似性过滤，使医学AI模型在动态临床环境中保持鲁棒性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自适应医学AI模型在动态临床环境中常因数据漂移导致性能下降，现有方法缺乏有效的持续监控和选择性重训练机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个自主框架，使医学图像分类模型在遇到分布外新数据时，既能适应变化又避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段方法：多度量特征分析（欧氏、余弦、马氏距离）结合蒙特卡洛dropout不确定性门控，仅集成统计相似且低熵的新图像，增量重训练并设置性能降级阈值（<5%）。
contributions: 提出一个无需人工干预的持续监控与数据集成框架，用于医学AI的鲁棒学习。
在肾小球病理图像分类任务上验证了框架防止性能退化、避免灾难性遗忘的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在包含ResNet18集成的多中心数据集上，新图像加入后AUC保持在~0.92，准确率~89%，无显著变化。
limitations: 仅针对二分类任务（增殖性vs非增殖性狼疮肾炎），泛化性待验证。
依赖预定义的相似度度量和不确定性阈值，可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种持续监控与数据集成框架，通过不确定性门控和相似性过滤，使医学AI模型在动态临床环境中保持鲁棒性能。

papers.title: Towards Linguistically-informed Representations for English as a Second or Foreign Language: Review, Construction and Application
papers.abstract: The widespread use of English as a Second or Foreign Language (ESFL) has sparked a paradigm shift: ESFL is not seen merely as a deviation from standard English but as a distinct linguistic system in its own right. This shift highlights the need for dedicated, knowledge-intensive representations of ESFL. In response, this paper surveys existing ESFL resources, identifies their limitations, and proposes a novel solution. Grounded in constructivist theories, the paper treats constructions as the fundamental units of analysis, allowing it to model the syntax--semantics interface of both ESFL and standard English. This design captures a wide range of ESFL phenomena by referring to syntactico-semantic mappings of English while preserving ESFL's unique characteristics, resulting a gold-standard syntactico-semantic resource comprising 1643 annotated ESFL sentences. To demonstrate the sembank's practical utility, we conduct a pilot study testing the Linguistic Niche Hypothesis, highlighting its potential as a valuable tool in Second Language Acquisition research.

analysis.tldr: 构建面向英语作为第二语言/外语的句法-语义资源，验证语言生态位假说。
analysis.research_motivation: 英语作为第二语言/外语（ESFL）被视作独立语言系统，但缺乏专门的知识密集型表示资源，现有资源存在局限性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建能够同时建模ESFL与标准英语句法-语义接口的高质量资源，并验证其应用价值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于构式语法理论，以构式为分析单元，构建包含1643句ESFL句子的句法-语义资源（sembank），并用于检验语言生态位假说。
contributions: 综述现有ESFL资源并指出其不足
提出基于构式的ESFL句法-语义表示方法
构建包含1643句的黄金标准资源
通过语言生态位假说验证资源实用性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 资源规模较小（1643句），可能覆盖不足
仅针对英语，方法泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建面向英语作为第二语言/外语的句法-语义资源，验证语言生态位假说。

papers.title: Hypergraph Neural Networks Accelerate MUS Enumeration
papers.abstract: Enumerating Minimal Unsatisfiable Subsets (MUSes) is a fundamental task in constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs). Its major challenge is the exponential growth of the search space, which becomes particularly severe when satisfiability checks are expensive. Recent machine learning approaches reduce this cost for Boolean satisfiability problems but rely on explicit variable-constraint relationships, limiting their application domains. This paper proposes a domain-agnostic method to accelerate MUS enumeration using Hypergraph Neural Networks (HGNNs). The proposed method incrementally builds a hypergraph with constraints as vertices and MUSes enumerated until the current step as hyperedges, and employs an HGNN-based agent trained via reinforcement learning to minimize the number of satisfiability checks required to obtain an MUS. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in accelerating MUS enumeration, showing that our method can enumerate more MUSes within the same satisfiability check budget compared to conventional methods.

analysis.tldr: 用超图神经网络加速极小不可满足子集枚举，减少可满足性检查次数。
analysis.research_motivation: MUS枚举是约束满足问题的基本任务，但搜索空间指数增长，可满足性检查代价高昂。现有机器学习方法依赖显式变量-约束关系，限制了应用范围。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖特定领域结构的前提下，减少MUS枚举中可满足性检查的次数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 增量构建超图（约束为顶点，已枚举MUS为超边），用基于HGNN的智能体通过强化学习训练，最小化获取一个MUS所需的可满足性检查次数。
contributions: 提出一种领域无关的MUS枚举加速方法，使用超图神经网络。
通过强化学习训练HGNN智能体，在相同检查预算下枚举更多MUS。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖超图构建的初始MUS集合质量。
强化学习训练可能不稳定或需要大量计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用超图神经网络加速极小不可满足子集枚举，减少可满足性检查次数。

papers.title: C$^2$T: Captioning-Structure and LLM-Aligned Common-Sense Reward Learning for Traffic--Vehicle Coordination
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art (SOTA) urban traffic control increasingly employs Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) to coordinate Traffic Light Controllers (TLCs) and Connected Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs). However, the performance of these systems is fundamentally capped by their hand-crafted, myopic rewards (e.g., intersection pressure), which fail to capture high-level, human-centric goals like safety, flow stability, and comfort. To overcome this limitation, we introduce C2T, a novel framework that learns a common-sense coordination model from traffic-vehicle dynamics. C2T distills "common-sense" knowledge from a Large Language Model (LLM) into a learned intrinsic reward function. This new reward is then used to guide the coordination policy of a cooperative multi-intersection TLC MARL system on CityFlow-based multi-intersection benchmarks. Our framework significantly outperforms strong MARL baselines in traffic efficiency, safety, and an energy-related proxy. We further highlight C2T's flexibility in principle, allowing distinct "efficiency-focused" versus "safety-focused" policies by modifying the LLM prompt.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM蒸馏常识奖励，提升多智能体交通信号与车辆协同性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交通控制方法依赖手工设计的短视奖励，无法捕捉安全、流畅性等高层人类目标，限制了系统性能。
analysis.problem: 如何学习一个能体现常识（安全、效率、舒适）的奖励函数，以指导多智能体交通信号与网联自动驾驶车辆的协同策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: C2T框架：从大语言模型（LLM）中蒸馏常识知识，学习内在奖励函数，用于指导基于CityFlow的多交叉口TLC MARL系统的协同策略。
contributions: 提出C2T框架，利用LLM蒸馏常识奖励，替代手工设计奖励。
在交通效率、安全性和能量代理指标上显著超越强MARL基线。
展示通过修改LLM提示可灵活实现效率优先或安全优先策略。
analysis.experiments: 在CityFlow多交叉口基准上评估，与强MARL基线对比，在交通效率、安全性和能量代理指标上表现更优。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖LLM的常识质量，可能受限于LLM的偏见或不准确。
仅在仿真环境CityFlow中验证，实际部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM蒸馏常识奖励，提升多智能体交通信号与车辆协同性能。

papers.title: StreamMeCo: Long-Term Agent Memory Compression for Efficient Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Vision agent memory has shown remarkable effectiveness in streaming video understanding. However, storing such memory for videos incurs substantial memory overhead, leading to high costs in both storage and computation. To address this issue, we propose StreamMeCo, an efficient Stream Agent Memory Compression framework. Specifically, based on the connectivity of the memory graph, StreamMeCo introduces edge-free minmax sampling for the isolated nodes and an edge-aware weight pruning for connected nodes, evicting the redundant memory nodes while maintaining the accuracy. In addition, we introduce a time-decay memory retrieval mechanism to further eliminate the performance degradation caused by memory compression. Extensive experiments on three challenging benchmark datasets (M3-Bench-robot, M3-Bench-web and Video-MME-Long) demonstrate that under 70% memory graph compression, StreamMeCo achieves a 1.87* speedup in memory retrieval while delivering an average accuracy improvement of 1.0%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Celina-love-sweet/StreamMeCo.

analysis.tldr: StreamMeCo通过图压缩和时域衰减检索实现长时视频代理内存的高效压缩，在70%压缩率下提速1.87倍并提升准确率1.0%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉代理内存方法在流式视频理解中有效，但存储大量视频内存导致高昂的存储和计算成本，亟需高效压缩方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失准确性的前提下大幅压缩长时视频代理内存，并缓解压缩带来的性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StreamMeCo框架，基于内存图连通性：对孤立节点采用无边缘最小最大采样，对连接节点采用边缘感知权重剪枝，以剔除冗余内存节点；同时引入时域衰减内存检索机制消除压缩导致的性能退化。
contributions: 提出StreamMeCo，一种高效的流式代理内存压缩框架，结合图结构感知的节点剪枝策略。
引入时域衰减内存检索机制，缓解压缩后的性能退化。
在三个基准上验证，70%压缩率下实现1.87倍检索加速和平均1.0%准确率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在M3-Bench-robot、M3-Bench-web和Video-MME-Long三个基准数据集上评估，70%内存图压缩下检索速度提升1.87倍，平均准确率提升1.0%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于图结构的内存表示，对其他内存形式不通用。
时域衰减机制可能对长间隔关键事件不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StreamMeCo通过图压缩和时域衰减检索实现长时视频代理内存的高效压缩，在70%压缩率下提速1.87倍并提升准确率1.0%。

papers.title: ASTRA: Adaptive Semantic Tree Reasoning Architecture for Complex Table Question Answering
papers.abstract: Table serialization remains a critical bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) in complex table question answering, hindered by challenges such as structural neglect, representation gaps, and reasoning opacity. Existing serialization methods fail to capture explicit hierarchies and lack schema flexibility, while current tree-based approaches suffer from limited semantic adaptability. To address these limitations, we propose ASTRA (Adaptive Semantic Tree Reasoning Architecture) including two main modules, AdaSTR and DuTR. First, we introduce AdaSTR, which leverages the global semantic awareness of LLMs to reconstruct tables into Logical Semantic Trees. This serialization explicitly models hierarchical dependencies and employs an adaptive mechanism to optimize construction strategies based on table scale. Second, building on this structure, we present DuTR, a dual-mode reasoning framework that integrates tree-search-based textual navigation for linguistic alignment and symbolic code execution for precise verification. Experiments on complex table benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应语义树推理架构ASTRA，通过逻辑语义树序列化和双模式推理提升复杂表格问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格序列化方法忽略结构层次、缺乏模式灵活性，树方法语义适应性有限，成为LLM在复杂表格问答中的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何有效序列化复杂表格并实现可解释、高精度的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ASTRA包含AdaSTR和DuTR两个模块：AdaSTR利用LLM全局语义将表格重构为逻辑语义树，并自适应优化构建策略；DuTR集成基于树搜索的文本导航和符号代码执行的双模式推理。
contributions: 提出AdaSTR模块，将表格自适应重构为逻辑语义树，显式建模层次依赖。
提出DuTR双模式推理框架，结合文本导航与符号执行，提升准确性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂表格基准上达到SOTA性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的语义理解能力，对低资源语言或领域泛化性未知。
树构建和双模式推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应语义树推理架构ASTRA，通过逻辑语义树序列化和双模式推理提升复杂表格问答性能。

papers.title: Matrix-Game 3.0: Real-Time and Streaming Interactive World Model with Long-Horizon Memory
papers.abstract: With the advancement of interactive video generation, diffusion models have increasingly demonstrated their potential as world models. However, existing approaches still struggle to simultaneously achieve memory-enabled long-term temporal consistency and high-resolution real-time generation, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. To address this, we present Matrix-Game 3.0, a memory-augmented interactive world model designed for 720p real-time longform video generation. Building upon Matrix-Game 2.0, we introduce systematic improvements across data, model, and inference. First, we develop an upgraded industrial-scale infinite data engine that integrates Unreal Engine-based synthetic data, large-scale automated collection from AAA games, and real-world video augmentation to produce high-quality Video-Pose-Action-Prompt quadruplet data at scale. Second, we propose a training framework for long-horizon consistency: by modeling prediction residuals and re-injecting imperfect generated frames during training, the base model learns self-correction; meanwhile, camera-aware memory retrieval and injection enable the base model to achieve long horizon spatiotemporal consistency. Third, we design a multi-segment autoregressive distillation strategy based on Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), combined with model quantization and VAE decoder pruning, to achieve efficient real-time inference. Experimental results show that Matrix-Game 3.0 achieves up to 40 FPS real-time generation at 720p resolution with a 5B model, while maintaining stable memory consistency over minute-long sequences. Scaling up to a 2x14B model further improves generation quality, dynamics, and generalization. Our approach provides a practical pathway toward industrial-scale deployable world models.

analysis.tldr: Matrix-Game 3.0 通过数据引擎、长时记忆训练和蒸馏量化，实现 720p 实时长视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交互式视频生成方法难以同时实现长时记忆一致性和高分辨率实时生成，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个支持长时记忆、高分辨率实时生成的交互式世界模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Matrix-Game 3.0，包含三大改进：1) 工业级无限数据引擎生成 Video-Pose-Action-Prompt 四元组数据；2) 长时一致性训练框架，通过预测残差建模和重注入不完美帧实现自校正，并利用相机感知记忆检索实现时空一致性；3) 基于 DMD 的多段自回归蒸馏策略，结合模型量化和 VAE 解码器剪枝实现实时推理。
contributions: 提出 Matrix-Game 3.0，首个支持 720p 实时长视频生成的记忆增强交互式世界模型。
设计工业级数据引擎和长时一致性训练框架，实现分钟级记忆一致性。
通过蒸馏和量化实现 5B 模型 40 FPS 实时生成，2x14B 模型提升质量。
analysis.experiments: 在 720p 分辨率下，5B 模型达到 40 FPS 实时生成，分钟级序列保持稳定记忆一致性；2x14B 模型进一步改善生成质量、动态和泛化性。
limitations: 依赖合成数据和 AAA 游戏数据，真实场景泛化性可能受限。
长时记忆一致性评估可能缺乏标准基准。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Matrix-Game 3.0 通过数据引擎、长时记忆训练和蒸馏量化，实现 720p 实时长视频生成。

papers.title: PinpointQA: A Dataset and Benchmark for Small Object-Centric Spatial Understanding in Indoor Videos
papers.abstract: Small object-centric spatial understanding in indoor videos remains a significant challenge for multimodal large language models (MLLMs), despite its practical value for object search and assistive applications. Although existing benchmarks have advanced video spatial intelligence, embodied reasoning, and diagnostic perception, no existing benchmark directly evaluates whether a model can localize a target object in video and express its position with sufficient precision for downstream use. In this work, we introduce PinpointQA, the first dataset and benchmark for small object-centric spatial understanding in indoor videos. Built from ScanNet++ and ScanNet200, PinpointQA comprises 1,024 scenes and 10,094 QA pairs organized into four progressively challenging tasks: Target Presence Verification (TPV), Nearest Reference Identification (NRI), Fine-Grained Spatial Description (FSD), and Structured Spatial Prediction (SSP). The dataset is built from intermediate spatial representations, with QA pairs generated automatically and further refined through quality control. Experiments on representative MLLMs reveal a consistent capability gap along the progressive chain, with SSP remaining particularly difficult. Supervised fine-tuning on PinpointQA yields substantial gains, especially on the harder tasks, demonstrating that PinpointQA serves as both a diagnostic benchmark and an effective training dataset. The dataset and project page are available at https://rainchowz.github.io/PinpointQA.

analysis.tldr: PinpointQA 是首个针对室内视频中小物体空间理解的基准与数据集，包含四个渐进难度的任务，实验发现 MLLMs 在结构化空间预测上存在显著能力差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 室内视频中小物体的空间理解对物体搜索和辅助应用至关重要，但现有基准未直接评估模型能否精确定位目标物体并表达其位置。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估多模态大语言模型在室内视频中定位小物体并精确描述其空间位置能力的基准和数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验揭示 MLLMs 在渐进任务链上存在一致的能力差距，结构化空间预测（SSP）任务尤其困难。
analysis.method: 基于 ScanNet++ 和 ScanNet200 构建包含 1,024 场景和 10,094 个 QA 对的数据集，自动生成 QA 对并经过质量控制，设计四个渐进难度的任务。
contributions: 首个针对室内视频中小物体空间理解的基准和数据集 PinpointQA
四个渐进难度的任务设计，系统评估 MLLMs 的空间理解能力
实验证明 PinpointQA 可作为诊断基准和有效训练数据集
analysis.experiments: 在代表性 MLLMs 上进行实验，发现 SSP 任务困难；监督微调在 PinpointQA 上取得显著提升。
limitations: 仅基于 ScanNet++ 和 ScanNet200 数据集，场景多样性有限
自动生成的 QA 对可能存在噪声，尽管经过质量控制
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PinpointQA 是首个针对室内视频中小物体空间理解的基准与数据集，包含四个渐进难度的任务，实验发现 MLLMs 在结构化空间预测上存在显著能力差距。

papers.title: ActFER: Agentic Facial Expression Recognition via Active Tool-Augmented Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have created new opportunities for facial expression recognition (FER), moving it beyond pure label prediction toward reasoning-based affect understanding. However, existing MLLM-based FER methods still follow a passive paradigm: they rely on externally prepared facial inputs and perform single-pass reasoning over fixed visual evidence, without the capability for active facial perception. To address this limitation, we propose ActFER, an agentic framework that reformulates FER as active visual evidence acquisition followed by multimodal reasoning. Specifically, ActFER dynamically invokes tools for face detection and alignment, selectively zooms into informative local regions, and reasons over facial Action Units (AUs) and emotions through a visual Chain-of-Thought. To realize such behavior, we further develop Utility-Calibrated GRPO (UC-GRPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm tailored to agentic FER. UC-GRPO uses AU-grounded multi-level verifiable rewards to densify supervision, query-conditional contrastive utility estimation to enable sample-aware dynamic credit assignment for local inspection, and emotion-aware EMA calibration to reduce noisy utility estimates while capturing emotion-wise inspection tendencies. This algorithm enables ActFER to learn both when local inspection is beneficial and how to reason over the acquired evidence. Comprehensive experiments show that ActFER trained with UC-GRPO consistently outperforms passive MLLM-based FER baselines and substantially improves AU prediction accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActFER框架，将面部表情识别转化为主动视觉证据获取与多模态推理，并设计UC-GRPO强化学习算法优化工具调用与推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于MLLM的面部表情识别方法遵循被动范式，依赖外部预处理的面部输入，仅对固定视觉证据进行单次推理，缺乏主动感知能力，限制了识别性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让MLLM在面部表情识别中具备主动获取视觉证据并进行多模态推理的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 被动范式下模型无法根据需求主动选择局部区域或调用工具，导致对关键面部动作单元（AU）的感知不足。
analysis.method: 提出ActFER智能体框架，动态调用人脸检测和对齐工具，选择性聚焦信息丰富的局部区域，并通过视觉思维链推理AU和情绪；同时设计UC-GRPO强化学习算法，利用AU级多级可验证奖励、查询条件对比效用估计和情绪感知EMA校准来优化工具调用和推理策略。
contributions: 提出ActFER，首个将FER重构为主动视觉证据获取与多模态推理的智能体框架。
设计UC-GRPO算法，通过AU级奖励、动态信用分配和情绪感知校准实现高效训练。
实验表明ActFER在AU预测和FER任务上显著优于被动MLLM基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个FER基准上进行了综合实验，ActFER+UC-GRPO一致优于被动MLLM基线，并显著提升AU预测准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖外部工具的质量和可用性。
计算开销可能高于纯推理方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActFER框架，将面部表情识别转化为主动视觉证据获取与多模态推理，并设计UC-GRPO强化学习算法优化工具调用与推理。

papers.title: SEA-Eval: A Benchmark for Evaluating Self-Evolving Agents Beyond Episodic Assessment
papers.abstract: Current LLM-based agents demonstrate strong performance in episodic task execution but remain constrained by static toolsets and episodic amnesia, failing to accumulate experience across task boundaries. This paper presents the first formal definition of the Self-Evolving Agent (SEA), formalizes the Evolutionary Flywheel as its minimal sufficient architecture, and introduces SEA-Eval -- the first benchmark designed specifically for evaluating SEAs. Grounded in Flywheel theory, SEA-Eval establishes $SR$ and $T$ as primary metrics and enables through sequential task stream design the independent quantification of evolutionary gain, evolutionary stability, and implicit alignment convergence. Empirical evaluation reveals that under identical success rates, token consumption differs by up to 31.2$\times$ across frameworks, with divergent evolutionary trajectories under sequential analysis -- demonstrating that success rate alone creates a capability illusion and that the sequential convergence of $T$ is the key criterion for distinguishing genuine evolution from pseudo-evolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个自进化智能体基准SEA-Eval，揭示成功率存在能力幻觉，序列收敛才是真进化关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体在单次任务中表现良好，但受限于静态工具集和任务间遗忘，无法跨任务积累经验，缺乏评估自进化能力的标准。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和评估智能体的自进化能力，特别是区分真进化与伪进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相同成功率下，不同框架的token消耗差异高达31.2倍，且进化轨迹在序列分析中发散，表明成功率单独使用会造成能力幻觉。
analysis.method: 形式化定义自进化智能体（SEA）和进化飞轮架构，设计SEA-Eval基准，通过连续任务流独立量化进化增益、进化稳定性和隐式对齐收敛，以SR和T为主要指标。
contributions: 首次形式化定义自进化智能体（SEA）并给出最小充分架构进化飞轮。
提出首个专门评估SEA的基准SEA-Eval，引入序列任务流和进化稳定性等新指标。
实验揭示成功率幻觉现象，证明序列收敛T是区分真伪进化的关键。
analysis.experiments: 在SEA-Eval上对多种框架进行实证评估，比较成功率和token消耗，分析进化轨迹的序列收敛性。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有自进化场景。
进化飞轮架构的通用性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个自进化智能体基准SEA-Eval，揭示成功率存在能力幻觉，序列收敛才是真进化关键。

papers.title: PilotBench: A Benchmark for General Aviation Agents with Safety Constraints
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) advance toward embodied AI agents operating in physical environments, a fundamental question emerges: can models trained on text corpora reliably reason about complex physics while adhering to safety constraints? We address this through PilotBench, a benchmark evaluating LLMs on safety-critical flight trajectory and attitude prediction.
