Built from 708 real-world general aviation trajectories spanning nine operationally distinct flight phases with synchronized 34-channel telemetry, PilotBench systematically probes the intersection of semantic understanding and physics-governed prediction through comparative analysis of LLMs and traditional forecasters. We introduce Pilot-Score, a composite metric balancing 60% regression accuracy with 40% instruction adherence and safety compliance. Comparative evaluation across 41 models uncovers a Precision-Controllability Dichotomy: traditional forecasters achieve superior MAE of 7.01 but lack semantic reasoning capabilities, while LLMs gain controllability with 86--89% instruction-following at the cost of 11--14 MAE precision. Phase-stratified analysis further exposes a Dynamic Complexity Gap-LLM performance degrades sharply in high-workload phases such as Climb and Approach, suggesting brittle implicit physics models. These empirical discoveries motivate hybrid architectures combining LLMs' symbolic reasoning with specialized forecasters' numerical precision. PilotBench provides a rigorous foundation for advancing embodied AI in safety-constrained domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出PilotBench基准，评估LLM在安全约束下的飞行轨迹预测能力，发现LLM与经典预测器存在精度-可控性权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在物理环境中作为具身智能体运行时，需要同时理解语义和物理规律并遵守安全约束，现有基准缺乏对此类场景的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在安全关键的飞行轨迹和姿态预测任务中的表现，特别是语义理解与物理预测的交叉能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现精度-可控性二分法：经典预测器MAE为7.01但缺乏语义推理，LLM指令遵循率达86-89%但MAE为11-14；动态复杂度差距：LLM在高工作负荷阶段（如爬升、进近）性能急剧下降。
analysis.method: 构建包含708条真实通用航空轨迹的基准，提出Pilot-Score复合指标（60%回归精度+40%指令遵循与安全合规），比较41个模型。
contributions: 提出PilotBench基准，包含多阶段飞行轨迹和34通道遥测数据
引入Pilot-Score复合评估指标
揭示LLM与经典预测器的精度-可控性权衡及动态复杂度差距
analysis.experiments: 在41个模型上进行对比评估，包括传统预测器和LLM，使用MAE和指令遵循率等指标。
limitations: 仅针对通用航空领域，可能不适用于其他安全关键场景
未提供混合架构的具体实现和验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PilotBench基准，评估LLM在安全约束下的飞行轨迹预测能力，发现LLM与经典预测器存在精度-可控性权衡。

papers.title: PerMix-RLVR: Preserving Persona Expressivity under Verifiable-Reward Alignment
papers.abstract: Persona prompting has been widely adopted to steer large language models (LLMs) behavior and improve their instruction performance by assigning specific characters. However, identifying an optimal persona is time-consuming, and its impact on output quality remains poorly understood. Prior work has mainly addressed this issue at the prompt level via inference-time strategies, incurring additional computation. In this work, we avoid inference-time prompt search by tackling persona sensitivity during training, aiming to train models that adapt their behavior to diverse personas while preserving task performance. In particular, we find that reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) systematically reduces sensitivity to persona prompts, but also reveals an inherent trade-off of outcome-based optimization: while RLVR improves robustness on tasks with verifiable goals, it can also degrade persona expressivity when needed, e.g., in-character role-playing. To address this limitation, we propose PerMix-RLVR, a persona-mixed RLVR strategy that mitigates the persona robustness-fidelity trade-off, preserving strong robustness to harmful persona variation while enabling faithful persona adoption when required. Concretely, PerMix-RLVR improves persona stability score (PSS) over RLVR by +21.2% on MATH500, while also enhancing persona fidelity by +11.4% on PersonaGym.

analysis.tldr: 提出PerMix-RLVR方法，在可验证奖励对齐中保留角色表达能力，缓解鲁棒性与忠实性之间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 角色提示广泛用于引导LLM行为，但最优角色搜索耗时且影响输出质量，现有方法多在推理阶段处理，增加计算开销。
analysis.problem: RLVR训练会降低模型对角色提示的敏感性，导致角色表达能力下降，需要在鲁棒性和忠实性之间取得平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLVR系统性地降低了对角色提示的敏感性，但存在结果优化固有的权衡：提升可验证任务鲁棒性的同时，损害了角色扮演等场景中的角色忠实性。
analysis.method: 提出PerMix-RLVR，一种角色混合的RLVR策略，通过混合不同角色提示进行训练，缓解鲁棒性-忠实性权衡。
contributions: 发现RLVR会降低角色敏感性并导致鲁棒性-忠实性权衡
提出PerMix-RLVR方法，在保持鲁棒性的同时提升角色忠实性
analysis.experiments: 在MATH500上角色稳定性得分（PSS）比RLVR提升21.2%，在PersonaGym上角色忠实性提升11.4%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可验证奖励场景
角色混合策略的通用性有待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PerMix-RLVR方法，在可验证奖励对齐中保留角色表达能力，缓解鲁棒性与忠实性之间的权衡。

papers.title: Neighbourhood Transformer: Switchable Attention for Monophily-Aware Graph Learning
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely adopted in engineering applications such as social network analysis, chemical research and computer vision. However, their efficacy is severely compromised by the inherent homophily assumption, which fails to hold for heterophilic graphs where dissimilar nodes are frequently connected. To address this fundamental limitation in graph learning, we first draw inspiration from the recently discovered monophily property of real-world graphs, and propose Neighbourhood Transformers (NT), a novel paradigm that applies self-attention within every local neighbourhood instead of aggregating messages to the central node as in conventional message-passing GNNs. This design makes NT inherently monophily-aware and theoretically guarantees its expressiveness is no weaker than traditional message-passing frameworks. For practical engineering deployment, we further develop a neighbourhood partitioning strategy equipped with switchable attentions, which reduces the space consumption of NT by over 95% and time consumption by up to 92.67%, significantly expanding its applicability to larger graphs. Extensive experiments on 10 real-world datasets (5 heterophilic and 5 homophilic graphs) show that NT outperforms all current state-of-the-art methods on node classification tasks, demonstrating its superior performance and cross-domain adaptability. The full implementation code of this work is publicly available at https://github.com/cf020031308/MoNT to facilitate reproducibility and industrial adoption.

analysis.tldr: 提出Neighbourhood Transformer，利用局部邻域自注意力解决异配图学习中的同配性假设局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统GNN基于同配性假设，在异配图上性能严重下降，而现实图常呈现异配性，亟需新方法。
analysis.problem: 解决GNN在异配图上因同配性假设导致的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Neighbourhood Transformer，在每个局部邻域内应用自注意力而非传统消息传递，并设计可切换注意力的邻域分区策略以降低计算开销。
contributions: 提出Neighbourhood Transformer，天然感知单配性，理论上表达能力不弱于传统消息传递框架。
开发邻域分区与可切换注意力机制，降低空间消耗95%以上、时间消耗高达92.67%。
在10个数据集上超越当前SOTA，验证了跨域适应性。
analysis.experiments: 在10个真实数据集（5个异配、5个同配）上进行节点分类实验，NT优于所有当前SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能对极大图仍需进一步优化。
可切换注意力的分区策略可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Neighbourhood Transformer，利用局部邻域自注意力解决异配图学习中的同配性假设局限。

papers.title: Litmus (Re)Agent: A Benchmark and Agentic System for Predictive Evaluation of Multilingual Models
papers.abstract: We study predictive multilingual evaluation: estimating how well a model will perform on a task in a target language when direct benchmark results are missing. This problem is common in multilingual deployment, where evaluation coverage is sparse and published evidence is uneven across languages, tasks, and model families. We introduce a controlled benchmark of 1,500 questions spanning six tasks and five evidence scenarios. The benchmark separates accessible evidence from ground truth, enabling evaluation of systems that must infer missing results from incomplete literature evidence. We also present Litmus (Re)Agent, a DAG-orchestrated agentic system that decomposes queries into hypotheses, retrieves evidence, and synthesises predictions through feature-aware aggregation. Across six systems, Litmus (Re)Agent achieves the best overall performance, with the largest gains in transfer-heavy scenarios where direct evidence is weak or absent. These results show that structured agentic reasoning is a promising approach to multilingual performance estimation under incomplete evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出多语言模型预测评估基准和基于DAG编排的智能体系统Litmus (Re)Agent，在证据缺失场景下通过结构化推理提升评估准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言模型部署中，评估覆盖稀疏且不同语言、任务和模型族之间的公开证据不均衡，导致难以预测模型在目标语言上的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何在直接基准结果缺失时，准确估计多语言模型在目标语言任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含1500个问题、覆盖6个任务和5种证据场景的基准；提出Litmus (Re)Agent，一个基于DAG编排的智能体系统，将查询分解为假设、检索证据并通过特征感知聚合合成预测。
contributions: 提出了一个用于多语言模型预测评估的受控基准，分离可获取证据与真实标签。
设计了Litmus (Re)Agent系统，通过结构化智能体推理在证据不完整场景下提升预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个系统上评估，Litmus (Re)Agent取得最佳整体性能，在迁移密集型场景中增益最大。
limitations: 基准规模有限（1500个问题），可能无法覆盖所有语言和任务。
系统依赖外部证据检索，证据质量可能影响预测准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多语言模型预测评估基准和基于DAG编排的智能体系统Litmus (Re)Agent，在证据缺失场景下通过结构化推理提升评估准确性。

papers.title: How Should Video LLMs Output Time? An Analysis of Efficient Temporal Grounding Paradigms
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), existing methods often couple output paradigms with different backbones, datasets, and training protocols. This makes it challenging to isolate the specific impact of the output design. Additionally, as VTG systems are increasingly considered for resource-constrained edge deployment, the trade-off between output formulation and system-level efficiency requires systematic investigation. In this paper, we present a controlled empirical study comparing three dominant VTG output paradigms: Text Numeral Generation, Temporal Token Generation, and Continuous Temporal Decoding. We evaluate these paradigms across identical compact VLMs (SmolVLM2, FastVLM, and Molmo2) using consistent datasets and LoRA fine-tuning protocols. Evaluations on Charades-STA, QVHighlights, and YouCook2 measure both localization accuracy and system efficiency, including inference latency, training throughput, and parameter overhead. Our results demonstrate that the choice of output formulation significantly affects both grounding accuracy and computational cost, independent of model scale. Specifically, the continuous distribution paradigm consistently achieves the most favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off on the Pareto frontier, delivering robust localization with minimal latency overhead. These findings provide objective empirical guidelines for designing efficient, deployment-ready VTG systems.

analysis.tldr: 视频LLM输出时间戳的方式（文本数字、时间令牌、连续解码）对效率和精度有显著影响，连续解码在帕累托前沿上表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时间定位（VTG）方法将输出范式与不同骨干网络、数据集和训练协议耦合，难以隔离输出设计的影响；同时，资源受限的边缘部署需要系统级效率权衡，但缺乏系统性研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计视频LLM的时间输出范式，以在保持定位精度的同时优化系统效率（推理延迟、训练吞吐量、参数开销）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 输出范式的选择显著影响定位精度和计算成本，且独立于模型规模；连续分布范式在帕累托前沿上实现了最佳的效率-精度权衡。
analysis.method: 在相同紧凑VLM（SmolVLM2、FastVLM、Molmo2）上，使用一致数据集和LoRA微调协议，对比三种VTG输出范式：文本数字生成、时间令牌生成、连续时间解码。
contributions: 首次在受控条件下系统比较三种VTG输出范式，隔离了输出设计的影响。
揭示了连续分布范式在效率-精度帕累托前沿上的优势，为部署提供实证指导。
analysis.experiments: 在Charades-STA、QVHighlights、YouCook2上评估定位精度和系统效率（推理延迟、训练吞吐量、参数开销）。
limitations: 仅评估了紧凑型VLM，未在更大规模模型上验证。
未考虑其他输出范式（如混合方法）或更复杂的训练策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视频LLM输出时间戳的方式（文本数字、时间令牌、连续解码）对效率和精度有显著影响，连续解码在帕累托前沿上表现最佳。

papers.title: Dynamic Class-Aware Active Learning for Unbiased Satellite Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation of satellite imagery plays a vital role in land cover mapping and environmental monitoring. However, annotating large-scale, high-resolution satellite datasets is costly and time consuming, especially when covering vast geographic regions. Instead of randomly labeling data or exhaustively annotating entire datasets, Active Learning (AL) offers an efficient alternative by intelligently selecting the most informative samples for annotation with the help of Human-in-the-loop (HITL), thereby reducing labeling costs while maintaining high model performance. AL is particularly beneficial for large-scale or resource-constrained satellite applications, as it enables high segmentation accuracy with significantly fewer labeled samples. Despite these advantages, standard AL strategies typically rely on global uncertainty or diversity measures and lack the adaptability to target underperforming or rare classes as training progresses, leading to bias in the system. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel adaptive acquisition function, Dynamic Class-Aware Uncertainty based Active learning (DCAU-AL) that prioritizes sample selection based on real-time class-wise performance gaps, thereby overcoming class-imbalance issue. The proposed DCAU-AL mechanism continuously tracks the performance of the segmentation per class and dynamically adjusts the sampling weights to focus on poorly performing or underrepresented classes throughout the active learning process. Extensive experiments on the OpenEarth land cover dataset show that DCAU-AL significantly outperforms existing AL methods, especially under severe class imbalance, delivering superior per-class IoU and improved annotation efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态类别感知主动学习方法，解决卫星图像分割中的类别不平衡和标注效率问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星图像语义分割需要大量标注数据，成本高昂；标准主动学习方法依赖全局不确定性或多样性，无法适应训练过程中表现不佳或稀有类别，导致系统偏差。
analysis.problem: 现有主动学习方法在卫星图像分割中缺乏对类别不平衡的适应性，无法动态关注表现差的类别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准主动学习策略在类别不平衡场景下存在偏差，导致稀有类别性能低下。
analysis.method: 提出动态类别感知不确定性主动学习（DCAU-AL），通过实时跟踪每个类别的分割性能，动态调整采样权重，优先选择表现差或代表性不足的类别样本。
contributions: 提出一种新的自适应采集函数DCAU-AL，动态关注类别性能差距以缓解类别不平衡。
在OpenEarth土地覆盖数据集上验证了方法在严重类别不平衡下显著优于现有主动学习方法。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenEarth土地覆盖数据集上进行实验，DCAU-AL在每类IoU和标注效率上显著优于现有主动学习方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和分割模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
动态跟踪类别性能可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态类别感知主动学习方法，解决卫星图像分割中的类别不平衡和标注效率问题。

papers.title: Aligned Agents, Biased Swarm: Measuring Bias Amplification in Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: While Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) are increasingly deployed for complex workflows, their emergent properties-particularly the accumulation of bias-remain poorly understood. Because real-world MAS are too complex to analyze entirely, evaluating their ethical robustness requires first isolating their foundational mechanics. In this work, we conduct a baseline empirical study investigating how basic MAS topologies and feedback loops influence prejudice. Contrary to the assumption that multi-agent collaboration naturally dilutes bias, we hypothesize that structured workflows act as echo chambers, amplifying minor stochastic biases into systemic polarization. To evaluate this, we introduce Discrim-Eval-Open, an open-ended benchmark that bypasses individual model neutrality through forced comparative judgments across demographic groups. Analyzing bias cascades across various structures reveals that architectural sophistication frequently exacerbates bias rather than mitigating it. We observe systemic amplification even when isolated agents operate neutrally, and identify a 'Trigger Vulnerability' where injecting purely objective context drastically accelerates polarization. By stripping away advanced swarm complexity to study foundational dynamics, we establish a crucial baseline: structural complexity does not guarantee ethical robustness. Our code is available at https://github.com/weizhihao1/MAS-Bias.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体系统中的结构化工作流会放大偏见，而非稀释偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）在复杂工作流中广泛应用，但其涌现属性（尤其是偏见积累）尚不明确，且真实MAS过于复杂难以全面分析，需要先隔离基础机制进行研究。
analysis.problem: 研究基本MAS拓扑结构和反馈循环如何影响偏见放大，验证结构化工作流是否充当回音室，将微小随机偏见放大为系统性极化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：架构复杂性常常加剧偏见而非缓解；即使单个智能体中性运行，系统仍出现系统性放大；存在“触发脆弱性”，即注入客观上下文会急剧加速极化。
analysis.method: 提出Discrim-Eval-Open基准，通过强制跨人口统计组比较判断来绕过单个模型的中立性，分析不同结构下的偏见级联。
contributions: 引入Discrim-Eval-Open基准，用于评估MAS中的偏见放大。
通过实证揭示结构化工作流会放大偏见，且架构复杂性不保证伦理鲁棒性。
识别“触发脆弱性”现象，即客观上下文注入加速极化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能无法覆盖所有现实MAS场景。
研究仅关注基础拓扑和反馈循环，未涉及高级群体智能复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体系统中的结构化工作流会放大偏见，而非稀释偏见。

papers.title: WOMBET: World Model-based Experience Transfer for Robust and Sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) in robotics is often limited by the cost and risk of data collection, motivating experience transfer from a source task to a target task. Offline-to-online RL leverages prior data but typically assumes a given fixed dataset and does not address how to generate reliable data for transfer. We propose \textit{World Model-based Experience Transfer} (WOMBET), a framework that jointly generates and utilizes prior data. WOMBET learns a world model in the source task and generates offline data via uncertainty-penalized planning, followed by filtering trajectories with high return and low epistemic uncertainty. It then performs online fine-tuning in the target task using adaptive sampling between offline and online data, enabling a stable transition from prior-driven initialization to task-specific adaptation. We show that the uncertainty-penalized objective provides a lower bound on the true return and derive a finite-sample error decomposition capturing distribution mismatch and approximation error. Empirically, WOMBET improves sample efficiency and final performance over strong baselines on continuous control benchmarks, demonstrating the benefit of jointly optimizing data generation and transfer.

analysis.tldr: WOMBET通过世界模型生成并筛选高质量离线数据，结合自适应采样实现鲁棒高效的强化学习迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人强化学习中数据采集成本高、风险大，现有离线到在线方法依赖固定数据集，缺乏可靠数据生成机制。
analysis.problem: 如何联合生成和利用先验数据，实现从源任务到目标任务的高效、鲁棒迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在源任务学习世界模型，通过不确定性惩罚规划生成离线数据，筛选高回报低认知不确定性轨迹；在目标任务中自适应采样离线与在线数据，实现从先验初始化到任务适应的稳定过渡。
contributions: 提出WOMBET框架，联合生成和利用先验数据用于强化学习迁移。
理论证明不确定性惩罚目标提供真实回报的下界，并给出有限样本误差分解。
在连续控制基准上验证了样本效率和最终性能的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在连续控制基准上，WOMBET相比强基线提升了样本效率和最终性能。
limitations: 可能依赖源任务与目标任务之间的相似性。
世界模型的学习和规划计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WOMBET通过世界模型生成并筛选高质量离线数据，结合自适应采样实现鲁棒高效的强化学习迁移。

papers.title: Low-Data Supervised Adaptation Outperforms Prompting for Cloud Segmentation Under Domain Shift
papers.abstract: Adapting vision-language models to remote sensing imagery presents a fundamental challenge: both the visual and linguistic distributions of satellite data lie far outside natural image pretraining corpora. Despite this, prompting remains the dominant deployment paradigm, driven by the assumption that domain-specific language can guide frozen model representations toward specialized tasks. We test this assumption directly on a domain where the mismatch is prominent: cloud segmentation for satellite imagery. Using CLIPSeg on the CloudSEN12+ cloud segmentation benchmark, we evaluate 60 prompt variants spanning simple labels, domain terminology, appearance descriptors, and contextual cues, finding that every variant underperforms the zero-shot baseline (0.255 mIoU), with engineered prompts scoring as low as 0.07 mIoU. No amount of linguistic refinement bridges the gap between CLIP's natural image representations and satellite spectral imagery. In contrast, supervised fine-tuning with just 0.1% labeled data (~8 images) surpasses zero-shot performance overall, and 5-10% data recovers ~85% of maximum achievable mIoU. Full fine-tuning consistently outperforms low-rank adaptation by 0.03-0.09 mIoU, with the largest gaps for spectrally ambiguous classes, and at 0.5 to 1% labeled data, fine-tuning temporarily degrades performance on these classes before recovering, a supervision dip that aggregate mIoU can mask. For practitioners adapting vision-language models to specialized imagery, our results deliver a clear message: labeled data is not the expensive alternative to prompting; it is the worthwhile path.

analysis.tldr: 在卫星云分割任务中，少量标注数据微调远优于精心设计的提示工程。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型在遥感图像等专业领域面临严重的分布偏移，提示工程被广泛采用但效果存疑，亟需验证其有效性并探索更优的部署范式。
analysis.problem: 验证提示工程在遥感云分割任务中的有效性，并比较监督微调与提示方法的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有60种提示变体均低于零样本基线（0.255 mIoU），最低仅0.07 mIoU；仅0.1%标注数据（约8张图像）的微调即可超越零样本性能；5-10%数据恢复约85%最大mIoU；全参数微调始终优于低秩适配，差距0.03-0.09 mIoU；在0.5-1%标注数据时，光谱模糊类别出现性能暂时下降。
analysis.method: 在CloudSEN12+数据集上使用CLIPSeg模型，系统评估60种提示变体，并与不同标注比例下的全参数微调和低秩适配（LoRA）进行对比。
contributions: 首次系统验证提示工程在遥感云分割中的失败，证明语言细化无法弥合自然图像与卫星光谱图像的分布差距。
揭示少量标注数据微调（0.1%数据）即可超越零样本性能，且全参数微调优于低秩适配。
发现微调过程中的监督下降现象（0.5-1%数据时光谱模糊类别性能暂时退化），并指出聚合mIoU可能掩盖此问题。
analysis.experiments: 在CloudSEN12+云分割基准上，使用CLIPSeg模型评估60种提示变体，并与不同标注比例（0.1%-100%）下的全参数微调和LoRA对比。
limitations: 仅针对云分割单一任务，结论可能不适用于其他遥感或专业领域。
未探索其他视觉-语言模型架构或更大规模预训练模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在卫星云分割任务中，少量标注数据微调远优于精心设计的提示工程。

papers.title: MuTSE: A Human-in-the-Loop Multi-use Text Simplification Evaluator
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become increasingly prevalent in text simplification, systematically evaluating their outputs across diverse prompting strategies and architectures remains a critical methodological challenge in both NLP research and Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS). Developing robust prompts is often hindered by the absence of structured, visual frameworks for comparative text analysis. While researchers typically rely on static computational scripts, educators are constrained to standard conversational interfaces -- neither paradigm supports systematic multi-dimensional evaluation of prompt-model permutations. To address these limitations, we introduce \textbf{MuTSE}\footnote{The project code and the demo have been made available for peer review at the following anonymized URL. https://osf.io/njs43/overview?view_only=4b4655789f484110a942ebb7788cdf2a, an interactive human-in-the-loop web application designed to streamline the evaluation of LLM-generated text simplifications across arbitrary CEFR proficiency targets. The system supports concurrent execution of $P \times M$ prompt-model permutations, generating a comprehensive comparison matrix in real-time. By integrating a novel tiered semantic alignment engine augmented with a linearity bias heuristic ($λ$), MuTSE visually maps source sentences to their simplified counterparts, reducing the cognitive load associated with qualitative analysis and enabling reproducible, structured annotation for downstream NLP dataset construction.

analysis.tldr: MuTSE是一个交互式人机协同文本简化评估工具，支持多提示-模型组合的实时对比与语义对齐可视化。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在文本简化中广泛应用，但缺乏结构化、可视化的框架来系统评估不同提示策略和模型架构的输出，阻碍了NLP研究和智能辅导系统的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个支持多维度、可复现的文本简化评估工具，以降低定性分析的认知负荷并促进结构化标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MuTSE是一个基于人机协同的Web应用，支持并行执行P×M个提示-模型组合，生成实时对比矩阵；集成新颖的分层语义对齐引擎，并引入线性偏差启发式（λ）来可视化源句与简化句的映射关系。
contributions: 提出MuTSE，一个交互式人机协同文本简化评估系统，支持多提示-模型组合的并行评估与实时对比。
设计分层语义对齐引擎与线性偏差启发式（λ），降低定性分析认知负荷，支持可复现的结构化标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖人工标注，扩展性受限。
线性偏差启发式（λ）的有效性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MuTSE是一个交互式人机协同文本简化评估工具，支持多提示-模型组合的实时对比与语义对齐可视化。

papers.title: TouchAnything: Diffusion-Guided 3D Reconstruction from Sparse Robot Touches
papers.abstract: Accurate object geometry estimation is essential for many downstream tasks, including robotic manipulation and physical interaction. Although vision is the dominant modality for shape perception, it becomes unreliable under occlusions or challenging lighting conditions. In such scenarios, tactile sensing provides direct geometric information through physical contact. However, reconstructing global 3D geometry from sparse local touches alone is fundamentally underconstrained. We present TouchAnything, a framework that leverages a pretrained large-scale 2D vision diffusion model as a semantic and geometric prior for 3D reconstruction from sparse tactile measurements. Unlike prior work that trains category-specific reconstruction networks or learns diffusion models directly from tactile data, we transfer the geometric knowledge encoded in pretrained visual diffusion models to the tactile domain. Given sparse contact constraints and a coarse class-level description of the object, we formulate reconstruction as an optimization problem that enforces tactile consistency while guiding solutions toward shapes consistent with the diffusion prior. Our method reconstructs accurate geometries from only a few touches, outperforms existing baselines, and enables open-world 3D reconstruction of previously unseen object instances. Our project page is https://grange007.github.io/touchanything .

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练视觉扩散模型作为先验，从稀疏触觉测量中重建3D几何。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉在遮挡或光照不佳时不可靠，触觉能提供直接几何信息，但稀疏触觉重建全局3D几何是欠约束问题。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量局部触觉测量中重建准确的全局3D几何。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将预训练2D视觉扩散模型作为语义和几何先验，通过优化问题在触觉约束下引导形状生成。
contributions: 提出利用预训练视觉扩散模型作为触觉重建先验的新框架
仅需少量触觉即可实现开放世界3D重建，优于现有基线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖粗粒度类别描述
可能受扩散模型先验偏差影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练视觉扩散模型作为先验，从稀疏触觉测量中重建3D几何。

papers.title: MASS: Mesh-inellipse Aligned Deformable Surfel Splatting for Hand Reconstruction and Rendering from Egocentric Monocular Video
papers.abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity 3D hands from egocentric monocular videos remains a challenge due to the limitations in capturing high-resolution geometry, hand-object interactions, and complex objects on hands. Additionally, existing methods often incur high computational costs, making them impractical for real-time applications. In this work, we propose Mesh-inellipse Aligned deformable Surfel Splatting (MASS) to address these challenges by leveraging a deformable 2D Gaussian Surfel representation. We introduce the mesh-aligned Steiner Inellipse and fractal densification for mesh-to-surfel conversion that initiates high-resolution 2D Gaussian surfels from coarse parametric hand meshes, providing surface representation with photorealistic rendering potential. Second, we propose Gaussian Surfel Deformation, which enables efficient modeling of hand deformations and personalized features by predicting residual updates to surfel attributes and introducing an opacity mask to refine geometry and texture without adaptive density control. In addition, we propose a two-stage training strategy and a novel binding loss to improve the optimization robustness and reconstruction quality. Extensive experiments on the ARCTIC dataset, the Hand Appearance dataset, and the Interhand2.6M dataset demonstrate that our model achieves superior reconstruction performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出MASS方法，利用可变形2D高斯曲面片从单目视频中高效重建高保真3D手部。
analysis.research_motivation: 从单目视频重建高保真3D手部面临几何分辨率低、手物交互复杂、计算成本高等挑战，现有方法难以兼顾实时性与质量。
analysis.problem: 如何从第一人称单目视频中高效、高质量地重建和渲染3D手部，包括手部变形、个性化特征及手物交互场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MASS框架，包括：1) 网格对齐的Steiner内椭圆和分形加密实现网格到曲面片的转换；2) 高斯曲面片变形模块，通过预测残差更新和透明度掩码优化几何与纹理；3) 两阶段训练策略和绑定损失提升鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出网格对齐的Steiner内椭圆和分形加密方法，从粗参数化手部网格初始化高分辨率2D高斯曲面片。
提出高斯曲面片变形模块，高效建模手部变形和个性化特征，无需自适应密度控制。
提出两阶段训练策略和绑定损失，提升优化鲁棒性和重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在ARCTIC、Hand Appearance和Interhand2.6M数据集上实验，结果表明模型在重建性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始网格，对极端姿态或严重遮挡鲁棒性有限。
实时性未在摘要中明确验证，可能仍需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MASS方法，利用可变形2D高斯曲面片从单目视频中高效重建高保真3D手部。

papers.title: M-IDoL: Information Decomposition for Modality-Specific and Diverse Representation Learning in Medical Foundation Model
papers.abstract: Medical foundation models (MFMs) aim to learn universal representations from multimodal medical images that can generalize effectively to diverse downstream clinical tasks. However, most existing MFMs suffer from information ambiguity that blend multimodal representations in a single embedding space, leading to the degradation of modality specificity and diversity. In this paper, we propose M-IDoL, a self-supervised \underline{\textit{M}}FM that introduces Information Decomposition for multimodal representation Learning via two objectives: i) maximize inter-modality entropy by dispersing multimodal representation into separable Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) subspaces to achieve representation specificity across modalities; and ii) minimize intra-modality uncertainty by performing fine-grained semantic discrimination within each MoE subspace to enrich representation diversity per modality. By pre-training on 1.15 million medical images, M-IDoL i) delivers superior generalization across 21 downstream clinical tasks, outperforming 20 foundation models on five imaging modalities (e.g., X-ray, fundus, OCT, dermoscopy and pathology), and ii) learns modality-specific and diverse representations, showing clearer separation of feature cluster across modalities and finer-grained feature discrimination within each modality.

analysis.tldr: 提出M-IDoL，通过信息分解实现多模态医学图像中模态特异性和表示多样性的自监督学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学基础模型将多模态表示混合在单一嵌入空间，导致信息模糊，缺乏模态特异性和多样性，限制了跨模态下游任务的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态医学图像中学习既具有模态特异性又具有丰富多样性的通用表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出M-IDoL，包含两个目标：1) 通过最大化模态间熵，将多模态表示分散到可分离的MoE子空间，实现模态特异性；2) 通过最小化模态内不确定性，在每个MoE子空间内进行细粒度语义判别，丰富模态内多样性。
contributions: 提出信息分解框架M-IDoL，同时优化模态间熵最大化和模态内不确定性最小化。
在115万医学图像上预训练，在21个下游任务、5种模态上超越20个基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在115万医学图像上预训练，在21个下游临床任务、5种成像模态（X光、眼底、OCT、皮肤镜、病理）上评估，与20个基础模型比较，M-IDoL取得更优泛化性能。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，小规模数据场景下效果未知。
MoE结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出M-IDoL，通过信息分解实现多模态医学图像中模态特异性和表示多样性的自监督学习。

papers.title: Enhancing LLM Problem Solving via Tutor-Student Multi-Agent Interaction
papers.abstract: Human cognitive development is shaped not only by individual effort but by structured social interaction, where role-based exchanges such as those between a tutor and a learner, enable solutions that neither could achieve alone. Inspired by these developmental principles, we ask the question whether a tutor-student multi-agent system can create a synergistic effect by pushing Large Language Model (LLM) beyond what it can do within existing frameworks. To test the idea, we adopt autonomous coding problem domain where two agents instantiated from the same LLM assigned asymmetric roles: a student agent generates and iteratively refines solutions, while a tutor agent provides structured evaluative feedback without access to ground-truth answers. In our proposed framework (PETITE), we aim to extract better problem-solving performance from one model by structuring its interaction through complementary roles, rather than relying on stronger supervisory models or heterogeneous ensembles. Our model is evaluated on the APPS coding benchmark against state-of-the-art approaches of Self-Consistency, Self-Refine, Multi-Agent Debate, and Multi-Agent Review. The results show that our model achieves similar or higher accuracy while consuming significantly fewer tokens. These results suggest that developmentally grounded role-differentiated interaction structures provide a principled and resource-efficient paradigm for enhancing LLM problem-solving through structured peer-like interactions. Index Terms- Peer Tutoring, Scaffolding, Large Language Models, Multi-Agent Systems, Code Generation

analysis.tldr: 通过导师-学生双智能体角色交互，在减少token消耗的同时提升LLM编程问题求解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类认知发展依赖结构化社会互动（如导师-学习者角色交换），而现有LLM框架缺乏这种角色差异化协同机制，导致性能瓶颈或资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何利用同一LLM实例化的两个智能体（导师和学生）通过角色互补交互，在不依赖更强监督模型或异构集成的情况下提升问题求解能力并降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但隐含观察：角色差异化交互可产生协同效应，优于单一模型或对称辩论。
analysis.method: 提出PETITE框架，包含学生智能体（生成并迭代优化代码）和导师智能体（提供结构化评估反馈，不访问真实答案），两者基于同一LLM实例化，通过角色互补交互提升性能。
contributions: 提出一种基于发展心理学原理的导师-学生多智能体交互框架（PETITE），用于增强LLM问题求解。
在APPS编程基准上验证，该方法在达到相似或更高准确率的同时显著减少token消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在APPS编程基准上，与Self-Consistency、Self-Refine、Multi-Agent Debate、Multi-Agent Review对比，PETITE在准确率相当或更高的情况下token消耗更少。
limitations: 仅针对编程问题领域，未验证在其他任务（如数学推理、文本生成）上的泛化性。
导师智能体不访问真实答案，可能限制反馈质量，尤其在复杂问题上。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过导师-学生双智能体角色交互，在减少token消耗的同时提升LLM编程问题求解性能。

papers.title: Customized Fusion: A Closed-Loop Dynamic Network for Adaptive Multi-Task-Aware Infrared-Visible Image Fusion
papers.abstract: Infrared-visible image fusion aims to integrate complementary information for robust visual understanding, but existing fusion methods struggle with simultaneously adapting to multiple downstream tasks. To address this issue, we propose a Closed-Loop Dynamic Network (CLDyN) that can adaptively respond to the semantic requirements of diverse downstream tasks for task-customized image fusion. Specifically, CLDyN introduces a closed-loop optimization mechanism that establishes a semantic transmission chain to achieve explicit feedback from downstream tasks to the fusion network through a Requirement-driven Semantic Compensation (RSC) module. The RSC module leverages a Basis Vector Bank (BVB) and an Architecture-Adaptive Semantic Injection (A2SI) block to customize the network architecture according to task requirements, thereby enabling task-specific semantic compensation and allowing the fusion network to actively adapt to diverse tasks without retraining. To promote semantic compensation, a reward-penalty strategy is introduced to reward or penalize the RSC module based on task performance variations. Experiments on the M3FD, FMB, and VT5000 datasets demonstrate that CLDyN not only maintains high fusion quality but also exhibits strong multi-task adaptability. The code is available at https://github.com/YR0211/CLDyN.

analysis.tldr: 提出闭环动态网络CLDyN，通过需求驱动语义补偿实现红外-可见光图像融合的多任务自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外-可见光图像融合方法难以同时适应多个下游任务，缺乏任务定制能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能根据下游任务语义需求自适应调整的融合网络，无需重新训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出闭环动态网络CLDyN，包含需求驱动语义补偿模块（RSC），利用基向量库（BVB）和架构自适应语义注入块（A2SI）根据任务需求定制网络架构，并采用奖励-惩罚策略优化。
contributions: 提出闭环动态网络CLDyN，实现任务定制的红外-可见光图像融合。
设计需求驱动语义补偿模块（RSC），通过基向量库和架构自适应语义注入实现任务特定语义补偿。
引入奖励-惩罚策略，根据任务性能变化动态调整融合网络。
analysis.experiments: 在M3FD、FMB和VT5000数据集上实验，表明CLDyN保持高融合质量并展现强多任务适应性。
limitations: 可能依赖下游任务反馈的准确性。
基向量库的构建和更新可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出闭环动态网络CLDyN，通过需求驱动语义补偿实现红外-可见光图像融合的多任务自适应。

papers.title: Transformation Categorization Based on Group Decomposition Theory Using Parameter Division
papers.abstract: Representation learning seeks meaningful sensory representations without supervision and can model aspects of human development. Although many neural networks empirically learn useful features, a principled account of what makes a representation "good" remains elusive. We study unsupervised categorization of transformations between pairs of inputs under algebraic constraints. Classical disentanglement favors mutually independent factors and fails when factors are coupled. Our prior Galois-theoretic approach decomposes a group via normal subgroups by learning a product of two transformations with one factor constrained to a normal subgroup, covering both commutative and non-commutative cases. That method, however, relied on auxiliary assumptions (e.g., motion and isometry restrictions) not required by decomposition theory, and ablations did not separate theory-based from auxiliary effects. We propose parameter division for a single transformation: we split its parameter into components, impose homomorphism constraints mapping the full transformation to one component, and identify the normal subgroup as the set of transformations when that component is fixed to the identity. This formulation drops the previous auxiliary assumptions and applies more broadly. We evaluate on image pairs involving rotation, translation, and scale; ablations show that group-decomposition constraints drive appropriate categorization.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于参数划分的群分解方法，无需辅助假设即可对变换进行无监督分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督表征学习中，如何定义“好”的表征缺乏理论依据；经典解耦方法在因子耦合时失效，而先前基于Galois理论的方法依赖辅助假设，限制了适用性。
analysis.problem: 在无监督条件下，对输入对之间的变换进行代数约束下的分类，且不依赖运动、等距等辅助假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将单个变换的参数划分为多个分量，施加同态约束（将完整变换映射到其中一个分量），并将正规子群定义为当该分量为恒等时所有变换的集合。
contributions: 提出参数划分方法，无需辅助假设即可实现基于群分解的变换分类。
在旋转、平移、尺度变换的图像对上验证了群分解约束的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在包含旋转、平移和尺度变换的图像对上进行评估，消融实验表明群分解约束驱动了正确的分类。
limitations: 仅评估了简单几何变换，未涉及更复杂或高维的变换。
方法可能对参数划分方式敏感，需要进一步研究自动划分策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于参数划分的群分解方法，无需辅助假设即可对变换进行无监督分类。

papers.title: Degradation-Robust Fusion: An Efficient Degradation-Aware Diffusion Framework for Multimodal Image Fusion in Arbitrary Degradation Scenarios
papers.abstract: Complex degradations like noise, blur, and low resolution are typical challenges in real world image fusion tasks, limiting the performance and practicality of existing methods. End to end neural network based approaches are generally simple to design and highly efficient in inference, but their black-box nature leads to limited interpretability. Diffusion based methods alleviate this to some extent by providing powerful generative priors and a more structured inference process. However, they are trained to learn a single domain target distribution, whereas fusion lacks natural fused data and relies on modeling complementary information from multiple sources, making diffusion hard to apply directly in practice. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an efficient degradation aware diffusion framework for image fusion under arbitrary degradation scenarios. Specifically, instead of explicitly predicting noise as in conventional diffusion models, our method performs implicit denoising by directly regressing the fused image, enabling flexible adaptation to diverse fusion tasks under complex degradations with limited steps. Moreover, we design a joint observation model correction mechanism that simultaneously imposes degradation and fusion constraints during sampling to ensure high reconstruction accuracy. Experiments on diverse fusion tasks and degradation configurations demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method under complex degradation scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种退化感知扩散框架，通过隐式去噪和联合观测模型校正实现任意退化场景下的多模态图像融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界图像融合中噪声、模糊、低分辨率等复杂退化限制了现有方法的性能和实用性，端到端方法缺乏可解释性，扩散方法难以直接应用于融合任务。
analysis.problem: 如何在任意退化场景下高效、鲁棒地进行多模态图像融合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型学习单域目标分布，而融合任务缺乏自然融合数据且需建模多源互补信息，导致直接应用困难。
analysis.method: 提出退化感知扩散框架：1) 隐式去噪，直接回归融合图像而非预测噪声；2) 联合观测模型校正机制，在采样过程中同时施加退化和融合约束。
contributions: 提出一种退化感知扩散框架，适用于任意退化场景下的多模态图像融合。
设计隐式去噪策略和联合观测模型校正机制，提升融合质量和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种融合任务和退化配置上进行了实验，证明了方法在复杂退化场景下的优越性。
limitations: 可能对极端退化或未见过的退化类型泛化能力有限。
计算效率可能受采样步骤影响，尽管声称高效但未提供具体量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种退化感知扩散框架，通过隐式去噪和联合观测模型校正实现任意退化场景下的多模态图像融合。

papers.title: TAIHRI: Task-Aware 3D Human Keypoints Localization for Close-Range Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D human keypoints localization is a critical technology enabling robots to achieve natural and safe physical interaction with users. Conventional 3D human keypoints estimation methods primarily focus on the whole-body reconstruction quality relative to the root joint. However, in practical human-robot interaction (HRI) scenarios, robots are more concerned with the precise metric-scale spatial localization of task-relevant body parts under the egocentric camera 3D coordinate. We propose TAIHRI, the first Vision-Language Model (VLM) tailored for close-range HRI perception, capable of understanding users' motion commands and directing the robot's attention to the most task-relevant keypoints. By quantizing 3D keypoints into a finite interaction space, TAIHRI precisely localize the 3D spatial coordinates of critical body parts by 2D keypoint reasoning via next token prediction, and seamlessly adapt to downstream tasks such as natural language control or global space human mesh recovery. Experiments on egocentric interaction benchmarks demonstrate that TAIHRI achieves superior estimation accuracy for task-critical body parts. We believe TAIHRI opens new research avenues in the field of embodied human-robot interaction. Code is available at: https://github.com/Tencent/TAIHRI.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向近距离人机交互的VLM，通过量化3D关键点实现任务相关身体部位的精确空间定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D人体关键点估计方法主要关注全身重建质量，但在实际人机交互中，机器人更需在自视角3D坐标下精确获取任务相关身体部位的度量空间位置，现有方法无法满足这一需求。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人理解用户运动指令并聚焦于任务最相关的关键点，实现精确的3D空间定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TAIHRI，首个面向近距离HRI的VLM，通过将3D关键点量化到有限交互空间，利用下一个token预测进行2D关键点推理，从而精确估计任务相关身体部位的3D坐标，并自然适配自然语言控制或全局人体网格恢复等下游任务。
contributions: 首次提出专为近距离人机交互设计的VLM，实现任务感知的3D关键点定位。
提出量化3D关键点空间的方法，通过2D关键点推理实现精确3D坐标估计。
analysis.experiments: 在自视角交互基准上，TAIHRI在任务关键身体部位上取得了更优的估计精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定交互场景的量化空间设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及在非自视角或远距离场景下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个面向近距离人机交互的VLM，通过量化3D关键点实现任务相关身体部位的精确空间定位。

papers.title: Beyond Relevance: Utility-Centric Retrieval in the LLM Era
papers.abstract: Information retrieval systems have traditionally optimized for topical relevance-the degree to which retrieved documents match a query. However, relevance only approximates a deeper goal: utility, namely, whether retrieved information helps accomplish a user's underlying task. The emergence of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) fundamentally changes this paradigm. Retrieved documents are no longer consumed directly by users but instead serve as evidence for large language models (LLMs) that produce answers. As a result, retrieval effectiveness must be evaluated by its contribution to generation quality rather than by relevance-based ranking metrics alone. This tutorial argues that retrieval objectives are evolving from relevance-centric optimization toward LLM-centric utility. We present a unified framework covering LLM-agnostic versus LLM-specific utility, context-independent versus context-dependent utility, and the connection with LLM information needs and agentic RAG. By synthesizing recent advances, the tutorial provides conceptual foundations and practical guidance for designing retrieval systems aligned with the requirements of LLM-based information access.

analysis.tldr: 提出以LLM为中心的效用导向检索框架，替代传统相关性优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统检索系统优化主题相关性，但RAG中检索文档被LLM消费，相关性仅是效用近似，需要新评估标准。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和优化检索对LLM生成质量的效用，而非仅基于相关性排名。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出相关性只是效用的近似，RAG改变了检索目标，需要从相关性转向LLM中心效用。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，涵盖LLM无关/特定效用、上下文无关/依赖效用，并与LLM信息需求和智能体RAG连接。
contributions: 论证检索目标从相关性优化转向LLM中心效用。
提供概念基础和实用指南，用于设计对齐LLM需求的检索系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能缺乏实证验证。
效用定义可能因任务而异，难以统一。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以LLM为中心的效用导向检索框架，替代传统相关性优化。

papers.title: MV3DIS: Multi-View Mask Matching via 3D Guides for Zero-Shot 3D Instance Segmentation
papers.abstract: Conventional 3D instance segmentation methods rely on labor-intensive 3D annotations for supervised training, which limits their scalability and generalization to novel objects. Recent approaches leverage multi-view 2D masks from the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to guide the merging of 3D geometric primitives, thereby enabling zero-shot 3D instance segmentation. However, these methods typically process each frame independently and rely solely on 2D metrics, such as SAM prediction scores, to produce segmentation maps. This design overlooks multi-view correlations and inherent 3D priors, leading to inconsistent 2D masks across views and ultimately fragmented 3D segmentation. In this paper, we propose MV3DIS, a coarse-to-fine framework for zero-shot 3D instance segmentation that explicitly incorporates 3D priors. Specifically, we introduce a 3D-guided mask matching strategy that uses coarse 3D segments as a common reference to match 2D masks across views and consolidates multi-view mask consistency via 3D coverage distributions. Guided by these view-consistent 2D masks, the coarse 3D segments are further refined into precise 3D instances. Additionally, we introduce a depth consistency weighting scheme that quantifies projection reliability to suppress ambiguities from inter-object occlusions, thereby improving the robustness of 3D-to-2D correspondence. Extensive experiments on the ScanNetV2, ScanNet200, ScanNet++, Replica, and Matterport3D datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of MV3DIS, which achieves superior performance over previous methods

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用3D先验引导多视图2D掩码匹配的零样本3D实例分割框架，有效解决跨视图掩码不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D实例分割依赖大量人工3D标注，限制了其对新物体的泛化能力；现有零样本方法独立处理每帧图像且仅依赖2D指标，忽略了多视图相关性和3D先验，导致分割碎片化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用3D先验信息实现多视图2D掩码的跨视图一致性匹配，从而提升零样本3D实例分割的精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法独立处理每帧并仅依赖2D指标（如SAM预测分数），导致跨视图2D掩码不一致，最终3D分割碎片化。
analysis.method: 提出MV3DIS粗到细框架：1）3D引导掩码匹配：以粗3D片段为公共参考匹配多视图2D掩码；2）通过3D覆盖分布整合多视图掩码一致性；3）深度一致性加权方案量化投影可靠性，抑制物体间遮挡歧义。
contributions: 提出一种显式利用3D先验的零样本3D实例分割框架，通过3D引导掩码匹配策略实现跨视图2D掩码一致性。
引入深度一致性加权方案，有效处理遮挡导致的投影歧义，提升3D-2D对应鲁棒性。
在多个基准数据集上取得领先性能，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNetV2、ScanNet200、ScanNet++、Replica和Matterport3D数据集上进行实验，结果表明MV3DIS优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖粗3D片段的质量，若初始分割不佳会影响后续匹配。
深度一致性加权方案可能对深度噪声敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种利用3D先验引导多视图2D掩码匹配的零样本3D实例分割框架，有效解决跨视图掩码不一致问题。

papers.title: M$^\star$: Every Task Deserves Its Own Memory Harness
papers.abstract: Large language model agents rely on specialized memory systems to accumulate and reuse knowledge during extended interactions. Recent architectures typically adopt a fixed memory design tailored to specific domains, such as semantic retrieval for conversations or skills reused for coding. However, a memory system optimized for one purpose frequently fails to transfer to others. To address this limitation, we introduce M$^\star$, a method that automatically discovers task-optimized memory harnesses through executable program evolution. Specifically, M$^\star$ models an agent memory system as a memory program written in Python. This program encapsulates the data Schema, the storage Logic, and the agent workflow Instructions. We optimize these components jointly using a reflective code evolution method; this approach employs a population-based search strategy and analyzes evaluation failures to iteratively refine the candidate programs. We evaluate M$^\star$ on four distinct benchmarks spanning conversation, embodied planning, and expert reasoning. Our results demonstrate that M$^\star$ improves performance over existing fixed-memory baselines robustly across all evaluated tasks. Furthermore, the evolved memory programs exhibit structurally distinct processing mechanisms for each domain. This finding indicates that specializing the memory mechanism for a given task explores a broad design space and provides a superior solution compared to general-purpose memory paradigms.

analysis.tldr: 提出M*方法，通过程序进化自动发现任务优化的记忆系统，在多个基准上超越固定记忆基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent记忆系统针对特定领域设计，无法跨任务迁移，缺乏通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动为不同任务生成专用的、优化的记忆系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定记忆设计在不同任务上表现差异大，进化出的记忆程序在不同领域具有结构不同的处理机制。
analysis.method: 将记忆系统建模为Python程序（包含数据Schema、存储逻辑和Agent工作流指令），通过基于种群搜索和失败分析的反射式代码进化方法联合优化。
contributions: 提出M*方法，自动发现任务优化的记忆系统。
在对话、具身规划、专家推理等四个基准上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个不同基准（对话、具身规划、专家推理）上评估，M*在所有任务上稳健地优于固定记忆基线。
limitations: 可能依赖Python程序的可进化性，对复杂任务可能搜索空间大。
未讨论进化计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出M*方法，通过程序进化自动发现任务优化的记忆系统，在多个基准上超越固定记忆基线。

papers.title: Large-Scale Universal Defect Generation: Foundation Models and Datasets
papers.abstract: Existing defect/anomaly generation methods often rely on few-shot learning, which overfits to specific defect categories due to the lack of large-scale paired defect editing data. This issue is aggravated by substantial variations in defect scale and morphology, resulting in limited generalization, degraded realism, and category consistency. We address these challenges by introducing UDG, a large-scale dataset of 300K normal-abnormal-mask-caption quadruplets spanning diverse domains, and by presenting UniDG, a universal defect generation foundation model that supports both reference-based defect generation and text instruction-based defect editing without per-category fine-tuning. UniDG performs Defect-Context Editing via adaptive defect cropping and structured diptych input format, and fuses reference and target conditions through MM-DiT multimodal attention. A two-stage training strategy, Diversity-SFT followed by Consistency-RFT, further improves diversity while enhancing realism and reference consistency. Extensive experiments on MVTec-AD and VisA show that UniDG outperforms prior few-shot anomaly generation and image insertion/editing baselines in synthesis quality and downstream single- and multi-class anomaly detection/localization. Code will be available at https://github.com/RetoFan233/UniDG.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模缺陷生成数据集UDG和基础模型UniDG，通过两阶段训练和缺陷-上下文编辑实现通用缺陷生成，提升异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有缺陷生成方法依赖小样本学习，因缺乏大规模配对数据而容易过拟合特定缺陷类别，且缺陷尺度和形态变化大导致泛化性差、真实感和类别一致性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模通用缺陷生成数据集和模型，支持参考图像和文本指令驱动的缺陷生成，无需逐类别微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建300K正常-异常-掩码-文本四元组数据集UDG；提出UniDG模型，采用自适应缺陷裁剪和结构化双联输入格式进行缺陷-上下文编辑，通过MM-DiT多模态注意力融合参考和目标条件；两阶段训练策略：Diversity-SFT提升多样性，Consistency-RFT增强真实感和参考一致性。
contributions: 构建大规模通用缺陷生成数据集UDG，包含300K四元组，覆盖多种领域。
提出UniDG基础模型，支持参考和文本指令驱动的缺陷生成，无需逐类别微调。
设计两阶段训练策略和缺陷-上下文编辑方法，提升生成多样性和真实感。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec-AD和VisA数据集上，UniDG在合成质量以及下游单类和多类异常检测/定位任务中优于先前的小样本异常生成和图像插入/编辑基线。
limitations: 数据集和模型可能对极端罕见缺陷类型覆盖不足。
两阶段训练策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模缺陷生成数据集UDG和基础模型UniDG，通过两阶段训练和缺陷-上下文编辑实现通用缺陷生成，提升异常检测性能。

papers.title: StaRPO: Stability-Augmented Reinforcement Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is effective in enhancing the accuracy of large language models in complex reasoning tasks. Existing RL policy optimization frameworks rely on final-answer correctness as feedback signals and rarely capture the internal logical structure of the reasoning process. Consequently, the models would generate fluent and semantically relevant responses but logically inconsistent, structurally erratic, or redundant. To this end, we propose StaRPO, a stability-augmented reinforcement learning framework that explicitly incorporates reasoning stability into the optimization objective. Our StaRPO decomposes stability into two computable lightweight metrics: the Autocorrelation Function (ACF) to evaluate local step-to-step coherence, and Path Efficiency (PE) to evaluate global goal-directedness of the reasoning trajectory. These stability rewards are combined with task rewards to provide complementary and process-aware feedback. We validate the effectiveness of using ACF and PE rewards by showing their correlation with logic errors on two backbone models. Experiments on four reasoning benchmarks show that StaRPO consistently outperforms compared baselines and can enhance both final-answer accuracy and logical stability.

analysis.tldr: StaRPO通过引入推理稳定性指标（ACF和PE）作为奖励信号，提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的准确性和逻辑一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习策略优化框架仅依赖最终答案正确性作为反馈，忽略了推理过程的内部逻辑结构，导致模型生成流畅但逻辑不一致、结构混乱或冗余的响应。
analysis.problem: 如何将推理稳定性显式地纳入强化学习优化目标，以提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的逻辑一致性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出现有方法生成的响应存在逻辑不一致、结构混乱或冗余的问题。
analysis.method: 提出StaRPO框架，将推理稳定性分解为两个轻量级指标：自相关函数（ACF）评估局部步骤间连贯性，路径效率（PE）评估推理轨迹的全局目标导向性；将这些稳定性奖励与任务奖励结合，提供过程感知的互补反馈。
contributions: 提出StaRPO框架，显式地将推理稳定性纳入强化学习优化目标。
设计两个轻量级稳定性指标（ACF和PE），分别评估局部连贯性和全局目标导向性。
在四个推理基准上验证了StaRPO在提升最终答案准确性和逻辑稳定性方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个推理基准上，使用两个骨干模型进行实验，StaRPO一致优于对比基线。
limitations: 稳定性指标的计算可能引入额外开销，尽管声称轻量级。
方法可能对特定任务或模型架构敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StaRPO通过引入推理稳定性指标（ACF和PE）作为奖励信号，提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的准确性和逻辑一致性。

papers.title: Fast Model-guided Instance-wise Adaptation Framework for Real-world Pansharpening with Fidelity Constraints
papers.abstract: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) images by fusing low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) and high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) images while preserving both spectral and spatial information. Although deep learning (DL)-based pansharpening methods achieve impressive performance, they require high training cost and large datasets, and often degrade when the test distribution differs from training, limiting generalization. Recent zero-shot methods, trained on a single PAN/LRMS pair, offer strong generalization but suffer from limited fusion quality, high computational overhead, and slow convergence. To address these issues, we propose FMG-Pan, a fast and generalizable model-guided instance-wise adaptation framework for real-world pansharpening, achieving both cross-sensor generality and rapid training-inference. The framework leverages a pretrained model to guide a lightweight adaptive network through joint optimization with spectral and physical fidelity constraints. We further design a novel physical fidelity term to enhance spatial detail preservation. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets under both intra- and cross-sensor settings demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. On the WorldView-3 dataset, FMG-Pan completes training and inference for a 512x512x8 image within 3 seconds on an RTX 3090 GPU, significantly faster than existing zero-shot methods, making it suitable for practical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出快速模型引导的实例级自适应框架FMG-Pan，通过预训练模型引导轻量网络联合优化保真度约束，实现跨传感器泛化和快速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习全色锐化方法训练成本高、泛化性差，零样本方法融合质量有限且计算开销大，亟需一种快速、通用且保真度高的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决全色锐化中跨传感器泛化性差、零样本方法融合质量低和计算效率低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预训练模型引导轻量自适应网络，通过联合优化光谱保真度和物理保真度约束（含新设计的物理保真项）进行实例级自适应。
contributions: 提出FMG-Pan框架，实现快速、跨传感器泛化的全色锐化。
设计新的物理保真度项增强空间细节保留。
在真实数据集上达到SOTA性能，且训练推理速度显著优于现有零样本方法。
analysis.experiments: 在WorldView-3等真实数据集上进行内传感器和跨传感器实验，FMG-Pan在512x512x8图像上3秒内完成训练和推理（RTX 3090），性能SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的质量。
物理保真项的设计可能对特定传感器敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出快速模型引导的实例级自适应框架FMG-Pan，通过预训练模型引导轻量网络联合优化保真度约束，实现跨传感器泛化和快速推理。

papers.title: Training Language Models for Bilateral Trade with Private Information
papers.abstract: Bilateral bargaining under incomplete information provides a controlled testbed for evaluating large language model (LLM) agent capabilities. Bilateral trade demands individual rationality, strategic surplus maximization, and cooperation to realize gains from trade. We develop a structured bargaining environment where LLMs negotiate via tool calls within an event-driven simulator, separating binding offers from natural-language messages to enable automated evaluation. The environment serves two purposes: as a benchmark for frontier models and as a training environment for open-weight models via reinforcement learning. In benchmark experiments, a round-robin tournament among five frontier models (15,000 negotiations) reveals that effective strategies implement price discrimination through sequential offers. Aggressive anchoring, calibrated concession, and temporal patience correlate with the highest surplus share and deal rate. Accommodating strategies that concede quickly disable price discrimination in the buyer role, yielding the lowest surplus capture and deal completion. Stronger models scale their behavior proportionally to item value, maintaining performance across price tiers; weaker models perform well only when wide zones of possible agreement offset suboptimal strategies. In training experiments, we fine-tune Qwen3 (8B, 14B) via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) against a fixed frontier opponent. These stages optimize competing objectives: SFT approximately doubles surplus share but reduces deal rates, while RL recovers deal rates but erodes surplus gains, reflecting the reward structure. SFT also compresses surplus variation across price tiers, which generalizes to unseen opponents, suggesting that behavioral cloning instills proportional strategies rather than memorized price points.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习训练语言模型在不完全信息双边贸易中实现策略性谈判。
analysis.research_motivation: 双边谈判是不完全信息下的经典博弈场景，现有LLM Agent在此类任务中缺乏系统训练和评估框架，且开放权重模型性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建结构化谈判环境，并利用强化学习训练LLM在双边贸易中实现个体理性、策略性剩余最大化和合作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基准实验发现：有效策略通过序贯报价实现价格歧视，激进锚定、校准让步和时间耐心与高剩余份额和高成交率相关；弱势模型仅在宽协议区间时表现良好。训练实验显示SFT提高剩余份额但降低成交率，RL恢复成交率但侵蚀剩余收益，反映奖励结构冲突。
analysis.method: 构建事件驱动的谈判环境，分离绑定报价与自然语言消息；对Qwen3 (8B, 14B) 进行SFT后接GRPO训练，对手固定为前沿模型。
contributions: 提出一个用于评估和训练LLM谈判能力的结构化双边贸易环境。
通过基准实验揭示前沿模型的有效谈判策略（价格歧视、锚定、让步节奏）。
展示SFT和RL在优化竞争目标时的权衡，并发现SFT学到的比例策略可泛化到未见对手。
analysis.experiments: 基准实验：5个前沿模型进行15,000场循环赛；训练实验：Qwen3 (8B, 14B) 经SFT+GRPO训练，与固定前沿对手对抗。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅测试了Qwen3系列，未验证其他开放权重模型。
训练对手固定，可能限制策略泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过强化学习训练语言模型在不完全信息双边贸易中实现策略性谈判。

papers.title: GeoMMBench and GeoMMAgent: Toward Expert-Level Multimodal Intelligence in Geoscience and Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have accelerated progress in domain-oriented AI, yet their development in geoscience and remote sensing (RS) remains constrained by distinctive challenges: wide-ranging disciplinary knowledge, heterogeneous sensor modalities, and a fragmented spectrum of tasks. To bridge these gaps, we introduce GeoMMBench, a comprehensive multimodal question-answering benchmark covering diverse RS disciplines, sensors, and tasks, enabling broader and more rigorous evaluation than prior benchmarks. Using GeoMMBench, we assess 36 open-source and proprietary large language models, uncovering systematic deficiencies in domain knowledge, perceptual grounding, and reasoning--capabilities essential for expert-level geospatial interpretation. Beyond evaluation, we propose GeoMMAgent, a multi-agent framework that strategically integrates retrieval, perception, and reasoning through domain-specific RS models and tools. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that GeoMMAgent significantly outperforms standalone LLMs, underscoring the importance of tool-augmented agents for dynamically tackling complex geoscience and RS challenges.

analysis.tldr: 提出地理遥感多模态基准GeoMMBench和智能体框架GeoMMAgent，揭示现有MLLM在领域知识、感知和推理上的不足，并验证工具增强智能体的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 地理遥感领域面临学科知识广泛、传感器模态异构、任务碎片化等挑战，现有MLLM缺乏系统性评估和专家级能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏覆盖多学科、多传感器、多任务的地理遥感多模态问答基准，以及能动态整合领域工具的高性能智能体框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估36个开源和专有LLM发现，它们在领域知识、感知基础和推理能力上存在系统性缺陷，这些能力对专家级地理空间解释至关重要。
analysis.method: 构建GeoMMBench基准，并提出GeoMMAgent多智能体框架，通过检索、感知和推理策略集成领域专用RS模型和工具。
contributions: 提出GeoMMBench，一个覆盖多种遥感学科、传感器和任务的综合多模态问答基准。
系统评估36个LLM，揭示其在领域知识、感知和推理上的不足。
提出GeoMMAgent多智能体框架，显著优于独立LLM，验证工具增强智能体的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在GeoMMBench上评估36个开源和专有LLM，并对比GeoMMAgent与独立LLM的性能，实验结果显示GeoMMAgent显著更优。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有遥感子领域或最新传感器。
智能体框架依赖外部工具，可能引入额外延迟或错误。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出地理遥感多模态基准GeoMMBench和智能体框架GeoMMAgent，揭示现有MLLM在领域知识、感知和推理上的不足，并验证工具增强智能体的有效性。

papers.title: Ge$^\text{2}$mS-T: Multi-Dimensional Grouping for Ultra-High Energy Efficiency in Spiking Transformer
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer superior energy efficiency over Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, they encounter significant deficiencies in training and inference metrics when applied to Spiking Vision Transformers (S-ViTs). Existing paradigms including ANN-SNN Conversion and Spatial-Temporal Backpropagation (STBP) suffer from inherent limitations, precluding concurrent optimization of memory, accuracy and energy consumption. To address these issues, we propose Ge$^\text{2}$mS-T, a novel architecture implementing grouped computation across temporal, spatial and network structure dimensions. Specifically, we introduce the Grouped-Exponential-Coding-based IF (ExpG-IF) model, enabling lossless conversion with constant training overhead and precise regulation for spike patterns. Additionally, we develop Group-wise Spiking Self-Attention (GW-SSA) to reduce computational complexity via multi-scale token grouping and multiplication-free operations within a hybrid attention-convolution framework. Experiments confirm that our method can achieve superior performance with ultra-high energy efficiency on challenging benchmarks. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to systematically establish multi-dimensional grouped computation for resolving the triad of memory overhead, learning capability and energy budget in S-ViTs.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ge²mS-T，通过时间、空间和网络结构维度的分组计算，在脉冲Transformer中实现超高能效。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）相比人工神经网络（ANN）具有优越的能效，但在脉冲视觉Transformer（S-ViT）中训练和推理指标存在显著缺陷，现有方法（ANN-SNN转换、时空反向传播）无法同时优化内存、精度和能耗。
analysis.problem: 解决S-ViT中内存开销、学习能力和能量预算三者之间的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有范式（ANN-SNN转换和STBP）存在固有限制，无法同时优化内存、精度和能耗。
analysis.method: 提出Ge²mS-T架构，包含Grouped-Exponential-Coding-based IF (ExpG-IF)模型实现无损转换和精确调控，以及Group-wise Spiking Self-Attention (GW-SSA)通过多尺度令牌分组和无乘法操作降低计算复杂度。
contributions: 首次系统性地建立多维分组计算来解决S-ViT中的内存、学习能力和能量预算三难问题。
提出ExpG-IF模型和GW-SSA机制，实现超高能效和优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在具有挑战性的基准测试上验证了方法能实现优越性能和超高能效。
limitations: 可能仅在视觉Transformer任务上验证，未提及在其他模态的泛化性。
分组计算可能引入额外的设计复杂度和调参成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ge²mS-T，通过时间、空间和网络结构维度的分组计算，在脉冲Transformer中实现超高能效。

papers.title: Adaptive Dual Residual U-Net with Attention Gate and Multiscale Spatial Attention Mechanisms (ADRUwAMS)
papers.abstract: Glioma is a harmful brain tumor that requires early detection to ensure better health results. Early detection of this tumor is key for effective treatment and requires an automated segmentation process. However, it is a challenging task to find tumors due to tumor characteristics like location and size. A reliable method to accurately separate tumor zones from healthy tissues is deep learning models, which have shown promising results over the last few years. In this research, an Adaptive Dual Residual U-Net with Attention Gate and Multiscale Spatial Attention Mechanisms (ADRUwAMS) is introduced. This model is an innovative combination of adaptive dual residual networks, attention mechanisms, and multiscale spatial attention. The dual adaptive residual network architecture captures high-level semantic and intricate low-level details from brain images, ensuring precise segmentation of different tumor parts, types, and hard regions. The attention gates use gating and input signals to compute attention coefficients for the input features, and multiscale spatial attention generates scaled attention maps and combines these features to hold the most significant information about the brain tumor. We trained the model for 200 epochs using the ReLU activation function on BraTS 2020 and BraTS 2019 datasets. These improvements resulted in high accuracy for tumor detection and segmentation on BraTS 2020, achieving dice scores of 0.9229 for the whole tumor, 0.8432 for the tumor core, and 0.8004 for the enhancing tumor.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合自适应双残差网络、注意力门和多尺度空间注意力的U-Net变体，用于脑肿瘤分割，在BraTS 2020上取得高Dice分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑胶质瘤早期检测对治疗至关重要，但肿瘤位置和大小多样导致自动分割困难，现有深度学习方法仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 如何设计网络结构以同时捕捉高维语义和低维细节，实现脑肿瘤不同子区域的精确分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ADRUwAMS模型，包含自适应双残差U-Net主干、注意力门（利用门控和输入信号计算注意力系数）和多尺度空间注意力（生成缩放注意力图并融合特征）。
contributions: 创新性地组合自适应双残差网络、注意力门和多尺度空间注意力机制。
在BraTS 2020和BraTS 2019数据集上验证，全肿瘤Dice达0.9229。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2020和BraTS 2019数据集上训练200轮，使用ReLU激活函数，报告了BraTS 2020上全肿瘤、肿瘤核心和增强肿瘤的Dice分数。
limitations: 仅在单一模态（MRI）和特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他先进方法进行充分对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合自适应双残差网络、注意力门和多尺度空间注意力的U-Net变体，用于脑肿瘤分割，在BraTS 2020上取得高Dice分数。

papers.title: A Closer Look at the Application of Causal Inference in Graph Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Modeling causal relationships in graph representation learning remains a fundamental challenge. Existing approaches often draw on theories and methods from causal inference to identify causal subgraphs or mitigate confounders. However, due to the inherent complexity of graph-structured data, these approaches frequently aggregate diverse graph elements into single causal variables, an operation that risks violating the core assumptions of causal inference. In this work, we prove that such aggregation compromises causal validity. Building on this conclusion, we propose a theoretical model grounded in the smallest indivisible units of graph data to ensure that the causal validity is guaranteed. With this model, we further analyze the costs of achieving precise causal modeling in graph representation learning and identify the conditions under which the problem can be simplified. To empirically support our theory, we construct a controllable synthetic dataset that reflects realworld causal structures and conduct extensive experiments for validation. Finally, we develop a causal modeling enhancement module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing graph learning pipelines, and we demonstrate its effectiveness through comprehensive comparative experiments.

analysis.tldr: 证明图表示学习中聚合操作会破坏因果有效性，并提出基于最小不可分单元的理论模型与增强模块。
analysis.research_motivation: 图表示学习中因果关系的建模是核心挑战，现有方法常将不同图元素聚合为单一因果变量，可能违反因果推断的基本假设，导致因果有效性受损。
analysis.problem: 图表示学习中聚合操作对因果有效性的影响，以及如何保证因果建模的正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法将多样图元素聚合为单一因果变量会破坏因果有效性，并证明了这一结论。
analysis.method: 提出基于图数据最小不可分单元的理论模型以保证因果有效性，并分析精确因果建模的成本与简化条件；开发可无缝集成到现有图学习流程的因果建模增强模块。
contributions: 证明了图表示学习中聚合操作会损害因果有效性。
提出了基于最小不可分单元的因果建模理论模型，并分析了简化条件。
构建了可控合成数据集并开发了因果建模增强模块，实验验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在可控合成数据集上进行实验，并通过综合对比实验验证了增强模块的有效性。
limitations: 理论模型可能仅适用于特定类型的图结构。
增强模块的实际性能提升可能依赖于具体任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明图表示学习中聚合操作会破坏因果有效性，并提出基于最小不可分单元的理论模型与增强模块。

papers.title: HM-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models in Hyperspectral Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made significant strides in natural image understanding, their ability to perceive and reason over hyperspectral image (HSI) remains underexplored, which is a vital modality in remote sensing. The high dimensionality and intricate spectral-spatial properties of HSI pose unique challenges for models primarily trained on RGB data.To address this gap, we introduce Hyperspectral Multimodal Benchmark (HM-Bench), the first benchmark designed specifically to evaluate MLLMs in HSI understanding. We curate a large-scale dataset of 19,337 question-answer pairs across 13 task categories, ranging from basic perception to spectral reasoning. Given that existing MLLMs are not equipped to process raw hyperspectral cubes natively, we propose a dual-modality evaluation framework that transforms HSI data into two complementary representations: PCA-based composite images and structured textual reports. This approach facilitates a systematic comparison of different representation for model performance. Extensive evaluations on 18 representative MLLMs reveal significant difficulties in handling complex spatial-spectral reasoning tasks. Furthermore, our results demonstrate that visual inputs generally outperform textual inputs, highlighting the importance of grounding in spectral-spatial evidence for effective HSI understanding. Dataset and appendix can be accessed at https://github.com/HuoRiLi-Yu/HM-Bench.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对高光谱遥感图像理解的多模态大语言模型基准HM-Bench，揭示了现有MLLM在复杂光谱-空间推理上的困难。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型在自然图像理解上取得显著进展，但高光谱图像作为遥感中关键模态，其高维度和复杂光谱-空间特性对主要基于RGB数据训练的模型构成独特挑战，目前缺乏专门评估MLLM在高光谱图像理解能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 现有MLLM无法原生处理高光谱数据，且缺乏系统评估其在HSI感知与推理能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对18个代表性MLLM的评估显示，模型在处理复杂空间-光谱推理任务时存在显著困难；视觉输入通常优于文本输入，表明基于光谱-空间证据的接地对于有效理解HSI至关重要。
analysis.method: 构建包含19,337个问答对、覆盖13个任务类别的大规模数据集，并提出双模态评估框架，将HSI数据转化为PCA复合图像和结构化文本报告两种互补表示，以系统比较不同表示对模型性能的影响。
contributions: 首次提出专门评估MLLM在高光谱图像理解能力的基准HM-Bench，包含大规模数据集和13个任务类别。
提出双模态评估框架，将HSI数据转化为PCA图像和文本报告，便于现有MLLM处理。
通过广泛评估揭示现有MLLM在光谱-空间推理上的不足，并证明视觉输入优于文本输入。
analysis.experiments: 在18个代表性MLLM上进行了广泛评估，结果显示模型在复杂空间-光谱推理任务上表现困难，且视觉输入优于文本输入。
limitations: 仅评估了基于PCA和文本报告的表示方式，其他HSI表示方法（如光谱波段子集）未探索。
基准主要关注静态图像理解，未涉及视频或实时高光谱数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对高光谱遥感图像理解的多模态大语言模型基准HM-Bench，揭示了现有MLLM在复杂光谱-空间推理上的困难。

papers.title: HTNav: A Hybrid Navigation Framework with Tiered Structure for Urban Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Inspired by the general Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task, aerial VLN has attracted widespread attention, owing to its significant practical value in applications such as logistics delivery and urban inspection. However, existing methods face several challenges in complex urban environments, including insufficient generalization to unseen scenes, suboptimal performance in long-range path planning, and inadequate understanding of spatial continuity. To address these challenges, we propose HTNav, a new collaborative navigation framework that integrates Imitation Learning (IL) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) within a hybrid IL-RL framework. This framework adopts a staged training mechanism to ensure the stability of the basic navigation strategy while enhancing its environmental exploration capability. By integrating a tiered decision-making mechanism, it achieves collaborative interaction between macro-level path planning and fine-grained action control. Furthermore, a map representation learning module is introduced to deepen its understanding of spatial continuity in open domains. On the CityNav benchmark, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across all scene levels and task difficulties. Experimental results demonstrate that this framework significantly improves navigation precision and robustness in complex urban environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合IL-RL框架HTNav，通过分层决策和地图表征学习提升城市空中VLN的导航精度与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市空中VLN在物流配送、巡检等应用中价值显著，但现有方法在复杂城市环境中泛化性差、长程路径规划效果不佳、空间连续性理解不足。
analysis.problem: 解决城市空中VLN在未见场景中的泛化不足、长程路径规划次优以及空间连续性理解欠缺的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HTNav混合IL-RL框架，采用分阶段训练机制稳定基础策略并增强探索能力，集成分层决策实现宏观路径规划与细粒度动作控制的协同，引入地图表征学习模块加深对开放域空间连续性的理解。
contributions: 提出混合IL-RL框架HTNav，结合模仿学习与强化学习实现稳定与探索的平衡。
引入分层决策机制和地图表征学习模块，提升长程路径规划和空间连续性理解。
在CityNav基准上达到所有场景和任务难度的最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CityNav基准上评估，方法在所有场景级别和任务难度上取得最优结果，显著提升导航精度和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定城市环境数据，泛化到其他类型场景需验证。
混合IL-RL框架的训练复杂度较高，计算资源需求可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合IL-RL框架HTNav，通过分层决策和地图表征学习提升城市空中VLN的导航精度与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Precise Shield: Explaining and Aligning VLLM Safety via Neuron-Level Guidance
papers.abstract: In real-world deployments, Vision-Language Large Models (VLLMs) face critical challenges from multilingual and multimodal composite attacks: harmful images paired with low-resource language texts can easily bypass defenses designed for high-resource language scenarios, exposing structural blind spots in current cross-lingual and cross-modal safety methods. This raises a mechanistic question: where is safety capability instantiated within the model, and how is it distributed across languages and modalities? Prior studies on pure-text LLMs have identified cross-lingual shared safety neurons, suggesting that safety may be governed by a small subset of critical neurons. Leveraging this insight, we propose Precise Shield, a two-stage framework that first identifies safety neurons by contrasting activation patterns between harmful and benign inputs, and then constrains parameter updates strictly within this subspace via gradient masking with affecting fewer than 0.03% of parameters. This strategy substantially improves safety while preserving multilingual and multimodal generalization. Further analysis reveals a moderate overlap of safety neurons across languages and modalities, enabling zero-shot cross-lingual and cross-modal transfer of safety capabilities, and offering a new direction for neuron-level, transfer-based safety enhancement.

analysis.tldr: 通过神经元级梯度掩码，仅更新0.03%参数即可提升VLLM多语言多模态安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLLM在多语言多模态复合攻击下存在安全盲区，现有防御方法难以覆盖低资源语言场景，亟需理解安全能力的神经机制并实现高效对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何定位VLLM中跨语言和跨模态共享的安全神经元，并仅通过极小参数更新实现安全对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 安全能力由少量关键神经元控制，且这些神经元在语言和模态间存在中等程度的重叠，支持零样本迁移。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：1) 通过有害/良性输入激活对比识别安全神经元；2) 在安全神经元子空间内进行梯度掩码，约束参数更新（影响<0.03%参数）。
contributions: 提出Precise Shield框架，通过神经元级梯度掩码实现高效安全对齐。
发现安全神经元在语言和模态间存在中等重叠，支持零样本跨语言和跨模态安全迁移。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 安全神经元识别依赖对比激活模式，可能受数据分布影响。
仅验证了中等重叠，完全跨语言/模态迁移的边界未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过神经元级梯度掩码，仅更新0.03%参数即可提升VLLM多语言多模态安全性。

papers.title: Revisiting the Capacity Gap in Chain-of-Thought Distillation from a Practical Perspective
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) distillation transfers reasoning behaviors from a strong teacher to a smaller student, but prior work reports a capacity gap: distillation may fail when the teacher-student capability mismatch is large. We revisit the capacity gap from a practical perspective by re-examining commonly used experimental settings. Notably, we find that CoT distillation often degrades performance compared to the student's pre-distillation baseline, an issue obscured when only post-distillation comparisons are reported. We therefore propose a more realistic evaluation protocol and find that the impact of capacity gap effects does not consistently dominate across tasks and settings, especially when candidate teachers differ substantially in performance. Our results offer practical guidance for selecting teacher-student pairs in CoT distillation.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视思维链蒸馏中的能力差距，发现常用评估设置掩盖了蒸馏后性能下降的问题，并提出更现实的评估协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 思维链蒸馏旨在将强教师模型的推理能力迁移到小模型，但先前工作报告了能力差距问题：师生能力不匹配时蒸馏可能失败。然而，现有评估方式可能不全面，导致实际应用中的性能退化被忽视。
analysis.problem: 现有CoT蒸馏评估中，仅报告蒸馏后与教师或学生的比较，忽略了蒸馏后学生相对于自身蒸馏前基线的性能变化，从而可能掩盖蒸馏导致的性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现CoT蒸馏常导致学生性能低于其蒸馏前基线，而先前工作仅关注蒸馏后比较，未揭示此退化现象。能力差距的影响并非在所有任务和设置中一致主导，尤其在教师性能差异显著时。
analysis.method: 提出更现实的评估协议：比较蒸馏后学生与自身蒸馏前基线的性能，并系统分析不同师生能力差距下的蒸馏效果。
contributions: 揭示CoT蒸馏中常被忽视的性能退化现象，即学生蒸馏后性能低于其基线。
提出更现实的评估协议，并发现能力差距的影响并非一致主导，为实际选择师生对提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有类型的CoT蒸馏方法或任务。
评估协议的有效性需更多实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 重新审视思维链蒸馏中的能力差距，发现常用评估设置掩盖了蒸馏后性能下降的问题，并提出更现实的评估协议。

papers.title: Harnessing Weak Pair Uncertainty for Text-based Person Search
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study the text-based person search, which is to retrieve the person of interest via natural language description. Prevailing methods usually focus on the strict one-to-one correspondence pair matching between the visual and textual modality, such as contrastive learning. However, such a paradigm unintentionally disregards the weak positive image-text pairs, which are of the same person but the text descriptions are annotated from different views (cameras). To take full use of weak positives, we introduce an uncertainty-aware method to explicitly estimate image-text pair uncertainty, and incorporate the uncertainty into the optimization procedure in a smooth manner. Specifically, our method contains two modules: uncertainty estimation and uncertainty regularization. (1) Uncertainty estimation is to obtain the relative confidence on the given positive pairs; (2) Based on the predicted uncertainty, we propose the uncertainty regularization to adaptively adjust loss weight. Additionally, we introduce a group-wise image-text matching loss to further facilitate the representation space among the weak pairs. Compared with existing methods, the proposed method explicitly prevents the model from pushing away potentially weak positive candidates. Extensive experiments on three widely-used datasets, .e.g, CUHK-PEDES, RSTPReid and ICFG-PEDES, verify the mAP improvement of our method against existing competitive methods +3.06%, +3.55% and +6.94%, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性感知方法，利用弱正样本对提升文本行人搜索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本行人搜索方法通常只关注严格的一对一匹配，忽略了同一行人不同视角描述的弱正样本对，导致模型可能错误推开这些潜在正样本。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用弱正图像-文本对（同一行人但不同视角描述）来提升文本行人搜索的匹配性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出对比学习等范式无意中忽略了弱正样本对，这些对虽属同一行人但描述来自不同视角，模型可能将其视为负样本而推开。
analysis.method: 提出不确定性感知方法，包含不确定性估计模块（获取正样本对的相对置信度）和不确定性正则化模块（根据预测不确定性自适应调整损失权重），并引入分组图像-文本匹配损失以改善弱正样本对间的表示空间。
contributions: 首次显式利用弱正样本对的不确定性来优化文本行人搜索。
提出不确定性估计和正则化模块，以及分组匹配损失，有效提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CUHK-PEDES、RSTPReid和ICFG-PEDES三个数据集上，mAP分别提升+3.06%、+3.55%和+6.94%。
limitations: 不确定性估计的准确性可能受限于训练数据质量。
方法可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性感知方法，利用弱正样本对提升文本行人搜索性能。

papers.title: A Mathematical Framework for Temporal Modeling and Counterfactual Policy Simulation of Student Dropout
papers.abstract: This study proposes a temporal modeling framework with a counterfactual policy-simulation layer for student dropout in higher education, using LMS engagement data and administrative withdrawal records. Dropout is operationalized as a time-to-event outcome at the enrollment level; weekly risk is modeled in discrete time via penalized, class-balanced logistic regression over person--period rows. Under a late-event temporal holdout, the model attains row-level AUCs of 0.8350 (train) and 0.8405 (test), with aggregate calibration acceptable but sparsely supported in the highest-risk bins. Ablation analyses indicate performance is sensitive to feature set composition, underscoring the role of temporal engagement signals. A scenario-indexed policy layer produces survival contrasts $ΔS(T)$ under an explicit trigger/schedule contract: positive contrasts are confined to the shock branch ($T_{\rm policy}=18$: 0.0102, 0.0260, 0.0819), while the mechanism-aware branch is negative ($ΔS_{\rm mech}(18)=-0.0078$, $ΔS_{\rm mech}(38)=-0.0134$). A subgroup analysis by gender quantifies scenario-induced survival gaps via bootstrap; contrasts are directionally stable but small. Results are not causally identified; they demonstrate the framework's capacity for internal structural scenario comparison under observational data constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个结合反事实策略模拟的时序建模框架，用于预测和模拟大学生辍学风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 学生辍学是高等教育中的重要问题，早期预警和干预策略的评估需要能够处理时序数据并模拟反事实场景的建模框架。
