By leveraging a novel Hilbert space projection identity, we also prove that the proposed online quantile function estimator (P-FGD) achieves the minimax optimal consistency rate $O(t^{-\frac{2s}{2s+1}})$ where $t$ is the current time and $s$ denotes the smoothness degree of the quantile function. Extensions to mini-batch learning are also established.

analysis.tldr: 提出投影函数梯度下降算法，用于在线非参数加性分位数回归，实现最优收敛率且无需存储历史数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线分位数回归在非参数加性模型中的高效算法缺乏，现有方法计算复杂度高或需存储历史数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在不存储历史数据的情况下，实现非参数加性分位数回归的在线学习并保证最优收敛率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统RKHS方法在在线学习中计算复杂度高，而投影函数梯度下降可避免历史数据存储并保持低复杂度。
analysis.main_method: 提出投影函数梯度下降算法，将函数随机梯度下降扩展到pinball损失，并利用Hilbert空间投影恒等式。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及实验，但理论证明了算法达到极小极大最优收敛率$O(t^{-2s/(2s+1)})$，并扩展到小批量学习。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出在线非参数加性分位数回归的投影梯度下降算法，证明其最优收敛率，且计算复杂度低。
analysis.limitations: 未提供实验验证，仅理论分析；可能对高维或复杂数据适应性需进一步研究。

papers.title: Multi-Agent Decision-Focused Learning via Value-Aware Sequential Communication
papers.abstract: Multi-agent coordination under partial observability requires agents to share complementary private information. While recent methods optimize messages for intermediate objectives (e.g., reconstruction accuracy or mutual information), rather than decision quality, we introduce \textbf{SeqComm-DFL}, unifying the sequential communication with decision-focused learning for task performance. Our approach features \emph{value-aware message generation with sequential Stackelberg conditioning}: messages maximize receiver decision quality and are generated in priority order, with agents conditioning on their predecessors. The \emph{guidance potential} determined by their prosocial ordering. We extend Optimal Model Design to communication-augmented world models with QMIX factorization, enabling efficient end-to-end training via implicit differentiation. We prove information-theoretic bounds showing that communication value scales with coordination gaps and establish $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{T})$ convergence for the bilevel optimization, where $T$ denotes the number of training iterations. On collaborative healthcare and StarCraft Multi-Agent Challenge (SMAC) benchmarks, SeqComm-DFL achieves four to six times higher cumulative rewards and over 13\% win rate improvements, enabling coordination strategies inaccessible under information asymmetry.

analysis.tldr: 提出SeqComm-DFL，通过价值感知顺序通信和决策聚焦学习，提升部分可观测多智能体协调性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法优化中间目标（如重构精度）而非决策质量，导致通信效率低下。
analysis.problem: 部分可观测环境下，智能体需共享互补信息，但现有通信方法未直接优化任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通信价值随协调差距增大而提升，顺序通信中先发智能体对后发者决策有显著影响。
analysis.main_method: 采用顺序Stackelberg条件化生成价值感知消息，结合QMIX分解和隐式微分实现端到端训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 在协作医疗和SMAC基准上，累积奖励提升4-6倍，胜率提高13%以上。
analysis.contributions: 首次统一顺序通信与决策聚焦学习，证明信息论界和双水平优化收敛性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义优先级顺序，可能不适用于动态角色切换场景。

papers.title: Delve into the Applicability of Advanced Optimizers for Multi-Task Learning
papers.abstract: Multi-Task Learning (MTL) is a foundational machine learning problem that has seen extensive development over the past decade. Recently, various optimization-based MTL approaches have been proposed to learn multiple tasks simultaneously by altering the optimization trajectory. Although these methods strive to de-conflict and re-balance tasks, we empirically identify that their effectiveness is often undermined by an overlooked factor when employing advanced optimizers: the instant-derived gradients play only a marginal role in the actual parameter updates. This discrepancy prevents MTL frameworks from fully releasing its power on learning dynamics. Furthermore, we observe that Muon-a recently emerged advanced optimizer-inherently functions as a multi-task learner, which underscores the critical importance of the gradients used for its orthogonalization. To address these issues, we propose APT (Applicability of advanced oPTimizers), a framework featuring a simple adaptive momentum mechanism designed to balance the strengths between advanced optimizers and MTL. Additionally, we introduce a light direction preservation method to facilitate Muon's orthogonalization. Extensive experiments across four mainstream MTL datasets demonstrate that APT consistently augments existing MTL approaches, yielding substantial performance improvements.

analysis.tldr: 发现多任务学习中高级优化器效果受限，因即时梯度对参数更新贡献小，提出APT框架提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有优化器在多任务学习中效果不佳，需探索其适用性并改进。
analysis.problem: 高级优化器中即时梯度对参数更新作用微弱，限制多任务学习动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Muon优化器本身具有多任务学习特性，其正交化依赖的梯度质量至关重要。
analysis.main_method: 提出APT框架，包含自适应动量机制和轻量方向保持方法，平衡优化器与多任务学习。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个主流多任务数据集上验证，APT持续提升现有方法性能。
analysis.contributions: 揭示优化器在多任务学习中的局限性，提出有效改进框架。
analysis.limitations: 未深入分析自适应动量机制的理论保证，可能依赖特定优化器。

papers.title: Predictive Entropy Links Calibration and Paraphrase Sensitivity in Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Medical Vision Language Models VLMs suffer from two failure modes that threaten safe deployment mis calibrated confidence and sensitivity to question rephrasing. We show they share a common cause, proximity to the decision boundary, by benchmarking five uncertainty quantification methods on MedGemma 4BIT across in distribution MIMIC CXR and outof distribution PadChest chest X ray datasets, with cross architecture validation on LLaVA RAD7B. For well calibrated single model methods, predictive entropy from one forward pass predicts which samples will flip under rephrasing AUROC 0.711 on MedGemma, 0.878 on LLaVARAD p 10 4, enabling a single entropy threshold to flag both unreliable and rephrase sensitive predictions. A five member LoRA ensemble fails under the MIMIC PadChest shift 42.9 ECE, 34.1 accuracy, though LLaVA RAD s ensemble does not collapse 69.1. MC Dropout achieves the best calibration ECE 4.3 and selective prediction coverage 21.5 at 5 risk, yet total entropy from a single forward pass outperforms the ensemble for both error detection AUROC 0.743 vs 0.657 and paraphrase screening. Simple methods win.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现医学视觉语言模型的校准误差与释义敏感性共享同一根源——靠近决策边界，单次前向传播的预测熵可同时检测两者。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉语言模型存在校准误差和释义敏感性两种故障模式，威胁安全部署，需探究其共同原因。
analysis.problem: 模型对问题重述敏感且置信度校准不良，缺乏统一检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 两种故障模式均源于样本靠近决策边界，预测熵可有效识别此类样本。
analysis.main_method: 使用单次前向传播的预测熵作为统一指标，检测校准不良和释义翻转样本，并对比MC Dropout、LoRA集成等不确定性量化方法。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MedGemma 4BIT上对MIMIC CXR和PadChest数据集进行基准测试，并在LLaVA-RAD7B上交叉验证，AUROC达0.711-0.878。
analysis.contributions: 揭示校准与释义敏感性的共同机制，提出基于预测熵的简单统一检测方法，证明简单方法优于复杂集成。
analysis.limitations: LoRA集成在分布偏移下性能崩溃，方法仅在特定模型和数据集上验证。

papers.title: Adaptive Candidate Point Thompson Sampling for High-Dimensional Bayesian Optimization
papers.abstract: In Bayesian optimization, Thompson sampling selects the evaluation point by sampling from the posterior distribution over the objective function maximizer. Because this sampling problem is intractable for Gaussian process (GP) surrogates, the posterior distribution is typically restricted to fixed discretizations (i.e., candidate points) that become exponentially sparse as dimensionality increases. While previous works aim to increase candidate point density through scalable GP approximations, our orthogonal approach increases density by adaptively reducing the search space during sampling. Specifically, we introduce Adaptive Candidate Thompson Sampling (ACTS), which generates candidate points in subspaces guided by the gradient of a surrogate model sample. ACTS is a simple drop-in replacement for existing TS methods -- including those that use trust regions or other local approximations -- producing better samples of maxima and improved optimization across synthetic and real-world benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应候选点汤普森采样（ACTS），通过梯度引导子空间生成候选点，解决高维贝叶斯优化中候选点稀疏问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维贝叶斯优化中，汤普森采样因固定离散化导致候选点指数级稀疏，限制了优化性能。
analysis.problem: 现有汤普森采样方法在高维空间中候选点密度不足，无法有效采样后验分布的最大值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定离散化在高维下变得指数级稀疏，而可扩展GP近似虽能增加密度但计算成本高。
analysis.main_method: ACTS在采样过程中，利用代理模型样本的梯度自适应地缩小搜索空间，生成子空间中的候选点。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成和真实基准测试中，ACTS作为现有TS方法的即插即用替代，显著提升优化效果。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种正交于可扩展GP近似的简单方法，通过自适应搜索空间增加候选点密度，兼容信任区域等局部方法。
analysis.limitations: 依赖梯度信息，可能不适用于不可微或噪声极大的代理模型。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Transformers: Conformal Prediction for Language Models
papers.abstract: Transformers have had a profound impact on the field of artificial intelligence, especially on large language models and their variants. However, as was the case with neural networks, their black-box nature limits trust and deployment in high-stakes settings. For models to be genuinely useful and trustworthy in critical applications, they must provide more than just predictions: they must supply users with a clear understanding of the reasoning that underpins their decisions. This article presents an uncertainty quantification framework for transformer-based language models. This framework, called CONFIDE (CONformal prediction for FIne-tuned DEep language models), applies conformal prediction to the internal embeddings of encoder-only architectures, like BERT and RoBERTa, while enabling hyperparameter tuning. CONFIDE uses either [CLS] token embeddings or flattened hidden states to construct class-conditional nonconformity scores, enabling statistically valid prediction sets with instance-level explanations. Empirically, CONFIDE improves test accuracy by up to 4.09% on BERT-tiny and achieves greater correct efficiency (i.e., the expected size of the prediction set conditioned on it containing the true label) compared to prior methods, including NM2 and VanillaNN. We show that early and intermediate transformer layers often yield better-calibrated and more semantically meaningful representations for conformal prediction. In resource-constrained models and high-stakes tasks with ambiguous labels, CONFIDE offers robustness and interpretability where softmax-based uncertainty fails. We position CONFIDE as a framework for practical diagnostic and efficiency/robustness improvement over prior conformal baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出CONFIDE框架，将共形预测应用于Transformer内部嵌入，为语言模型提供统计有效的预测集和实例级解释。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer模型的黑箱特性限制了其在高风险场景中的信任度和部署，需要提供预测之外的不确定性量化。
analysis.problem: 现有语言模型缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，且softmax-based方法在高风险任务中表现不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期和中间Transformer层能产生更校准且语义更丰富的表示，适合共形预测。
analysis.main_method: CONFIDE框架利用[CLS]标记嵌入或展平隐藏状态构建类条件非一致性分数，实现统计有效的预测集。
analysis.key_experiments: 在BERT-tiny上测试准确率提升4.09%，在正确效率上优于NM2和VanillaNN等方法。
analysis.contributions: 首次将共形预测系统应用于Transformer内部嵌入，支持超参数调优和实例级解释。
analysis.limitations: 仅适用于编码器架构（如BERT/RoBERTa），未扩展到解码器或序列生成模型。

papers.title: A novel hybrid approach for positive-valued DAG learning
papers.abstract: Causal discovery from observational data remains a fundamental challenge in machine learning and statistics, particularly when variables represent inherently positive quantities such as gene expression levels, asset prices, company revenues, or population counts, which often follow multiplicative rather than additive dynamics. We propose the Hybrid Moment-Ratio Scoring (H-MRS) algorithm, a novel method for learning directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) from positive-valued data by combining moment-based scoring with log-scale regression. The key idea is that for positive-valued variables, the moment ratio $\frac{\mathbb{E}[X_j^2]}{\mathbb{E}[(\mathbb{E}[X_j \mid S])^2]}$ provides an effective criterion for causal ordering, where $S$ denotes candidate parent sets. H-MRS integrates log-scale Ridge regression for moment-ratio estimation with a greedy ordering procedure based on raw-scale moment ratios, followed by Elastic Net-based parent selection to recover the final DAG structure. Experiments on synthetic log-linear data demonstrate competitive precision and recall. The proposed method is computationally efficient and naturally respects positivity constraints, making it suitable for applications in genomics and economics. These results suggest that combining log-scale modeling with raw-scale moment ratios provides a practical framework for causal discovery in positive-valued domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合矩比评分算法，利用矩比准则和log尺度回归学习正变量有向无环图，在合成数据上表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 正变量（如基因表达、资产价格）常遵循乘法动力学，现有因果发现方法多假设加法关系，导致模型不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何从正变量观测数据中高效学习有向无环图结构，同时保持对正性约束的尊重。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正变量的矩比（二阶矩与条件期望平方的比值）能有效指示因果顺序，且与log尺度回归结合可提升估计稳定性。
analysis.main_method: 混合矩比评分算法：先用log尺度岭回归估计矩比，再基于原始尺度矩比进行贪心排序，最后用弹性网络选择父节点。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成对数线性数据上测试，与基线方法比较精确率和召回率，验证了方法的竞争性。
analysis.contributions: 首次将矩比准则与log尺度回归结合用于正变量DAG学习，提出计算高效且保持正性约束的混合方法。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了合成数据，真实应用（如基因组学、经济学）的鲁棒性尚未充分评估；矩比准则对非线性依赖的适用性待研究。

papers.title: Using Synthetic Data for Machine Learning-based Childhood Vaccination Prediction in Narok, Kenya
papers.abstract: Background: Limited data utilization in low-resource settings poses a barrier to the vaccine delivery ecosystem, undermining efforts to achieve equitable immunization coverage. In nomadic populations, individuals face an increased risk of missing crucial vaccination doses as children. One such population is the Maasai in Narok County, Kenya, where the absence of high-volume, quality data hampers accurate coverage estimates, impedes efficient resource allocation, and weakens the ability to deliver timely interventions. Additionally, data privacy concerns are heightened in groups with limited sensitive data. Objectives: First, we aim to identify children at risk of missing key vaccines across a large population to provide timely, evidence-based interventions that support increased vaccination coverage. Second, we aim to better protect the privacy of sensitive health data in a vulnerable population. Methods: We digitized 8 years of child vaccination records from the MOH 510 registry (n=6,913) and applied machine learning models (Logistic Regression and XGBoost) to identify children at risk. Additionally, we utilize a novel approach to tabular diffusion-based synthetic data generation (TabSyn) to protect patient privacy within the models. Results: Our findings show that classification techniques can reliably and successfully predict children at risk of missing a vaccine, with recall, precision, and F1-scores exceeding 90% for some vaccines modeled. Additionally, training these models with synthetic data rather than real data, thus preserving the privacy of individuals within the original dataset, does not lead to a loss in predictive performance. Conclusion: These results support the use of synthetic data implementation in health informatics strategies for clinics with limited digital infrastructure, enabling privacy-preserving, scalable forecasting for childhood immunization coverage.

analysis.tldr: 利用合成数据和机器学习预测肯尼亚游牧儿童疫苗接种风险，保护隐私且不降低预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源环境下数据利用不足和隐私问题阻碍了疫苗接种覆盖率的提升，尤其在游牧人群中。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测儿童错过关键疫苗的风险，同时保护敏感健康数据的隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法因数据量少和隐私顾虑难以有效预测，而合成数据可平衡隐私与性能。
analysis.main_method: 数字化8年疫苗接种记录，使用Logistic回归和XGBoost模型，并采用TabSyn生成表格扩散合成数据。
analysis.key_experiments: 在6913名儿童数据上测试，部分疫苗的召回率、精确率和F1分数超过90%，合成数据训练未导致性能下降。
analysis.contributions: 展示了合成数据在低资源环境下保护隐私的同时保持预测性能，支持可扩展的免疫覆盖预测。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定地区（Narok）和有限疫苗，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Bridging SFT and RL: Dynamic Policy Optimization for Robust Reasoning
papers.abstract: Post-training paradigms for Large Language Models (LLMs), primarily Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), face a fundamental dilemma: SFT provides stability (low variance) but suffers from high fitting bias, while RL enables exploration (low bias) but grapples with high gradient variance. Existing unified optimization strategies often employ naive loss weighting, overlooking the statistical conflict between these distinct gradient signals. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of this bias-variance trade-off and propose \textbf{DYPO} (Dynamic Policy Optimization), a unified framework designed to structurally mitigate this conflict. DYPO integrates three core components: (1) a \textit{Group Alignment Loss (GAL)} that leverages intrinsic group dynamics to significantly reduce RL gradient variance; (2) a \textit{Multi-Teacher Distillation} mechanism that corrects SFT fitting bias via diverse reasoning paths; and (3) a \textit{Dynamic Exploitation-Exploration Gating} mechanism that adaptively arbitrates between stable SFT and exploratory RL based on reward feedback. Theoretical analysis confirms that DYPO linearly reduces fitting bias and minimizes overall variance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DYPO significantly outperforms traditional sequential pipelines, achieving an average improvement of 4.8\% on complex reasoning benchmarks and 13.3\% on out-of-distribution tasks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Tocci-Zhu/DYPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出DYPO框架，通过动态策略优化统一SFT和RL，解决偏差-方差权衡，在推理任务上平均提升4.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SFT和RL后训练范式存在根本性矛盾：SFT稳定但偏差高，RL探索性强但方差大，缺乏有效的统一优化策略。
analysis.problem: 如何结构性地缓解SFT和RL梯度信号之间的统计冲突，实现偏差-方差的最优权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT和RL的梯度信号存在统计冲突，简单加权融合无法解决偏差-方差困境，导致模型在稳定性和探索性之间难以平衡。
analysis.main_method: 提出DYPO框架，包含组对齐损失（GAL）降低RL方差、多教师蒸馏纠正SFT偏差、动态利用-探索门控机制自适应协调SFT和RL。
analysis.key_experiments: 在复杂推理基准上平均提升4.8%，在分布外任务上提升13.3%，代码已开源。
analysis.contributions: 首次从理论上分析SFT和RL的偏差-方差权衡，提出结构化解冲突的统一框架，显著提升推理鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论大规模模型（如100B+）上的计算开销，以及门控机制对奖励信号质量的敏感性。

papers.title: GRASP: Grounded CoT Reasoning with Dual-Stage Optimization for Multimodal Sarcasm Target Identification
papers.abstract: Moving beyond the traditional binary classification paradigm of Multimodal Sarcasm Detection, Multimodal Sarcasm Target Identification (MSTI) presents a more formidable challenge, requiring precise localization of fine-grained targets such as textual phrases and visual regions. Existing approaches predominantly rely on implicit cross-modal alignment, offering limited interpretability and suboptimal fine-grained localization. To address these limitations, we propose GRASP, Grounded Chain-of-Thought ReAsoning with Dual-Stage Optimization for Multimodal Sarcasm Prediction and Target Identification, a framework that integrates visual grounding with explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to move beyond black-box MSTI. Specifically, we curate MSTI-MAX, a refined dataset that mitigates class imbalance and enriches multimodal sarcasm cues. We introduce Grounded CoT reasoning, which explicitly anchors sarcasm-related visual regions within the reasoning trajectory and prompts the model to articulate rationales before predicting the final classification labels and sarcasm targets. Furthermore, we employ a dual-stage outcome-supervised joint optimization strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning with a coordinate-aware weighted loss, followed by Fine-Grained Target Policy Optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GRASP outperforms existing baselines in fine-grained sarcasm target identification across modalities, and an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation quantitatively measures the quality of internal reasoning chains. Our dataset and source code will be released on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出GRASP框架，结合视觉定位与链式思维推理，通过双阶段优化实现多模态讽刺目标识别，显著提升细粒度定位与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测仅关注二元分类，缺乏对细粒度目标（如文本短语和视觉区域）的精准定位与可解释性。
analysis.problem: 多模态讽刺目标识别（MSTI）需要精确定位跨模态的讽刺目标，但现有方法依赖隐式对齐，导致定位不精确且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 讽刺表达常涉及文本与视觉元素间的微妙冲突，隐式对齐难以捕捉这种跨模态关联，而显式推理可提升定位准确性。
analysis.main_method: 构建MSTI-MAX数据集缓解类别不平衡；提出Grounded CoT推理，在推理轨迹中显式锚定讽刺相关视觉区域；采用双阶段优化（监督微调+细粒度目标策略优化）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MSTI-MAX数据集上对比多个基线，使用LLM-as-a-Judge评估推理链质量，实验显示GRASP在细粒度目标识别上全面领先。
analysis.contributions: 首次将视觉定位与链式思维推理结合用于MSTI；提出双阶段优化策略；构建高质量数据集MSTI-MAX。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义视觉区域锚定，可能遗漏非显式讽刺线索；双阶段优化计算成本较高。

papers.title: Cross-Lingual Attention Distillation with Personality-Informed Generative Augmentation for Multilingual Personality Recognition
papers.abstract: While significant work has been done on personality recognition, the lack of multilingual datasets remains an unresolved challenge. To address this, we propose ADAM (Cross-Lingual (A)ttention (D)istillation with Personality-Guided Generative (A)ugmentation for (M)ultilingual Personality Recognition), a state-of-the-art approach designed to advance multilingual personality recognition. Our approach leverages an existing English-language personality dataset as the primary source and employs a large language model (LLM) for translationbased augmentation, enhanced by Personality-Informed Generative Augmentation (PIGA), to generate high-quality training data in multiple languages, including Japanese, Chinese, Malay, and French. We provide a thorough analysis to justify the effectiveness of these augmentation techniques. Building on these advancements, ADAM integrates Cross-Lingual Attention Distillation (CLAD) to train a model capable of understanding and recognizing personality traits across languages, bridging linguistic and cultural gaps in personality analysis. This research presents a thorough evaluation of the proposed augmentation method, incorporating an ablation study on recognition performance to ensure fair comparisons and robust validation. Overall, with PIGA augmentation, the findings demonstrate that CLAD significantly outperforms the standard BCE across all languages and personality traits, achieving notable improvements in average BA scores - 0.6332 (+0.0573) on the Essays dataset and 0.7448 (+0.0968) on the Kaggle dataset. The CLAD-trained model also demonstrated strong generalizability and achieved benchmark performance comparable to current leading encoder models. The model weight, dataset, and algorithm repository are available at https://research.jingjietan.com/?q=ADAM.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADAM方法，通过人格引导的生成增强和跨语言注意力蒸馏，实现多语言人格识别，显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言人格识别数据集匮乏，现有方法主要依赖英语数据，难以推广到其他语言。
analysis.problem: 缺乏多语言人格识别数据集，现有模型在跨语言场景下性能不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接翻译增强数据质量不足，人格信息在翻译中可能丢失，需结合人格特征指导生成。
analysis.main_method: 利用LLM进行翻译增强，结合人格引导生成增强（PIGA）生成多语言数据，并采用跨语言注意力蒸馏（CLAD）训练模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Essays和Kaggle数据集上评估，CLAD相比标准BCE在平均BA分数上分别提升0.0573和0.0968。
analysis.contributions: 提出PIGA增强方法和CLAD训练框架，实现多语言人格识别，性能达到领先水平。
analysis.limitations: 依赖LLM生成质量，可能受限于源语言数据规模；未深入探讨文化差异对人格识别的影响。

papers.title: How does Chain of Thought decompose complex tasks?
papers.abstract: Many language tasks can be modeled as classification problems where a large language model (LLM) is given a prompt and selects one among many possible answers. We show that the classification error in such problems scales as a power law in the number of classes. This has a dramatic consequence: the prediction error can be reduced substantially by splitting the overall task into a sequence of smaller classification problems, each with the same number of classes ("degree"). This tree-structured decomposition models chain-of-thought (CoT). It has been observed that CoT-based predictors perform better when they "think'", i.e., when they develop a deeper tree, thus decomposing the problem into a larger number of steps. We identify a critical threshold for the degree, below which thinking is detrimental, and above which there exists an optimal depth that minimizes the error. It is impossible to surpass this minimal error by increasing the depth of thinking.

analysis.tldr: 论文证明分类错误随类别数呈幂律增长，链式思维通过将任务分解为小分类问题降低错误，并发现存在最优思考深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 解释链式思维（CoT）为何能提升大语言模型在复杂任务上的表现，并量化其效果。
analysis.problem: 大语言模型在分类任务中错误率随类别数增加而急剧上升，如何通过任务分解有效降低错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分类错误与类别数呈幂律关系，将任务分解为多个小分类问题可显著减少错误；CoT的“思考”深度存在临界阈值，低于该阈值有害，高于则有最优深度。
analysis.main_method: 将CoT建模为树状分解结构，每个节点处理固定类别数（度）的子问题，通过分析错误幂律缩放推导最优深度。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论分析分类错误幂律缩放，并推导出度阈值和最优深度公式，未提及具体实验数据集。
analysis.contributions: 首次从理论上证明CoT通过任务分解降低错误，并揭示度阈值和最优深度的存在。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析基于分类错误幂律假设，未在真实LLM任务中验证；未考虑分解步骤间的依赖和计算成本。

papers.title: Finite-Sample Analysis of Nonlinear Independent Component Analysis:Sample Complexity and Identifiability Bounds
papers.abstract: Independent Component Analysis (ICA) is a fundamental unsupervised learning technique foruncovering latent structure in data by separating mixed signals into their independent sources. While substantial progress has been made in establishing asymptotic identifiability guarantees for nonlinear ICA, the finite-sample statistical properties of learning algorithms remain poorly understood. This gap poses significant challenges for practitioners who must determine appropriate sample sizes for reliable source recovery. This paper presents a comprehensive finite-sample analysis of nonlinear ICA with neural network encoders, providing the first complete characterization with matching upper and lower bounds. Our theoretical development introduces three key technical contributions. First, we establish a direct relationship between excess risk and identification error that bypasses parameter-space arguments, thereby avoiding the rate degradation that would otherwise yield suboptimal scaling. Second, we prove matching information-theoretic lower bounds that confirm the optimality of our sample complexity results. Third, we extend our analysis to practical SGD optimization, showing that the same sample efficiency can be achieved with finite-iteration gradient descent under standard landscape assumptions. We validate our theoretical predictions through carefully designed simulation experiments. This gap points toward valuable future research on finite-sample behavior of neural network training and highlights the importance of our validated scaling laws for dimension and diversity.

analysis.tldr: 首次为非线性ICA提供完整有限样本分析，建立匹配上下界，证明样本复杂度最优性。
analysis.research_motivation: 非线性ICA的渐近可辨识性已有进展，但有限样本统计性质未知，阻碍实践者确定合适样本量。
analysis.problem: 缺乏非线性ICA学习算法的有限样本复杂度与可辨识性边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参数空间论证会导致率退化，而直接建立超额风险与辨识误差的关系可避免次优缩放。
analysis.main_method: 提出三项技术贡献：直接关联超额风险与辨识误差、证明信息论下界、扩展至SGD优化分析。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过精心设计的仿真实验验证理论预测。
analysis.contributions: 首次完整刻画非线性ICA的有限样本复杂度，提供匹配上下界，并扩展至实际SGD训练。
analysis.limitations: 分析基于标准景观假设，可能不覆盖所有实际训练场景。

papers.title: Discrete Meanflow Training Curriculum
papers.abstract: Flow-based image generative models exhibit stable training and produce high quality samples when using multi-step sampling procedures. One-step generative models can produce high quality image samples but can be difficult to optimize as they often exhibit unstable training dynamics. Meanflow models exhibit excellent few-step sampling performance and tantalizing one-step sampling performance. Notably, MeanFlow models that achieve this have required extremely large training budgets. We significantly decrease the amount of computation and data budget it takes to train Meanflow models by noting and exploiting a particular discretization of the Meanflow objective that yields a consistency property which we formulate into a ``Discrete Meanflow'' (DMF) Training Curriculum. Initialized with a pretrained Flow Model, DMF curriculum reaches one-step FID 3.36 on CIFAR-10 in only 2000 epochs. We anticipate that faster training curriculums of Meanflow models, specifically those fine-tuned from existing Flow Models, drives efficient training methods of future one-step examples.

analysis.tldr: 提出离散平均流训练课程，显著降低平均流模型的训练成本，在CIFAR-10上仅用2000步达到FID 3.36。
analysis.research_motivation: 平均流模型在少步采样中表现优异，但训练成本极高，需要大量计算和数据预算。
analysis.problem: 如何降低平均流模型的训练成本，同时保持其一阶采样性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 平均流目标函数的离散化可产生一致性属性，利用此属性可设计更高效的训练课程。
analysis.main_method: 提出离散平均流训练课程，基于预训练流模型初始化，利用离散化的一致性属性逐步优化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIFAR-10上，DMF课程仅用2000步达到一阶FID 3.36，显著减少训练预算。
analysis.contributions: 提出DMF训练课程，大幅降低平均流模型训练成本，为未来一阶生成模型提供高效训练方法。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预训练流模型初始化，可能限制通用性；实验仅在CIFAR-10上验证，未在更大数据集测试。

papers.title: Spectral Geometry of LoRA Adapters Encodes Training Objective and Predicts Harmful Compliance
papers.abstract: We study whether low-rank spectral summaries of LoRA weight deltas can identify which fine-tuning objective was applied to a language model, and whether that geometric signal predicts downstream behavioral harm. In a pre-registered experiment on \texttt{Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct}, we manufacture 38 LoRA adapters across four categories: healthy SFT baselines, DPO on inverted harmlessness preferences, DPO on inverted helpfulness preferences, and activation-steering-derived adapters, and extract per-layer spectral features (norms, stable rank, singular-value entropy, effective rank, and singular-vector cosine alignment to a healthy centroid). Within a single training method (DPO), a logistic regression classifier achieves AUC~1.00 on binary drift detection, all six pairwise objective comparisons, and near-perfect ordinal severity ranking ($\rho \geq 0.956$). Principal component analysis on flattened weight deltas reveals that training objective is PC1 (AUC~1.00 for objective separation), orthogonal to training duration on PC2. Query-projection weights detect that drift occurred; value-projection weights identify which objective. Cross-method generalization fails completely: a DPO-trained classifier assigns every steering adapter a lower drift score than every DPO adapter (AUC~0.00). In a behavioral evaluation phase, DPO-inverted-harmlessness adapters show elevated harmful compliance on HEx-PHI prompts (mean ASR 0.266 vs.\ healthy 0.112, $\Delta = +0.154$), with near-perfect dose--response ($\rho = 0.986$). The geometry-to-behavior rank correlation is $\rho = 0.72$ across 24 non-steered adapters. These results establish that within a controlled manufacturing regime, LoRA weight-space geometry carries objective identity, intensity ordering, and a coarse link to harmful compliance, and that cross-method monitoring requires per-method calibration.

analysis.tldr: LoRA适配器的谱几何编码了微调目标，并能预测有害合规行为，但跨方法泛化失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索LoRA权重空间的几何特征是否能够识别微调目标并预测下游行为危害。
analysis.problem: 如何通过LoRA适配器的谱几何特征检测微调目标（如有害对齐）及其与有害合规行为的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA权重差异的谱特征（如奇异值熵、有效秩）在相同训练方法内能完美区分目标，但跨方法（如DPO vs. 激活引导）完全失效。
analysis.main_method: 提取每层LoRA的谱特征（范数、稳定秩、奇异值熵等），使用逻辑回归分类器进行目标检测，并通过主成分分析降维。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct上制造38个LoRA适配器（含健康SFT、DPO反转无害偏好等），测试目标检测（AUC=1.00）和有害合规行为（ASR从0.112升至0.266）。
analysis.contributions: 证明LoRA权重空间几何可编码目标身份、强度顺序，并与有害合规行为粗粒度关联；揭示跨方法监控需逐方法校准。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一模型和人工制造适配器，跨方法泛化失败，实际场景中可能更复杂。

papers.title: Hierarchical Kernel Transformer: Multi-Scale Attention with an Information-Theoretic Approximation Analysis
papers.abstract: The Hierarchical Kernel Transformer (HKT) is a multi-scale attention mechanism that processes sequences at L resolution levels via trainable causal downsampling, combining level-specific score matrices through learned convex weights. The total computational cost is bounded by 4/3 times that of standard attention, reaching 1.3125x for L = 3. Four theoretical results are established. (i) The hierarchical score matrix defines a positive semidefinite kernel under a sufficient condition on the symmetrised bilinear form (Proposition 3.1). (ii) The asymmetric score matrix decomposes uniquely into a symmetric part controlling reciprocal attention and an antisymmetric part controlling directional attention; HKT provides L independent such pairs across scales, one per resolution level (Propositions 3.5-3.6). (iii) The approximation error decomposes into three interpretable components with an explicit non-Gaussian correction and a geometric decay bound in L (Theorem 4.3, Proposition 4.4). (iv) HKT strictly subsumes single-head standard attention and causal convolution (Proposition 3.4). Experiments over 3 random seeds show consistent gains over retrained standard attention baselines: +4.77pp on synthetic ListOps (55.10+-0.29% vs 50.33+-0.12%, T = 512), +1.44pp on sequential CIFAR-10 (35.45+-0.09% vs 34.01+-0.19%, T = 1,024), and +7.47pp on IMDB character-level sentiment (70.19+-0.57% vs 62.72+-0.40%, T = 1,024), all at 1.31x overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出层级核Transformer（HKT），通过可训练因果下采样实现多尺度注意力，计算开销仅为标准注意力的1.31倍，在多个任务上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Transformer的注意力机制缺乏多尺度建模能力，且计算复杂度高，需要更高效的层级化注意力方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算成本的前提下，引入多尺度注意力机制以捕捉序列中的不同粒度特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准注意力矩阵可分解为对称和反对称部分，分别控制互惠注意力和方向注意力；HKT在不同分辨率下独立学习这些结构。
analysis.main_method: 通过可训练的因果下采样构建L个分辨率层级，每个层级生成独立的注意力分数矩阵，并用可学习凸权重组合，总计算复杂度为O(4/3 N²)。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ListOps（+4.77pp）、序列CIFAR-10（+1.44pp）和IMDB情感分类（+7.47pp）上验证，均优于重训练的标准注意力基线，开销仅1.31倍。
analysis.contributions: 提出HKT架构，理论证明了其核正定性、分解性质、误差界及对标准注意力的包含关系，实验验证了有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于3个随机种子实验，统计显著性有限；未在更大规模或更复杂任务（如语言建模）上验证。
